H842.definition: or אֲשֵׁירָה; from אָשַׁר; happy; Asherah (or Astarte) a Phoenician goddess; also an image of the same.

H843.definition: patronymic from אָשֵׁר; an Asherite (collectively) or descendant of Asher.

H844.definition: an orthographical variation for אֲשַׂרְאֵל; Asriel, the name of two Israelites.

H845.definition: patronymic from אַשְׂרִיאֵל; an Asrielite (collectively) or descendant of Asriel.

H846.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to אָשַׁר; a wall (from its uprightness).

H847.definition: or אֶשְׁתָּאוֹל; probably from שָׁאַל; intreaty; Eshtaol, a place in Palestine.

H848.definition: patrial from אֶשְׁתָּאֹל; an Eshtaolite (collectively) or inhabitant of Eshtaol.

H849.definition: (Aramaic) from שְׁדַר (in a bad sense); rebellion.

H850.definition: probably from the same as שׁוּנִי; restful; Eshton, an Israelite.

H851.definition: or אֶשְׁתְּמוֹעַ; or אֶשְׁתְּמֹה; from שָׁמַע (in the sense of obedience); Eshtemoa or Eshtemoh, a place in Palestine.

H853.definition: apparent contracted from אוֹת in the demonstrative sense of entity; properly, self (but generally used to point out more definitely the object of a verb or preposition, even or namely).

H854.definition: probably from אָנָה; properly, nearness (used only as a preposition or an adverb), near; hence, generally, with, by, at, among, etc..
H854.kjv: against, among, before, by, for, from, in(-to), (out) of, with. Often with another prepositional prefix.

H855.definition: of uncertain derivation; a hoe or other digging implement.

H856.definition: from אֵת and בַּעַל; with Baal; Ethbaal, a Phoenician king.

H857.definition: or אָתָא; a primitive root (collateral to אוּת contraction); to arrive.

H859.definition: or (shortened); אַתָּ; or אַת; feminine (irregular) sometimes אַתִּי; plural masculine אַתֶּם; feminine אַתֶּן; or אַתֵּנָהlemma אתֵּנָה missing vowel, corrected to אַתֵּנָה; or אַתֵּנָּה; a primitive pronoun of the second person; thou and thee, or (plural) ye and you.

H860.definition: probably from the same as אֵיתָן (in the sense of patience); a female donkey (from its docility).

H861.definition: (Aramaic) probably from the corresponding to אֵשׁ; probably a fire-place, i.e. furnace.

H862.definition: or אַתִּיק; from נָתַק in the sense of decreasing; a ledge or offset in abuilding.

H863.definition: or אִיתַי; from אֵת; near; Ittai or Ithai, the name of a Gittite and of an Israelite.

H864.definition: of Egyptian derivation; Etham, a place in the Desert.

H865.definition: or אִתְמוֹל; or אֶתְמוּל; probably from אֵת or אֵת and מוּל; heretofore; definitely yesterday.
H865.kjv: [phrase] before (that) time, [phrase] heretofore, of late (old), [phrase] times past, yester(day).

H866.definition: from תָּנָה; a present (as the price of harlotry).

H867.definition: perhaps from אֶתְנָה; munificence; Ethni, an Israelite.

H868.definition: the same as אֶתְנָה; a gift (as the price of harlotry or idolatry).

H869.definition: the same as אֶתְנַן in the sense of אֶתְנִי; Ethnan, an Israelite.

H870.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of אֲתָרִים; a place; (adverb) after.

H871.definition: plural from an unused root (probably meaning to step); places; Atharim, a place near Palestine.

H872.definition: from בּוֹא; an entrance to a building.

H874.definition: a primitive root; to dig; by analogy, to engrave; figuratively, to explain.

H875.definition: from בָּאַר; a pit; especially a well.

H876.definition: the same as בְּאֵר; Beer, a place in the Desert, also one in Palestine.

H878.definition: from בְּאֵר; a well; Beera, an Israelite.

H879.definition: from בְּאֵר and the plural of אֵל; well of heroes; Beer-Elim, a place in the Desert.

H880.definition: the same as בְּאֵרָא; Beerah, an Israelite.

H881.definition: feminine plural of בְּאֵר; wells; Beeroth, a place in Palestine.

H882.definition: from בְּאֵר; fountained; Beeri, the name of a Hittite and of an Israelite.

H883.definition: from בְּאֵר and חַי (with prefix) and רֹאֶה; well of a living (One) my Seer; Beer-Lachai-Roi, a place in the Desert.

H884.definition: from בְּאֵר and שֶׁבַע (in the sense of שָׁבַע); well of an oath; Beer-Sheba, a place in Palestine.

H885.definition: xlit Bᵉêrôth corrected to Bᵉʼêrôth; from the feminine plural of בְּאֵר, and the plural contraction of בֵּן, and יַעֲקָן; wells of (the) sons of Jaakan; Beeroth-Bene-Jaakan, a place in the Desert.
H885.kjv: Beeroth of the children of Jaakan.

H886.definition: patrial from בְּאֵרוֹת; a Beerothite or inhabitant of Beeroth.

H887.definition: a primitive root; to smell bad; figuratively, to be offensive morally.
H887.kjv: (make to) be abhorred (had in abomination, loathsome, odious), (cause a, make to) stink(-ing savour), [idiom] utterly.

H890.definition: feminine of בְּאֹשׁ; stink-weed or any other noxious or useless plant.

H892.definition: feminine active participle of an unused root meaning to hollow out; something hollowed (as a gate), i.e. pupil of the eye.

H893.definition: probably of foreign origin; Bebai, an Israelite.

H894.definition: from בָּלַל; confusion; Babel (i.e. Babylon), including Babylonia and the Babylonian empire.

H898.definition: a primitive root; to cover (with a garment); figuratively, to act covertly; by implication, to pillage.
H898.kjv: deal deceitfully (treacherously, unfaithfully), offend, transgress(-or), (depart), treacherous (dealer, -ly, man), unfaithful(-ly, man), [idiom] very.

H899.definition: from בָּגַד; a covering, i.e. clothing; also treachery or pillage.
H899.kjv: apparel, cloth(-es, ing), garment, lap, rag, raiment, robe, [idiom] very (treacherously), vesture, wardrobe.

H900.definition: feminine plural active participle of בָּגַד; treacheries.

H902.definition: probably of foreign origin; Bigvai, an Israelite.

H903.definition: of Persian derivation; Bigtha, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H904.definition: or בִּגְתָנָא; of similar derivation to בִּגְתָא; Bigthan or Bigthana, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H905.definition: from בָּדַד; properly, separation; by implication, a part of the body, branch of atree, bar forcarrying; figuratively, chief of a city; especially (with prepositional prefix) as an adverb, apart, only, besides.
H905.kjv: alone, apart, bar, besides, branch, by self, of each alike, except, only, part, staff, strength.

H906.definition: perhaps from בָּדַד (in the sense of divided fibres); flaxen thread or yarn; hence, a linen garment.

H907.definition: from בָּדָא; a brag or lie; also a liar.

H909.definition: a primitive root; to divide, i.e. (reflex.) be solitary.

H911.definition: from בָּדַד; separation; Bedad, an Edomite.

H912.definition: probably a shortened form עֹבַדְיָה; servant of Jehovah; Bedejah, an Israelite.

H913.definition: from בָּדַל; alloy (because removed by smelting); by analogy, tin.

H914.definition: a primitive root; to divide (in variation senses literally or figuratively, separate, distinguish, differ, select, etc.).
H914.kjv: (make, put) difference, divide (asunder), (make) separate (self, -ation), sever (out), [idiom] utterly.

H916.definition: probably from בָּדַל; something in pieces, i.e. bdellium, a (fragrant) gum (perhaps amber); others a pearl.

H917.definition: probably shortened for עַבְדוֹן; servile; Bedan, the name of two Israelites.

H918.definition: a primitive root; to gap open; used only as a denominative from בֶּדֶק; to mend a breach.

H919.definition: from בָּדַק; a gap or leak (in a building or a ship).

H920.definition: probably from דָּקַר with a prepositional prefix; by stabbing, i.e. assassin; Bidkar, an Israelite.

H921.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding (by transposition) to פָּרַד; to scatter.

H922.definition: from an unused root (meaning to be empty); a vacuity, i.e. (superficially) an undistinguishable ruin.

H923.definition: from an unused root (probably meaning to glisten); white marble or perhaps alabaster.

H924.definition: (Aramaic) from בְּהַל; a hurry; only adverb, hastily.

H925.definition: from an unused root (meaning to be bright); shining.

H926.definition: a primitive root; to tremble inwardly (or palpitate), i.e. (figuratively) be (causative, make) (suddenly) alarmed or agitated; by implication to hasten anxiously.
H926.kjv: be (make) affrighted (afraid, amazed, dismayed, rash), (be, get, make) haste(-n, -y, -ily), (give) speedy(-ily), thrust out, trouble, vex.

H927.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to בָּהַל; to terrify, hasten.

H929.definition: from an unused root (probably meaning to be mute); properly, a dumb beast; especially any large quadruped or animal (often collective).

H930.definition: in form a plural or בְּהֵמָה, but really a singular of Egyptian derivation; a water-ox, i.e. the hippopotamus or Nile-horse.

H931.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to be thick; the thumb of the hand or great toe of the foot.

H932.definition: an orthographical variation of בֹּהֶן; thumb, Bohan, an Israelite.

H933.definition: from an unused root meaning to be pale; white scurf.

H934.definition: feminine active participle of the same as בָּהִיר; a whitish spot on the skin.

H935.definition: a primitive root; to go or come (in a wide variety of applications).
H935.kjv: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upon, to pass), depart, [idiom] doubtless again, [phrase] eat, [phrase] employ, (cause to) enter (in, into, -tering, -trance, -try), be fallen, fetch, [phrase] follow, get, give, go (down, in, to war), grant, [phrase] have, [idiom] indeed, (in-) vade, lead, lift (up), mention, pull in, put, resort, run (down), send, set, [idiom] (well) stricken (in age), [idiom] surely, take (in), way.

H938.definition: the same as בּוּז; Buz, the name of a son of Nahor, and of an Israelite.

H939.definition: feminine passive participle of בּוּז; something scorned; an object of contempt.

H940.definition: patronymic from בּוּז; a Buzite or descendant of Buz.

H941.definition: the same as בּוּזִי; Buzi, an Israelite.

H942.definition: probably of Persian origin; Bavvai, an Israelite.

H943.definition: a primitive root; to involve (literally or figuratively).

H944.definition: for יְבוּל; produce (of the earth, etc.).

H945.definition: the same as בּוּל (in the sense of rain); Bul, the eighth Hebrew month.

H946.definition: from בִּין; discretion; Bunah, an Israelite.

H947.definition: a primitive root; to trample (literally or figuratively).

H948.definition: from an unused root (of the same form) meaning to bleach, i.e. (intransitive) be white; probably cotton (of some sort).

H949.definition: from the same as בּוּץ; shining; Botsets, a rock near Michmash.

H950.definition: feminine passive participle of an unused root (meaning to be hollow); emptiness (as adjective).

H951.definition: lemma בּוֹקִר second vowel, corrected to בּוֹקֵר; xlit bôwkêr corrected to bôwqêr; properly, active participle from בָּקַר as denominative from בָּקָר; a cattle-tender.

H952.definition: a primitive root; to bore, i.e. (figuratively) examine.

H953.definition: from בּוּר (in the sense of בֹּאר); a pit hole (especially one used as a cistern or a prison).

H954.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pale, i.e. by implication to be ashamed; also (by implication) to be disappointed or delayed.
H954.kjv: (be, make, bring to, cause, put to, with, a-) shamed(-d), be (put to) confounded(-fusion), become dry, delay, be long.

H955.definition: feminine participle passive of בּוּשׁ; shame.

H956.definition: (Aramaic) apparent denominative from בַּיִת; to lodge over night.

H958.definition: a primitive root; probably to cleave.

H959.kjv: despise, disdain, contemn(-ptible), [phrase] think to scorn, vile person.

H962.kjv: catch, gather, (take) for a prey, rob(-ber), spoil, take (away, spoil), [idiom] utterly.

H964.definition: from בָּזָה and יָהּ; contempts of Jah; Bizjothjah, a place in Palestine.

H965.definition: from an unused root meaning to lighten; a flash of lightning.

H966.definition: from בָּזָק; lightning; Bezek, a place in Palestine.

H968.definition: of Persian origin; Biztha, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H969.definition: xlit bâchôwnʼ corrected to bâchôwn; from בָּחַן; an assayer or metals.

H970.definition: or בָּחֻר; participle passive of בָּחַר; properly, selected, i.e. a youth (often collective).

H971.definition: another form of בַּחַן; a watch-tower of besiegers.

H973.kjv: abhor, get hastily (from the margin for בָּהַל).

H974.definition: a primitive root; to test (especially metals); generally and figuratively, to investigate.

H975.definition: from בָּחַן (in the sense of keeping a look-out); a watch-tower.

H977.definition: a primitive root; properly, to try, i.e. (by implication) select.
H977.kjv: acceptable, appoint, choose (choice), excellent, join, be rather, require.

H978.definition: patrial from בַּחֻרִים (by transposition); a Bacharumite or inhabitant of Bachurim.

H979.definition: or בְּחוּרוֹת; feminine plural of בָּחוּר; also (masculine plural) בְּחֻרִים; youth (collectively and abstractly).

H980.definition: or בַּחוּרִים; masculine plural of בָּחוּר; young men; Bachurim, a place in Palestine.

H981.definition: or בָּטָה; a primitive root; to babble; hence, to vociferate angrily.

H982.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as חָסָה); figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure.
H982.kjv: be bold (confident, secure, sure), careless (one, woman), put confidence, (make to) hope, (put, make to) trust.

H983.definition: from בָּטַח; properly, a place of refuge; abstract, safety, both the fact (security) and the feeling (trust); often (adverb with or without preposition) safely.
H983.kjv: assurance, boldly, (without) care(-less), confidence, hope, safe(-ly, -ty), secure, surely.

H984.definition: the same as בֶּטַח; Betach, a place in Syria.

H988.definition: a primitive root; to desist from labor.

H990.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow; the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything.
H990.kjv: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.

H991.definition: the same as בֶּטֶן; Beten. a place in Palestine.

H992.definition: from בֶּטֶן; (only in plural) a pistachio-nut (from its form).

H993.definition: probably plural from בֹּטֶן; hollows; Betonim, a place in Palestine.

H994.definition: perhaps from בָּעָה (in the sense of asking); properly, a request; used only adverbially (always with 'my Lord'); oh that!; with leave, or if it please.

H995.definition: a primitive root; to separate mentally (or distinguish), i.e.(generally) understand.
H995.kjv: attend, consider, be cunning, diligently, direct, discern, eloquent, feel, inform, instruct, have intelligence, know, look well to, mark, perceive, be prudent, regard, (can) skill(-full), teach, think, (cause, make to, get, give, have) understand(-ing), view, (deal) wise(-ly, man).

H996.definition: (sometimes in the plural masculine or feminine); properly, the constructive form of an otherwise unused noun from בִּין; a distinction; but used only as a preposition,; between (repeated before each noun, often with other particles); also as a conjunction, either...or.
H996.kjv: among, asunder, at, between (-twixt...and), [phrase] from (the widest), [idiom] in, out of, whether (it be...or), within.

H1000.definition: from the same as בּוּץ; an egg (from its whiteness).

H1002.definition: of foreign origin; a castle or palace.

H1004.definition: probably from בָּנָה abbreviated; a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.).
H1004.kjv: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phrase] prison, [phrase] steward, [phrase] tablet, temple, web, [phrase] within(-out).

H1006.definition: the same as בַּיִת; Bajith, a place in Palestine.

H1007.definition: from בַּיִת and אָוֶן; house of vanity; Beth-Aven, a place in Palestine.

H1008.definition: from בַּיִת and אֵל; house of God; Beth-El, a place in Palestine.

H1009.definition: from בַּיִת and אֶרֶב and אֵל; house of God's ambush; Beth-Arbel, a place in Palestine.

H1010.definition: from בַּיִת and בַּעַל and מָעוֹן; house of Baal of (the) habitation of (apparently by transposition); or (shorter) בֵּית מְעוֹןlemma בֵּית מעוֹן missing vowel, corrected to בֵּית מְעוֹן; house of habitation of (Baal); Beth-Baal-Meon, a place in Palestine.
H1010.kjv: Beth-baal-meon. Compare בַּעַל מְעוֹן and בְּעֹן.

H1011.definition: xlit Birʻîy corrected to Birʼîy; from בַּיִת and בָּרָא; house of a creative one; Beth-Biri, a place in Palestine.

H1012.definition: probably from בַּיִת and עֲבָרָה; house of (the) ford; Beth-Barah, a place in Palestine.

H1013.definition: from בַּיִת and גָּדֵר; house of (the) wall; Beth-Gader, a place in Palestine.

H1014.definition: from בַּיִת and the passive participle of גְּמוּל; house of (the) weaned; Beth-Gamul, a place East of the Jordan.

H1015.definition: from בַּיִת and the dual of דְּבֵלָה; house of (the) two figcakes; Beth-Diblathajim, a place East of the Jordan.

H1016.definition: from בַּיִת and דָּגוֹן; house of Dagon; Beth-Dagon, the name of two places in Palestine.

H1017.definition: patrial from בֵּית־אֵל with the article interposed; a Beth-elite, or inhabitant of Bethel.

H1018.definition: from בַּיִת and אֵצֶל with the article interposed; house of the side; Beth-ha-Etsel, a place in Palestine.

H1019.definition: from בַּיִת and גִּלְגָּל with the article interposed; house of Gilgal (or rolling); Beth-hag-Gilgal, a place in Palestine.

H1020.definition: from בַּיִת and the plural of יְשִׁימַה with the article interposed; house of the deserts; Beth-ha-Jeshimoth, a town East of the Jordan.

H1021.definition: from בַּיִת and כֶּרֶם with the article interposed; house of the vineyard; Beth-hak-Kerem, a place in Palestine.

H1022.definition: patrial from בֵּית לֶחֶם with the article inserted; a Beth-lechemite, or native of Bethlechem.

H1023.definition: from בַּיִת and מֶרְחָק with the article interposed; house of the breadth; Beth-ham-Merchak, a place in Palestine.

H1024.definition: or (shortened) בֵּית מַרְכָּבוֹת; from בַּיִת and the plural of מֶרְכָּבָה (with or without the article interposed); place of (the) chariots; Beth-ham-Markaboth or Beth-Markaboth, a place in Palestine.

H1025.definition: from בַּיִת and עֵמֶק with the article interposed; house of the valley; Beth-ha-Emek, a place in Palestine.

H1026.definition: from בַּיִת and עֲרָבָה with the article interposed; house of the Desert; Beth-ha-Arabah, a place in Palestine.

H1027.definition: from בַּיִת and רוּם with the article interposed; house of the height; Beth-ha-Ram, a place East of the Jordan.

H1028.definition: probably for בֵּית הָרָם; Beth-ha-Ram, a place East of the Jordan.

H1029.definition: from בַּיִת and שִׁטָּה with the article interposed; house of the acacia; Beth-hash-Shittah, a place in Palestine.

H1030.definition: patrial from בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ with the article inserted; a Beth-shimshite, or inhabitant of Bethshemesh.

H1031.definition: from בַּיִת and the same as חׇגְלָה; house of a partridge; Beth-Choglah, a place in Palestine.

H1032.definition: from בַּיִת and חוֹר; house of hollowness; Beth-Choron, the name of two adjoining places in Palestine.

H1033.definition: from בַּיִת and כַּר; house of pasture; Beth-Car, a place in Palestine.

H1034.definition: from בַּיִת and the plural of לָבִיא; house of lionesses; Beth-Lebaoth, a place in Palestine.

H1035.definition: from בַּיִת and לֶחֶם; house of bread; Beth-Lechem, a place in Palestine.

H1036.definition: from בַּיִת and the feminine of עָפָר (with preposition interposed); house to (i.e. of) dust; Beth-le-Aphrah, a place in Palestine.

H1037.definition: or בֵּית מִלֹּא; from בַּיִת and מִלּוֹא; house of (the) rampart; Beth-Millo, the name of two citadels.

H1038.definition: from בַּיִת and מַעֲכָה; house of Maakah; Beth-Maakah, a place in Palestine.

H1039.definition: from בַּיִת and the feminine of נָמֵר; house of (the) leopard; Beth-Nimrah, a place east of the Jordan.

H1040.definition: from בַּיִת and עֵדֶן; house of pleasure; Beth-Eden, a place in Syria.

H1041.definition: from בַּיִת and עַזְמָוֶת; house of Azmaveth, a place in Palestine.

H1042.definition: from בַּיִת and a plural from עָנָה; house of replies; Beth-Anoth, a place in Palestine.

H1043.definition: an orthographical variation for בֵּית עֲנוֹת; Beth-Anath, a place in Palestine.

H1044.definition: from בַּיִת and a derivative of עָקַד; house of (the) binding (for sheep-shearing); Beth-Eked, a place in Palestine.

H1045.definition: ; from בַּיִת and עַשְׁתָּרוֹת; house of Ashtoreths; Beth-Ashtaroth, a place in Palestine.
H1045.kjv: house of Ashtaroth. Compare בְּעֶשְׁתְּרָה, עַשְׁתָּרוֹת.

H1046.definition: from בַּיִת and פָּלִיט; house of escape; Beth-Palet, a place in Palestine.

H1047.definition: from בַּיִת and פְּעוֹר; house of Peor; Beth-Peor, a place East of the Jordan.

H1048.definition: from בַּיִת and a derivative from פּוּץ; house of dispersion; Beth-Patstsets, a place in Palestine.

H1049.definition: from בַּיִת and צוּר; house of (the) rock; Beth-Tsur, a place in Palestine.

H1050.definition: from בַּיִת and רְחֹב; house of (the) street; Beth-Rechob, a place in Palestine.

H1051.definition: from בַּיִת and רָפָא; house of (the) giant; Beth-Rapha, an Israelite.

H1052.definition: or בֵּית שָׁן; from בַּיִת and שָׁאַן; house of ease; Beth-Shean or Beth-Shan, a place in Palestine.

H1053.definition: from בַּיִת and שֶׁמֶשׁ; house of (the) sun; Beth-Shemesh, a place in Palestine.

H1054.definition: from בַּיִת and תַּפּוּחַ; house of (the) apple; Beth-Tappuach, a place in Palestine.

H1055.definition: probably from בַּיִת; a palace (i.e. large house).

H1056.definition: from בָּכָה, weeping; Baca, a valley in Palestine.

H1057.definition: the same as בָּכָא; the weeping tree (some gum-distilling tree, perhaps the balsam).

H1058.definition: a primitive root; to weep; generally to bemoan.
H1058.kjv: [idiom] at all, bewail, complain, make lamentation, [idiom] more, mourn, [idiom] sore, [idiom] with tears, weep.

H1061.definition: from בָּכַר; the first-fruits of the crop.

H1062.definition: or (short) בְּכֹרָה; feminine of בְּכוֹר; the firstling of man or beast; abstractly primogeniture.

H1063.definition: feminine of בִּכּוּר; the early fig.

H1064.definition: feminine of בְּכוֹרָה; primogeniture; Bekorath, an Israelite.

H1065.definition: from בָּכָה; a weeping; by analogy, a dripping.

H1066.definition: plural active participle of בָּכָה; (with the article) the weepers; Bo-kim, a place in Palestine.

H1067.definition: xlit bekîyrâh corrected to bᵉkîyrâh; feminine from בָּכַר; the eldest daughter.

H1069.definition: a primitive root; properly, to burst the womb, i.e. (causatively) bear or make early fruit (of woman or tree); also (as denominative from בִּכּוּר); to give the birthright.
H1069.kjv: make firstborn, be firstling, bring forth first child (new fruit).

H1070.definition: from בָּכַר (in the sense of youth); a young camel.

H1071.definition: the same as בֶּכֶר; Beker, the name of two Israelites.

H1072.definition: feminine of בֶּכֶר; a young she-camel.

H1073.definition: by orthographical variation for בִּכּוּרָה; a first-ripe fig.

H1074.definition: from בָּכַר; first-born; Bokeru, an Israelite.

H1075.definition: from בָּכַר; youth-ful; Bikri, an Israelite.

H1076.definition: patronymically from בֶכֶר; a Bakrite (collectively) or descendants of Beker.

H1077.definition: from בָּלָה; properly, a failure; by implication nothing; usually (adverb) not at all; also lest.
H1077.kjv: lest, neither, no, none (that...), not (any), nothing.

H1078.definition: by contraction for בַּעַל; Bel, the Baal of the Babylonians.

H1079.definition: (Aramaic) from בְּלָא; properly, anxiety, i.e. (by implication) the heart (as its seat).

H1080.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to בָּלָה (but used only in a mental sense); to afflict.

H1081.definition: from בֵּל and אָדוֹן (contracted); Bel (is his) lord; Baladan, the name of a Babylonian prince.

H1082.definition: a primitive root; to break off or loose (in a favorable or unfavorable sense), i.e. desist (from grief) or invade (with destruction).

H1083.definition: from בָּלַג; desistance; Bilgah, the name of two Israelites.

H1084.definition: from בָּלַג; desistant; Bilgai, an Israelite.

H1085.definition: of uncertain derivation; Bildad, one of Job's friends.

H1086.definition: a primitive root; to fail; by implication to wear out, decay (causatively, consume, spend).
H1086.kjv: consume, enjoy long, become (make, wax) old, spend, waste.

H1088.definition: feminine of בָּלֶה; failure; Balah, a place in Palestine.

H1089.definition: a primitive root (rather by transposition for בָּהַל); to palpitate; hence, (causatively) to terrify.

H1090.definition: from בָּלַהּ; timid; Bilhah, the name of one of Jacob's concubines; also of a place in Palestine.

H1092.definition: from בָּלַהּ; timid; Bilhan, the name of an Edomite and of an Israelite.

H1093.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to בָּלָה; excise (on articles consumed).

H1094.definition: or (fully) בְּלוֹי; from בָּלָה; (only in plural construction) rags.

H1095.definition: of foreign derivation; Belteshatstsar, the Babylonian name of Daniel.

H1097.definition: from בָּלָה; properly, failure, i.e. nothing or destruction; usually (with preposition) without, not yet, because not, as long as, etc..
H1097.kjv: corruption, ig(norantly), for lack of, where no...is, so that no, none, not, un(awares), without.

H1098.definition: from בָּלַל; mixed, i.e. (specifically) feed (for cattle).

H1099.definition: from בְּלִי and מָה; (as indefinitely) nothing whatever.

H1100.definition: from בְּלִי and יַעַל;(often in connection with אִישׁ, אִשָּׁה, בֵּן, etc.); without profit, worthlessness; by extension, destruction, wickedness.

H1101.definition: a primitive root; (also  denominatively from בְּלִיל) to fodder; to overflow (specifically with oil.); by implication, to mix; to fodder.
H1101.kjv: anoint, confound, [idiom] fade, mingle, mix (self), give provender, temper.

H1103.definition: a primitive root; to pinch sycamore figs (a process necessary to ripen them).

H1104.definition: a primitive root; to make away with (specifically by swallowing); generally, to destroy.
H1104.kjv: cover, destroy, devour, eat up, be at end, spend up, swallow down (up).

H1105.definition: from בָּלַע; a gulp; figuratively, destruction.
H1105.kjv: devouring, that which he hath swallowed up.

H1106.definition: the same as בֶּלַע; Bela, the name of a place, also of an Edomite and of two Israelites.

H1107.definition: or בַּלְעֲדֵי; constructive plural from בַּל and עַד, not till, i.e. (as preposition or adverb); except, without, besides.

H1108.definition: patronymically from בֶּלַע; a Belaite (collectively) or descendants of Bela.

H1109.definition: probably from בַּל and עַם; not (of the) people, i.e. foreigner; Bilam, a Mesopotamian prophet; also a place in Palestine.

H1111.definition: from בָּלַק; waster; Balak, a Moabitish king.

H1112.definition: or בֵּלְאשַׁצַּרlemma בֵּלְאשַׁצּר missing vowel, corrected to בֵּלְאשַׁצַּר; of foreign origin (compare בֵּלְטְשַׁאצַּר); Belshatstsar, a Babylonian king.

H1114.definition: of uncertain derivation; Bilshan, an Israelite.

H1115.definition: constructive feminine of בָּלָה (equivalent to בְּלִי); properly, a failure of, i.e. (used only as a negative particle, usually with a prepositional prefix) not, except, without, unless, besides, because not, until, etc..
H1115.kjv: because un(satiable), beside, but, [phrase] continual, except, from, lest, neither, no more, none, not, nothing, save, that no, without.

H1116.definition: from an unused root (meaning to be high); an elevation.

H1117.definition: the same as בָּמָה; Bamah, a place in Palestine.

H1118.definition: probably from מָהַל with prepositional prefix; with pruning; Bimhal, an Israelite.

H1119.definition: prolongation for prepositional prefix; in, with, by, etc..

H1120.definition: plural of בָּמָה; heights; or (fully) בָּמוֹת בַּעַל; from the same and בַּעַל; heights of Baal; Bamoth or Bamoth-Baal, a place East of the Jordan.

H1121.definition: from בָּנָה; a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.).
H1121.kjv: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch, breed, [phrase] (young) bullock, [phrase] (young) calf, [idiom] came up in, child, colt, [idiom] common, [idiom] corn, daughter, [idiom] of first, [phrase] firstborn, foal, [phrase] very fruitful, [phrase] postage, [idiom] in, [phrase] kid, [phrase] lamb, ([phrase]) man, meet, [phrase] mighty, [phrase] nephew, old, ([phrase]) people, [phrase] rebel, [phrase] robber, [idiom] servant born, [idiom] soldier, son, [phrase] spark, [phrase] steward, [phrase] stranger, [idiom] surely, them of, [phrase] tumultuous one, [phrase] valiant(-est), whelp, worthy, young (one), youth.

H1122.definition: the same as בֵּן; Ben, an Israelite.

H1124.definition: (Aramaic) or בְּנָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to בָּנָה; to build.

H1125.definition: from בֵּן and אֲבִימֶלֶךְ; (the) son of Abinadab; Ben-Abinadab, an Israelite.

H1126.definition: from בֵּן and אָוֶן; son of my sorrow; Ben-Oni, the original name of Benjamin.

H1127.definition: from בֵּן and גֶּבֶר; son of (the) hero; Ben-Geber, an Israelite.

H1128.definition: from בֵּן and a derivative of דָּקַר; son of piercing (or of a lance); Ben-Deker, an Israelite.

H1129.definition: a primitive root; to build (literally and figuratively).
H1129.kjv: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

H1130.definition: from בֵּן and הֲדַד; son of Hadad; Ben-Hadad, the name of several Syrian kings.

H1131.definition: from בָּנָה; built up; Binnui, an Israelite.

H1132.definition: from בֵּן and זוֹחֵת; son of Zocheth; Ben-Zocheth, an Israelite.

H1133.definition: from בֵּן and חוּר; son of Chur; Ben-Chur, an Israelite.

H1134.definition: from בֵּן and חַיִל; son of might; Ben-Chail, an Israelite.

H1135.definition: from בֵּן and חָנָן; son of Chanan; Ben-Chanan, an Israelite.

H1136.definition: from בֵּן and חֵסֵד; son of kindness; Ben-Chesed, an Israelite.

H1137.definition: from בָּנָה; built; Bani, the name of five Israelites.

H1138.definition: or (fuller) בּוּנִי; from בָּנָה; built; Bunni or Buni, an Israelite.

H1139.definition: from the plural construction of בֵּן and בָּרָק; sons of lightning, Bene-berak, a place in Palestine.

H1141.definition: or בּנָיָהוּ; (prolonged) from בָּנָה and יָהּ; Jah has built; Benajah, the name of twelve Israelites.

H1142.definition: from the plural of בֵּן and יַעֲקָן; sons of Yaakan; Bene-Jaakan, a place in the Desert.

H1143.definition: dual of בֵּין; a double interval, i.e. the space between two armies.

H1144.definition: from בֵּן and יָמִין; son of (the) right hand; Binjamin, youngest son of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory.

H1145.definition: sometimes (with the article inserted) בֵּן־הַיּמִינִי; with אִישׁ inserted (1 Samuel 9:1) בֶּן־אִישׁ ימִינִי; son of a man of Jemini; or shortened אִישׁ יְמִינִי; (1 Samuel 9:4; Esther 2:5) a man of Jemini, or (1 Samuel 20:1) simply יְמִינִיxlit Yᵉmînîy corrected to Yᵉmîynîy; a Jeminite; (plural) בְּנֵי יְמִינִיxlit Bᵉnîy corrected to Bᵉnêy; patron from בִּנְיָמִין; a Benjaminite, or descendent of Benjamin.

H1148.definition: probably from בֵּן with pron. suff.; our son; Beninu, an Israelite.

H1149.definition: (Aramaic) of uncertain affinity; to be enraged.

H1150.definition: or בִּנְעָה; of uncertain derivation; Bina or Binah, an Israelite.

H1151.definition: from בֵּן and עַם with pronomial suffix; son of my people; Ben-Ammi, a son of Lot.

H1152.definition: from סוֹד and יָהּ with prepositional prefix; in (the) counsel of Jehovah; Besodejah, an Israelite.

H1153.definition: from בּוּס; domineering; Besai, one of the Nethinim.

H1154.definition: from an unused root meaning to be sour; an immature grape.

H1156.definition: (Aramaic) or בְּעָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to בָּעָה; to seek or ask.
H1156.kjv: ask, desire, make (petition), pray, request, seek.

H1157.definition: from עַד with prepositional prefix; in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc..
H1157.kjv: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

H1158.definition: a primitive root; to gush over, i.e. to swell; (figuratively) to desire earnestly; by implication to ask.
H1158.kjv: cause, inquire, seek up, swell out.

H1160.definition: from בָּעַר (in the sense of burning); a lamp; Beor, the name of the father of an Edomitish king; also of that of Balaam.

H1162.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Boaz, the ancestor of David; also the name of a pillar in front of the temple.

H1163.definition: a primitive root; to trample down, i.e. (figuratively) despise.

H1165.definition: from בָּעַר (in the sense of eating); cattle.

H1166.definition: a primitive root; also as denominative from בַּעַל; to be master; hence, to marry.
H1166.kjv: have dominion (over), be husband, marry(-ried, [idiom] wife).

H1167.definition: from בָּעַל; a master; hence, a husband, or (figuratively) owner (often used with another noun in modifications of this latter sense).
H1167.kjv: [phrase] archer, [phrase] babbler, [phrase] bird, captain, chief man, [phrase] confederate, [phrase] have to do, [phrase] dreamer, those to whom it is due, [phrase] furious, those that are given to it, great, [phrase] hairy, he that hath it, have, [phrase] horseman, husband, lord, man, [phrase] married, master, person, [phrase] sworn, they of.

H1168.definition: the same as בַּעַל; Baal, a Phoenician deity.

H1170.definition: from בַּעַל and בְּרִית; Baal of (the) covenant; Baal-Berith, a special deity of the Shechemites.

H1171.definition: from בַּעַל and גָּד; Baal of Fortune; Baal-Gad, a place in Syria.

H1173.definition: the same as בַּעֲלָה; Baalah, the name of three places in Palestine.

H1174.definition: from בַּעַל and הָמוֹן; possessor of a multitude; Baal-Hamon, a place in Palestine.

H1175.definition: plural of בַּעֲלָה; mistresses; Bealoth, a place in Palestine.
H1175.kjv: Bealoth, in Aloth (by mistake for a plural from עָלָה with prepositional prefix).

H1176.definition: from בַּעַל and זְבוּב; Baal of (the) Fly; Baal-Zebub, a special deity of the Ekronites.

H1177.definition: from בַּעַל and חָנַן; possessor of grace; Baal-Chanan, the name of an Edomite, also of an Israelite.

H1178.definition: from בַּעַל and a modification of חָצֵר; possessor of a village; Baal-Chatsor, a place in Palestine.

H1179.definition: from בַּעַל and חֶרְמוֹן; possessor of Hermon; Baal-Chermon, a place in Palestine.

H1180.definition: from בַּעַל with pron. suff.; my master; Baali, a symbolical name for Jehovah.

H1181.definition: from the plural of בַּעַל and the plural of בָּמָה; Baals of (the) heights; Baale-Bamoth, a place East of the Jordan.

H1182.definition: from בַּעַל and יָדַע; Baal has known; Beeljada, an Israelite.

H1183.definition: from בַּעַל and יָהּ; Jah (is) master; Bealjah, an Israelite.

H1184.definition: from the plural of בַּעַל and יְהוּדָה; masters of Judah; Baale-Jehudah, a place in Palestine.

H1185.definition: xlit Baʻălîç corrected to Baʻălîyç; probably from a derivative of עָלַס with prepositional prefix; in exultation; Baalis, an Ammonitish king.

H1186.definition: from בַּעַל and מָעוֹן; Baal of (the) habitation (of) (compare בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן); Baal-Meon, a place East of the Jordan.

H1187.definition: from בַּעַל and פְּעוֹר; Baal of Peor; Baal-Peor, a Moabitish deity.

H1188.definition: from בַּעַל and the plural of פֶּרֶץ; possessor of breaches; Baal-Peratsim, a place in Palestine.

H1189.definition: from בַּעַל and צָפוֹן (in the sense of cold) (according to others an Egyptian form of Typhon, the destroyer); Baal of winter; Baal-Tsephon, a place in Eqypt.

H1190.definition: from בַּעַל and שָׁלִשָׁה; Baal of Shalishah, Baal-Shalishah, a place in Palestine.

H1191.definition: a modification of בַּעֲלָה; mistressship; Baalath, a place in Palestine.

H1192.definition: xlit Bᵉʻêr corrected to Bᵉʼêr; from בַּעֲלָה and בְּאֵר; mistress of a well; Baalath-Beer, a place in Palestine.

H1193.definition: from בַּעַל and תָּמָר; possessor of (the) palm-tree; Baal-Tamar, a place in Palestine.

H1194.definition: probably a contraction of בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן; Beon, a place East of the Jordan.

H1195.definition: the same as בַּעֲנָה; Banana, the name of four Israelite.

H1196.definition: from a derivative of עָנָה with prepositional prefix; in affliction; Baanah, the name of four Israelites.

H1197.definition: a primitive root; also as denominative from בַּעַר; to kindle, i.e. consume (by fire or by eating);  to be(-come) brutish.
H1197.kjv: be brutish, bring (put, take) away, burn, (cause to) eat (up), feed, heat, kindle, set (on fire), waste.

H1198.definition: from בָּעַר; properly, foot (as consumed); i.e. (by exten.) of cattle brutishness; (concretely) stupid.

H1199.definition: from בַּעַר; brutish; Baara, an Israelitish woman.

H1201.definition: from an unused root meaning to stink; offensiveness; Basha, a king of Israel.

H1202.definition: from עָשָׂה and יָהּ with a prepositional prefix; in (the) work of Jah; Baasejah, an Israelite.

H1203.definition: from עַשְׁתְּרָה (as singular of עַשְׁתָּרוֹת) with a prepositional prefix; with Ashtoreth; Beeshterah, a place East of the Jordan.

H1206.definition: probably the same as בּוּץ; mud (as whitish clay).

H1209.definition: perhaps the same as בְּסַי; Betsai, the name of two Israelites.

H1210.definition: from בָּצַר; clipped, i.e. the grape crop.

H1211.definition: xlit bᵉtsel corrected to betsel; from an unused root apparently meaning to peel; an onion.

H1212.definition: probably from צֵל and אֵל with a prepositional prefix; in (the) shadow (i.e. protection) of God; Betsalel, the name of two Israelites.

H1213.definition: or בַּצְלִית; from the same as בֶּצֶלxlit bᵉtsel corrected to betsel; a peeling; Batsluth or Batslith, an Israelite.

H1214.definition: a primitive root to break off, i.e. (usually) plunder; figuratively, to finish, or (intransitively) stop.
H1214.kjv: (be) covet(-ous), cut (off), finish, fulfill, gain (greedily), get, be given to (covetousness), greedy, perform, be wounded.

H1215.definition: from בָּצַע; plunder; by extension, gain (usually unjust).

H1216.definition: a primitive root; perhaps to swell up, i.e. blister.

H1217.definition: from בָּצֵק; dough (as swelling by fermentation).

H1218.definition: from בָּצֵק; a swell of ground; Botscath, a place in Palestine.

H1219.definition: a primitive root; to clip off; specifically (as denominative from בָּצִיר); to gather grapes; also to be isolated (i.e. inaccessible by height or fortification).
H1219.kjv: cut off, (de-) fenced, fortify, (grape) gather(-er), mighty things, restrain, strong, wall (up), withhold.

H1220.definition: from בָּצַר; strictly a clipping, i.e. gold (as dug out).

H1221.definition: the same as בֶּצֶר, an inaccessible spot; Betser, a place in Palestine; also an Israelite.

H1223.definition: feminine from בָּצַר; an enclosure, i.e. sheep fold.

H1224.definition: the same as בׇּצְרָה; Botsrah, a place in Edom.

H1225.definition: masculine intensive from בָּצַר; a fortress.

H1226.definition: feminine intensive from בָּצַר; restraint (of rain), i.e. drought.

H1227.definition: the same as בַּקְבֻּקxlit baqbûk corrected to baqbuq; Bakbuk, one of the Nethinim.

H1228.definition: xlit baqbûk corrected to baqbuq; from בָּקַק; a bottle (from the gurgling in emptying).

H1229.definition: xlit Baqbukyâh corrected to Baqbuqyâh; from בַּקְבֻּקxlit baqbûk corrected to baqbuq and יָהּ; emptying (i.e. wasting) of Jah; Bakbukjah, an Israelite.

H1230.definition: reduplicated from בָּקַר; searcher; Bakbakkar, an Israelite.

H1231.definition: from בָּקַק; wasteful; Bukki, the name of two Israelites.

H1232.definition: from בָּקַק and יָהּ; wasting of Jah; Bukkijah, an Israelite.

H1234.definition: a primitive root; to cleave; generally, to rend, break, rip or open.
H1234.kjv: make a breach, break forth (into, out, in pieces, through, up), be ready to burst, cleave (asunder), cut out, divide, hatch, rend (asunder), rip up, tear, win.

H1235.definition: from בָּקַע; a section (half) of ashekel, i.e. a beka (a weight and a coin).

H1237.definition: from בָּקַע; properly, a split, i.e. a wide level valley between mountains.

H1238.definition: a primitive root; to pour out, i.e. to empty, figuratively, to depopulate; by analogy, to spread out (as a fruitful vine).

H1239.definition: a primitive root; properly, to plough, or (generally) break forth, i.e. (figuratively) to inspect, admire, care for, consider.

H1241.definition: from בָּקַר; beef cattle or an animal of the ox family of either gender (as used for plowing); collectively, a herd.
H1241.kjv: beeve, bull ([phrase] -ock), [phrase] calf, [phrase] cow, great (cattle), [phrase] heifer, herd, kine, ox.

H1242.definition: from בָּקַר; properly, dawn (as the break of day); generally, morning.

H1243.definition: intensive from בָּקַר; a looking after.

H1244.definition: from בָּקַר; properly, examination, i.e. (by implication) punishment.

H1245.definition: a primitive root; to search out (by any method, specifically in worship or prayer); by implication, to strive after.
H1245.kjv: ask, beg, beseech, desire, enquire, get, make inquisition, procure, (make) request, require, seek (for).

H1247.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to בֵּן; a son, grandson, etc..

H1248.definition: borrowed (as a title) from בַּר; the heir (apparent to the throne).

H1249.definition: from בָּרַר (in its various senses); beloved; also pure, empty.

H1250.definition: or בַּר; from בָּרַר (in the sense of winnowing); grain of any kind (even while standing in the field); by extension the open country.

H1253.definition: the same as בֹּר; vegetable lye (from its cleansing); used as a soap forwashing, or a flux formetals.

H1254.definition: a primitive root; (absolutely) to create; (qualified) to cut down (a wood), select, feed (as formative processes).
H1254.kjv: choose, create (creator), cut down, dispatch, do, make (fat).

H1255.definition: a variation of מְרֹאדַךְ בַּלְאָדָן; Berodak-Baladan, a Babylonian king.

H1256.definition: from בָּרָא and שְׁמוּאֵל; Jah has created; Berajah, an Israelite.

H1257.definition: by reduplication from בָּר; a fowl (as fattened on grain).

H1260.definition: from בָּרַד; hail; Bered, the name of a place south of Palestine, also of an Israelite.

H1261.definition: from בָּרַד; spotted (as if with hail).

H1262.definition: a primitive root; to select; also (as denominative from בָּר) to feed; also (as equivalent to בָּרַר) to render clear (Ecclesiastes 3:18); to select; to feed; to render clear.

H1263.definition: passive participle from בָרַךְ; blessed; Baruk, the name of three Israelites.

H1264.definition: probably of foreign origin; damask (stuff of variegated thread).

H1265.definition: of uncertain derivation; a cypress (?) tree; hence, a lance or a musical instrument (as made of that wood).

H1266.definition: lemma בֻּרוֹת first vowel, corrected to בְּרוֹת; a variation of בְּרוֹשׁ; the cypress (or some elastic tree).

H1268.definition: or בֵּרֹתַי; probably from בְּרוֹתlemma בֻּרוֹת first vowel, corrected to בְּרוֹת; cypress or cypresslike; Berothah or Berothai, a place north of Palestine.

H1269.definition: probably feminine plural from an unused root (apparently mean to pierce); holes; Birzoth, an Israelite.

H1270.definition: perhaps from the root of בִּרְזוֹת; iron (as cutting); by extension, an iron implement.

H1271.definition: from בַּרְזֶל; iron-hearted; Barzillai, the name of three Israelites.

H1272.definition: a primitive root; to bolt, i.e. figuratively, to flee suddenly; chase (away).
H1272.kjv: drive away, fain, flee (away), put to flight, make haste, reach, run away, shoot.

H1273.definition: by transposition for בַּחֲרוּמִי; a Barchumite, or native of Bachurim.

H1275.definition: probably by contraction from בְּאֵרִי; Beri, an Israelite.

H1276.definition: of uncertain derivation; (only in the plural and with the article) the Berites, a place in Palestine.

H1277.definition: from בָּרָא (in the sense of בָּרָה); fatted or plump.

H1278.definition: feminine from בָּרָא; a creation, i.e. a novelty.

H1281.definition: or בָּרִחַ; (shortened) from בָּרַח; a fugitive, i.e. the serpent (as fleeing), and the constellation by that name.

H1282.definition: the same as בָּרִיחַ; Bariach, an Israelite.

H1283.definition: apparently from the feminine of רַע with a prepositional prefix; in trouble; Beriah, the name of four Israelites.

H1284.definition: patronymically from בְּרִיעָה; a Beriite (collectively) or descendants of Beriah.

H1285.definition: from בָּרָה (in the sense of cutting (like בָּרָא)); a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh).

H1286.definition: the same as בְּרִית; Berith, a Shechemitish deity.

H1288.definition: a primitive root; to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason).
H1288.kjv: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

H1292.definition: from בָרַךְ and אֵל, God has blessed; Barakel, the father of one of Job's friends.

H1293.definition: from בָרַךְ; benediction; by implication prosperity.

H1294.definition: the same as בְּרָכָה; Berakah, the name of an Israelite, and also of a valley in Palestine.

H1295.definition: from בָרַךְ; a reservoir (at which camels kneel as a resting-place).

H1296.definition: or בֶּרֶכְיָהוּ; from בֶּרֶךְ and יָהּ; knee (i.e. blessing) of Jah; Berekjah, the name of six Israelites.

H1297.definition: (Aramaic) perhaps from רוּם with a prepositional prefix; properly, highly, i.e. surely; but used adversatively, however.

H1298.definition: of uncertain derivation; Bera, a Sodomitish king.

H1300.definition: from בָּרַק; lightning; by analogy, a gleam; concretely, a flashing sword.

H1301.definition: the same as בָּרָק; Barak, an Israelite.

H1302.definition: of uncertain derivation; Barkos, one of the Nethimim.

H1303.definition: from בָּרָק; a thorn (perhaps as burning brightly).

H1304.definition: lemma בָּרְקַת variant form, corrected to בָּרֶקֶת; or בָּרְקַתxlit bârᵉkath corrected to bârᵉqath; from בָּרָק; a gem (as flashing), perhaps the emerald.

H1305.definition: a primitive root; to clarify (i.e. brighten), examine, select.
H1305.kjv: make bright, choice, chosen, cleanse (be clean), clearly, polished, (shew self) pure(-ify), purge (out).

H1306.definition: probably from רֶשַׁע with a prepositional prefix; with wickedness; Birsha, a king of Gomorrah.

H1307.definition: patrial from בֵּרוֹתָה; a Berothite, or inhabitant of Berothai.

H1308.definition: from בָּשַׂר; cheerful; Besor, a stream of Palestine.

H1309.definition: or (shortened) בְּשֹׂרָה; feminine from בָּשַׂר; glad tidings; by implication, reward forgood news.

H1310.definition: a primitive root; properly, to boil up; hence, to be done in cooking; figuratively to ripen.
H1310.kjv: bake, boil, bring forth, roast, seethe, sod (be sodden).

H1312.definition: of foreign derivation; Bishlam, a Persian.

H1313.definition: from an unused root meaning to be fragrant; (compare סַם); the balsam plant.

H1314.definition: or בֹּשֶׂם; from the same as בָּשָׂם; fragrance; by implication, spicery; also the balsam plant.

H1315.definition: feminine of בֶּשֶׂם (the second form); fragrance; Bosmath, the name of a wife of Esau, and of a daughter of Solomon.

H1316.definition: of uncertain derivation; Bashan (often with the article), a region East of the Jordan.

H1318.definition: a primitive root; to trample down.

H1319.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be fresh, i.e. full (rosy, (figuratively) cheerful); to announce (glad news).
H1319.kjv: messenger, preach, publish, shew forth, (bear, bring, carry, preach, good, tell good) tidings.

H1320.definition: from בָּשַׂר; flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman.
H1320.kjv: body, (fat, lean) flesh(-ed), kin, (man-) kind, [phrase] nakedness, self, skin.

H1322.definition: from בּוּשׁ; shame (the feeling and the condition, as well as its cause); by implication (specifically) an idol.
H1322.kjv: ashamed, confusion, [phrase] greatly, (put to) shame(-ful thing).

H1323.definition: from בָּנָה (as feminine of בֵּן); a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively).
H1323.kjv: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

H1324.definition: probably from the same as בַּתָּה; a bath or Hebrew measure (as a means of division) of liquids.

H1326.definition: probably an orthographical variation for בַּתָּה; desolation.

H1327.definition: feminine from an unused root (meaning to break in pieces); desolation.

H1328.definition: apparently from the same as בָּתָה and אֵל; destroyed of God; Bethuel, the name of a nephew of Abraham, and of a place in Palestine.

H1329.definition: for בְּתוּאֵל; Bethul (i.e. Bethuel), a place in Palestine.

H1330.definition: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to separate; a virgin (from her privacy); sometimes (by continuation) a bride; also (figuratively) a city or state.

H1331.definition: masculine plural of the same as בְּתוּלָה; (collectively and abstractly) virginity; by implication and concretely, the tokens of it.

H1332.definition: from בַּת and יָהּ; daughter (i.e. worshipper) of Jah; Bithjah, an Egyptian woman.

H1333.definition: a primitive root; to cut in pieces.

H1334.definition: a primitive root,; to chop up.

H1336.definition: the same as בֶּתֶר; Bether, a (craggy) place in Palestine.

H1337.definition: from בַּת and a masculine plural from רַב; the daughter (i.e. city) of Rabbah.

H1338.definition: from בָּתַר; (with the article) the craggy spot; Bithron, a place East of the Jordan.

H1339.definition: from בַּת and שֶׁבַע (in the sense of שָׁבַע); daughter of an oath; Bath-Sheba, the mother of Solomon.

H1340.definition: from בַּת and שׁוֹעַ; daughter of wealth;  the same as בַּת־שֶׁבַע; Bath-shua,.

H1342.definition: a primitive root; to mount up; hence, in general, to rise, (figuratively) be majestic.
H1342.kjv: gloriously, grow up, increase, be risen, triumph.

H1345.definition: from גָּאָה and אֵל; majesty of God; Geuel, an Israelite.

H1346.definition: xlit gaʻăvâh corrected to gaʼăvâh; from גָּאָה; arrogance or majesty; by implication, (concretely) ornament.
H1346.kjv: excellency, haughtiness, highness, pride, proudly, swelling.

H1350.definition: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.; to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.).
H1350.kjv: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.

H1351.definition: a primitive root, (rather identified with גָּאַל, through the idea of freeing, i.e. repudiating); to soil or (figuratively) desecrate.

H1353.definition: xlit gᵉullâh corrected to gᵉʼullâh; feminine passive participle of גָּאַל; redemption (including the right and the object); by implication, relationship.

H1354.definition: from an unused root meaning to hollow or curve; (compare גֵּו and גּוּף); the back (as rounded); by analogy, the top or rim, a boss, a vault, arch of eye, bulwarks, etc..
H1354.kjv: back, body, boss, eminent (higher) place, (eye) brows, nave, ring.

H1356.definition: from גּוּב; a log (as cut out); also well or cistern (as dug).

H1357.definition: probably from גּוּב (compare גּוֹב); a locust (from its cutting).

H1358.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to גּוּב; a pit (for wild animals) (as cut out).

H1359.definition: or (fully) גּוֹב; from גּוּב; pit; Gob, a place in Palestine.

H1360.definition: xlit gebe corrected to gebeʼ; from an unused root meaning probably to collect; a reservoir; by analogy, a marsh.

H1361.definition: a primitive root; to soar, i.e. be lofty; figuratively, to be haughty.
H1361.kjv: exalt, be haughty, be (make) high(-er), lift up, mount up, be proud, raise up great height, upward.

H1363.kjv: excellency, haughty, height, high, loftiness, pride.

H1364.definition: or גָּבוֹהַּ; (fully) from גָּבַהּ; elevated (or elated), powerful, arrogant.
H1364.kjv: haughty, height, high(-er), lofty, proud, [idiom] exceeding proudly.

H1366.definition: or גְּבֻל; (shortened) from גָּבַל; properly, a cord (as twisted), i.e. (by implication) a boundary; by extension the territory inclosed.
H1366.kjv: border, bound, coast, [idiom] great, landmark, limit, quarter, space.

H1367.definition: or גְּבֻלָה; (shortened) feminine of גְּבוּל; a boundary, region.

H1368.definition: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as גֶּבֶר; powerful; by implication, warrior, tyrant.
H1368.kjv: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.

H1369.definition: feminine passive participle from the same as גִּבּוֹר; force (literally or figuratively); by implication, valor, victory.
H1369.kjv: force, mastery, might, mighty (act, power), power, strength.

H1371.definition: from an unused root meaning to be high (in the forehead); bald in the forehead.

H1372.definition: from the same as גִּבֵּחַ; baldness in the forehead; by analogy, a bare spot on the right side of cloth.

H1373.definition: from the same as גַב; collective; Gabbai, an Israelite.

H1374.definition: plural of גֵּב; cisterns; Gebim, a place in Palestine.

H1375.definition: from an unused root (meaning to be convex); a goblet; by analogy, the calyx of aflower.

H1378.definition: from an unused root (probably meaning to freeze); crystal (from its resemblance to ice).

H1379.definition: a primitive root; also as a denominative from גְּבוּל; properly, to twist as arope;  to bound (as by a line).

H1380.definition: from גָּבַל (in the sense of a chain of hills); a mountain; Gebal, a place in Phoenicia.

H1381.definition: the same as גְּבַל; Gebal, a region in Idumaea.

H1382.definition: ; patrial from גְּבַל; a Gebalite, or inhabitant of Gebal.

H1383.definition: from גָּבַל; a twisted chain or lace.

H1384.definition: from an unused root meaning to be arched or contracted; hunch-backed.

H1385.definition: feminine from the same as גִּבֵּן; curdled milk.

H1386.definition: from the same as גִּבֵּן; a hump or peak of hills.

H1387.definition: from the same as גְּבִיעַ, a hillock; Geba, a place in Palestine.

H1388.definition: by permutation for גִּבְעָה; a hill; Giba, a place in Palestine.

H1389.definition: feminine from the same as גֶּבַע; a hillock.

H1390.definition: the same as גִּבְעָה; Gibah; the name of three places in Palestine.

H1391.definition: from the same as גֶּבַע; hilly; Gibon, a place in Palestine.

H1392.definition: prolonged from גְּבִיעַ; the calyx of a flower.

H1393.definition: patrial from גִּבְעוֹן; a Gibonite, or inhabitant of Gibon.

H1394.definition: from the same as גְּבִיעַ; hilliness; Gibath.

H1395.definition: patrial from גִּבְעָה; a Gibathite, or inhabitant of Gibath.

H1396.definition: a primitive root; to be strong; by implication, to prevail, act insolently.
H1396.kjv: exceed, confirm, be great, be mighty, prevail, put to more (strength), strengthen, be stronger, be valiant.

H1397.definition: from גָּבַר; properly, a valiant man or warrior; generally, a person simply.

H1398.definition: the same as גֶּבֶר; Geber, the name of two Israelites.

H1399.definition: from גָּבַר; the same as גֶּבֶר; a person.

H1401.definition: (Aramaic) intensive of גְּבַר; valiant, or warrior.

H1402.definition: intensive of גְּבַר; Gibbar, an Israelite.

H1403.definition: from גֶּבֶר and אֵל; man of God; Gabriel, an archangel.

H1405.definition: intensive from גִּבְעָה; a hilly spot; Gibbethon, a place in Palestine.

H1406.definition: probably by reduplication from גָּאָה; a roof; by analogy, the top of an altar.
H1406.kjv: roof (of the house), (house) top (of the house).

H1407.definition: from גָּדַד (in the sense of cutting); coriander seed (from its furrows).

H1408.definition: a variation of גָּד; Fortune, a Babylonian deity.

H1409.definition: from גּוּד (in the sense of distributing); fortune.

H1410.definition: from גּוּד; Gad, a son of Jacob, including his tribe and its territory; also a prophet.

H1412.definition: by reduplication from גָּדַד (in the sense of cutting) cleft; Gudgodah, a place in the Desert.

H1413.definition: a primitive root (compare גּוּד); to crowd; also to gash (as if by pressing into).
H1413.kjv: assemble (selves by troops), gather (selves together, self in troops), cut selves.

H1414.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to גָּדַד; to cut down.

H1415.definition: from an unused root (meaning to cut off); a border of a river (as cut into by the stream).

H1416.definition: from גָּדַד; a crowd (especially of soldiers).
H1416.kjv: army, band (of men), company, troop (of robbers).

H1417.definition: or גְּדֻדָה; (feminine) from גָּדַד; a furrow (as cut).

H1418.definition: feminine participle passive of גָּדַד; an incision.

H1419.definition: or גָּדֹל; (shortened) from גָּדַל; great (in any sense); hence, older; also insolent.
H1419.kjv: [phrase] aloud, elder(-est), [phrase] exceeding(-ly), [phrase] far, (man of) great (man, matter, thing,-er,-ness), high, long, loud, mighty, more, much, noble, proud thing, [idiom] sore, ([idiom]) very.

H1420.definition: or גְּדֻלָּה; (shortened) or (less accurately) גְּדוּלָּה; feminine of גָּדוֹל; greatness; (concretely) mighty acts.

H1421.definition: or (shortened) גִּדֻּף; and (feminine) גִּדּוּפָהxlit giddûphâh corrected to giddûwphâh; or גִּדֻּפָה; from גְּדוּפָה; vilification.

H1422.definition: feminine passive participle of גָּדַף; a revilement.

H1423.definition: from the same as גָּדָה; a young goat (from browsing).

H1424.definition: from גָּד; fortunate; Gadi, an Israelite.

H1425.definition: patronymically from גָּד; a Gadite (collectively) or descendants of Gad.

H1426.definition: intensive for גָּדִי; Gaddi, an Israelite.

H1427.definition: from גָּד and אֵל; fortune of God; Gaddiel, an Israelite.

H1428.definition: or גַּדיָה; the same as גָּדָה; a river brink.

H1429.definition: feminine of גְּדִי; a young female goat.

H1430.definition: from an unused root (meaning to heap up); a stack of sheaves; by analogy, a tomb.

H1431.definition: a primitive root; properly, to twist (compare גְּדִל), i.e.; to be (causatively make) large (in various senses, as in body, mind, estate or honor, also in pride).
H1431.kjv: advance, boast, bring up, exceed, excellent, be(-come, do, give, make, wax), great(-er, come to... estate, [phrase] things), grow(up), increase, lift up, magnify(-ifical), be much set by, nourish (up), pass, promote, proudly (spoken), tower.

H1434.definition: from גָּדַל (in the sense of twisting); thread, i.e. a tassel or festoon.

H1435.definition: from גָּדַל; stout; Giddel, the name of one of the Nethinim, also of one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H1436.definition: or (prolonged) גְּדַלְיָהוּ; from גָּדַל and יָהּ; Jah has become great; Gedaljah, the name of five Israelites.

H1437.definition: from גָּדַל; I have made great; Giddalti, an Israelite.

H1438.definition: a primitive root; to fell a tree; generally, to destroy anything.
H1438.kjv: cut (asunder, in sunder, down, off), hew down.

H1439.definition: from גָּדַע; feller (i.e. warrior); Gidon, an Israelite.

H1440.definition: from גָּדַע; a cutting (i.e. desolation); Gidom, a place in Palestine.

H1441.definition: lemma גִּדְעֹני missing vowel, corrected to גִּדְעֹנִי; from גָּדַע; warlike (compare גִּדְעוֹן); Gidoni, an Israelite.

H1442.definition: a primitive root; to hack (with words), i.e. revile.

H1443.definition: a primitive root; to wall in or around.
H1443.kjv: close up, fence up, hedge, inclose, make up (a wall), mason, repairer.

H1445.definition: ; the same as גֶּדֶר; Geder, a place in Palestine.

H1446.definition: or (fully) גְּדוֹר; from גָּדַר; inclosure; Gedor, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites.

H1447.definition: from גָּדַר; a circumvallation; by implication, an inclosure.

H1448.definition: feminine of גָּדֵר; enclosure (especially for flocks).

H1449.definition: the same as גְּדֵרָה; (with the article) Gederah, a place in Palestine.

H1450.definition: plural of גְּדֵרָה; walls; Gederoth, a place in Palestine.

H1451.definition: patrial from גֶּדֶר; a Gederite, or inhabitant of Geder.

H1452.definition: patrial from גְּדֵרָה; a Gederathite, or inhabitant of Gederah.

H1453.definition: dual of גְּדֵרָה; double wall; Gederothajim, a place in Palestine.

H1454.definition: probably a clerical error for זֶה; this.

H1455.definition: a primitive root; to remove (a bandage from a wound, i.e. heal it).

H1457.definition: a primitive root; to prostrate oneself.

H1458.definition: another form for גֵּו; the back.

H1460.definition: from גָּאָה (corresponding to גַב); the back; by analogy, the middle.

H1462.definition: from גּוּב; the locust (from its grubbing as a larvae).

H1463.definition: of uncertain derivation; Gog, the name of an Israelite, also of some nothern nation.

H1464.definition: a primitive root (akin to גָּדַד); to crowd upon, i.e. attack.

H1465.definition: feminine of גֵּו; the back, i.e. (by extensive) the person.

H1466.definition: the same as גֵּוָה; exaltation; (figuratively) arrogance.

H1468.definition: a primitive root (compare גַּזָז); properly, to shear off; but used only in the (figuratively) sense of passing rapidly.

H1469.definition: or (shortened) גֹזָלlemma גזָל missing vowel, corrected to גֹזָל; from גָּזַל; a nestling (as being comparatively nude of feathers).

H1470.definition: probably from גּוּז; a quarry (as a place of cutting stones); Gozan, a province of Assyria.

H1471.definition: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as גֵּוָה (in the sense of massing); a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts.

H1472.definition: prolonged for גֵּוָה; a body, whether alive or dead.

H1473.definition: or (shortened) גֹּלָה; active participle feminine of גָּלָה; exile; concretely and collectively exiles.

H1474.definition: from גּוֹלָה; captive; Golan, a place east of the Jordan.

H1476.definition: probably from גָּנַן; protected; Guni, the name of two Israelites.

H1477.definition: patronymically from גּוּנִי; a Gunite (collectively with article prefix) or descendants of Guni.

H1478.definition: a primitive root; to breathe out, i.e. (by implication) expire.
H1478.kjv: die, be dead, give up the ghost, perish.

H1479.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hollow or arch, i.e. (figuratively) close; to shut.

H1480.definition: from גּוּף; a corpse (as closed to sense).

H1481.definition: a primitive root; properly, to turn aside from the road (for a lodging or any other purpose), i.e. sojourn (as a guest); also to shrink, fear (as in a strange place); also to gather forhostility (as afraid).
H1481.kjv: abide, assemble, be afraid, dwell, fear, gather (together), inhabitant, remain, sojourn, stand in awe, (be) stranger, [idiom] surely.

H1482.definition: or (shortened) גֻּר; perhaps from גּוּר; a cub (as still abiding in the lair), especially of the lion.

H1483.definition: the same as גּוּר; Gur, a place in Palestine.

H1485.definition: from גּוּר and בַּעַל; dwelling of Baal; Gur-Baal, a place in Arabia.

H1486.definition: or (shortened) גֹּרָל; from an unused root meaning to be rough (as stone); properly, a pebble, i.e. a lot (small stones being used for that purpose); figuratively, a portion or destiny (as if determined by lot).

H1487.definition: or rather (by permutation) גִּישׁ; of uncertain derivation; a mass of earth.

H1488.definition: from גַּזָז; a fleece (as shorn); also mown grass.

H1491.definition: a primitive root (akin to גּוּז); to cut off, i.e. portion out.

H1493.definition: patrial from the unused name of a place apparently in Palestine; a Gizonite or inhabitant of Gizoh.

H1494.definition: a primitive root (akin to גּוּז); to cut off; specifically to shear aflock or shave the hair; figuratively to destroy an enemy.

H1495.definition: from גַּזָז; shearer; Gazez, the name of two Israelites.

H1496.definition: from גָּזָה; something cut, i.e. dressed stone.

H1497.definition: a primitive root; to pluck off; specifically to flay, strip or rob.
H1497.kjv: catch, consume, exercise (robbery), pluck (off), rob, spoil, take away (by force, violence), tear.

H1498.kjv: robbery, thing taken away by violence.

H1499.kjv: violence, violent perverting.. gozal. See גּוֹזָל.

H1501.definition: from an unused root meaning to devour; a kind of locust.

H1502.definition: from the same as גָּזָם; devourer; Gazzam, one of the Nethinim.

H1503.definition: from an unused root meaning to cut down (trees); the trunk or stump of atree (as felled or as planted).

H1504.definition: a primitive root; to cut down or off; (figuratively) to destroy, divide, exclude, or decide.

H1505.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to גָּזַר; to quarry; determine.

H1506.definition: from גָּזַר; something cut off; a portion.

H1507.definition: the same as גֶּזֶר; Gezer, a place in Palestine.

H1508.definition: feminine of גֶּזֶר; the figure or person (as if cut out); also an inclosure (as separated).

H1511.definition: (in the m patrial from גֶּזֶר; a Gezerite (collectively) or inhabitants of Gezer; but better (as in the text) bytransposition גִּזְרִיxlit Girzîy corrected to Gizrîy; patrial of גְּרִזִים; a Grizite (collectively) or member of a native tribe in Palestine.

H1512.definition: probably from גִּיחַlemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; (compare גִּיחוֹן); the external abdomen, belly (as the source of the faetus ).

H1513.definition: or (feminine) גַּחֶלֶת; from an unused root meaning to glow or kindle; an ember.

H1514.definition: from an unused root meaning to burn; flame; Gacham, a son of Nahor.

H1515.definition: from an unused root meaning to hide; lurker; Gachar, one of the Nethinim.

H1516.definition: or (shortened) גַּי; probably (by transmutation) from the same root as גֵּוָה (abbreviated); a gorge (from its lofty sides; hence, narrow, but not a gully or winter-torrent).

H1517.definition: probably from גּוּד; a thong (as compressing); by analogy, a tendon.

H1518.definition: lemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; or (shortened) גֹּחַ; a primitive root; to gush forth (as water), generally to issue.
H1518.kjv: break forth, labor to bring forth, come forth, draw up, take out.

H1519.definition: (Aramaic) or (shortened) גּוּחַ; (Aramaic), corresponding to גִּיחַlemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; to rush forth.

H1520.definition: from גִּיחַlemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; a fountain; Giach, a place in Palestine.

H1521.definition: or (shortened) גִּחוֹן; from גִּיחַlemma גּיחַ missing vowel, corrected to גִּיחַ; stream; Gichon, a river of Paradise; also a valley (or pool) near Jerusalem.

H1522.definition: or גֵּחֲזִי; apparently from גַּיְא and חָזָה; valley of a visionary; Gechazi, the servant of Elisha.

H1523.definition: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root; properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear.
H1523.kjv: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.

H1524.definition: from גִּיל; a revolution (of time, i.e. an age); also joy.
H1524.kjv: [idiom] exceedingly, gladness, [idiom] greatly, joy, rejoice(-ing), sort.

H1525.definition: or גִּילַת; feminine of גִּיל; joy.

H1526.definition: patrial from גִּלֹה; a Gilonite or inhabitant of Giloh.

H1527.definition: of uncertain derivation; Ginath, an Israelite.

H1529.definition: from the same as גּוּשׁ; lumpish; Geshan, an Israelite.

H1530.definition: from גָּלַל; something rolled, i.e. a heap of stone or dung (plural ruins), by analogy, a spring of water (plural waves).

H1531.definition: from גָּלַל; a cup for oil (as round).

H1532.definition: from an unused root meaning to shave; a barber.

H1533.definition: from גַּל and בָּעָה; fountain of ebullition; Gilboa, a mountain of Palestine.

H1534.definition: by reduplication from גָּלַל; a wheel; by analogy, a whirlwind; also dust (as whirled).

H1537.definition: the same as גִּלְגָּל (with the article as a properly, noun); Gilgal, the name of three places in Palestine.

H1538.definition: by reduplication from גָּלַל; a skull (as round); by implication, a head (in enumeration of persons).

H1539.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to polish; the (human) skin (as smooth).

H1540.definition: a primitive root; to denude (especially in a disgraceful sense); by implication, to exile (captives being usually stripped); figuratively, to reveal.
H1540.kjv: [phrase] advertise, appear, bewray, bring, (carry, lead, go) captive (into captivity), depart, disclose, discover, exile, be gone, open, [idiom] plainly, publish, remove, reveal, [idiom] shamelessly, shew, [idiom] surely, tell, uncover.

H1542.definition: or (fully) גִּילֹה; from גָּלָה; open; Giloh, a place in Palestine.

H1543.definition: feminine from גָּלַל; a fountain, bowl or globe (all as round).

H1544.definition: or (shortened) גִּלֻּל; from גָּלַל; properly, a log (as round); by implication, an idol.

H1546.definition: feminine from גָּלָה; captivity; concretely, exiles (collectively).

H1548.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be bald, i.e. (causatively) to shave; figuratively to lay waste.

H1549.definition: or גִּלְיוֹן; from גָּלָה; a tablet for writing (as bare); by analogy, a mirror (as a plate).

H1550.definition: from גָּלַל; a valve of a folding door (as turning); also a ring (as round).

H1551.definition: or (prolonged) גָּלִילָה; the same as גָּלִיל; a circle (with the article); Galil (as a special circuit) in the North of Palestine.

H1552.definition: feminine of גָּלִיל; a circuit or region.

H1553.definition: plural of גְלִילָה; circles; Geliloth, a place in Palestine.

H1554.definition: plural of גַּל; springs; Gallim, a place in Palestine.

H1555.definition: perhaps from גָּלָה; exile; Goljath, a Philistine.

H1556.definition: a primitive root; to roll (literally or figuratively).
H1556.kjv: commit, remove, roll (away, down, together), run down, seek occasion, trust, wallow.

H1558.definition: from גָּלַל; a circumstance (as rolled around); only used adverbially, on account of.

H1559.definition: from גָּלַל, in the sense of גְּלָל; great; Galal, the name of two Israelites.

H1560.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to גָּלַל; weight or size (as if rolled).

H1561.definition: a variation of גָּלָל; dung (plural balls of dung).

H1562.definition: from גֵּלֶל; dungy; Gilalai, an Israelite.

H1564.definition: from גָּלַם; a wrapped (and unformed mass, i.e. as the embryo).

H1565.definition: probably by prolonged from גָּלַם; sterile (as wrapped up too hard); figuratively, desolate.

H1566.definition: a primitive root; to be obstinate.

H1567.definition: from גַּל and עֵד; heap of testimony; Galed, a memorial cairn East of the Jordan.

H1568.definition: probably from גַּלְעֵד; Gilad, a region East of the Jordan; also the name of three Israelites.

H1569.definition: patronymically from גִּלְעָד; a Giladite or descendant of Gilad.

H1570.definition: a primitive root; probably to caper (as a goat).

H1571.definition: by contraction from an unused root meaning to gather; properly, assemblage; used only adverbially also, even, yea, though; often repeated as correl. both...and.
H1571.kjv: again, alike, also, (so much) as (soon), both (so)...and, but, either...or, even, for all, (in) likewise (manner), moreover, nay...neither, one, then(-refore), though, what, with, yea.

H1572.definition: a primitive root (literally or figuratively) to absorb; to absorb.

H1573.definition: from גָּמָא; properly, an absorbent, i.e. the bulrush (from its porosity); specifically the papyrus.

H1574.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to grasp; properly, a span.

H1575.definition: from the same as גֹּמֶד; a warrior (as grasping weapons).

H1576.definition: from גָּמַל; treatment, i.e. an act (of good or ill); by implication, service or requital.
H1576.kjv: [phrase] as hast served, benefit, desert, deserving, that which he hath given, recompense, reward.

H1577.definition: passive participle of גָּמַל; rewarded; Gamul, an Israelite.

H1578.definition: feminine of גְּמוּל; meaning the same.

H1579.definition: of uncertain derivation; Gimzo, a place in Palestine.

H1580.definition: a primitive root; to treat a person (well or ill), i.e. benefit or requite; by implication (of toil), to ripen, i.e. (specifically) to wean.
H1580.kjv: bestow on, deal bountifully, do (good), recompense, requite, reward, ripen, [phrase] serve, mean, yield.

H1581.definition: apparently from גָּמַל (in the sense of labor or burden-bearing); a camel.

H1582.definition: probably from גָּמָל; cameldriver; Gemalli, an Israelite.

H1583.definition: from גָּמַל and אֵל; reward of God; Gamliel, an Israelite.

H1584.definition: a primitive root; to end (in the sense of completion or failure).
H1584.kjv: cease, come to an end, fail, perfect, perform.

H1586.definition: from גָּמַר; completion; Gomer, the name of a son of Japheth and of his descendants; also of a Hebrewess.

H1587.definition: or גְּמַרְיָהוּ; from גָּמַר and יָהּ; Jah has perfected; Gemarjah, the name of two Israelites.

H1589.definition: a primitive root; to thieve (literally or figuratively); by implication, to deceive.
H1589.kjv: carry away, [idiom] indeed, secretly bring, steal (away), get by stealth.

H1591.definition: from גָּנַב; stealing, i.e. (concretely) something stolen.

H1592.definition: from גָּנַב; theft; Genubath, an Edomitish prince.

H1595.definition: from an unused root meaning to store; treasure; by implication, a coffer.

H1598.definition: a primitive root; to hedge about, i.e. (generally) protect.

H1599.definition: or גִּנְּתוֹ; from גָּנַן; gardener; Ginnethon or Ginnetho, an Israelite.

H1600.definition: a primitive root; to bellow (as cattle).

H1601.definition: feminine active participle of גָּעָה; lowing; Goah, a place near Jerusalem.

H1602.definition: a primitive root; to detest; by implication, to reject.
H1602.kjv: abhor, fail, lothe, vilely cast away.

H1603.definition: from גָּעַל; loathing; Gaal, an Israelite.

H1607.definition: a primitive root; to agitate violently.

H1608.definition: from גָּעַשׁ; a quaking; Gaash, a hill in Palestine.

H1609.definition: of uncertain derivation; Gatam, an Edomite.

H1610.definition: from an unused root meaning to arch; the back; by extension the body or self.

H1612.definition: from an unused root meaning to bend; a vine (as twining), especially the grape.

H1613.definition: from an unused root, probably meaning to house in; a kind of tree or wood (as used for building), apparently the cypress.

H1614.definition: probably feminine of גֹּפֶר; properly, cypress-resin; by analogy, sulphur (as equally inflammable).

H1615.definition: perhaps from כּוּר; lime (from being burned in a kiln).

H1616.definition: or (fully) geyr (gare); from גּוּר; properly, a guest; by implication, a foreigner.

H1617.definition: perhaps from גֵּרָה; a grain; Gera, the name of six Israelites.

H1618.definition: from an unused root meaning to scratch; scurf (from itching).

H1619.definition: from the same as גָּרָב; scabby; Gareb, the name of an Israelite, also of a hill near Jerusalem.

H1620.definition: by reduplication from גָּרַר; a berry (as if a pellet of rumination).

H1621.definition: feminine plural from גָּרַר; the throat (as used in rumination).

H1622.definition: patrial from an unused name (of uncertain derivation); a Girgashite, one of the native tribes of Canaan.

H1624.definition: a primitive root; properly, to grate, i.e. (figuratively) to anger.

H1625.definition: from גָּרַר; the cud (as scraping the throat).

H1626.definition: from גָּרַר (as in גֵּרָה); properly, (like גַּרְגַּר) a kernel (round as if scraped), i.e.; a gerah or small weight (and coin).

H1627.definition: or (shortened) גָּרֹן; from גָּרַר; (compare גַּרְגְּרוֹת); the throat (as roughened by swallowing).

H1629.definition: a primitive root; to cut off.

H1630.definition: plural of an unused noun from גָּרַז (compare גִּזְרִי), cut up (i.e. rocky); Gerizim, a mountain of Palestine.

H1632.definition: from the same as גּוֹרָל; harsh.
H1632.kjv: man of great (as in the margin which reads גָּדוֹל).

H1633.definition: a primitive root; to be spare or skeleton-like; used only as a denominative from גֶּרֶם; (causative) to bone, i.e. denude (by extensive, craunch) the bones.

H1634.definition: from גָּרַם; a bone (as the skeleton of the body); hence, self, i.e. (figuratively) very.

H1637.definition: from an unused root meaning to smooth; a threshing-floor (as made even); by analogy, any open area.

H1638.definition: a primitive root; to crush; also (intransitively and figuratively) to dissolve.

H1639.definition: a primitive root; to scrape off; by implication, to shave, remove, lessen, withhold.
H1639.kjv: abate, clip, (di-) minish, do (take) away, keep back, restrain, make small, withdraw.

H1640.definition: a primitive root; to bear off violently.

H1641.definition: a primitive root; to drag off roughly; by implication, to bring up the cud (i.e. ruminate); by analogy, to saw.

H1642.definition: probably from גָּרַר; a rolling country; Gerar, a Philistine city.

H1643.definition: from an unused root meaning to husk; a kernel (collectively), i.e. grain.

H1644.definition: a primitive root; to drive out from a possession; especially to expatriate or divorce.
H1644.kjv: cast up (out), divorced (woman), drive away (forth, out), expel, [idiom] surely put away, trouble, thrust out.

H1646.definition: feminine passive participle of גָּרַשׁ; (abstractly) dispossession.

H1647.definition: for גֵּרְשׁוֹן; Gereshom, the name of four Israelites.

H1648.definition: or גֵּרְשׁוֹם; from גָּרַשׁ; a refugee; Gereshon or Gereshom, an Israelite.

H1649.definition: patronymically from גֵּרְשׁוֹן; a Gereshonite or descendant of Gereshon.

H1650.definition: from an unused root (meaning to join); bridge; Geshur, a district of Syria.

H1651.definition: patrial from גְּשׁוּר; a Geshurite (also collectively) or inhabitants of Geshur.

H1652.definition: a primitive root; to shower violently.

H1654.definition: or (prolonged) גַּשְׁמוּ; the same as גֶּשֶׁם; Geshem or Gashmu, an Arabian.

H1655.definition: (Aramaic) apparently the same as גֶּשֶׁם; used in a peculiar sense, the body (probably for the (figuratively) idea of a hard rain).

H1657.definition: probably of Egyptian origin; Goshen, the residence of the Israelites in Egypt; also a place in Palestine.

H1658.definition: of uncertain derivation; Gishpa, an Israelite.

H1659.definition: a primitive root; apparently; to feel about.

H1660.definition: probably from נָגַן (in the sense of treading out grapes); a wine-press (or vat for holding the grapes in pressing them).
