H1661.definition: the same as גַּת; Gath, a Philistine city.

H1662.definition: or (abridged) גִּתָּה־חֵפֶר; from גַּת and חָפַר with the article inserted; wine-press of (the) well; Gath-Chepher, a place in Palestine.

H1663.definition: patrial from גַּת; a Gittite or inhabitant of Gath.

H1664.definition: dual of גַּת; double winepress; Gittajim, a place in Palestine.

H1665.definition: feminine of גִּתִּי; a Gittite harp.

H1666.definition: of uncertain derivation; Gether, a son of Aram, and the region settled by him.

H1667.definition: from גַּת and רִמּוֹן; wine-press of (the) pomegranate; Gath-Rimmon, a place in Palestine.

H1670.definition: from דָּאַב; properly, pining; by analogy, fear.

H1672.kjv: be afraid (careful, sorry), sorrow, take thought.

H1673.definition: or (fully) דּוֹאֵג; active participle of דָּאַג; anxious; Doeg, an Edomite.

H1675.definition: a primitive root; to dart, i.e. fly rapidly.

H1676.definition: from דָּאָה; the kite (from its rapid flight).

H1677.definition: or (fully) דּוֹב; from דָּבַב; the bear (as slow).

H1679.definition: from an unused root (compare דָּבַב) (probably meaning to be sluggish, i.e. restful); quiet.

H1680.definition: a primitive root (compare דֹּבֶא); to move slowly, i.e. glide.

H1681.definition: from דָּבַב (in the sense of furtive motion); slander.

H1682.definition: or (shortened) דְּבֹרָה; from דָבַר (in the sense of orderly motion); the bee (from its systematic instincts).

H1683.definition: or (shortened) דְּבֹרָה; the same as דְּבוֹרָה; Deborah, the name of two Hebrewesses.

H1684.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָבַח; to sacrifice (an animal).

H1686.definition: in the margin for the textual reading, חֶרְיוֹן; both, (in the plural only and) of uncertain derivation,; probably some cheap vegetable, perhaps a bulbous root.

H1687.definition: or (shortened) דְּבִר; from דָבַר (apparently in the sense of oracle); the shrine or innermost part of the sanctuary.

H1688.definition: or (shortened) דְּבִר; (Joshua 13:26 (but see לֹא דְבַר)), the same as דְּבִיר; Debir, the name of an Amoritish king and of two places in Palestine.

H1689.definition: probably an orthographical error for רִבְלָה; Diblah, a place in Syria.

H1690.definition: from an unused root (akin to זָבַל) probably meaning to press together; a cake of pressed figs.

H1691.definition: dual from the masculine of דְּבֵלָה; two cakes; Diblajim, a symbolic name.

H1692.definition: a primitive root; properly, to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere; figuratively, to catch by pursuit.
H1692.kjv: abide fast, cleave (fast together), follow close (hard after), be joined (together), keep (fast), overtake, pursue hard, stick, take.

H1693.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to דָּבַק; to stick to.

H1694.definition: from דָּבַק; a joint; by implication, solder.

H1696.definition: a primitive root; perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue.
H1696.kjv: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), utter, [idiom] well, [idiom] work.

H1697.definition: from דָבַר; a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause.
H1697.kjv: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [phrase] concern(-ing), [phrase] confer, counsel, [phrase] dearth, decree, deed, [idiom] disease, due, duty, effect, [phrase] eloquent, errand, (evil favoured-) ness, [phrase] glory, [phrase] harm, hurt, [phrase] iniquity, [phrase] judgment, language, [phrase] lying, manner, matter, message, (no) thing, oracle, [idiom] ought, [idiom] parts, [phrase] pertaining, [phrase] please, portion, [phrase] power, promise, provision, purpose, question, rate, reason, report, request, [idiom] (as hast) said, sake, saying, sentence, [phrase] sign, [phrase] so, some (uncleanness), somewhat to say, [phrase] song, speech, [idiom] spoken, talk, task, [phrase] that, [idiom] there done, thing (concerning), thought, [phrase] thus, tidings, what(-soever), [phrase] wherewith, which, word, work.

H1698.definition: from דָבַר (in the sense of destroying); a pestilence.

H1699.definition: from דָבַר (in its original sense); a pasture (from its arrangement of the flock).

H1700.definition: feminine of דָּבָר; a reason, suit or style.

H1702.definition: feminine active participle of דָבַר in the sense of driving (compare דֹּבֶר); a raft.

H1704.definition: from דָּבָר; wordy; Dibri, an Israelite.

H1705.definition: from דָּבָר (perhaps in the sense of דֹּבֶר); Daberath, a place in Palestine.

H1706.definition: from an unused root meaning to be gummy; honey (from its stickiness); by analogy, syrup.

H1707.definition: intensive from the same as דְּבַשׁ; a sticky mass, i.e. the hump of acamel.

H1708.definition: the same as דַּבֶּשֶׁת; Dabbesheth, a place in Palestine.

H1709.definition: or (fully) דָּאג; (Nehemiah 13:16), from דָּגָה; a fish (as prolific); or perhaps rather from דָּאַג (as timid); but still better from דָּאַג (in the sense of squirming, i.e. moving by the vibratory action of the tail); a fish (often used collectively).

H1711.definition: a primitive root; to move rapidly; used only as a denominative from דָּג; to spawn, i.e. become numerous.

H1712.definition: from דָּג; the fish-god; Dagon, a Philistine deity.

H1713.definition: a primitive root; to flaunt, i.e. raise a flag; figuratively, to be conspicuous.

H1715.definition: from דָּגָה; properly, increase, i.e. grain.

H1716.definition: a primitive root,; to brood over eggs or young.

H1717.definition: apparently from the same as דּוֹד; the breast (as the seat of love, or from its shape).

H1718.definition: a doubtful root; to walk gently.

H1719.definition: or (prolonged) דְּדָנֶה; (Ezekiel 25:13), of uncertain derivation; Dedan, the name of two Cushites and of their territory.

H1720.definition: plural of דְּדָן (as patrial); Dedanites, the descendants or inhabitants of Dedan.

H1721.definition: or (by orthographical error) רֹדָנִים (1 Chronicles 1:7); a plural of uncertain derivation; Dodanites, or descendants of a son of Javan.

H1723.definition: (Aramaic) of uncertain derivation; Dahava, a people colonized in Samaria.

H1724.definition: a primitive root (compare דּוּחַ); to be dumb, i.e. (figuratively) dumbfounded.

H1725.definition: a primitive root; to curvet or move irregularly.

H1726.definition: by reduplication from דָּהַר; a gallop.

H1727.definition: a primitive root; to mope, i.e. (figuratively) pine.

H1728.definition: an orthographical variation of דָּג as a denominative (דַּיָּג); a fisherman.

H1729.definition: feminine from the same as דַּוָּג; properly, fishery, i.e. a hook forfishing.

H1730.definition: or (shortened) דֹּד; from an unused root meaning properly, to boil, i.e.; (figuratively) to love; by implication, a love-token, lover, friend; specifically an uncle.

H1731.definition: from the same as דּוֹד; a pot (for boiling); also (by resemblance of shape) a basket.

H1732.definition: rarely (fully); דָּוִיד; from the same as דּוֹד; loving; David, the youngest son of Jesse.

H1734.definition: from דּוֹד; loving; Dodo, the name of three Israelites.

H1735.definition: from דּוֹד and יָהּ; love of Jah; Dodavah, an Israelite.

H1736.definition: from דּוּד; a boiler or basket; also the mandrake (as an aphrodisiac).

H1737.definition: formed like דּוּדַי; amatory; Dodai, an Israelite.

H1738.definition: a primitive root; to be sick (as if in menstruation).

H1739.kjv: faint, menstruous cloth, she that is sick, having sickness.

H1740.definition: a primitive root; to thrust away; figuratively, to cleanse.

H1743.definition: a primitive root; to bruise in a mortar.

H1744.definition: of uncertain derivation; the hoopoe or else the grouse.

H1745.definition: from an unused root meaning to be dumb (compare דָּמָה); silence; figuratively, death.

H1746.definition: the same as דּוּמָה; Dumah, a tribe and region of Arabia.

H1747.definition: from דָּמָה; stillness; adverbially, silently; abstractly quiet, trust.

H1752.definition: a primitive root; properly, to gyrate (or move in a circle), i.e. to remain.

H1754.definition: from דּוּר; a circle, ball or pile.

H1755.definition: or (shortened) דֹּר; from דּוּר; properly, a revolution of time, i.e. an age or generation; also a dwelling.

H1756.definition: or (by permutation) דֹּאר; (Joshua 17:11; 1 Kings 4:11), from דּוֹר; dwelling; Dor, a place in Palestine.

H1757.definition: (Aramaic) probably from דּוּר; circle or dwelling; Dura, a place in Babylonia.

H1758.definition: or דּוֹשׁ; or דִּישׁ; a primitive root; to trample or thresh.
H1758.kjv: break, tear, thresh, tread out (down), at grass (Jeremiah 50:11, by mistake for דֶּשֶׁא).

H1760.definition: or דָּחַח; (Jeremiah 23:12), a primitive root; to push down.
H1760.kjv: chase, drive away (on), overthrow, outcast, [idiom] sore, thrust, totter.

H1761.definition: (Aramaic) from the equivalent of דָּחָה; probably a musical instrument (as being struck).

H1762.definition: from דָּחָה; a push, i.e. (by implication) a fall.

H1763.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָחַל; to slink, i.e. (by implication) to fear, or (causatively) be formidable.

H1765.definition: a primitive root; to urge, i.e. hasten.

H1766.definition: a primitive root; to press, i.e. oppress.

H1767.definition: of uncertain derivation; enough (as noun or adverb), used chiefly with preposition in phrases.
H1767.kjv: able, according to, after (ability), among, as (oft as), (more than) enough, from, in, since, (much as is) sufficient(-ly), too much, very, when.

H1768.definition: (Aramaic) apparently for דָּא; that, used as relative conjunction, and especially (with a preposition) in adverbial phrases; also as preposition of.
H1768.kjv: [idiom] as, but, for(-asmuch [phrase]), [phrase] now, of, seeing, than, that, therefore, until, [phrase] what (-soever), when, which, whom, whose.

H1769.definition: or (shortened) דִּיבֹן; from דּוּב; pining; Dibon, the name of three places in Palestine.

H1772.definition: intensive from דָּאָה; a falcon (from its rapid flight).

H1774.definition: as if from דִּי and זָהָב; of gold; Dizahab, a place in the Desert.

H1775.definition: perhaps for דִּיבוֹן; Dimon, a place in Palestine.

H1776.definition: feminine of דִּימוֹן; Dimonah, a place in Palestine.

H1777.definition: or (Genesis 6:3) דּוּן; a primitive root; a straight course, i.e. sail direct.

H1779.definition: or (Job 19:29) דּוּן; from דִּין; judgement (the suit, justice, sentence or tribunal); by implication also strife.

H1781.definition: from דִּין; a judge or advocate.

H1783.definition: feminine of דִּין; justice; Dinah, the daughter of Jacob.

H1784.definition: (Aramaic) partial from uncertain primitive; a Dinaite or inhabitant of some unknown Assyria province.

H1785.definition: from a root corresp. to דּוּק; a battering-tower.

H1787.definition: (Diyshon, the same as דִּישֹׁן; Dishon, the name of two Edomites.

H1788.definition: from דּוּשׁ; the leaper, i.e. an antelope.

H1789.definition: another form of דִּישׁוֹן; Dishan, an Edomite.

H1790.definition: from an unused root (compare דָּכָה); crushed, i.e. (figuratively) injured.

H1791.definition: (Aramaic) or דָּךְ; (Aramaic), prolonged from דָּא; this.

H1792.definition: a primitive root (compare דָּכָה); to crumble; transitively, to bruise (literally or figuratively).
H1792.kjv: beat to pieces, break (in pieces), bruise, contrite, crush, destroy, humble, oppress, smite.

H1793.definition: from דָּכָא; crushed (literally powder, or figuratively, contrite).

H1794.definition: a primitive root (compare דַּךְ, דָּכָא); to collapse (phys. or mentally).

H1796.definition: from דָּכָה; a dashing of surf.

H1798.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָכָר; properly, a male, i.e. of sheep.

H1799.definition: (Aramaic) or דׇּכְרָן (Aramaic); corresponding to זִכְרוֹן; a register.

H1800.definition: from דָּלַל; properly, dangling, i.e. (by implication) weak or thin.

H1802.definition: a primitive root (compare דָּלַל); properly, to dangle, i.e. to let down abucket (for drawing out water); figuratively, to deliver.

H1803.definition: from דָּלָה; properly, something dangling, i.e. a loose thread or hair; figuratively, indigent.

H1804.definition: a primitive root; to roil water.

H1805.definition: or דֳּלִי; from דָּלָה; a pail or jar (for drawing water).

H1806.definition: or (prolonged) דְּלָיָהוּxlit Dᵉlâyâhhûw corrected to Dᵉlâyâhûw; from דָּלָה and יָהּ; Jah has delivered; Delajah, the name of five Israelites.

H1807.definition: lemma דִּלִילָה first vowel, corrected to דְּלִילָה; from דָּלַל; languishing; Delilah, a Philistine woman.

H1808.definition: from דָּלָה; something dangling, i.e. a bough.

H1809.definition: a primitive root (compare דָּלָה); to slacken or be feeble; figuratively, to be oppressed.
H1809.kjv: bring low, dry up, be emptied, be not equal, fail, be impoverished, be made thin.

H1810.definition: of uncertain derivation; Dilan, a place in Palestine.

H1811.definition: a primitive root; to drip; by implication, to weep.

H1813.definition: from דָּלַף; dripping; Dalphon, a son of Haman.

H1814.definition: a primitive root; to flame (literally or figuratively).
H1814.kjv: burning, chase, inflame, kindle, persecute(-or), pursue hotly.

H1817.definition: from דָּלָה; something swinging, i.e. the valve of adoor.

H1818.definition: from דָּמַם (compare אָדַם); blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood).

H1819.definition: a primitive root; to compare; by implication, to resemble, liken, consider.
H1819.kjv: compare, devise, (be) like(-n), mean, think, use similitudes.

H1820.definition: a primitive root; to be dumb or silent; hence, to fail or perish; trans. to destroy.
H1820.kjv: cease, be cut down (off), destroy, be brought to silence, be undone, [idiom] utterly.

H1823.definition: from דָּמָה; resemblance; concretely, model, shape; adverbially, like.

H1826.definition: a primitive root (compare דָּהַם, דָּמָה); to be dumb; by implication, to be astonished, to stop; also to perish.
H1826.kjv: cease, be cut down (off), forbear, hold peace, quiet self, rest, be silent, keep (put to) silence, be (stand) still, tarry, wait.

H1829.definition: feminine from the same as דֹּמֶן; a dung-heap; Dimnah, a place in Palestine.

H1831.definition: from דָּמַע; a tear; figuratively, juice.

H1833.definition: by orthographical variation from דַּמֶּשֶׂק; damask (as a fabric of Damascus).

H1834.definition: or דּוּמֶשֶׂק; or דַּרְמֶשֶׂק; of foreign origin; Damascus, a city of Syria.

H1835.definition: from דִּין; judge; Dan, one of the sons of Jacob; also the tribe descended from him, and its territory; likewise a place in Palestine colonized by them.

H1836.definition: (Aramaic) an orthographical variation of דֵּךְ; this.
H1836.kjv: (afore-) time, [phrase] after this manner, here (-after), one...another, such, there(-fore), these, this (matter), [phrase] thus, where(-fore), which.

H1837.definition: of uncertain derivation; Dannah, a place in Palestine.

H1838.definition: of uncertain derivation; Dinhabah, an Edomitish town.

H1839.definition: patronymically from דָּן; a Danite (often collectively) or descendants (or inhabitants) of Dan.

H1840.definition: in Ezekiel it is; דָּנִאֵל; from דָּן and אֵל; judge of God; Daniel or Danijel, the name of two Israelites.

H1841.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to דָנִיֵּאל; Danijel, the Hebrew prophet.

H1842.definition: from דָּן and (apparently) יַעַן; judge of purpose; Dan-Jaan, a place in Palestine.

H1845.definition: from יָדַע and אֵל; known of God; Deuel, an Israelite.

H1846.definition: a primitive root; to be extinguished; figuratively, to expire or be dried up.
H1846.kjv: be extinct, consumed, put out, quenched.

H1848.definition: from an unused root (meaning to push over); a stumbling-block.

H1849.definition: a primitive root; to knock; by analogy, to press severely.

H1850.definition: from דָּפַק; a knock; Dophkah, a place in the Desert.

H1851.definition: from דָּקַק; crushed, i.e. (by implication) small or thin.
H1851.kjv: dwarf, lean(-fleshed), very little thing, small, thin.

H1852.definition: from דָּקַק; something crumbling, i.e. fine (as a thin cloth).

H1853.definition: of foreign origin; Diklah, a region of Arabia.

H1854.definition: a primitive root (compare הָדַךְlemma הָדךְ missing vowel, corrected to הָדַךְ); to crush (or intransitively) crumble.
H1854.kjv: beat in pieces (small), bruise, make dust, (into) [idiom] powder, (be, very) small, stamp (small).

H1855.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to דָּקַק; to crumble or (trans.) crush.

H1856.definition: a primitive root; to stab; by analogy, to starve; figuratively, to revile.

H1857.definition: from דָּקַר; a stab; Deker, an Israelite.

H1858.definition: apparently from the same as דְּרוֹר; properly, a pearl (from its sheen as rapidly turned); by analogy, pearl-stone, i.e. mother-of-pearl or alabaster.

H1860.definition: or דֵּרָאוֹן; from an unused root (meaning to repulse); an object of aversion.

H1861.definition: (also dor-bawn'); of uncertain derivation; a goad.

H1862.definition: apparently from דַּר and דֵּעַ; pearl of knowledge; Darda, an Israelite.

H1864.definition: of uncertain derivation; the south; poet. the south wind.

H1865.definition: from an unused root (meaning to move rapidly); freedom; hence, spontaneity of outflow, and so clear.

H1866.definition: the same as דְּרוֹר, applied to a bird; the swift, a kind of swallow.

H1867.definition: of Persian origin; Darejavesh, a title (rather than name) of several Persian kings.

H1869.definition: a primitive root; to tread; by implication, to walk; also to string abow (by treading on it in bending).
H1869.kjv: archer, bend, come, draw, go (over), guide, lead (forth), thresh, tread (down), walk.

H1870.definition: from דָּרַךְ; a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb.
H1870.kjv: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

H1871.definition: of Persian origin; a 'drachma', or coin.

H1873.definition: probably a contraction from דַּרְדַּע; Dara, an Israelite.

H1874.definition: of uncertain derivation; Darkon, one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H1875.definition: a primitive root; properly, to tread or frequent; usually to follow (for pursuit or search); by implication, to seek or ask; specifically to worship.
H1875.kjv: ask, [idiom] at all, care for, [idiom] diligently, inquire, make inquisition, (necro-) mancer, question, require, search, seek (for, out), [idiom] surely.

H1877.definition: from דָּשָׁא; a sprout; by analogy, grass.

H1878.definition: a primitive root; also denominatively (from דֶּשֶׁן); to be fat; transitively, to fatten (or regard as fat); specifically to anoint; figuratively, to satisfy;  to remove (fat) ashes (of sacrifices).
H1878.kjv: accept, anoint, take away the (receive) ashes (from), make (wax) fat.

H1879.definition: from דָּשֵׁן; fat; figuratively, rich, fertile.

H1880.definition: from דָּשֵׁן; the fat; abstractly fatness, i.e. (figuratively) abundance; specifically the (fatty) ashes of sacrifices.

H1881.definition: of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; a royal edict or statute.

H1884.definition: (Aramaic) of Persian origin; meaning one skilled in law; a judge.

H1885.definition: of uncertain derivation; Dathan, an Israelite.

H1886.definition: or (Aramaic dual) דֹּתַיִן; (Genesis 37:17), of uncertain derivation; Dothan, a place in Palestine.

H1889.definition: xlit heâch corrected to heʼâch; from הֵא and אָח; aha!.

H1890.definition: by reduplication from יָהַב; gift (in sacrifice), i.e. holocaust.

H1891.definition: a primitive root; to be vain in act, word, or expectation; specifically to lead astray.

H1892.definition: or (rarely in the abs.) הֲבֵל; from הָבַל; emptiness or vanity; figuratively, something transitory and unsatisfactory; often used as an adverb.

H1893.definition: the same as הֶבֶל; Hebel, the son of Adam.

H1894.definition: only in plural, from an unused root meaning to be hard; ebony.

H1895.definition: a primitive root of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; to be a horoscopist.

H1896.definition: or (by permutation) הֵגַי; probably of Persian origin; Hege or Hegai, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H1897.definition: a primitive root (compare הָגִיג); to murmur (in pleasure or anger); by implication, to ponder.
H1897.kjv: imagine, meditate, mourn, mutter, roar, [idiom] sore, speak, study, talk, utter.

H1899.definition: from הָגָה; a muttering (in sighing, thought, or as thunder).

H1901.definition: from an unused root akin to הָגָה; properly, a murmur, i.e. complaint.

H1902.definition: intensive from הָגָה; a murmuring sound, i.e. a musical notation (probably similar to the modern affettuoso to indicate solemnity of movement); by implication, a machination.

H1903.definition: of uncertain derivation; perhaps suitable or turning.

H1904.definition: of uncertain (perhaps foreign) derivation; Hagar, the mother of Ishmael.

H1905.definition: or (prolonged) הַגְרִיאxlit Hagrîʼ corrected to Hagrîyʼ; perhaps patronymically from הָגָר; a Hagrite or member of a certain Arabian clan.

H1907.definition: (Aramaic) probably of foreign origin; a vizier.

H1908.definition: probably of foreign origin (compare אֲדַד); Hadad, the name of an idol, and of several kings of Edom.

H1909.definition: from הֲדַד and עֵזֶר; Hadad (is his) help; Hadadezer, a Syrian king.

H1910.definition: from הֲדַד and רִמּוֹן; Hadad-Rimmon, a place in Palestine.

H1911.definition: a primitive root (compare יָדָה); to stretch forth the hand.

H1913.definition: or הֲדֹרָם; probably of foreign derivation; Hadoram, a son of Joktan, and the tribe descended from him.

H1914.definition: of uncertain derivation; Hiddai, an Israelite.

H1915.definition: lemma הָדךְ missing vowel, corrected to הָדַךְ; a primitive root (compare דָּקַק); to crush with the foot.

H1916.definition: from an unused root meaning to stamp upon; a foot stool.

H1917.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of הֲדֹם; something stamped to pieces, i.e. a bit.

H1920.definition: a primitive root; to push away or down.

H1921.definition: a primitive root; to swell up (literally or figuratively, active or passive); by implication, to favor or honour, be high or proud.
H1921.kjv: countenance, crooked place, glorious, honour, put forth.

H1922.definition: lemma הֲדַּר extra dagesh, corrected to הֲדַר; (Aramaic) corresponding to הָדַר; to magnify (figuratively).

H1923.definition: (Aramaic) from הֲדַרlemma הֲדַּר extra dagesh, corrected to הֲדַר; magnificence.

H1924.definition: the same as הָדָר; Hadar, an Edomite.

H1925.definition: from הָדַר; honour; used (figuratively) for the capital city (Jerusalem).

H1926.definition: from הָדַר; magnificence, i.e. ornament or splendor.
H1926.kjv: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.

H1928.definition: from הֲדַר and עֵזֶר; Hadar (i.e. Hadad, הֲדַד) is his help; (i.e. Hadadezer, הֲדַדְעֶזֶר); Hadarezer,  a Syrian king.

H1929.definition: a shortened form of אֲהָהּ; ah! expressing grief.

H1931.definition: of which the feminine (beyond the Pentateuch) is הִיא; a primitive word, the third person pronoun singular; he (she or it); only expressed when emphatic or without a verb; also (intensively) self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are.
H1931.kjv: he, as for her, him(-self), it, the same, she (herself), such, that (...it), these, they, this, those, which (is), who.

H1933.definition: or הָוָה; a primitive root (compare אָוָה, הָיָה) supposed to mean properly, to breathe; to be (in the sense of existence).

H1934.definition: (Aramaic) or הָוָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to הָוָא; to exist; used in a great variety of applications (especially in connection with other words).
H1934.kjv: be, become, [phrase] behold, [phrase] came (to pass), [phrase] cease, [phrase] cleave, [phrase] consider, [phrase] do, [phrase] give, [phrase] have, [phrase] judge, [phrase] keep, [phrase] labour, [phrase] mingle (self), [phrase] put, [phrase] see, [phrase] seek, [phrase] set, [phrase] slay, [phrase] take heed, tremble, [phrase] walk, [phrase] would.

H1935.definition: from an unused root; grandeur (i.e. an imposing form and appearance).
H1935.kjv: beauty, comeliness, excellency, glorious, glory, goodly, honour, majesty.

H1936.definition: the same as הוֹד; Hod, an Israelite.

H1937.definition: a form of הוֹדַוְיָה; Hodevah (or Hodevjah), an Israelite.

H1938.definition: from הוֹד and יָהּ; majesty of Jah; Hodavjah, the name of three Israelites.

H1939.definition: a form of הוֹדַוְיָה; Hodajvah, an Israelite.

H1940.definition: a form for the feminine of יְהוּדִי; a Jewess.

H1941.definition: a form of הוֹדַוְיָה; Hodijah, the name of three Israelites.

H1942.definition: from הָוָא (in the sense of eagerly coveting and rushing upon; by implication, of falling); desire; also ruin.
H1942.kjv: calamity, iniquity, mischief, mischievous (thing), naughtiness, naughty, noisome, perverse thing, substance, very wickedness.

H1944.definition: of uncertain derivation; Hoham, a Canaanitish king.

H1945.definition: a prolonged form of הוֹ (akin to אוֹי); oh!.

H1946.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to הֲלַךְ; to go; causatively, to bring.

H1947.definition: feminine active participle of הָלַל; folly.

H1948.definition: from active participle of הָלַל; folly.

H1949.definition: a primitive root (compare הָמַם); to make an uproar, or agitate greatly.
H1949.kjv: destroy, move, make a noise, put, ring again.

H1950.definition: from הָמַם; raging; Homam, an Edomitish chieftain.

H1951.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be naught, i.e. (figuratively) to be (causatively, act) light.

H1952.definition: from the same as הוּן in the sense of אוֹן; wealth; by implication, enough.
H1952.kjv: enough, [phrase] for nought, riches, substance, wealth.

H1953.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁמַע; Jehovah has heard; Hoshama, an Israelite.

H1954.definition: from יָשַׁע; deliverer; Hoshea, the name of five Israelites.

H1955.definition: from יָשַׁע and יָהּ; Jah has saved; Hoshajah, the name of two Israelites.

H1956.definition: from יָתַר; he has caused to remain; Hothir, an Israelite.

H1957.definition: a primitive root (compare חָזָה); to dream.

H1959.definition: from an unused root (meaning to shout); acclamation.

H1960.definition: from the same as הֵידָד; properly, an acclaim, i.e. a choir of singers.

H1961.definition: a primitive root (compare הָוָא); to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary).
H1961.kjv: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (one-) self, require, [idiom] use.

H1964.definition: probably from יָכֹל (in the sense of capacity); a large public building, such as a palace or temple.

H1966.definition: from הָלַל (in the sense of brightness); the morning-star.

H1967.definition: another form for הוֹמָם; Hemam, an Idumaean.

H1968.definition: probably from אָמַן; faithful; Heman, the name of at least two Israelites.

H1969.definition: probably of Egyptian origin; a hin or liquid measure.

H1970.definition: a primitive root; apparently; to injure.

H1972.definition: probably denominatively from הָלְאָהxlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh; to remove or be remote.

H1973.definition: xlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh; from the primitive form of the article (hal); to the distance, i.e. far away; also (of time) thus far.
H1973.kjv: back, beyond, (hence,-) forward, hitherto, thence, forth, yonder.

H1974.definition: from הָלַל (in the sense of rejoicing); a celebration of thanksgiving for harvest.

H1976.definition: from the article (see הָלְאָהxlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh) and זֶה; this very.

H1978.definition: from הָלַךְ; a walk, i.e. (by implication) a step.

H1979.definition: feminine of הָלִיךְ; a walking; by implication, a procession or march, a caravan.

H1980.definition: akin to יָלַךְ; a primitive root; to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively).
H1980.kjv: (all) along, apace, behave (self), come, (on) continually, be conversant, depart, [phrase] be eased, enter, exercise (self), [phrase] follow, forth, forward, get, go (about, abroad, along, away, forward, on, out, up and down), [phrase] greater, grow, be wont to haunt, lead, march, [idiom] more and more, move (self), needs, on, pass (away), be at the point, quite, run (along), [phrase] send, speedily, spread, still, surely, [phrase] tale-bearer, [phrase] travel(-ler), walk (abroad, on, to and fro, up and down, to places), wander, wax, (way-) faring man, [idiom] be weak, whirl.

H1981.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to הָלַךְ (compare הוּךְ); to walk.

H1982.definition: from הָלַךְ; properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) a wayfarer; also a flowing.

H1983.definition: (Aramaic) from הֲלַךְ; properly, a journey, i.e. (by implication) toll on goods at aroad.

H1984.definition: a primitive root; to be clear (orig. of sound, but usually of color); to shine; hence, to make ashow, to boast; and thus to be (clamorously) foolish; to rave; causatively, to celebrate; also to stultify.
H1984.kjv: (make) boast (self), celebrate, commend, (deal, make), fool(-ish, -ly), glory, give (light), be (make, feign self) mad (against), give in marriage, (sing, be worthy of) praise, rage, renowned, shine.

H1985.definition: from הָלַל; praising (namely God); Hillel, an Israelite.

H1986.definition: a primitive root; to strike down; by implication, to hammer, stamp, conquer, disband.
H1986.kjv: beat (down), break (down), overcome, smite (with the hammer).

H1987.definition: from הָלַם; smiter; Helem, the name of two Israelites.

H1988.definition: from the article (see הָלְאָהxlit hâlᵉâh corrected to hâlᵉʼâh); hither.

H1990.definition: of uncertain derivation; Ham, a region of Palestine.

H1992.definition: or (prolonged) הֵמָּה; masculine plural from הֲלַךְ; they (only used when emphatic).
H1992.kjv: it, like, [idiom] (how, so) many (soever, more as) they (be), (the) same, [idiom] so, [idiom] such, their, them, these, they, those, which, who, whom, withal, ye.

H1993.definition: a primitive root (compare הוּם); to make a loud sound (like English 'hum'); by implication, to be in great commotion or tumult, to rage, war, moan, clamor.
H1993.kjv: clamorous, concourse, cry aloud, be disquieted, loud, mourn, be moved, make a noise, rage, roar, sound, be troubled, make in tumult, tumultuous, be in an uproar.

H1994.definition: (Aramaic) or (prolonged) הִמּוֹן; (Aramaic), corresponding to הֵם; they.

H1995.definition: or הָמֹן; (Ezekiel 5:7), from הָמָה; a noise, tumult, crowd; also disquietude, wealth.
H1995.kjv: abundance, company, many, multitude, multiply, noise, riches, rumbling, sounding, store, tumult.

H1996.definition: from הָמוֹן and גּוֹג; the multitude of Gog; the fanciful name of an emblematic place in Palestine.

H1997.definition: feminine of הָמוֹן; multitude; , the same as הֲמוֹן גּוֹג; Hamonah.

H1999.definition: or (too fully) הֲמוּלָּה; (Jeremiah 11:16), feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to rush (as rain with a windy roar); a sound.

H2000.definition: a primitive root (compare הוּם, הָמָה); properly, to put in commotion; by implication, to disturb, drive, destroy.
H2000.kjv: break, consume, crush, destroy, discomfit, trouble, vex.

H2001.definition: of foreign derivation; Haman, a Persian vizier.

H2002.definition: (Aramaic) but the text is הֲמוּנֵךְ; of foreign origin; a necklace.

H2003.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to crackle; a dry twig or brushwood.

H2004.definition: feminine plural from הוּא; they (only used when emphatic).
H2004.kjv: [idiom] in, such like, (with) them, thereby, therein, (more than) they, wherein, in which, whom, withal.

H2005.definition: a primitive particle; lo!; also (as expressing surprise) if.

H2006.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to הֵן; lo! also there(-fore), (un-) less, whether, but, if.

H2007.definition: prolongation for הֵן; themselves (often used emphatic for the copula, also in indirect relation).
H2007.kjv: [idiom] in, [idiom] such (and such things), their, (into) them, thence, therein, these, they (had), on this side, whose, wherein.

H2008.definition: from הֵן; hither or thither (but used both of place and time).
H2008.kjv: here, hither(-to), now, on this (that) side, [phrase] since, this (that) way, thitherward, [phrase] thus far, to...fro, [phrase] yet.

H2010.definition: from נוּחַ; permission of rest, i.e. quiet.

H2011.definition: probably of foreign origin; Hinnom, apparently a Jebusite.

H2012.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Hena, a place apparently in Mesopotamia.

H2013.kjv: hold peace (tongue), (keep) silence, be silent, still.

H2015.definition: a primitive root; to turn about or over; by implication, to change, overturn, return, pervert.
H2015.kjv: [idiom] become, change, come, be converted, give, make (a bed), overthrow (-turn), perverse, retire, tumble, turn (again, aside, back, to the contrary, every way).

H2016.definition: ; or הֵפֶךְ; from הָפַךְ; a turn, i.e. the reverse.

H2017.definition: from הָפַךְ; an upset, i.e. (abstract) perversity.

H2019.definition: by reduplication from הָפַךְ; very perverse.

H2021.definition: from an unused root meaning apparently to be sharp or strong; a weapon of war.

H2022.definition: a shortened form of הָרָר; a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively).

H2023.definition: another form of הַר; mountain; Hor, the name of a peak in Idumaea and of one in Syria.

H2024.definition: perhaps from הַר; mountainousness; Hara, a region of Media.

H2025.definition: from הַר and אֵל; mount of God; figuratively, the altar of burnt-offering.

H2026.definition: a primitive root; to smite with deadly intent.
H2026.kjv: destroy, out of hand, kill, murder(-er), put to (death), make (slaughter), slay(-er), [idiom] surely.

H2029.definition: a primitive root; to be (or become) pregnant, conceive (literally or figuratively).
H2029.kjv: been, be with child, conceive, progenitor.

H2031.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to הָרָה; a mental conception.

H2033.definition: another form for הֲרָרִי; a Harorite or mountaineer.

H2036.definition: from an unused root (meaning to tower up); high; Horam, a Canaanitish king.

H2037.definition: passive participle of the same as הֹרָם; high; Harum, an Israelite.

H2038.definition: from the same as הֹרָם; a castle (from its height).

H2039.definition: perhaps from הַר; mountaineer; Haran, the name of two men.

H2040.definition: a primitive root; to pull down or in pieces, break, destroy.
H2040.kjv: beat down, break (down, through), destroy, overthrow, pluck down, pull down, ruin, throw down, [idiom] utterly.

H2042.definition: from an unused root meaning to loom up; a mountain.

H2044.definition: perhaps from the same as חָשֻׁם; wealthy; Hashem, an Israelite.

H2047.definition: probably of foreign origin; Hathak, a Persian eunuch.

H2048.definition: a primitive root; to deride; by implication, to cheat.

H2049.definition: from הָתַל (only in plural collectively); a derision.

H2050.definition: xlit hâthathʼ corrected to hâthath; a primitive root; properly, to break in upon, i.e. to assail.

H2051.definition: perhaps for עֵדֶן; Vedan (or Aden), a place in Arabia.

H2052.definition: of uncertain derivation; Vaheb, a place in Moab.

H2053.definition: probably; a hook (the name of the sixth Hebrew letter).

H2054.definition: presumed to be from an unused root meaning to bear guilt; crime.

H2055.definition: of foreign origin; Vajezatha, a son of Haman.

H2057.definition: perhaps for עֲנָיָה; Vanjah, an Israelite.

H2058.definition: probably from יָסַף; additional; Vophsi, an Israelite.

H2059.definition: probably from יִשְׁמְרַי; weak; Vashni, an Israelite.

H2060.definition: of Persian origin; Vashti, the queen of Xerxes.

H2061.definition: from an unused root meaning to be yellow; a wolf.

H2062.definition: the same as זְאֵב; Zeeb, a Midianitish prince.

H2063.definition: irregular feminine of זֶה; this (often used adverb).
H2063.kjv: hereby (-in, -with), it, likewise, the one (other, same), she, so (much), such (deed), that, therefore, these, this (thing), thus.

H2066.definition: from זָבַד; giver; Zabad, the name of seven Israelites.

H2067.definition: from זֶבֶד; giving; Zabdi, the name of four Israelites.

H2068.definition: from זֶבֶד and אֵל; gift of God; zabdiel, the name of two Israelites.

H2069.definition: or זְבַדְיָהוּ; from זָבַד and יָהּ; Jah has given; Zebadjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H2070.definition: from an unused root (meaning to flit); a fly (especially one of a stinging nature).

H2071.definition: from זָבַד; given, Zabud, an Israelite.

H2072.definition: a form of זָבוּד; given; Zabbud, an Israelite.

H2073.definition: or זְבֻל; from זָבַל; a residence.

H2074.definition: or זְבֻלוּן; or זְבוּלֻן; from זָבַל; habitation; Zebulon, a son of Jacob; also his territory and tribe.

H2075.definition: patronymically from זְבוּלוּן; a Zebulonite or descendant of Zebulun.

H2076.definition: a primitive root; to slaughter an animal (usually in sacrifice).

H2077.definition: from זָבַח; properly, a slaughter, i.e. the flesh of an animal; by implication, a sacrifice (the victim or the act).

H2078.definition: the same as זֶבַח; sacrifice; Zebach, a Midianitish prince.

H2079.definition: probably by orthographical error for זַכַּי; Zabbai (or Zaccai), an Israelite.

H2080.definition: feminine from זָבַד; giving; Zebidah, an Israelitess.

H2081.definition: from an unused root (meaning to purchase); gainfulness; Zebina, an Israelite.

H2082.definition: a primitive root; apparently properly, to inclose, i.e.; to reside.

H2083.definition: the same as זְבוּל; dwelling; Zebul, an Israelite.

H2084.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of זְבִינָא; to acquire by purchase.

H2085.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to inclose; the skin of a grape.

H2088.definition: a primitive word; the masculine demonstrative pronoun, this or that.
H2088.kjv: he, [idiom] hence, [idiom] here, it(-self), [idiom] now, [idiom] of him, the one...the other, [idiom] than the other, ([idiom] out of) the (self) same, such (a one) that, these, this (hath, man), on this side...on that side, [idiom] thus, very, which. Compare זֹאת, זֹה, זוֹ, זוּ.

H2089.definition: (1 Samuel by permutation for שֶׂה; a sheep.

H2090.kjv: as well as another, it, this, that, thus and thus.

H2091.definition: from an unused root meaning to shimmer; gold, figuratively, something gold-colored (i.e. yellow), as oil, a clear sky.

H2092.definition: a primitive root; to be rancid, i.e. (transitively) to loathe.

H2093.definition: from זָהַם; loathing; Zaham, an Israelite.

H2094.definition: a primitive root; to gleam; figuratively, to enlighten (by caution).

H2099.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to be prominent; properly, brightness (compare זִיו), i.e. (figuratively) the month of flowers; Ziv (corresponding to Ijar or May).

H2100.definition: a primitive root; to flow freely (as water), i.e. (specifically) to have a (sexual) flux; figuratively, to waste away; also to overflow.
H2100.kjv: flow, gush out, have a (running) issue, pine away, run.

H2101.definition: from זוּב; a seminal or menstrual flux.

H2102.definition: or (by permutation) זִיד; a primitive root; to seethe; figuratively, to be insolent.
H2102.kjv: be proud, deal proudly, presume, (come) presumptuously, sod.

H2103.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זוּד; to be proud.

H2104.definition: plural probably from the same as זִיז; prominent; Zuzites, an aboriginal tribe of Palestine.

H2105.definition: of uncertain origin; Zocheth, an Israelite.

H2106.definition: apparently from the same root as זִו (in the sense of prominence); an angle (as projecting), i.e. (by implication) a corner-column (or anta).

H2107.definition: a primitive root (compare זָלַל); probably to shake out, i.e. (by implication) to scatter profusely; figuratively, to treat lightly.

H2108.definition: from זוּל; probably scattering, i.e. removal; used adverbially, except.

H2109.definition: a primitive root; perhaps properly, to be plump, i.e. (transitively) to nourish.

H2111.definition: a primitive root; properly, to shake off, i.e. (figuratively) to agitate (as with fear).

H2112.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זוּעַ; to shake (with fear).

H2113.kjv: be removed, trouble, vexation. Compare זַעֲוָה.

H2114.definition: a primitive root; to turn aside (especially for lodging); hence to be aforeigner, strange, profane; specifically (active participle) to commit adultery.
H2114.kjv: (come from) another (man, place), fanner, go away, (e-) strange(-r, thing, woman).

H2115.definition: a primitive root (compare צוֹק); to press together, tighten.

H2117.definition: probably from the root of זִיז; prominent; Zaza, an Israelite.

H2118.definition: a primitive root; to shove or displace.

H2119.definition: a primitive root; to crawl; by implication, to fear.

H2120.definition: feminine active participle of זָחַל; crawling (i.e. serpent); Zocheleth, a boundary stone in. Palestine.

H2121.definition: from זוּד; boiling of water, i.e. wave.

H2123.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to be conspicuous; fulness of the breast; also a moving creature.

H2124.definition: apparently from the same as זִיז; prominence; Ziza, the name of two Israelites.

H2125.definition: another form for זִיזָא; Zizah, an Israelite.

H2126.definition: from זוּן; well-fed; or perhaps an orthographical error for זִיזָא; Zina, an Israelite.

H2127.definition: from זוּעַ; agitation; Zia, an Israelite.

H2128.definition: from the same as זֶפֶת; flowing; Ziph, the name of a place in Palestine; also of an Israelite.

H2129.definition: feminine of זִיף; a flowing; Ziphah, an Israelite.

H2130.definition: patrial from זִיף; a Ziphite or inhabitant of Ziph.

H2131.definition: (Isaiah 50: (feminine); and זִק; or זֵק; from זָנַק; properly, what leaps forth, i.e. flash of fire, or a burning arrow; also (from the original sense of the root) a bond.

H2132.definition: probably from an unused root (akin to זִו); an olive (as yielding illuminating oil), the tree, the branch or the berry.

H2133.definition: from זַיִת; olive grove; Zethan, an Israelite.

H2135.definition: a primitive root (compare זָכַךְ); to be translucent; figuratively, to be innocent.
H2135.kjv: be (make) clean, cleanse, be clear, count pure.

H2136.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to זָכָה; purity.

H2137.definition: from זָכָה; properly, transparency, i.e. glass.

H2138.definition: properly, passive participle of זָכַר, but used for זָכָר; a male (of man or animals).

H2139.definition: from זָכַר; mindful; Zakkur, the name of seven Israelites.

H2140.definition: from זָכַךְ; pure; Zakkai, an Israelite.

H2141.definition: a primitive root (compare זָכָה); to be transparent or clean (phys. or morally).

H2142.definition: a primitive root; also as denominative from זָכָר; properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male.
H2142.kjv: [idiom] burn (incense), [idiom] earnestly, be male, (make) mention (of), be mindful, recount, record(-er), remember, make to be remembered, bring (call, come, keep, put) to (in) remembrance, [idiom] still, think on, [idiom] well.

H2143.definition: or זֶכֶר; from זָכַר; a memento, abstractly recollection (rarely if ever); by implication, commemoration.

H2144.definition: the same as זֵכֶר; Zeker, an Israelite.

H2145.definition: from זָכַר; properly, remembered, i.e. a male (of man or animals, as being the most noteworthy sex).

H2146.definition: from זָכַר; a memento (or memorable thing, day or writing).

H2147.definition: from זָכַר; memorable; Zicri, the name of twelve Israelites.

H2148.definition: or זְכַרְיָהוּ; from זָכַר and יָהּ; Jah has remembered; Zecarjah, the name of twenty-nine Israelites.

H2149.definition: from זָלַל; properly, a shaking, i.e. perhaps a tempest.

H2150.definition: by reduplication from זָלַל; tremulous, i.e. a twig.

H2151.definition: a primitive root (compare זוּל); to shake (as in the wind), i.e. to quake; figuratively, to be loose morally, worthless or prodigal.

H2152.definition: or זִלְעָפָהxlit zilʻâphâph corrected to zilʻâphâh; from זָעַף; a glow (of wind or anger); also a famine (as consuming).

H2153.definition: ; from an unused root apparently meaning to trickle, as myrrh; fragrant dropping; Zilpah, Leah's maid.

H2154.definition: or זַמָּה; from זָמַם; a plan, especially a bad one.
H2154.kjv: heinous crime, lewd(-ly, -ness), mischief, purpose, thought, wicked (device, mind, -ness).

H2155.definition: the same as זִמָּה; Zimmah, the name of two Israelites.

H2156.definition: or זְמֹרָה (feminine); and זְמֹר (masculine); from זָמַר; a twig (as pruned).

H2157.definition: from זָמַם; intriguing; a Zamzumite, or native tribe of Palestine.

H2158.definition: or זָמִר; and (feminine) זְמִרָה; from זָמַר; a song to be accompanied with instrumental music.

H2160.definition: feminine of זָמִיר; song; Zemirah, an Israelite.

H2161.definition: a primitive root; to plan, usually in a bad sense.
H2161.kjv: consider, devise, imagine, plot, purpose, think (evil).

H2163.definition: a primitive root; to fix (a time).

H2164.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָמַן; to agree (on a time and place).

H2167.definition: a primitive root (perhaps identical with זָמַר through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a musical instrument, i.e.; play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music.
H2167.kjv: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.

H2168.definition: a primitive root (compare זָמַר, סָמַר, צֶמֶר); to trim (a vine).

H2169.definition: apparently from זָמַר or זָמַר; a gazelle (from its lightly touching the ground).

H2170.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to זָמַר; instrumental music.

H2171.definition: (Aramaic) from the same as זְמָר; an instrumental musician.

H2172.definition: from זָמַר; a musical piece or song to be accompanied by an instrument.

H2174.definition: from זָמַר; musical; Zimri, the name of five Israelites, and of an Arabian tribe.

H2175.definition: from זָמַר; musical; Zimran, a son of Abraham by Keturah.

H2176.definition: from זָמַר; instrumental music; by implication, praise.

H2177.definition: from זוּן; properly, nourished (or fully developed), i.e. a form or sort.
H2177.kjv: divers kinds, [idiom] all manner of store.

H2179.definition: a primitive root meaning to wag; used only as a denominative from זָנָב; to curtail, i.e. cut off the rear.

H2180.definition: from זָנַב (in the original sense of flapping); the tail (literally or figuratively).

H2181.definition: a primitive root (highly-fed and therefore wanton); to commit adultery (usually of the female, and less often of simple fornication, rarely of involuntary ravishment); figuratively, to commit idolatry (the Jewish people being regarded as the spouse of Jehovah).
H2181.kjv: (cause to) commit fornication, [idiom] continually, [idiom] great, (be an, play the) harlot, (cause to be, play the) whore, (commit, fall to) whoredom, (cause to) go a-whoring, whorish.

H2182.definition: from זָנַח; rejected; Zanoach, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2184.definition: from זָנָה; adultery, i.e. (figuratively) infidelity, idolatry.

H2185.definition: regarded by some as if from זוּן or an unused root, and applied to military equipments; but evidently the feminine plural active participle of זָנָה; harlots.

H2186.definition: a primitive root meaning to push aside, i.e.; reject, forsake, fail.

H2187.definition: a primitive root; properly, to draw together the feet (as an animal about to dart upon its prey), i.e. to spring forward.

H2188.definition: from זוּעַ (in the sense of יֶזַע); perspiration.

H2189.definition: by transposition for זְוָעָה; agitation, maltreatment.

H2190.definition: from זוּעַ; disquiet; Zaavan, an Idumaean.

H2191.definition: xlit zeʻêyr corrected to zᵉʻêyr; from an unused root (akin (by permutation) to צָעַר), meaning to dwindle; small.

H2194.definition: a primitive root; properly, to foam at the mouth, i.e. to be enraged.

H2195.definition: from זָעַם; strictly froth at the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) fury (especially of God's displeasure with sin).

H2196.definition: a primitive root; properly, to boil up, i.e. (figuratively) to be peevish or angry.
H2196.kjv: fret, sad, worse liking, be wroth.

H2199.definition: a primitive root; to shriek (from anguish or danger); by analogy, (as a herald) to announce or convene publicly.
H2199.kjv: assemble, call (together), (make a) cry (out), come with such a company, gather (together), cause to be proclaimed.

H2200.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָעַק; to make an outcry.

H2201.definition: and (feminine) זְעָקָהxlit zᵉâqâh corrected to zᵉʻâqâh; from זָעַק; a shriek or outcry.

H2202.definition: from an unused root (meaning to be fragrant); Ziphron, a place in Palestine.

H2203.definition: from an unused root (meaning to liquify); asphalt (from its tendency to soften in the sun).

H2204.definition: a primitive root; to be old.

H2205.kjv: aged, ancient (man), elder(-est), old (man, men and...women), senator.

H2206.definition: from זָקֵן; the beard (as indicating age).

H2208.definition: lemma זָקֻ missing final nun, corrected to זָקֻן; properly, passive participle of זָקֵן (used only in the plural as a noun); old age.

H2210.definition: a primitive root; to life, i.e. (figuratively) comfort.

H2211.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to זָקַף; to hang, i.e. impale.

H2212.definition: a primitive root; to strain, (figuratively) extract, clarify.
H2212.kjv: fine, pour down, purge, purify, refine.

H2213.definition: from זָרַר (in the sense of scattering); a chaplet (as spread around the top), i.e. (specifically) a border moulding.

H2214.definition: from זוּר (in the sense of estrangement) (compare זָרָה); disgust.

H2215.definition: a primitive root; to flow away.

H2216.definition: from זָרַב and בָּבֶל; descended of (i.e. from) Babylon, i.e. born there; Zerubbabel, an Israelite.

H2218.definition: from an unused root meaning to be exuberant in growth; lined with shrubbery; Zered, a brook East of the Dead Sea.

H2219.definition: a primitive root (compare זוּר); to toss about; by implication, to diffuse, winnow.
H2219.kjv: cast away, compass, disperse, fan, scatter (away), spread, strew, winnow.

H2220.definition: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from זָרַע; the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force.
H2220.kjv: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.

H2221.definition: from זָרַע; something sown, i.e. a plant.

H2222.definition: by reduplication from an unused root meaning to flow; a pouring rain.

H2223.definition: by reduplication from זוּר; properly, tightly girt, i.e. probably a racer, or some fleet animal (as being slender in the waist).

H2224.definition: a primitive root; properly, to irradiate (or shoot forth beams), i.e. to rise (as the sun); specifically, to appear (as a symptom of leprosy).
H2224.kjv: arise, rise (up), as soon as it is up.

H2225.definition: from זָרַח; a rising of light.

H2226.definition: the same as זֶרַח; Zerach, the name of three Israelites, also of an Idumaean and an Ethiopian prince.

H2227.definition: patronymically from זֶרַח; a Zarchite or descendant of Zerach.

H2228.definition: from זֶרַח and יָהּ; Jah has risen; Zerachjah, the name of two Israelites.

H2229.definition: a primitive root; to gush (as water).
H2229.kjv: carry away as with a flood, pour out.

H2230.definition: from זָרַם; a gush of water.

H2231.definition: feminine of זֶרֶם; a gushing of fluid (semen).

H2232.definition: a primitive root; to sow; figuratively, to disseminate, plant, fructify.
H2232.kjv: bear, conceive seed, set with sow(-er), yield.

H2233.definition: from זָרַע; seed; figuratively, fruit, plant, sowing-time, posterity.

H2235.definition: or זֵרָעֹן; from זָרַע; something sown (only in the plural), i.e. a vegetable (as food).

H2236.definition: a primitive root; to sprinkle (fluid or solid particles).
H2236.kjv: be here and there, scatter, sprinkle, strew.

H2237.definition: a primitive root (compare זוּר); perhaps to diffuse, i.e. (specifically) to sneeze.

H2238.definition: of Persian origin; Zeresh, Haman's wife.

H2239.definition: from זָרָה; the spread of the fingers, i.e. a span.

H2240.definition: of uncertain derivation; Zattu, an Israelite.

H2241.definition: apparently a variation for זֵיתָן; Zetham, an Israelite.

H2242.definition: of Persian origin; Zethar, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H2243.definition: by contraction from חָבַב; properly, a cherisher, i.e. the bosom.

H2244.definition: a primitive root (compare חָבַב); to secrete.

H2245.definition: a primitive root (compare חָבָא, חָבָה); properly, to hide (as in the bosom), i.e. to cherish (with affection).

H2246.definition: from חָבַב; cherished; Chobab, father-in-law of Moses.

H2247.definition: a primitive root (compare חָבַב); to secrete.

H2248.definition: (Aramaic) from חֲבַל; properly, overthrown, i.e. (morally) crime.

H2249.definition: from חָבַר; united; Chabor, a river of Assyria.

H2250.definition: or חַבֻּרָה; or חֲבֻרָה; from חָבַר; properly, bound (with stripes), i.e. a weal (or black-and-blue mark itself).

H2251.definition: a primitive root; to knock out or off.

H2252.definition: or חֲבָיָהlemma חֲבָיה missing vowel, corrected to חֲבָיָה; from חָבָה and יָהּ; Jah has hidden; Chabajah, an Israelite.

H2254.definition: a primitive root; to wind tightly (as a rope), i.e. to bind; specifically, by a pledge; figuratively, to pervert, destroy; also to writhe in pain (especially of parturition).
H2254.kjv: [idiom] at all, band, bring forth, (deal) corrupt(-ly), destroy, offend, lay to (take a) pledge, spoil, travail, [idiom] very, withhold.

H2256.definition: or חֵבֶל; from חָבַל; a rope (as twisted), especially a measuring line; by implication, a district or inheritance (as measured); or a noose (as of cords); figuratively, a company (as if tied together); also a throe (especially of parturition); also ruin.
H2256.kjv: band, coast, company, cord, country, destruction, line, lot, pain, pang, portion, region, rope, snare, sorrow, tackling.

H2258.definition: or (feminine) חֲבֹלָה; from חָבַל; a pawn (as security for debt).

H2259.definition: active participle from חָבַל (in the sense of handling ropes); a sailor.

H2260.definition: from חָבַל (in the sense of furnished with ropes); a mast.

H2262.definition: of uncertain derivation; Chabatstsanjah, a Rechabite.

H2263.definition: a primitive root; to clasp (the hands or in embrace).

H2264.definition: from חָבַק; a clasping of the hands (in idleness).

H2265.definition: by reduplication from חָבַק; embrace; Chabakkuk, the prophet.

H2266.definition: a primitive root; to join (literally or figuratively); specifically (by means of spells) to fascinate.
H2266.kjv: charm(-er), be compact, couple (together), have fellowship with, heap up, join (self, together), league.

H2267.definition: from חָבַר; a society; also a spell.

H2268.definition: the same as חֶבֶר; community; Cheber, the name of a Kenite and of three Israelites.

H2269.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָבַר; an associate.

H2272.definition: by reduplication from חָבַר; a streak (like a line), as on the tiger.

H2275.definition: from חֶבֶר; seat of association; Chebron, a place in Palestine, also the name of two Israelites.

H2276.definition: or חֶבְרֹנִי; patronymically from חֶבְרוֹן; Chebronite (collectively), an inhabitant of Chebron.

H2277.definition: patronymically from חֶבֶר; a Chebrite (collectively) or descendants of Cheber.

H2279.definition: feminine active participle of חָבַר; a joint.

H2280.definition: a primitive root; to wrap firmly (especially a turban, compress, or saddle); figuratively, to stop, to rule.
H2280.kjv: bind (up), gird about, govern, healer, put, saddle, wrap about.

H2281.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to cook (compare מַחֲבַת); something fried, probably a griddle-cake.

H2282.definition: or חָג; from חָגַג; a festival, or a victim therefor.

H2283.definition: from an unused root meaning to revolve (compare חָגַג); properly, vertigo, i.e. (figuratively) fear.

H2285.definition: the same as חָגָב; locust; Chagab, one of the Nethinim.

H2286.definition: or חֲגָבָה; feminine of חָגָב; locust; Chagaba or Chagabah, one of the Nethinim.

H2287.definition: a primitive root (compare חָגָא, חוּג); properly, to move in acircle, i.e. (specifically) to march in asacred procession, to observe afestival; by implication, to be giddy.
H2287.kjv: celebrate, dance, (keep, hold) a (solemn) feast (holiday), reel to and fro.

H2288.definition: from an unused root meaning to take refuge; a rift in rocks.

H2290.definition: or חֲגֹר; and (feminine) חֲגוֹרָה; or חֲגֹרָה; from חָגַר; a belt (for the waist).

H2291.definition: from חָגַג; festive; Chaggi, an Israelite; also (patronymically) a Chaggite, or descendant of the same.

H2292.definition: from חַג; festive; Chaggai, a Hebrew prophet.

H2293.definition: from חַג and יָהּ; festival of Jah; Chaggijah, an Israelite.

H2294.definition: xlit Chaggiyîth corrected to Chaggîyth; feminine of חַגִּי; festive; Chaggith, a wife of David.

H2295.definition: of uncertain derivation; probably a partridge; Choglah, an Israelitess.

H2296.definition: a primitive root; to gird on (as a belt, armor, etc.).
H2296.kjv: be able to put on, be afraid, appointed, gird, restrain, [idiom] on every side.

H2298.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חַד; as card. one; as article single; as an ordinal, first; adverbially, at once.

H2300.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) sharp or (figuratively) severe.

H2301.definition: from חָדַד; fierce; Chadad, an Ishmaelite.

H2307.definition: from חָדַד; a peak; Chadid, a place in Palestine.

H2308.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be flabby, i.e. (by implication) desist; (figuratively) be lacking or idle.
H2308.kjv: cease, end, fall, forbear, forsake, leave (off), let alone, rest, be unoccupied, want.

H2309.definition: from חָדַל; rest, i.e. the state of the dead.

H2310.definition: from חָדַל; vacant, i.e. ceasing or destitute.

H2311.definition: from חֶדֶל; idle; Chadlai, an Israelite.

H2312.definition: from an unused root meaning to sting; a prickly plant.

H2313.definition: probably of foreign origin; the Chiddekel (or Tigris) river.

H2314.definition: a primitive root; properly, to inclose (as a room), i.e. (by analogy,) to beset (as in a siege).

H2315.kjv: ((bed) inner) chamber, innermost(-ward) part, parlour, [phrase] south, [idiom] within.

H2316.definition: another form for חֶדֶר; chamber; Chadar, an Ishmaelite.

H2317.definition: of uncertain derivation; Chadrak, a Syrian deity.

H2318.definition: a primitive root; to be new; causatively, to rebuild.

H2320.definition: from חָדַשׁ; the new moon; by implication, a month.

H2321.definition: the same as חֹדֶשׁ; Chodesh, an Israelitess.

H2322.definition: feminine of חָדָשׁ; new; Chadashah, a place in Palestine.

H2325.definition: also חָיַב; a primitive root; properly, perhaps to tie, i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) to owe, or (by implication) to forfeit.

H2327.definition: feminine active participle of חָבָה; hiding place; Chobah, a place in Syria.

H2328.definition: a primitive root (compare חָגַג); to describe a circle.

H2330.definition: a primitive root; properly, to tie a knot, i.e. (figuratively) to propound a riddle.

H2331.definition: a primitive root; (compare חֲוָא, חָיָה); properly, to live; by implication (intensively) to declare or show.

H2332.definition: causatively from חָוָה; life-giver; Chavvah (or Eve), the first woman.

H2333.definition: properly, the same as חַוָּה (lifegiving, i.e. living-place); by implication, an encampment or village.

H2334.definition: from the plural of חַוָּה and a modification of יָעוּר; hamlets of Jair, a region of Palestine.

H2335.definition: from חֹזֶה; visionary; Chozai, an Israelite.

H2336.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to pierce; a thorn; by analogy, a ring forthe nose.

H2337.definition: perhaps the same as חוֹחַ; a dell or crevice (as if pierced in the earth).

H2338.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of חוּט, perhaps as a denominative; to string together, i.e. (figuratively) to repair.

H2339.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to sew; a string; by implication, a measuring tape.

H2340.definition: perhaps from חַוָּה; a villager; a Chivvite, one of the aboriginal tribes of Palestine.

H2341.definition: probably from חוּל; circular; Chavilah, the name of two or three eastern regions; also perhaps of two men.

H2342.definition: or חִיל; a primitive root; properly, to twist or whirl (in a circular or spiral manner), i.e. (specifically) to dance, to writhe in pain (especially of parturition) or fear; figuratively, to wait, to pervert.
H2342.kjv: bear, (make to) bring forth, (make to) calve, dance, drive away, fall grievously (with pain), fear, form, great, grieve, (be) grievous, hope, look, make, be in pain, be much (sore) pained, rest, shake, shapen, (be) sorrow(-ful), stay, tarry, travail (with pain), tremble, trust, wait carefully (patiently), be wounded.

H2343.definition: from חוּל; a circle; Chul, a son of Aram; also the region settled by him.

H2344.definition: from חוּל; sand (as round or whirling particles).

H2345.definition: from an unused root meaning to be warm, i.e. (by implication); sunburnt or swarthy (blackish).

H2346.definition: feminine active participle of an unused root apparently meaning to join; a wall of protection.

H2347.definition: a primitive root; properly, to cover, i.e. (figuratively) to compassionate.

H2348.definition: from an unused root meaning to cover; a cove (as a sheltered bay).
H2348.kjv: coast (of the sea), haven, shore, (sea-) side.

H2349.definition: from the same as חוֹף; protection; Chupham, an Israelite.

H2350.definition: patronymically from חוּפָם; a Chuphamite or descendant of Chupham.

H2351.definition: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever; properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors.
H2351.kjv: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.

H2352.definition: or (shortened) חֻר; from an unused root probably meaning to bore; the crevice of a serpent; the cell of aprison.

H2354.definition: the same as חוּר or חוּר; Chur, the name of four Israelites and one Midianite.

H2355.definition: the same as חוּר; white linen.

H2356.definition: or (shortened) חֹר; the same as חוּר; a cavity, socket, den.

H2357.definition: a primitive root; to blanch (as with shame).

H2358.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָוַר; white.

H2359.definition: probably from חוּר; linen-worker; Churi, an Israelite.

H2360.definition: probably an orthographical variation for חוּרִי; Churai, an Israelite.

H2361.definition: probably from חוּר; whiteness, i.e. noble; Churam, the name of an Israelite and two Syrians.

H2362.definition: apparently from חָוַר (in the sense of חוּר); cavernous; Chavran, a region East of the Jordan.

H2363.definition: a primitive root; to hurry; figuratively, to be eager with excitement or enjoyment.

H2364.definition: from חוּשׁ; haste; Chushah, an Israelite.

H2365.definition: from חוּשׁ; hasty; Chushai, an Israelite.

H2366.definition: or חֻשִׁים; or חֻשִׁם; plural from חוּשׁ; hasters; Chushim, the name of three Israelites.

H2367.definition: or חֻשָׁם; from חוּשׁ; hastily; Chusham, an Idumaean.

H2368.definition: or חֹתָם; from חָתַם; a signature-ring.

H2369.definition: the same as חוֹתָם; seal; Chotham, the name of two Israelites.

H2370.definition: (Aramaic) or חֲזָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to חָזָה; to gaze upon; mentally to dream, be usual (i.e. seem).
H2370.kjv: behold, have (a dream), see, be wont.

H2371.definition: or חֲזָהאֵל; from חָזָה and אֵל; God has seen; Chazael, a king of Syria.

H2372.definition: a primitive root; to gaze at; mentally to perceive, contemplate (with pleasure); specifically, to have avision of.

H2373.definition: from חָזָה; the breast (as most seen in front).

H2374.definition: active participle of חָזָה; a beholder in vision; also a compact (as looked upon with approval).
H2374.kjv: agreement, prophet, see that, seer, (star-) gazer.

H2375.definition: from חָזָה; seer; Chazo, a nephew of Abraham.

H2377.definition: from חָזָה; a sight (mentally), i.e. a dream, revelation, or oracle.

H2380.definition: from חָזָה; a look; hence (figuratively) striking appearance, revelation, or (by implication) compact.

H2381.definition: from חָזָה and אֵל; seen of God; Chaziel, a Levite.

H2382.definition: from חָזָה and יָהּ; Jah has seen; Chazajah, an Israelite.

H2383.definition: from חָזָה; vision; Chezjon, a Syrian.

H2384.definition: from חָזָה; a revelation, expectation by dream.

H2385.definition: from an unused root meaning to glare; a flash of lightning.

H2386.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to enclose; a hog (perhaps as penned).

H2387.definition: from the same as חֲזִיר; perhaps protected; Chezir, the name of two Israelites.

H2388.definition: a primitive root; to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer.
H2388.kjv: aid, amend, [idiom] calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify, make hard, harden, help, (lay) hold (fast), lean, maintain, play the man, mend, become (wax) mighty, prevail, be recovered, repair, retain, seize, be (wax) sore, strengthen (self), be stout, be (make, shew, wax) strong(-er), be sure, take (hold), be urgent, behave self valiantly, withstand.

H2389.definition: from חָזַק; strong (usu. in a bad sense, hard, bold, violent).
H2389.kjv: harder, hottest, [phrase] impudent, loud, mighty, sore, stiff(-hearted), strong(-er).

H2394.definition: feminine of חֹזֶק; vehemence (usually in a bad sense).

H2395.definition: from חָזַק; strong; Chizki, an Israelite.

H2396.definition: or חִזְקִיָּהוּ; also יְחִזְקִיָּה; or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from חָזַק and יָהּ; strengthened of Jah; Chizkijah, a king of Judah, also the name of two other Israelites.

H2397.definition: once (Ezekiel 29:4) חָחִי; from the same as חוֹחַ; a ring for the nose (or lips).

H2398.definition: a primitive root; properly, to miss; hence (figuratively and generally) to sin; by inference, to forfeit, lack, expiate, repent, (causatively) lead astray, condemn.
H2398.kjv: bear the blame, cleanse, commit (sin), by fault, harm he hath done, loss, miss, (make) offend(-er), offer for sin, purge, purify (self), make reconciliation, (cause, make) sin(-ful, -ness), trespass.

H2399.definition: from חָטָא; a crime or its penalty.

H2400.definition: intensively from חָטָא; a criminal, or one accounted guilty.

H2401.definition: feminine of חֵטְא; an offence, or a sacrifice forit.

H2402.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חֲטָאָה; an offence, and the penalty or sacrifice forit.

H2403.definition: or חַטָּאת; from חָטָא; an offence (sometimes habitual sinfulness), and its penalty, occasion, sacrifice, or expiation; also (concretely) an offender.
H2403.kjv: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

H2404.definition: a primitive root; to chop or carve wood.

H2405.definition: feminine passive participle of חָטַב; properly, a carving; hence, a tapestry (as figured).

H2406.definition: of uncertain derivation; wheat, whether the grain or the plant.

H2407.definition: from an unused root of uncertain signification; Chattush, the name of four or five Israelites.

H2408.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָטָא; an offence.

H2409.definition: (Aramaic) from the same as חֲטִי; an expiation.

H2410.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to dig out; explorer; Chatita, a temple porter.

H2411.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to wave; fluctuating; Chattil, one of 'Solomon's servants'.

H2412.definition: from חָטַף; robber; Chatipha, one of the Nethinim.

H2414.definition: a primitive root; to clutch; hence, to seize as aprisoner.

H2415.definition: from an unused root of uncertain signification; a twig.

H2416.definition: from חָיָה; alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively.
H2416.kjv: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, quick, raw, running, springing, troop.

H2417.definition: (Aramaic) from חֲיָא; alive; also (as noun in plural) life.

H2418.definition: (Aramaic) or חֲיָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to חָיָה; to live.

H2419.definition: from חַי and אֵל; living of God; Chiel, an Israelite.

H2420.definition: from חוּד; a puzzle, hence, a trick, conundrum, sententious maxim.
H2420.kjv: dark saying (sentence, speech), hard question, proverb, riddle.

H2421.definition: a primitive root (compare חָוָה, חָיָה); to live, whether literally or figuratively; causatively, to revive.
H2421.kjv: keep (leave, make) alive, [idiom] certainly, give (promise) life, (let, suffer to) live, nourish up, preserve (alive), quicken, recover, repair, restore (to life), revive, ([idiom] God) save (alive, life, lives), [idiom] surely, be whole.

H2425.definition: a primitive root (compare חָיָה); to live; causatively to revive.

H2426.definition: or (shortened) חֵל; a collateral form of חַיִל; an army; also (by analogy,) an intrenchment.
H2426.kjv: army, bulwark, host, [phrase] poor, rampart, trench, wall.

H2427.definition: and (feminine) חִילָה; from חוּל; a throe (expectant of childbirth).

H2428.definition: from חוּל; probably a force, whether of men, means or other resources; an army, wealth, virtue, valor, strength.
H2428.kjv: able, activity, ([phrase]) army, band of men (soldiers), company, (great) forces, goods, host, might, power, riches, strength, strong, substance, train, ([phrase]) valiant(-ly), valour, virtuous(-ly), war, worthy(-ily).

H2429.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חַיִל; an army, or strength.

H2431.definition: or חֵלָאםxlit Chêlʼâm corrected to Chêlâʼm; from חַיִל; fortress; Chelam, a place East of Palestine.

H2432.definition: from חַיִל; fortress; Chilen, a place in Palestine.

H2434.definition: another form for חוּץ; a wall.

H2435.definition: from חַיִץ; properly, the (outer) wall side; hence, exterior; figuratively, secular (as opposed to sacred).

H2436.definition: or חֵק; and חוֹק; from an unused root, apparently meaning to inclose; the bosom (literally or figuratively).

H2437.definition: from חָוַר in the sense of splendor; Chirah, an Adullamite.

H2438.definition: or חִירוֹםlemma חִירֹם missing vav, corrected to חִירוֹם; another form of חוּרָם; Chiram or Chirom, the name of two Tyrians.

H2439.definition: another form of חוּשׁ; to hurry.

H2440.definition: from חִישׁ; properly, a hurry; hence (adverb) quickly.

H2441.definition: probably from חָנַךְ in the sense of tasting; properly, the palate or inside of the mouth; hence, the mouth itself (as the organ of speech, taste and kissing).

H2442.definition: a primitive root (apparently akin to חָקָה through the idea of piercing); properly, to adhere to; hence, to await.

H2443.definition: probably from חָכָה; a hook (as adhering).

H2444.definition: from the same as חַכְלִיל; dark; Chakilah, a hill in Palestine.

H2445.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָכַם; wise, i.e. a Magian.

H2446.definition: from the base of חַכְלִיל and יָהּ; darkness of Jah; Chakaljah, an Israelite.

H2447.definition: by reduplication from an unused root apparently meaning to be dark; darkly flashing (only of the eyes); in a good sense, brilliant (as stimulated by wine).

H2448.definition: from חַכְלִיל; flash (of the eyes); in a bad sense, blearedness.

H2449.definition: a primitive root,; to be wise (in mind, word or act).
H2449.kjv: [idiom] exceeding, teach wisdom, be (make self, shew self) wise, deal (never so) wisely, make wiser.

H2450.definition: from חָכַם; wise, (i.e. intelligent, skilful or artful).

H2451.definition: from חָכַם; wisdom (in a good sense).

H2453.definition: from חָכַם; skilful; Chakmoni, an Israelite.

H2454.definition: or חַכְמוֹת; collateral forms of חׇכְמָה; wisdom.

H2455.definition: from חָלַל; properly, exposed; hence, profane.

H2456.definition: a primitive root (compare חָלָה); to be sick.

H2457.definition: from חָלָא; properly, disease; hence, rust.

H2458.definition: the same as חֶלְאָה; Chelah, an Israelitess.

H2459.definition: or חֵלֶב; from an unused root meaning to be fat; fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part.

H2460.definition: the same as חֶלֶב; fatness; Cheleb, an Israelite.

H2461.definition: from the same as חֶלֶב; milk (as the richness of kine).

H2462.definition: feminine of חֶלֶב; fertility; Chelbah, a place in Palestine.

H2463.definition: from חֶלֶב; fruitful; Chelbon, a place in Syria.

H2464.definition: from חֶלֶב; galbanam, an odorous gum (as if fatty).

H2465.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to glide swiftly; life (as a fleeting portion of time); hence, the world (as transient).

H2466.definition: the same as חֶלֶד; Cheled, an Israelite.

H2467.definition: from the same as חֶלֶד; a weasel (from its gliding motion).

H2468.definition: feminine of חֹלֶד; Chuldah, an Israelitess.

H2469.definition: from חֵלֶד; worldliness; Cheldai, the name of two Israelites.

H2470.definition: a primitive root (compare חוּל, חָלָה, חָלַל); properly, to be rubbed or worn; hence (figuratively) to be weak, sick, afflicted; or (causatively) to grieve, make sick; also to stroke (in flattering), entreat.
H2470.kjv: beseech, (be) diseased, (put to) grief, be grieved, (be) grievous, infirmity, intreat, lay to, put to pain, [idiom] pray, make prayer, be (fall, make) sick, sore, be sorry, make suit ([idiom] supplication), woman in travail, be (become) weak, be wounded.

H2471.definition: from חָלַל; a cake (as usually punctured).

H2472.definition: or (shortened) חֲלֹם; from חָלַם; a dream.

H2473.definition: or (shortened) חֹלֹן; probably from חוֹל; sandy; Cholon, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2475.definition: from חָלַף; properly, surviving; by implication (collectively) orphans.

H2476.definition: feminine passive participle of חָלַשׁ; defeat.

H2477.definition: probably of foreign origin; Chalach, a region of Assyria.

H2478.definition: by reduplication from חוּל; contorted; Chalchul, a place in Palestine.

H2479.definition: feminine from the same as חַלְחוּל; writhing (in childbirth); by implication, terror.

H2480.definition: a primitive root; to snatch at.

H2482.definition: the same as חֲלִי; Chali, a place in Palestine.

H2486.definition: or חָלִלָה; a directive from חָלַל; literal fora profaned thing; used (interj.) far be it!.

H2487.definition: lemma חלִיפָה missing vowel, corrected to חֲלִיפָה; from חָלַף; alternation.

H2489.definition: or חֵלְכָה; apparently from an unused root probably meaning to be dark or (figuratively) unhappy; a wretch, i.e. unfortunate.

H2490.definition: a primitive root (compare חָלָה); also  denominative (from חָלִיל); properly, to bore, i.e. (by implication) to wound, to dissolve; figuratively, to profane (a person, place or thing), to break (one's word), to begin (as if by an 'opening wedge'); to play (the flute).
H2490.kjv: begin ([idiom] men began), defile, [idiom] break, defile, [idiom] eat (as common things), [idiom] first, [idiom] gather the grape thereof, [idiom] take inheritance, pipe, player on instruments, pollute, (cast as) profane (self), prostitute, slay (slain), sorrow, stain, wound.

H2491.definition: from חָלַל; pierced (especially to death); figuratively, polluted.

H2492.definition: a primitive root; properly, to bind firmly, i.e. (by implication) to be (causatively to make) plump; also (through the figurative sense of dumbness) to dream.
H2492.kjv: (cause to) dream(-er), be in good liking, recover.

H2493.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָלַם; a dream.

H2494.definition: from חָלַם; a dream; Chelem, an Israelite.

H2495.definition: from חָלַם (in the sense of insipidity); probably purslain.

H2496.definition: probably from חָלַם (in the sense of hardness); flint.

H2497.definition: from חַיִל; strong; Chelon, an Israelite.

H2498.definition: a primitive root; properly, to slide by, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, pass on, spring up, pierce or change.
H2498.kjv: abolish, alter, change, cut off, go on forward, grow up, be over, pass (away, on, through), renew, sprout, strike through.

H2499.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חָלַף; to pass on (of time).

H2500.definition: from חָלַף; properly, exchange; hence (as preposition) instead of.

H2501.definition: the same as חֵלֶף; change; Cheleph, a place in Palestine.

H2502.definition: a primitive root; to pull off; hence (intensively) to strip, (reflex.) to depart; by implication, to deliver, equip (for fight); present, strengthen.
H2502.kjv: arm (self), (go, ready) armed ([idiom] man, soldier), deliver, draw out, make fat, loose, (ready) prepared, put off, take away, withdraw self.

H2503.definition: or חֵלֶץ; from חָלַץ; perhaps, strength; Chelets, the name of two Israelites.

H2504.definition: from חָלַץ (in the sense of strength); only in the dual; the loins (as the seat of vigor).

H2505.definition: a primitive root; to be smooth (figuratively); by implication (as smooth stones were used for lots) to apportion or separate.
H2505.kjv: deal, distribute, divide, flatter, give, (have, im-) part(-ner), take away a portion, receive, separate self, (be) smooth(-er).

H2506.definition: from חָלַק; properly, smoothness (of the tongue); also an allotment.

H2507.definition: the same as חֵלֶק; portion; Chelek, an Israelite.

H2508.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָלַק; a part.

H2510.definition: the same as חָלָק; bare; Chalak, a mountain of Idumaea.

H2513.definition: feminine of חֵלֶק; properly, smoothness; figuratively, flattery; also an allotment.
H2513.kjv: field, flattering(-ry), ground, parcel, part, piece of land (ground), plat, portion, slippery place, smooth (thing).

H2516.definition: patronymically from חֵלֶק; a Chelkite or descendant of Chelek.

H2517.definition: from חָלַק; apportioned; Chelkai, an Israelite.

H2518.definition: or חִלְקִיָּהוּ; from חֵלֶק and יָהּ; portion of Jah; Chilhijah, the name of eight Israelites.

H2519.definition: by reduplication from חָלַק; properly, something very smooth; i.e. a treacherous spot; figuratively, blandishment.

H2520.definition: a form of חֶלְקָה; smoothness; Chelkath, a place in Palestine.
