H2521.definition: from חֶלְקַת and the plural of צוּר, with the article inserted; smoothness of the rocks; Chelkath Hats-tsurim, a place in Palestine.

H2522.definition: a primitive root; to prostrate; by implication, to overthrow, decay.

H2524.definition: from the same as חוֹמָה; a father-in-law (as in affinity).

H2526.definition: the same as חָם; hot (from the tropical habitat); Cham, a son of Noah; also (as a patronymic) his descendants or their country.

H2528.definition: (Aramaic) or חֲמָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to חֵמָה; anger.

H2529.definition: or (shortened) חֵמָה; from the same root as חוֹמָה; curdled milk or cheese.

H2530.definition: a primitive root; to delight in.
H2530.kjv: beauty, greatly beloved, covet, delectable thing, ([idiom] great) delight, desire, goodly, lust, (be) pleasant (thing), precious (thing).

H2533.definition: from חֶמֶד; pleasant; Chemdan, an Idumaean.

H2534.definition: or (Daniel 11:44) חֵמָא; from יָחַם; heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever).
H2534.kjv: anger, bottles, hot displeasure, furious(-ly, -ry), heat, indignation, poison, rage, wrath(-ful). See חֶמְאָה.

H2535.definition: from חָם; heat; by implication, the sun.

H2536.definition: from חַמָּה and אֵל; anger of God; Chammuel, an Israelite.

H2537.definition: or חֲמִיטַל; from חָם and טַל; father-in-law of dew; Chamutal or Chamital, an Israelitess.

H2538.definition: from חָמַל; pitied; Chamul, an Israelite.

H2539.definition: patronymically from חָמוּל; a Chamulite (collectively) or descendants of Chamul.

H2540.definition: from חָמַם; warm spring; Chammon, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2541.definition: from חָמֵץ; properly, violent; by implication, a robber.

H2542.definition: from חָמַק; a wrapping, i.e. drawers.

H2543.definition: or (shortened) חֲמֹר; from חָמַר; a male ass (from its dun red).

H2544.definition: the same as חֲמוֹר; donkey; Chamor, a Canaanite.

H2545.definition: or (shortened) חֲמֹת; feminine of חָם; a mother-in-law.

H2546.definition: from an unused root probably meaning, to lie low; a lizard (as creeping).

H2547.definition: feminine of חֹמֶט; low; Chumtah, a place in Palestine.

H2548.definition: from חָמֵץ; seasoned, i.e. salt provender.

H2549.definition: or חֲמִשִּׁי; ordinal from חָמֵשׁ; fifth; also a fifth.

H2550.definition: a primitive root; to commiserate; by implication, to spare.

H2552.definition: a primitive root; to be hot (literally or figuratively).
H2552.kjv: enflame self, get (have) heat, be (wax) hot, (be, wax) warm (self, at).

H2554.definition: a primitive root; to be violent; by implication, to maltreat.
H2554.kjv: make bare, shake off, violate, do violence, take away violently, wrong, imagine wrongfully.

H2555.definition: from חָמַס; violence; by implication, wrong; by meton. unjust gain.
H2555.kjv: cruel(-ty), damage, false, injustice, [idiom] oppressor, unrighteous, violence (against, done), violent (dealing), wrong.

H2556.definition: a primitive root; to be pungent; i.e. in taste (sour, i.e. literally fermented, or figuratively, harsh), in color (dazzling).

H2557.definition: xlit châmêtz corrected to châmêts; from חָמֵץ; ferment, (figuratively) extortion.

H2559.definition: a primitive root; properly, to wrap; hence, to depart (i.e. turn about).

H2560.definition: a primitive root; also  as denominative (from חֵמָר); properly, to boil up; hence, to ferment (with scum); to glow (with redness); to smear with pitch.

H2563.definition: from חָמַר; properly, a bubbling up, i.e. of water, a wave; of earth, mire or clay (cement); also a heap; hence, a chomer or dry measure.

H2564.definition: from חָמַר; bitumen (as rising to the surface).

H2566.definition: from חָמַר; red; Chamran, an Idumaean.

H2567.definition: a denominative from חָמֵשׁ; to tax a fifth.

H2568.definition: masculine חֲמִשָּׁה; a primitive numeral; five.

H2570.definition: from an unused root probably meaning, to be stout; the abdomen (as obese).

H2571.definition: passive participle of the same as חֹמֶשׁ; staunch, i.e. able-bodied soldiers.

H2573.definition: from the same as חוֹמָה; a skin bottle (as tied up).

H2574.definition: from the same as חוֹמָה; walled; Chamath, a place in Syria.

H2575.definition: a variation for the first part of חַמֹּת דֹּאר; hot springs; Chammath, a place in Palestine.

H2576.definition: from the plural of חַמָּה and דּוֹר; hot springs of Dor; Chammath-Dor, a place in Palestine.

H2577.definition: patrial from חֲמָת; a Chamathite or native of Chamath.

H2578.definition: from חֲמָת and צוֹבָא; Chamath of Tsobah; probably the same as חֲמָת; Chamath-Tsobah.

H2579.definition: from חֲמָת and רַבָּה; Chamath of Rabbah; probably the same as חֲמָת.; Chamath-Rabbah.

H2580.definition: from חָנַן; graciousness, i.e. subjective (kindness, favor) or objective (beauty).

H2581.definition: the same as חֵן; grace; Chen, a figurative name for an Israelite.

H2582.definition: probably from חֵן and הֲדַד; favor of Hadad; Chenadad, an Israelite.

H2583.definition: a primitive root (compare חָנַן); properly, to incline; by implication, to decline (of the slanting rays of evening); specifically, to pitch atent; gen. to encamp (for abode or siege).
H2583.kjv: abide (in tents), camp, dwell, encamp, grow to an end, lie, pitch (tent), rest in tent.

H2584.definition: from חָנַן; favored; Channah, an Israelitess.

H2585.definition: from חָנַךְ; initiated; Chanok, an antediluvian patriach.

H2586.definition: from חָנַן; favored; Chanun, the name of an Ammonite and of two Israelites.

H2588.definition: from חָנָה; properly, a vault or cell (with an arch); by implication, a prison.

H2589.definition: from חָנַן (in the sense of prayer); supplication.

H2590.definition: a primitive root; to spice; by implication, to embalm; also to ripen.

H2592.definition: from חָנַן and אֵל; favor of God; Channiel, the name of two Israelites.

H2595.definition: lemma חֲניִת second vowel, corrected to חֲנִית; from חָנָה; a lance (for thrusting, like pitching a tent).

H2596.definition: a primitive root; (compare חָנַק); properly, to narrow; figuratively, to initiate or discipline.

H2599.definition: patronymically from חֲנוֹךְ; a Chanokite (collectively) or descendants of Chanok.

H2600.definition: from חֵן; gratis, i.e. devoid of cost, reason or advantage.
H2600.kjv: without a cause (cost, wages), causeless, to cost nothing, free(-ly), innocent, for nothing (nought, in vain.

H2601.definition: probably by orthographical variation for חֲנַנְאֵל; Chanamel, an Israelite.

H2602.definition: of uncertain derivation; perhaps the aphis or plantlouse.

H2603.definition: a primitive root (compare חָנָה); properly, to bend or stoop in kindness to an inferior; to favor, bestow; causatively to implore (i.e. move to favor by petition).
H2603.kjv: beseech, [idiom] fair, (be, find, shew) favour(-able), be (deal, give, grant (gracious(-ly), intreat, (be) merciful, have (shew) mercy (on, upon), have pity upon, pray, make supplication, [idiom] very.

H2604.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חָנַן; to favor or (causatively) to entreat.

H2605.definition: from חָנַן; favor; Chanan, the name of seven Israelites.

H2606.definition: from חָנַן and אֵל; God has favored; Chananel, probably an Israelite, from whom a tower of Jerusalem was named.

H2607.definition: from חָנַן; gracious; Chanani, the name of six Israelites.

H2608.definition: or חֲנַנְיָהוּ; from חָנַן and יָהּ; Jah has favored; Chananjah, the name of thirteen Israelites.

H2609.definition: of Egyptian derivation; Chanes, a place in Egypt.

H2610.definition: a primitive root; to soil, especially in a moral sense.

H2611.definition: from חָנֵף; soiled (i.e. with sin), impious.

H2612.definition: from חָנֵף; moral filth, i.e. wickedness.

H2614.definition: a primitive root (compare חָנַךְ); to be narrow; by implication, to throttle, or (reflex.) to choke oneself to death (by a rope).

H2615.definition: probably from חָנַן; favored; Channathon, a place in Palestine.

H2616.definition: a primitive root; (compare חָנַן); (compare בָרַךְ); properly, perhaps to bow (the neck only  in courtesy to an equal), i.e. to be kind; also (by euphemistically, but rarely) to reprove.
H2616.kjv: shew self merciful, put to shame.

H2617.definition: from חָסַד; kindness; by implication (towards God) piety; rarely (by opposition) reproof, or (subject.) beauty.
H2617.kjv: favour, good deed(-liness, -ness), kindly, (loving-) kindness, merciful (kindness), mercy, pity, reproach, wicked thing.

H2618.definition: the same as חֵסֵד; favor; Chesed, an Israelite.

H2619.definition: from חֵסֵד and יָהּ; Jah has favored; Chasadjah, an Israelite.

H2620.definition: a primitive root; (compare בָּטַח); to flee for protection; figuratively, to confide in.

H2621.definition: from חָסָה; hopeful; Chosah, an Israelite; also a place in Palestine.

H2623.definition: from חָסַד; properly, kind, i.e. (religiously) pious (a saint).
H2623.kjv: godly (man), good, holy (one), merciful, saint, (un-) godly.

H2624.definition: feminine of חָסִיד; the kind (maternal) bird, i.e. a stork.

H2625.definition: from חָסַל; the ravager, i.e. a locust.

H2626.definition: from חָסַן; properly, firm, i.e. (by implication) mighty.

H2627.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָסֵר; deficient.

H2628.definition: a primitive root; to eat off.

H2629.definition: a primitive root; to muzzle; by analogy, to stop the nose.

H2630.definition: a primitive root; properly, to (be) compact; by implication, to hoard.

H2631.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to חָסַן; to hold in occupancy.

H2635.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to that of חַסְפַּס; a clod.

H2636.definition: reduplicated from an unused root meaning apparently to peel; a shred or scale.

H2637.definition: a primitive root; to lack; by implication, to fail, want, lessen.
H2637.kjv: be abated, bereave, decrease, (cause to) fail, (have) lack, make lower, want.

H2638.kjv: destitute, fail, lack, have need, void, want.

H2641.definition: from חָסֵר; want; Chasrah, an Israelite.

H2643.definition: from חׇפַף (in the moral sense of covered from soil); pure.

H2644.definition: an orthographical variation of חָפָה; properly, to cover, i.e. (in a sinister sense) to act covertly.

H2645.definition: a primitive root (compare חָפָא, חׇפַף); to cover; by implication, to veil, to encase, protect.

H2647.definition: the same as חֻפָּה; Chuppah, an Israelite.

H2648.definition: a primitive root; properly, to start up suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to hasten away, to fear.

H2650.definition: plural of חֻפָּה (compare חוּפָם); Chuppim, an Israelite.

H2651.definition: from an unused root of uncertain signification; a fist (only in the dual).

H2652.definition: from חֹפֶן; perhaps pugilist; Chophni, an Israelite.

H2653.definition: a primitive root (compare חָפָה, יָחֵף); to cover (in protection).

H2654.definition: a primitive root; properly, to incline to; by implication (literally but rarely) to bend; figuratively, to be pleased with, desire.
H2654.kjv: [idiom] any at all, (have, take) delight, desire, favour, like, move, be (well) pleased, have pleasure, will, would.

H2655.kjv: delight in, desire, favour, please, have pleasure, whosoever would, willing, wish.

H2656.definition: from חָפֵץ; pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind).
H2656.kjv: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly.

H2657.definition: from חֵפֶץ with suffixes; my delight (is) in her; Cheptsi-bah, a fanciful name for Palestine.

H2658.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pry into; by implication, to delve, to explore.

H2659.definition: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as חָפַר through the idea of detection); to blush; figuratively, to be ashamed, disappointed; causatively, to shame, reproach.
H2659.kjv: be ashamed, be confounded, be brought to confusion (unto shame), come (be put to) shame, bring reproach.

H2660.definition: from חָפַר or חָפֵר; a pit of shame; Chepher, a place in Palestine; also the name of three Israelites.

H2661.definition: from חָפַר; a hole; only in connection with פֵּרָה, which ought rather to be joined as one word, thus חַפַרְפֵּרָה; by reduplication from חָפַר; a burrower, i.e. probably a rat.

H2662.definition: patronymically from חֵפֶר; a Chephrite (collectively) or descendants of Chepher.

H2663.definition: dual of חֵפֶר; double pit; Chapharajim, a place in Palestine.

H2664.definition: a primitive root; to seek; causatively, to conceal oneself (i.e. let be sought), or mask.
H2664.kjv: change, (make) diligent (search), disquise self, hide, search (for, out).

H2665.definition: from חָפַשׂ; something covert, i.e. a trick.

H2666.definition: a primitive root; to spread loose; figuratively, to manumit.

H2667.definition: from חָפַשׁ; something spread loosely, i.e. a carpet.

H2669.definition: and חׇפְשִׁית; from חָפַשׁ; (with בַּיִת, a hospital); prostration by sickness.

H2670.definition: from חָפַשׁ; exempt (from bondage, tax or care).

H2671.definition: from חָצַץ; also by interchange for עֵץ; properly, a piercer, i.e. an arrow; by implication, a wound; figuratively, (of God) thunderbolt; the shaft of aspear.
H2671.kjv: [phrase] archer, arrow, dart, shaft, staff, wound.

H2672.definition: or חָצֵב; a primitive root; to cut or carve (wood, stone or other material); by implication, to hew, split, square, quarry, engrave.
H2672.kjv: cut, dig, divide, grave, hew (out, -er), made, mason.

H2673.definition: lemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; a primitive root (compare זֵד)); to cut or split in two; to halve.
H2673.kjv: divide, [idiom] live out half, reach to the midst, participle

H2674.definition: a collective form of חָצֵר; village; Chatsor, the name (thus simply) of two places in Palestine and of one in Arabia.

H2675.definition: from חָצוֹר and a Aramaizing form of the feminine of חָדָשׁ (compare חֲדָת); new Chatsor, a place in Palestine.

H2676.definition: lemma חָעוֹת ayin, corrected to חָצוֹת; from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; the middle (of the night).

H2677.definition: from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; the half or middle.
H2677.kjv: half, middle, mid(-night), midst, part, two parts.

H2678.definition: or חֵצִי; prolongation from חֵץ; an arrow.

H2679.definition: from חֵצִי and the plural of מְנוּחָה, with the article interposed; midst of the resting-places; Chatsi-ham-Menuchoth, an Israelite.

H2680.definition: patronymically from חֲצִי הַמְּנֻחוֹת; a Chatsi-ham-Menachtite or descendant of Chatsi-ham-Menuchoth.

H2681.definition: a collateral form of חָצֵר; a court or abode.

H2682.definition: perhaps originally the same as חָצִיר, from the greenness of a courtyard; grass; also a leek (collectively).

H2683.definition: from an unused root meaning to hold firmly; the bosom (as comprised between the arms).

H2685.definition: (Aramaic) a primitive root; properly, to shear or cut close; figuratively, to be severe.

H2686.definition: a primitive root (compare חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה); also as denominative from חֵץ; properly, to chop into, pierce or sever; hence, to curtail, to distribute (into ranks);  to shoot an arrow.
H2686.kjv: archer, [idiom] bands, cut off in the midst.

H2687.definition: from חָצָץ;  also like חֵץ; properly, something cutting; hence, gravel (as grit); an arrow.

H2688.definition: or חַצֲצֹן תָּמָר; from חָצַץ and תָּמָר; division (i.e. perhaps row) of (the) palm-tree; Chatsetson-tamar, a place in Palestine.

H2689.definition: by reduplication from חָצַר; a trumpet (from its sundered or quavering note).

H2690.definition: a primitive root; properly, to surround with a stockade, and thus separate from the open country; but used only in the reduplicated form חֲצֹצֵר; or (2 Chronicles 5:12) חֲצֹרֵר; as dem. from חֲצֹצְרָה; to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument.

H2691.definition: (masculine and feminine); from חָצַר in its original sense; a yard (as inclosed by a fence); also a hamlet (as similarly surrounded with walls).

H2692.definition: xlit Addâr corrected to ʼAddâr; from חָצֵר and אַדָּר; (the) village of Addar; Chatsar-Addar, a place in Palestine.

H2693.definition: from חָצֵר and a feminine of גַּד; (the) village of (female) Fortune; Chatsar-Gaddah, a place in Palestine.

H2694.definition: from חָצֵר and תִּיכוֹן with the article interposed; village of the middle; Chatsar-hat-Tikon, a place in Palestine.

H2695.definition: by an orthographical variation for חֶצְרוֹן; enclosure; Chetsro, an Israelite.

H2696.definition: from חָצֵר; court-yard; Chetsron, the name of a place in Palestine; also of two Israelites.

H2697.definition: patronymically from חֶצְרוֹן; a Chetsronite or (collectively) descendants of Chetsron.

H2698.definition: feminine plural of חָצֵר; yards; Chatseroth, a place in Palestine.

H2699.definition: plural masculine of חָצֵר; yards; Chatserim, a place in Palestine.

H2700.definition: from חָצֵר and מָוֶת; village of death; Chatsarmaveth, a place in Arabia.

H2701.definition: from חָצֵר and סוּסָה; village of cavalry; Chatsar-Susah, a place in Palestine.

H2702.definition: from חָצֵר and the plural of סוּס; village of horses; Chatsar-Susim, a place in Palestine.

H2703.definition: from חָצֵר and a derivative of עַיִן; village of springs; Chatsar-Enon, a place in Palestine.

H2704.definition: from חָצֵר and the same as עֵינָן; village of springs; Chatsar-Enan, a place in Palestine.

H2705.definition: from חָצֵר and שׁוּעָל; village of (the) fox; Chatsar-Shual, a place in Palestine.

H2706.definition: from חָקַק; an enactment; hence, an appointment (of time, space, quantity, labor or usage).
H2706.kjv: appointed, bound, commandment, convenient, custom, decree(-d), due, law, measure, [idiom] necessary, ordinance(-nary), portion, set time, statute, task.

H2707.definition: a primitive root; to carve; by implication, to delineate; also to entrench.
H2707.kjv: carved work, portrayed, set a print.

H2709.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to bend; crooked; Chakupha, one of the Nethinim.

H2710.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hack, i.e. engrave (Judges 5:14, to be a scribe simply); by implication, to enact (laws being cut in stone or metal tablets in primitive times) or (gen.) prescribe.
H2710.kjv: appoint, decree, governor, grave, lawgiver, note, pourtray, print, set.

H2711.definition: from חָקַק; an enactment, a resolution.

H2712.definition: or (fully) חוּקֹק; from חָקַק; appointed; Chukkok or Chukok, a place in Palestine.

H2713.definition: a primitive root; properly, to penetrate; hence, to examine intimately.
H2713.kjv: find out, (make) search (out), seek (out), sound, try.

H2715.definition: or (fully) חוֹר; from חָרַר; (compare חֹרִי); properly, white or pure (from the cleansing or shining power of fire; hence (figuratively) noble (in rank).

H2716.definition: from an unused (and vulgar) root probably meaning to evacuate the bowels; excrement.

H2717.definition: or חֲרֵב; a primitive root; to parch (through drought) i.e. (by analogy,) to desolate, destroy, kill.
H2717.kjv: decay, (be) desolate, destroy(-er), (be) dry (up), slay, [idiom] surely, (lay, lie, make) waste.

H2718.definition: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to חָרַב; to demolish.

H2719.definition: from חָרַב; drought; also a cutting instrument (from its destructive effect), as a knife, sword, or other sharp implement.
H2719.kjv: axe, dagger, knife, mattock, sword, tool.

H2721.definition: a collaterally form of חֶרֶב; drought or desolation.
H2721.kjv: desolation, drought, dry, heat, [idiom] utterly, waste.

H2722.definition: from חָרַב; desolate; Choreb, a (generic) name for the Sinaitic mountains.

H2723.definition: feminine of חֹרֶב; properly, drought, i.e. (by implication) a desolation.

H2726.definition: or חַרְבוֹנָה; of Persian origin; Charbona or Charbonah, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H2727.definition: a primitive root; properly, to leap suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to be dismayed.

H2728.definition: from חָרַג; the leaping insect, i.e. a locust.

H2729.definition: a primitive root; to shudder with terror; hence, to fear; also to hasten (with anxiety).
H2729.kjv: be (make) afraid, be careful, discomfit, fray (away), quake, tremble.

H2732.definition: the same as חֲרָדָה; Charadah, a place in the Desert.

H2733.definition: patrial from a derivative of חָרַד (compare עֵין חֲרֹד); a Charodite, or inhabitant of Charod.

H2734.definition: a primitive root (compare חָרַר); to glow or grow warm; figuratively (usually) to blaze up, of anger, zeal, jealousy.
H2734.kjv: be angry, burn, be displeased, [idiom] earnestly, fret self, grieve, be (wax) hot, be incensed, kindle, [idiom] very, be wroth. See תַּחָרָה.

H2735.definition: from חוֹר and a collateral (masculine) form of גֻּדְגֹּדָה, with the article interposed; hole of the cleft; Chor-hag-Gidgad, a place in the Desert.

H2736.definition: ; from חָרָה and יָהּ; fearing Jah; Charhajah, an Israelite.

H2737.definition: from an unused root meaning to perforate; properly, pierced, i.e. a bead of pearl, gems or jewels (as strung).

H2738.definition: or (shortened) חָרֻל; apparently, a passive participle of an unused root probably meaning to be prickly; properly, pointed, i.e. a bramble or other thorny weed.

H2739.definition: from passive participle of חָרַם and אַף; snub-nosed; Charumaph, an Israelite.

H2740.definition: or (shortened) חָרֹן; from חָרָה; a burning of anger.

H2741.definition: a patrial from (probably) a collateral form of חָרִיף; a Charuphite or inhabitant of Charuph (or Chariph).

H2742.definition: or חָרֻץ; passive participle of חָרַץ; properly, incised or (active) incisive; hence (as noun masculine or feminine) a trench (as dug), gold (as mined), a threshing-sledge (having sharp teeth); (figuratively) determination; also eager.
H2742.kjv: decision, diligent, (fine) gold, pointed things, sharp, threshing instrument, wall.

H2743.definition: the same as חֲרוּץ; earnest; Charuts, an Israelite.

H2744.definition: a fuller form of חַרְחֻר; inflammation; Charchur, one of the Nethinim.

H2745.definition: from the same as חֶרֶס; perhaps shining; Charchas, an Israelite.

H2747.definition: from a primitive root meaning to engrave; a chisel or graver; also a style forwriting.

H2748.definition: from the same as חֶרֶט; a horoscopist (as drawing magical lines or circles).

H2750.definition: from חָרָה; a burning (i.e. intense) anger.

H2751.definition: from the same as חוּר; white bread.

H2752.definition: from חוֹר; cave-dweller or troglodyte; a Chorite or aboriginal Idumaean.

H2753.definition: or חוֹרִי; the same as חֹרִי; Chori, the name of two men.

H2754.definition: or חָרִט; from the same as חֶרֶט; properly, cut out (or hollow), i.e. (by implication) a pocket.

H2756.definition: from חָרַף; autumnal; Chariph, the name of two Israelites.

H2757.definition: or חֲרִץ; from חָרַץ; (compare חֲרוּץ); properly, incisure or (passively) incised; hence, a threshing-sledge (with sharp teeth); also a slice (as cut).

H2758.definition: from חָרַשׁ; ploughing or its season.

H2759.definition: from חָרַשׁ in the sense of silence; quiet, i.e. sultry (as feminine noun, the sirocco or hot east wind).

H2760.definition: a primitive root; to braid (i.e. to entangle or snare) or catch (game) in anet.

H2761.definition: (Aramaic) a root probably allied to the equivalent of חָרַר; to scorch.

H2762.definition: from חָרַךְ; properly, a net, i.e. (by analogy) lattice.

H2763.definition: a primitive root; to seclude; specifically (by a ban) to devote to religious uses (especially destruction); physical and reflexive, to be blunt as to the nose.
H2763.kjv: make accursed, consecrate, (utterly) destroy, devote, forfeit, have a flat nose, utterly (slay, make away).

H2764.definition: or (Zechariah 14:11) חֶרֶם; from חָרַם; physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination.
H2764.kjv: (ac-) curse(-d, -d thing), dedicated thing, things which should have been utterly destroyed, (appointed to) utter destruction, devoted (thing), net.

H2765.definition: from חָרַם; devoted; Chorem, a place in Palestine.

H2766.definition: from חָרַם; snub-nosed; Charim, an Israelite.

H2767.definition: from חָרַם; devoted; Chormah, a place in Palestine.

H2768.definition: from חָרַם; abrupt; Chermon, a mount of Palestine.

H2769.definition: plural of חֶרְמוֹן; Hermons, i.e. its peaks.

H2771.definition: from חָרַר; parched; Charan, the name of a man and also of a place.

H2772.definition: patrial from חֹרֹנַיִם; a Choronite or inhabitant of Choronaim.

H2773.definition: dual of a derivative from חוֹר; double cave-town; Choronajim, a place in Moab.

H2774.definition: of uncertain derivation; Charnepher, an Israelite.

H2775.definition: or (with a directive enclitic) חַרְסָה; from an unused root meaning to scrape; also perhaps from the mediating idea of חַרְסוּת; the itch; the sun.

H2776.definition: the same as חֶרֶס; shining; Cheres, a mountain in Palestine.

H2777.definition: from חֶרֶס (apparently in the sense of a red tile used for scraping); a potsherd, i.e. (by implication) a pottery; the name of a gate at Jerusalem.

H2778.definition: a primitive root; also  denominative (from חֹרֶף); to pull off, i.e. (by implication) to expose (as by stripping); specifically, to betroth (as if a surrender); figuratively, to carp at, i.e. defame; to spend the winter.
H2778.kjv: betroth, blaspheme, defy, jeopard, rail, reproach, upbraid.

H2779.definition: from חָרַף; properly, the crop gathered, i.e. (by implication) the autumn (and winter) season; figuratively, ripeness of age.

H2780.definition: from חָרַף; reproachful; Chareph, an Israelite.

H2781.definition: from חָרַף; contumely, disgrace, the pudenda.

H2782.definition: a primitive root; properly, to point sharply, i.e. (literally) to wound; figuratively, to be alert, to decide.
H2782.kjv: bestir self, decide, decree, determine, maim, move.

H2783.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָרַץ in the sense of vigor; the loin (as the seat of strength).

H2784.definition: of uncertain derivation; a fetter; figuratively, a pain.

H2785.definition: from חָרַץ; a sour grape (as sharp in taste).

H2786.definition: a primitive root; to grate the teeth.

H2787.definition: a primitive root; to glow, i.e. literally (to melt, burn, dry up) or figuratively (to show or incite passion).

H2789.definition: a collateral form mediating between חֶרֶס and חֶרֶשׁ; a piece of pottery.

H2790.definition: a primitive root; to scratch, i.e. (by implication) to engrave, plough; hence (from the use of tools) to fabricate (of any material); figuratively, to devise (in a bad sense); hence (from the idea of secrecy) to be silent, to let alone; hence (by implication) to be deaf (as an accompaniment of dumbness).
H2790.kjv: [idiom] altogether, cease, conceal, be deaf, devise, ear, graven, imagine, leave off speaking, hold peace, plow(-er, man), be quiet, rest, practise secretly, keep silence, be silent, speak not a word, be still, hold tongue, worker.

H2791.definition: from חָרַשׁ; magical craft; also silence.

H2792.definition: the same as חֶרֶשׁ; Cheresh, a Levite.

H2793.definition: from חָרַשׁ; a forest (perhaps as furnishing the material for fabric).

H2794.definition: active participle of חָרַשׁ; a fabricator or mechanic.

H2795.definition: from חָרַשׁ; deaf (whether literally or spiritual).

H2796.definition: from חָרַשׁ; a fabricator or any material.
H2796.kjv: artificer, ([phrase]) carpenter, craftsman, engraver, maker, [phrase] mason, skilful, ([phrase]) smith, worker, workman, such as wrought.

H2797.definition: from חֶרֶשׁ; magician; Charsha, one of the Nethinim.

H2798.definition: plural of חָרָשׁ; mechanics, the name of a valley in Jerusalem.

H2800.definition: the same as חֲרֹשֶׁת; Charosheth, a place in Palestine.

H2802.definition: from חָרַת (but equivalent to חֹרֶשׁ); forest; Chereth, a thicket in Palestine.

H2803.definition: a primitive root; properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think, regard, value, compute.
H2803.kjv: (make) account (of), conceive, consider, count, cunning (man, work, workman), devise, esteem, find out, forecast, hold, imagine, impute, invent, be like, mean, purpose, reckon(-ing be made), regard, think.

H2805.definition: from חָשַׁב; a belt or strap (as being interlaced).

H2806.definition: from חָשַׁב and דִּין; considerate judge; Chasbaddanah, an Israelite.

H2807.definition: from חָשַׁב; estimation; Cashubah, an Israelite.

H2808.definition: from חָשַׁב; properly, contrivance; by implication, intelligence.

H2809.definition: the same as חֶשְׁבּוֹן; Cheshbon, a place East of the Jordan.

H2810.definition: from חָשַׁב; a contrivance, i.e. actual (a warlike machine) or mental (a machination).

H2811.definition: or חֲשַׁבְיָהוּ; from חָשַׁב and יָהּ; Jah has regarded; Chashabjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H2812.definition: feminine of חֶשְׁבּוֹן; inventiveness; Chashnah, an Israelite.

H2813.definition: from חֶשְׁבּוֹן and יָהּ; thought of Jah; Chashabnejah, the name of two Israelites.

H2814.definition: a primitive root; to hush or keep quiet.
H2814.kjv: hold peace, keep silence, be silent, (be) still.

H2815.definition: lemma חַשְּׁוּב extra sheva, corrected to חַשּׁוּב; from חָשַׁב; intelligent; Chashshub, the name of two or three Israelites.

H2816.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to חָשַׁךְ; the dark.

H2817.definition: or חֲשֻׂפָא; from חָשַׂף; nakedness; Chasupha, one of the Nethinim.

H2818.definition: (Aramaic) a collateral root to one corresponding to חוּשׁ in the sense of readiness; to be necessary (from the idea of convenience) or (transitively) to need.

H2819.definition: from a root corresponding to חֲשַׁח; necessity.

H2820.definition: a primitive root; also interchangeable  with חָשַׁךְ; to restrain or (reflex.) refrain; by implication, to refuse, spare, preserve; to observe.
H2820.kjv: assuage, [idiom] darken, forbear, hinder, hold back, keep (back), punish, refrain, reserve, spare, withhold.

H2821.definition: a primitive root; to be dark (as withholding light); transitively, to darken.
H2821.kjv: be black, be (make) dark, darken, cause darkness, be dim, hide.

H2822.definition: from חָשַׁךְ; the dark; hence (literally) darkness; figuratively, misery, destruction, death, ignorance, sorrow, wickedness.

H2825.definition: or חֲשֵׁיכָהxlit chăshêkâh corrected to chăshêykâh; from חָשַׁךְ; darkness; figuratively, misery.

H2826.definition: a primitive root; to make (intrans. be) unsteady, i.e. weak.

H2827.definition: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to חָשַׁל; to weaken, i.e. crush.

H2828.definition: from the same as חַשְׁמַן; enriched; Chashum, the name of two or three Israelites.

H2829.definition: the same as חַשְׁמַן; opulent; Cheshmon, a place in Palestine.

H2830.definition: of uncertain derivation; probably bronze or polished spectrum metal.

H2831.definition: from an unused root (probably meaning firm or capacious in resources); apparently; wealthy.

H2832.definition: feminine of חַשְׁמַן; fertile; Chasmonah, a place in the Desert.

H2833.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to contain or sparkle; perhaps a pocket (as holding the Urim and Thummim), or rich (as containing gems), used only of the gorget of the highpriest.

H2834.definition: a primitive root; to strip off, i.e. generally to make naked (for exertion or in disgrace), to drain away or bail up (a liquid).
H2834.kjv: make bare, clean, discover, draw out, take, uncover.

H2835.definition: from חָשַׂף; properly, drawn off, i.e. separated; hence, a small company (as divided from the rest).

H2836.definition: a primitive root; also interchangeable for חָשַׂךְ; to cling, i.e. join, (figuratively) to love, delight in; elliptically; to deliver.
H2836.kjv: have a delight, (have a) desire, fillet, long, set (in) love.

H2838.definition: or חָשׁוּק; past participle of חָשַׁק; attached, i.e. a fence-rail or rod connecting the posts or pillars.

H2839.definition: from חָשַׁק; conjoined, i.e. a wheel-spoke or rod connecting the hub with the rim.

H2840.definition: from an unused root meaning to bind together; combined, i.e. the nave or hub of awheel (as holding the spokes together).

H2841.definition: from the same as חִשֻּׁר; properly, a combination or gathering, i.e. of watery clouds.

H2842.definition: by variation for קַשׁ; dry grass.

H2843.definition: patronymically from חוּשָׁה; a Chushathite or descendant of Chushah.

H2844.definition: from חָתַת; concretely, crushed; also afraid; abstractly, terror.

H2845.definition: from חָתַת; terror; Cheth, an aboriginal Canaanite.

H2846.definition: a primitive root; to lay hold of; especially to pick up fire.

H2848.definition: from חָתַל; swathed, i.e. a bandage.

H2850.definition: patronymically from חֵת; a Chittite, or descendant of Cheth.

H2852.definition: a primitive root; properly, to cut off, i.e. (figuratively) to decree.

H2855.definition: from חָתַל; enswathed; Chethlon, a place in Palestine.

H2856.definition: a primitive root; to close up; especially to seal.
H2856.kjv: make an end, mark, seal (up), stop.

H2857.definition: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to חָתַם; to seal.

H2858.definition: feminine active participle of חָתַם; a seal.

H2859.definition: a primitive root; to give (a daughter) away in marriage; hence (generally) to contract affinity by marriage.
H2859.kjv: join in affinity, father in law, make marriages, mother in law, son in law.

H2860.definition: from חָתַן; a relative by marriage (especially through the bride); figuratively, a circumcised child (as a species of religious espousal).

H2863.definition: from חָתַף; properly, rapine; figuratively, robbery.

H2864.definition: a primitive root; to force a passage, as by burglary; figuratively, with oars.

H2865.definition: a primitive root; properly, to prostrate; hence, to break down, either (literally) by violence, or (figuratively) by confusion and fear.
H2865.kjv: abolish, affright, be (make) afraid, amaze, beat down, discourage, (cause to) dismay, go down, scare, terrify.

H2867.definition: the same as חֲתַת; Chathath, an Israelite.

H2870.definition: from טוֹב and אֵל; pleasing (to) God; Tabeel, the name of a Syrian and of a Persian.

H2871.definition: passive participle of טָבַל; properly, dyed, i.e. a turban (probably as of colored stuff).

H2872.definition: from an unused root meaning to pile up; properly, accumulated; i.e. (by implication) a summit.

H2873.definition: a primitive root; to slaughter (animals or men).

H2874.definition: from טָבַח; properly, something slaughtered; hence, a beast (or meat, as butchered); abstractly butchery (or concretely, a place of slaughter).

H2875.definition: the same as טֶבַח; massacre; Tebach, the name of a Mesopotamian and of an Israelite.

H2876.definition: from טָבַח; properly, a butcher; hence, a lifeguardsman (because he was acting as an executioner); also a cook (usually slaughtering the animal for food).

H2877.definition: (Aramaic) the same as טַבָּח; a lifeguardsman.

H2879.definition: feminine of טַבָּח; a female cook.

H2880.definition: lemma טבְחַת missing vowel, corrected to טִבְחַת; from טִבְחָה; slaughter; Tibchath, a place in Syria.

H2881.definition: a primitive root; to dip, to immerse.

H2882.definition: from טָבַל and יָהּ; Jah has dipped; Tebaljah, an Israelite.

H2884.definition: plural of טַבַּעַת; rings; Tabbaoth, one of the Nethinim.

H2885.definition: from טָבַע; properly, a seal (as sunk into the wax), i.e. signet (for sealing); hence (generally) a ring of any kind.

H2886.definition: from טוֹב and רִמּוֹן; pleasing (to) Rimmon; Tabrimmon, a Syrian.

H2887.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Tebeth, the tenth Hebrew month.

H2888.definition: of uncertain derivation; Tabbath, a place East of the Jordan.

H2889.definition: or טָהֹר; from טָהֵר; pure (in a physical, chemical, ceremonial or moral sense).

H2891.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be bright; i.e. (by implication); to be pure (physical sound, clear, unadulterated; Levitically, uncontaminated; morally, innocent or holy).
H2891.kjv: be (make, make self, pronounce) clean, cleanse (self), purge, purify(-ier, self).

H2892.definition: from טָהֵר; literally brightness; ceremonially purification.

H2893.definition: feminine of טֹהַר; ceremonial purification; moral purity.

H2894.definition: a primitive root; to sweep away.

H2895.definition: a primitive root,; to be (transitively, do or make) good (or well) in the widest sense.
H2895.kjv: be (do) better, cheer, be (do, seem) good, (make) goodly, [idiom] please, (be, do, go, play) well.

H2896.definition: from טוֹב; good (as an adjective) in the widest sense; used likewise as a noun, both in the masculine and the feminine, the singular and the plural (good, a good or good thing, a good man or woman; the good, goods or good things, good men or women), also as an adverb (well).
H2896.kjv: beautiful, best, better, bountiful, cheerful, at ease, [idiom] fair (word), (be in) favour, fine, glad, good (deed, -lier, -liest, -ly, -ness, -s), graciously, joyful, kindly, kindness, liketh (best), loving, merry, [idiom] most, pleasant, [phrase] pleaseth, pleasure, precious, prosperity, ready, sweet, wealth, welfare, (be) well(-favoured).

H2897.definition: the same as טוֹב; good; Tob, a region apparently East of the Jordan.

H2898.definition: from טוֹב; good (as a noun), in the widest sense, especially goodness (superlative concretely, the best), beauty, gladness, welfare.
H2898.kjv: fair, gladness, good(-ness, thing, -s), joy, go well with.

H2899.definition: xlit Ădônîyâhûw corrected to ʼĂdônîyâhûw; from טוֹב and אֲדֹנִיָּה; pleasing (to) Adonijah; Tob-Adonijah, an Israelite.

H2900.definition: or טוֹבִיָּהוּ; from טוֹב and יָהּ; goodness of Jehovah; Tobijah, the name of three Israelites and of one Samaritan.

H2902.definition: a primitive root; to smear, especially with lime.

H2903.definition: from an unused root meaning to go around or bind; a fillet for the forehead.

H2904.definition: a primitive root; to pitch over or reel; hence (transitively) to cast down or out.
H2904.kjv: carry away, (utterly) cast (down, forth, out), send out.

H2905.definition: from an unused root meaning to range in a regular manner; a row; hence, a wall.

H2906.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to צוּר; a rock or hill.

H2907.definition: a primitive root; to pounce as a bird of prey.

H2908.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to טָוָה; hunger (as twisting).

H2909.definition: a primitive root; to stretch a bow, as an archer.

H2910.definition: xlit ṭuwchâh corrected to ṭuchâh; from טָחָה (or טוּחַ) in the sense of overlaying; (in the plural only) the kidneys (as being covered); hence (figuratively) the inmost thought.

H2911.definition: from טָחַן; a hand mill; hence, a millstone.

H2912.definition: a primitive root; to grind meal; hence, to be aconcubine (that being their employment).

H2913.definition: from טָחַן; a hand mill; hence (figuratively) chewing.

H2914.definition: from an unused root meaning to burn; a boil or ulcer (from the inflammation), especially a tumorin the anus or pudenda (the piles).

H2915.definition: from (the equiv. of) טוּחַ; mortar or plaster.

H2916.definition: from an unused root meaning apparently to be sticky (rather perb. a demonstrative); from טוּא, through the idea of dirt to be swept away); mud or clay; figuratively, calamity.

H2917.definition: (Aramaic) perhaps, by interchange, for a word corresponding to טִיט; clay.

H2918.definition: feminine of (an equivalent to) טוּר; a wall; hence, a fortress or a hamlet.

H2921.definition: a primitive root; properly, to cover with pieces; i.e. (by implication) to spot or variegate (as tapestry).

H2922.definition: apparently from טָלָא in the (orig.) sense of covering (for protection); (compare טָלֶה); a lamb.

H2923.definition: from the plural of טְלָא; lambs; Telaim, a place in Palestine.

H2924.definition: by variation for טְלָא; a lamb.

H2926.definition: a primitive root; properly, to strew over, i.e. (by implication) to cover in or plate (with beams).

H2927.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to טָלַל; to cover with shade.

H2928.definition: from an unused root meaning to break up or treat violently; oppression; Telem, the name of a place in Idumaea, also of a temple doorkeeper.

H2929.definition: from the same as חָרְגֹּל; oppressive; Talmon, a temple doorkeeper.

H2930.definition: a primitive root; to be foul, especially in a ceremial or moral sense (contaminated).
H2930.kjv: defile (self), pollute (self), be (make, make self, pronounce) unclean, [idiom] utterly.

H2931.definition: from טָמֵא; foul in a religious sense.

H2933.definition: a collateral form of טָמֵא; to be impure in a religious sense.

H2934.definition: a primitive root; to hide (by covering over).

H2935.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to weave; a basket (of interlaced osiers).

H2937.definition: a primitive root; to wander; causatively to lead astray.

H2938.definition: a primitive root; to taste; figuratively, to perceive.

H2939.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to טָעַם; to taste; causatively to feed.

H2940.definition: from טָעַם; properly, a taste, i.e. (figuratively) perception; by implication, intelligence; transitively, a mandate.
H2940.kjv: advice, behaviour, decree, discretion, judgment, reason, taste, understanding.

H2941.definition: (Aramaic) from טְעַם; compare טַעַם); properly, a taste, i.e.  ajudicial sentence.
H2941.kjv: account, [idiom] to be commanded, commandment, matter.

H2942.definition: (Aramaic) from טְעַם, and equivalent to טַעַם; properly, flavor; figuratively, judgment (both subjective and objective); hence, account (both subjectively and objectively).
H2942.kjv: [phrase] chancellor, [phrase] command, commandment, decree, [phrase] regard, taste, wisdom.

H2943.definition: a primitive root; to load a beast.

H2945.definition: from טָפַף (perhaps referring to the tripping gait of children); a family (mostly used collectively in the singular).

H2946.definition: a primitive root; or perhaps a denominative from טֵפַח, from dandling on the palms; to flatten out or extend (as a tent); figuratively, to nurse achild (as promotive of growth).

H2947.definition: from טָפַח; a spread of the hand, i.e. a palm-breadth (not 'span' of the fingers); architecturally, a corbel (as a supporting palm).

H2950.definition: a primitive root; properly, to stick on as apatch; figuratively, to impute falsely.

H2951.definition: of foreign derivation; a military governor.

H2952.definition: a primitive root; apparently; to trip (with short steps) coquettishly.

H2953.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to צָפַר, and meaning the same as צִפֹּרֶן; a finger-nail; also a hoof or claw.

H2954.definition: a primitive root; properly, apparently to be thick; figuratively, to be stupid.

H2955.definition: probably from נָטַף; a dropping (of ointment); Taphath, an Israelitess.

H2956.definition: a primitive root; to drive on; figuratively, to follow close.

H2958.definition: a variation of טֶרֶם; not yet.

H2961.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to be moist; properly, dripping; hence, fresh (i.e. recently made such).

H2962.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to interrupt or suspend; properly, non-occurrence; used adverbially, not yet or before.

H2963.definition: a primitive root; to pluck off or pull to pieces; causatively to supply with food (as in morsels).
H2963.kjv: catch, [idiom] without doubt, feed, ravin, rend in pieces, [idiom] surely, tear (in pieces).

H2964.definition: from טָרַף; something torn, i.e. a fragment, e.g. a fresh leaf, prey, food.

H2965.definition: from טָרַף; recently torn off, i.e. fresh.

H2966.definition: feminine (collectively) of טֶרֶף; prey, i.e. flocks devoured by animals.
H2966.kjv: ravin, (that which was) torn (of beasts, in pieces).

H2967.definition: (Aramaic) from a name of foreign derivation; a Tarpelite (collectively) or inhabitants of Tarpel, a place in Assyria.

H2969.definition: a primitive root; to be suitable.

H2970.definition: or יַאֲזַנְיָהוּ; from אָזַן and יָהּ; heard of Jah; Jaazanjah, the name of four Israelites.

H2971.definition: from אוֹר; enlightener; Jair, the name of four Israelites.

H2972.definition: patronymically from יָאִיר; a Jairite or descendant of Jair.

H2973.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be slack, i.e. (figuratively) to be foolish.

H2974.definition: a primitive root (probably rather the same as יָאַל through the idea of mental weakness); properly, to yield, especially assent; hence (pos.) to undertake as an act of volition.
H2974.kjv: assay, begin, be content, please, take upon, [idiom] willingly, would.

H2975.definition: of Egyptian origin; a channel, e.g. a fosse, canal, shaft; specifically the Nile, as the one river of Egypt, including its collateral trenches; also the Tigris, as the main river of Assyria.

H2976.definition: a primitive root; to desist, i.e. (figuratively) to despond.
H2976.kjv: (cause to) despair, one that is desperate, be no hope.

H2977.definition: or יֹאשִׁיָּהוּ; from the same root as אֲשׁוּיָה and יָהּ; founded of Jah; Joshijah, the name of two Israelites.

H2979.definition: from the same as אֲתָרִים; stepping; Jeatherai, an Israelite.

H2981.definition: from יָבַל; produce, i.e. a crop or (figuratively) wealth.

H2982.definition: from בּוּס; trodden, i.e. threshing-place; Jebus, the original name of Jerusalem.

H2983.definition: xlit Yebûwçîy corrected to Yᵉbûwçîy; patrial from יְבוּס; a Jebusite or inhabitant of Jebus.

H2984.definition: from בָּחַר; choice; Jibchar, an Israelite.

H2985.definition: from בִּין; intelligent; Jabin, the name of two Canaanitish kings.

H2986.definition: a primitive root; properly, to flow; causatively, to bring (especially with pomp).

H2989.definition: the same as יָבָל; Jabal, an antediluvian.

H2991.definition: from בָּלַע and עַם; devouring people; Jibleam, a place in Palestine.

H2992.definition: a primitive root of doubtful meaning; used only as a denominative from יָבָם; to marry a (deceased) brother's widow.
H2992.kjv: perform the duty of a husband's brother, marry.

H2993.definition: from (the orig. of) יָבַם; a brotherin-law.

H2994.definition: feminine participle of יָבַם; a sister-in-law.

H2995.definition: from בָּנָה and אֵל; built of God; Jabneel, the name of two places in Palestine.

H2996.definition: from בָּנָה; a building; Jabneh, a place in Palestine.

H2997.definition: from בָּנָה and יָהּ; built of Jah; Jibnejah, an Israelite.

H2998.definition: from בָּנָה and יָהּ; building of Jah; Jibnijah, an Israelite.

H2999.definition: probably from בָּקַק; pouring forth; Jabbok, a river east of the Jordan.

H3000.definition: from בָרַךְ and יָהּ; blessed of Jah; Jeberekjah, an Israelite.

H3001.definition: a primitive root; to be ashamed, confused or disappointed; also (as failing) to dry up (as water) or wither (as herbage).
H3001.kjv: be ashamed, clean, be confounded, (make) dry (up), (do) shame(-fully), [idiom] utterly, wither (away).

H3003.definition: the same as יָבֵשׁ (also יָבֵישׁ; often with the addition of גִּלְעָד, i.e. Jabesh of Gilad); Jobesh, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H3005.definition: from the same as בֶּשֶׂם; fragrant; Jibsam, an Israelite.

H3006.definition: a variation of יַבָּשָׁה; dry ground.

H3008.definition: from גָּאַל; avenger; Jigal, the name of three Israelites.

H3009.definition: a primitive root; to dig or plow.

H3011.definition: feminine from גָּבַהּ; hillock; Jogbehah, a place East of the Jordan.

H3012.definition: from גָּדַל and יָהּ; magnified of Jah; Jigdaljah, an Israelite.

H3013.kjv: afflict, cause grief, grieve, sorrowful, vex.

H3014.definition: a primitive root (probably rather the same as יָגָה through the common idea of dissatisfaction); to push away.

H3017.definition: probably from גּוּר; a lodging; Jagur, a place in Palestine.

H3018.definition: from יָגַע; toil; hence, a work, produce, property (as the result of labor).

H3020.definition: from גָּלָה; exiled; Jogli, an Israelite.

H3021.definition: a primitive root; properly, to gasp; hence, to be exhausted, to tire, to toil.

H3022.definition: from יָגַע; earnings (as the product of toil).

H3026.definition: (Aramaic) from a word derived from an unused root (meaning to gather) and a derivation of a root corresponding to שָׂהֵד; heap of the testimony; Jegar-Sahadutha, a cairn East of the Jordan.

H3027.definition: a primitive word; in distinction from כַּף, the closed one); used (as noun, adverb, etc.) in a great variety of applications, both literally and figuratively, both proximate and remote (as follows); a hand (the open one (indicating power, means, direction, etc.),.
H3027.kjv: ([phrase] be) able, [idiom] about, [phrase] armholes, at, axletree, because of, beside, border, [idiom] bounty, [phrase] broad, (broken-) handed, [idiom] by, charge, coast, [phrase] consecrate, [phrase] creditor, custody, debt, dominion, [idiom] enough, [phrase] fellowship, force, [idiom] from, hand(-staves, -y work), [idiom] he, himself, [idiom] in, labour, [phrase] large, ledge, (left-) handed, means, [idiom] mine, ministry, near, [idiom] of, [idiom] order, ordinance, [idiom] our, parts, pain, power, [idiom] presumptuously, service, side, sore, state, stay, draw with strength, stroke, [phrase] swear, terror, [idiom] thee, [idiom] by them, [idiom] themselves, [idiom] thine own, [idiom] thou, through, [idiom] throwing, [phrase] thumb, times, [idiom] to, [idiom] under, [idiom] us, [idiom] wait on, (way-) side, where, [phrase] wide, [idiom] with (him, me, you), work, [phrase] yield, [idiom] yourselves.

H3030.definition: xlit Yidălâh corrected to Yidʼălâh; of uncertain derivation; Jidalah, a place in Palestine.

H3031.definition: from the same as דְּבַשׁ; perhaps honeyed; Jidbash, an Israelite.

H3032.definition: a primitive root; (compare יָדָה); properly, to handle, i.e. to throw, e.g. lots.

H3033.definition: from יְדִיד; properly, affection; concretely, a darling object.

H3034.definition: a primitive root; used only as denominative from יָד; literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand; physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands).

H3035.definition: from יָדָה; praised; Jiddo, an Israelite.

H3036.definition: from יָדָה; thankful; Jadon, an Israelite.

H3037.definition: from יָדַע; knowing; Jaddua, the name of two Israelites.

H3038.definition: or יְדֻתוּן; or יְדִיתוּן; probably from יָדָה; laudatory; Jeduthun, an Israelite.

H3039.definition: from the same as דּוֹד; loved.

H3040.definition: feminine of יְדִיד; beloved; Jedidah, an Israelitess.

H3041.definition: from יְדִיד and יָהּ; beloved of Jah; Jedidejah, a name of Solomon.

H3042.definition: from יָדָה and יָהּ; praised of Jah; Jedajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3043.definition: from יָדַע and אֵל; knowing God; Jediael, the name of three Israelites.

H3044.definition: from דָּלַף; tearful; Jidlaph, a Mesopotamian.

H3045.definition: a primitive root; to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designation, punishment, etc.).
H3045.kjv: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare, be diligent, (can, cause to) discern, discover, endued with, familiar friend, famous, feel, can have, be (ig-) norant, instruct, kinsfolk, kinsman, (cause to let, make) know, (come to give, have, take) knowledge, have (knowledge), (be, make, make to be, make self) known, [phrase] be learned, [phrase] lie by man, mark, perceive, privy to, [idiom] prognosticator, regard, have respect, skilful, shew, can (man of) skill, be sure, of a surety, teach, (can) tell, understand, have (understanding), [idiom] will be, wist, wit, wot.

H3047.definition: from יָדַע; knowing; Jada, an Israelite.

H3048.definition: from יָדַע and יָהּ; Jah has known; Jedajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3049.definition: from יָדַע; properly, a knowing one; specifically, a conjurer; (by impl) a ghost.

H3050.definition: contraction for יְהֹוָה, and meaning the same; Jah, the sacred name.
H3050.kjv: Jah, the Lord, most vehement. Compare names in '-iah,' '-jah.'

H3051.definition: a primitive root; to give (whether literal or figurative); generally, to put; imperatively (reflexive) come.
H3051.kjv: ascribe, bring, come on, give, go, set, take.

H3053.definition: from יָהַב; properly, what is given (by Providence), i.e. a lot.

H3054.definition: denominative from a form corresponding to יְהוּדlemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; to Judaize, i.e. become Jewish.

H3055.definition: a briefer form of one corresponding to יְהוּדlemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; Jehud, a place in Palestine.

H3056.definition: perhaps from a form corresponding to יְהוּדlemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; Judaistic; Jehdai, an Israelite.

H3057.definition: feminine of יְהוּדִי; Jehudijah, a Jewess.

H3058.definition: from יְהֹוָה and הוּא; Jehovah (is) He; Jehu, the name of five Israelites.

H3059.definition: from יְהֹוָה and אָחַז; Jehovah-seized; Jehoachaz, the name of three Israelites.

H3060.definition: from יְהֹוָה and (perhaps) אֵשׁ; Jehovah-fired; Jehoash, the name of two Israelite kings.

H3061.definition: lemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; (Aramaic) contracted from a form corresponding to יְהוּדָה; properly, Judah, hence, Judaea.

H3062.definition: (Aramaic) patrial from יְהוּדlemma יְהיּד yod, corrected to יְהוּד; a Jehudaite (or Judaite), i.e. Jew.

H3063.definition: from יָדָה; celebrated; Jehudah (or Judah), the name of five Israelites; also of the tribe descended from the first, and of its territory.

H3064.definition: patronymically from יְהוּדָה; a Jehudite (i.e. Judaite or Jew), or descendant of Jehudah (i.e. Judah).

H3065.definition: the same as יְהוּדִי; Jehudi, an Israelite.

H3066.definition: feminine of יְהוּדִי; the Jewish (used adverbially) language.

H3067.definition: the same as יְהוּדִית; Jewess; Jehudith, a Canaanitess.

H3068.definition: from הָיָה; (the) self-Existent or Eternal; Jehovah, Jewish national name of God.
H3068.kjv: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare יָהּ, יְהֹוִה.

H3070.definition: xlit yireh corrected to yirʼeh; from יְהֹוָה and רָאָה; Jehovah will see (to it); Jehovah-Jireh, a symbolical name for Mount Moriah.

H3071.definition: from יְהֹוָה and נֵס with the prononimal suffix; Jehovah (is) my banner; Jehovah-Nissi, a symbolical name of an altar in the Desert.

H3072.definition: from יְהֹוָה and צֶדֶק with pronominal suffix; Jehovah (is) our right; Jehovah-Tsidkenu, a symbolical epithet of the Messiah and of Jerusalem.

H3073.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁלוֹם; Jehovah (is) peace; Jehovah-Shalom, a symbolical name of an altar in Palestine.

H3074.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁם with directive enclitic; Jehovah (is) thither; Jehovah-Shammah, a symbolic title of Jerusalem.

H3075.definition: from יְהֹוָה and זָבַד; Jehovah-endowed; Jehozabad, the name of three Israelites.

H3076.definition: from יְהֹוָה and חָנַן; Jehovah-favored; Jehochanan, the name of eight Israelites.

H3077.definition: from יְהֹוָה and יָדַע; Jehovah-known; Jehojada, the name of three Israelites.

H3078.definition: from יְהֹוָה and כּוּן; Jehovah will establish; Jehojakin, a Jewish king.

H3079.definition: from יְהֹוָה abbreviated and קוּם; Jehovah will raise; Jehojakim, a Jewish king.

H3080.definition: from יְהֹוָה and רִיב; Jehovah will contend; Jehojarib, the name of two Israelites.

H3081.definition: from יָכֹל; potent; Jehukal, an Israelite.

H3082.definition: from יְהֹוָה and נָדַב; Jehovah-largessed; Jehonadab, the name of an Israelite and of an Arab.

H3083.definition: from יְהֹוָה and נָתַן; Jehovah-given; Jehonathan, the name of four Israelites.

H3084.definition: a fuller form of יוֹסֵף; Jehoseph (i.e. Joseph), a son of Jacob.

H3085.definition: from יְהֹוָה and עָדָה; Jehovah-adorned; Jehoaddah, an Israelite.

H3086.definition: or יְהוֹעַדָּן; from יְהֹוָה and עָדַן; Jehovahpleased; Jehoaddin or Jehoaddan, an Israelitess.

H3087.definition: from יְהֹוָה and צָדַק; Jehovah-righted; Jehotsadak, an Israelite.

H3088.definition: from יְהֹוָה and רוּם; Jehovah-raised; Jehoram, the name of a Syrian and of three Israelites.

H3089.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁבַע; Jehovah-sworn; Jehosheba, an Israelitess.

H3090.definition: a form of יְהוֹשֶׁבַע; Jehoshabath, an Israelitess.

H3091.definition: or יְהוֹשֻׁעַ; from יְהֹוָה and יָשַׁע; Jehovah-saved; Jehoshua (i.e. Joshua), the Jewish leader.
H3091.kjv: Jehoshua, Jehoshuah, Joshua. Compare הוֹשֵׁעַ, יֵשׁוּעַ.

H3092.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁפַט; Jehovah-judged; Jehoshaphat, the name of six Israelites; also of a valley near Jerusalem.

H3093.definition: probably from the same as הַר; elated; hence, arrogant.

H3094.definition: from הָלַל and אֵל; praising God; Jehallelel, the name of two Israelites.

H3095.definition: from הָלַם (in the sense of hardness); a precious stone, probably onyx.

H3096.definition: or יַהְצָה; or (feminine) יַהְצָה; from an unused root meaning to stamp; perhaps threshing-floor; Jahats or Jahtsah, a place East of the Jordan.

H3097.definition: from יְהֹוָה and אָב; Jehovah-fathered; Joab, the name of three Israelites.

H3098.definition: from יְהֹוָה and אָח; Jehovahbrothered; Joach, the name of four Israelites.

H3099.definition: a form of יְהוֹאָחָז; Joachaz, the name of two Israelites.

H3100.definition: from יְהֹוָה and אֵל; Jehovah (is his) God; Joel, the name of twelve Israelites.

H3101.definition: or יֹאָשׁ; (2 Chronicles 24:1), a form of יְהוֹאָשׁ; Joash, the name of six Israelites.

H3102.definition: perhaps a form of יוֹבָב, but more probably by erroneous transcription for יָשׁוּב; Job, an Israelite.

H3103.definition: from יָבַב; howler; Jobab, the name of two Israelites and of three foreigners.

H3104.definition: or יֹבֵל; apparently from יָבַל; the blast of a horn (from its continuous sound); specifically, the signal of the silver trumpets; hence, the instrument itself and the festival thus introduced.

H3106.definition: from יָבַל; stream; Jubal, an antediluvian.

H3107.definition: a form of יְהוֹזָבָד; Jozabad, the name of ten Israelites.

H3108.definition: from יְהֹוָה and זָכַר; Jehovah-remembered; Jozacar, an Israelite.

H3109.definition: probably from יְהֹוָה and a variation of חָיָה; Jehovah-revived; Jocha, the name of two Israelites.

H3110.definition: a form of יְהוֹחָנָן; Jochanan, the name of nine Israelites.

H3111.definition: a form of יְהוֹיָדָע; Jojada, the name of two Israelites.

H3112.definition: a form of יְהוֹיָכִין; Jojakin, an Israelite king.

H3113.definition: a form of יְהוֹיָקִים; Jojakim, an Israelite.

H3114.definition: a form of יְהוֹיָרִיב; Jojarib, the name of four Israelites.

H3115.definition: from יְהֹוָה contracted and כָּבַד; Jehovah-gloried; Jokebed, the mother of Moses.

H3116.definition: a form of יְהוּכַל; Jukal, an Israelite.

H3117.definition: from an unused root meaning to be hot; a day (as the warm hours), whether literal (from sunrise to sunset, or from one sunset to the next), or figurative (a space of time defined by an associated term), (often used adverb).
H3117.kjv: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (for) ever(-lasting, -more), [idiom] full, life, as (so) long as (... live), (even) now, [phrase] old, [phrase] outlived, [phrase] perpetually, presently, [phrase] remaineth, [idiom] required, season, [idiom] since, space, then, (process of) time, [phrase] as at other times, [phrase] in trouble, weather, (as) when, (a, the, within a) while (that), [idiom] whole ([phrase] age), (full) year(-ly), [phrase] younger.

H3120.definition: probably from the same as יַיִן; effervescing (i.e. hot and active); Javan, the name of a son of Joktan, and of the race (Ionians, i.e. Greeks) descended from him, with their territory; also of a place in Arabia.

H3121.definition: from the same as יַיִן; properly, dregs (as effervescing); hence, mud.

H3122.definition: a form of יְהוֹנָדָב; Jonadab, the name of an Israelite and of a Rechabite.

H3123.definition: probably from the same as יַיִן; a dove (apparently from the warmth of their mating).

H3124.definition: xlit Yônâh corrected to Yôwnâh; the same as יוֹנָה; Jonah, an Israelite.

H3125.definition: patronymically from יָוֵן; a Jevanite, or descendant of Javan.

H3126.definition: active participle of יָנַק; a sucker; hence, a twig (of a tree felled and sprouting).

H3128.definition: from יוֹנָה and אֵלֶם and the plural of רָחוֹק; dove of (the) silence (i.e. dumb Israel) of (i.e. among) distances (i.e. strangers); the title of a ditty (used for a name of its melody).

H3129.definition: a form of יְהוֹנָתָן; Jonathan, the name of ten Israelites.

H3130.definition: future of יָסַף; let him add (or perhaps simply active participle adding); Joseph, the name of seven Israelites.

H3131.definition: from active participle of יָסַף and יָהּ; Jah (is) adding; Josiphjah, an Israelite.

H3132.definition: perhaps feminine active participle of יַעַל; furthermore; Joelah, an Israelite.

H3133.definition: apparently the active participle of יָעַד; appointer; Joed, an Israelite.

H3134.definition: from יְהֹוָה and עֵזֶר; Jehovah (is his) help; Joezer, an Israelite.

H3135.definition: from יְהֹוָה and עוּשׁ; Jehovahhastened; Joash, the name of two Israelites.

H3136.definition: a form of יְהוֹצָדָק; Jotsadak, an Israelite.

H3137.definition: a form of יוֹיָקִים; Jokim, an Israelite.

H3138.definition: active participle of יָרָה; sprinkling; hence, a sprinkling (or autumnal showers).

H3139.definition: from יָרָה; rainy; Jorah, an Israelite.

H3140.definition: from יָרָה; rainy; Jorai, an Israelite.

H3141.definition: a form of יְהוֹרָם; Joram, the name of three Israelites and one Syrian.

H3142.definition: from שׁוּב and חֵסֵד; kindness will be returned; Jushab-Chesed, an Israelite.

H3143.definition: from יָשַׁב and יָהּ; Jehovah will cause to dwell; Josibjah, an Israelite.

H3144.definition: probably a form of יוֹשַׁוְיָה; Joshah, an Israelite.

H3145.definition: from יְהֹוָה and שָׁוָה; Jehovah-set; Joshavjah, an Israelite.

H3146.definition: a form of יְהוֹשָׁפָט; Joshaphat, an Israelite.

H3147.definition: from יְהֹוָה and תָּם; Jehovah (is) perfect; Jotham, the name of three Israelites.

H3148.definition: active participle of יָתַר; properly, redundant; hence, over and above, as adjective, noun, adverb or conjunction.

H3149.definition: from an unused root (meaning to sprinkle) and אֵל; sprinkled of God; Jezavel, an Israelite.

H3150.definition: from the same as the first part of יְזַוְאֵל and יָהּ; sprinkled of Jah; Jizzijah, an Israelite.

H3151.definition: from the same as זִיז; he will make prominent; Jaziz, an Israelite.

H3152.definition: perhaps from an unused root (meaning to draw up); he will draw out; Jizliah, an Israelite.

H3153.definition: or יְזַנְיָהוּ; probably for יַאֲזַנְיָה; Jezanjah, an Israelite.

H3154.definition: from an unused root mean to ooze; sweat, i.e. (by implication) a sweating dress.

H3155.definition: a variation for אֶזְרָחִי; a Jizrach (i.e. Ezrachite or Zarchite) or descendant of Zerach.

H3156.definition: from זָרַח and יָהּ; Jah will shine; Jizrachjah, the name of two Israelites.

H3157.definition: from זָרַע and אֵל; God will sow; Jizreel, the name of two places in Palestine and of two Israelites.

H3158.definition: patronymically from יִזְרְעֵאל; a Jizreelite or native of Jizreel.

H3160.definition: from חָבָה; hidden; Jechubbah, an Israelite.

H3161.definition: a primitive root; to be (or become) one.

H3162.definition: from יָחַד; properly, a unit, i.e. (adverb) unitedly.
H3162.kjv: alike, at all (once), both, likewise, only, (al-) together, withal.

H3163.definition: from יַחַד with pronominal suffix; his unity, i.e. (adverb) together; Jachdo, an Israelite.

H3164.definition: from יַחַד and אֵל; unity of God; Jachdiel, an Israelite.

H3165.definition: from יַחַד and יָהּ; unity of Jah; Jechdijah, the name of two Israelites.

H3166.definition: from חָזָה and אֵל; beheld of God; Jachaziel, the name of five Israelites.

H3167.definition: from חָזָה and יָהּ; Jah will behold; Jachzejah, an Israelite.

H3168.definition: from חָזַק and אֵל; God will strengthen; Jechezkel, the name of two Israelites.

H3169.definition: or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from יְרוּשָׁא and יָהּ; strengthened of Jah; Jechizkijah, the name of five Israelites.

H3170.definition: from the same as חֲזִיר; perhaps protection; Jachzerah, an Israelite.

H3171.definition: or (2 Chronicles 29:14) יְחַוְאֵל; from חָיָה and אֵל; God will live; Jechiel (or Jechavel), the name of eight Israelites.

H3172.definition: patronymically from יְחִיאֵל; a Jechielite or descendant of Jechiel.

H3173.definition: from יָחַד; properly, united, i.e. sole; by implication, beloved; also lonely; (feminine) the life (as not to be replaced).

H3174.definition: from חָיָה and יָהּ; Jah will live; Jechijah, an Israelite.

H3176.definition: a primitive root; to wait; by implication, to be patient, hope.
H3176.kjv: (cause to, have, make to) hope, be pained, stay, tarry, trust, wait.

H3177.definition: from יָחַל and אֵל; expectant of God; Jachleel, an Israelite.

H3178.definition: patronymically from יַחְלְאֵל; a Jachleelite or descendant of Jachleel.

H3179.definition: a primitive root; probably to be hot; figuratively, to conceive.
H3179.kjv: get heat, be hot, conceive, be warm.

H3180.definition: from חָמַר; a kind of deer.

H3181.definition: probably from יָחַם; hot; Jachmai, an Israelite.

H3182.definition: from an unused root meaning to take off the shoes; unsandalled.

H3183.definition: from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה and אֵל; God will allot; Jachtseel, an Israelite.

H3184.definition: patronymically from יַחְצְאֵל; a Jachtseelite (collectively) or descendants of Jachtseel.

H3185.definition: from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה and אֵל; allotted of God; Jachtsiel, an Israelite.

H3187.definition: a primitive root; to sprout; used only as denominative from יַחַשׂ; to enroll by pedigree.
H3187.kjv: (number after, number throughout the) genealogy (to be reckoned), be reckoned by genealogies.

H3188.definition: from יָחַשׂ; a pedigree or family list (as growing spontaneously).

H3189.definition: from יָחַד; unity; Jachath, the name of four Israelites.

H3190.definition: a primitive root; to be (causative) make well, literally (sound, beautiful) or figuratively (happy, successful, right).
H3190.kjv: be accepted, amend, use aright, benefit, be (make) better, seem best, make cheerful, be comely, [phrase] be content, diligent(-ly), dress, earnestly, find favour, give, be glad, do (be, make) good(-ness), be (make) merry, please ([phrase] well), shew more (kindness), skilfully, [idiom] very small, surely, make sweet, thoroughly, tire, trim, very, be (can, deal, entreat, go, have) well (said, seen).

H3192.definition: from יָטַב; pleasantness; Jotbah, a place in Palestine.

H3193.definition: from יׇטְבָה; Jotbathah, a place in the Desert.

H3194.definition: or יוּטָה; from נָטָה; extended; Juttah (or Jutah), a place in Palestine.

H3195.definition: probably from the same as טוּר; encircled (i.e. inclosed); Jetur, a son of Ishmael.

H3196.definition: from an unused root meaning to effervesce; wine (as fermented); by implication, intoxication.

H3197.definition: by erroneous transcription for יָד; a hand or side.

H3198.definition: a primitive root; to be right (i.e. correct); reciprocal, to argue; causatively, to decide, justify or convict.
H3198.kjv: appoint, argue, chasten, convince, correct(-ion), daysman, dispute, judge, maintain, plead, reason (together), rebuke, reprove(-r), surely, in any wise.

H3199.definition: lemma יִכִין first vowel, corrected to יָכִין; from כּוּן; he (or it) will establish; Jakin, the name of three Israelites and of a temple pillar.

H3200.definition: patronymically from יָכִיןlemma יִכִין first vowel, corrected to יָכִין; a Jakinite (collectively) or descendants of Jakin.

H3201.definition: or (fuller) יָכוֹל; a primitive root; to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might).
H3201.kjv: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.

H3203.definition: and יְכׇלְיָהוּ; or (2 Chronicles 26:3) יְכִילְיָה; from יָכֹל and יָהּ; Jah will enable; Jekoljah or Jekiljah, an Israelitess.

H3204.definition: and יְכׇנְיָהוּ; or (Jeremiah 27:20) יְכוֹנְיָה; from כּוּן and יָהּ; Jah will establish; Jekonjah, a Jewish king.

H3205.definition: a primitive root; to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage.
H3205.kjv: bear, beget, birth(-day), born, (make to) bring forth (children, young), bring up, calve, child, come, be delivered (of a child), time of delivery, gender, hatch, labour, (do the office of a) midwife, declare pedigrees, be the son of, (woman in, woman that) travail(-eth, -ing woman).

H3206.definition: from יָלַד; something born, i.e. a lad or offspring.
H3206.kjv: boy, child, fruit, son, young man (one).

H3210.definition: from לוּן; lodging; Jalon, an Israelite.

H3212.definition: a primitive root (compare הָלַךְ); to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses).
H3212.kjv: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), grow, lead (forth), let down, march, prosper, [phrase] pursue, cause to run, spread, take away (-journey), vanish, (cause to) walk(-ing), wax, [idiom] be weak.

H3213.definition: a primitive root; to howl (with a wailing tone) or yell (with a boisterous one).

H3216.definition: a primitive root; to blurt or utter inconsiderately.

H3217.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to stick or scrape; scurf or tetter.

H3218.definition: from an unused root meaning to lick up; a devourer; specifically, the young locust.

H3219.definition: from לָקַט; a travelling pouch (as if for gleanings).

H3220.definition: from an unused root meaning to roar; a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south.

H3222.definition: from the same as יוֹם; a warm spring.

H3223.definition: from יוֹם and אֵל; day of God; Jemuel, an Israelite.

H3224.definition: perhaps from the same as יוֹם; properly, warm, i.e. affectionate; hence, dove (compare יוֹנָה); Jemimah, one of Job's daughters.

H3225.definition: from יָמַן; the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south.

H3226.definition: the same as יָמִין; Jamin, the name of three Israelites.

H3228.definition: patronymically from יָמִין; a Jeminite (collectively) or descendants of Jamin.

H3229.definition: or יִמְלָה; from מָלֵא; full; Jimla or Jimlah, an Israelite.

H3230.definition: from מָלַךְ; he will make king; Jamlek, an Israelite.

H3231.definition: a primitive root; to be (physically) right (i.e. firm); but used only as denominative from יָמִין and transitive,; to be right-handed or take the right-hand side.
H3231.kjv: go (turn) to (on, use) the right hand.

H3232.definition: from יָמַן; prosperity (as betokened by the right hand); Jimnah, the name of two Israelites; also (with the article) of the posterity of one of them.

H3233.definition: from יָמַן; right (i.e. at the right hand).

H3234.definition: from מָנַע; he will restrain; Jimna, an Israelite.

H3235.definition: a primitive root; to exchange; by implication, to change places.

H3236.definition: probably from יָמַר; interchange; Jimrah, an Israelite.

H3238.definition: a primitive root; to rage or be violent; by implication, to suppress, to maltreat.
H3238.kjv: destroy, (thrust out by) oppress(-ing, -ion, -or), proud, vex, do violence.

H3239.definition: from יָנַח; quiet; Janoach or Janochah, a place in Palestine.

H3240.definition: a primitive root; to deposit; by implication, to allow to stay; bestow, cast down, lay (down, up), leave (off), let alone (remain), pacify, place, put, set (down), suffer, withdraw, withhold. (The Hiphil forms with the dagesh are here referred to, in accordance with the older grammarians.
H3240.kjv: but if any distinction of the kind is to be made, these should rather be referred to נוּחַ, and the others here.)

H3241.definition: from נוּם; asleep; Janim, a place in Palestine.

H3242.definition: from יָנַק; a sucker or sapling.

H3243.definition: a primitive root; to suck; causatively, to give milk.
H3243.kjv: milch, nurse(-ing mother), (give, make to) suck(-ing child, -ling).

H3244.definition: or יַנְשׁוֹף; apparently from נָשַׁף; (compare נֶשֶׁף); an unclean (acquatic) bird; probably the heron (perhaps from its blowing cry, or because the nightheron is meant )).

H3245.definition: a primitive root; to set (literally or figuratively); intensively, to found; reflexively, to sit down together, i.e. settle, consult.
H3245.kjv: appoint, take counsel, establish, (lay the, lay for a) found(-ation), instruct, lay, ordain, set, [idiom] sure.

H3246.definition: from יָסַד; a foundation (figuratively, i.e. beginning).

H3247.definition: from יָסַד; a foundation (literally or figuratively).

H3252.definition: from an unused root meaning to watch; observant; Jiskah, sister of Lot.

H3253.definition: from סָמַךְ and יָהּ; Jah will sustain; Jismakjah, an Israelite.

H3254.definition: a primitive root; to add or augment (often adverbial, to continue to do a thing).
H3254.kjv: add, [idiom] again, [idiom] any more, [idiom] cease, [idiom] come more, [phrase] conceive again, continue, exceed, [idiom] further, [idiom] gather together, get more, give more-over, [idiom] henceforth, increase (more and more), join, [idiom] longer (bring, do, make, much, put), [idiom] (the, much, yet) more (and more), proceed (further), prolong, put, be (strong-) er, [idiom] yet, yield.

H3256.definition: a primitive root; to chastise, literally (with blows) or figuratively (with words); hence, to instruct.
H3256.kjv: bind, chasten, chastise, correct, instruct, punish, reform, reprove, sore, teach.

H3258.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to grieve; sorrowful; Jabets, the name of an Israelite, and also of a place in Palestine.

H3259.definition: a primitive root; to fix upon (by agreement or appointment); by implication, to meet (at a stated time), to summon (to trial), to direct (in a certain quarter or position), to engage (for marriage).
H3259.kjv: agree,(maxke an) appoint(-ment, a time), assemble (selves), betroth, gather (selves, together), meet (together), set (a time).

H3260.definition: from יָעַד; appointed; Jedi, an Israelite.

H3261.definition: a primitive root; apparently; to brush aside.

H3262.definition: from יָעָה and אֵל; carried away of God; Jeuel, the name of four Israelites.

H3263.definition: from עוּץ; counsellor; Jeuts, an Israelite.

H3264.definition: a variation of יַעֲרֶשְׁיָה; a forest.

H3265.definition: apparently the passive participle of the same as יַעַר; wooded; Jaur, an Israelite.

H3266.definition: from עוּשׁ; hasty; Jeush, the name of an Edomite and of four Israelites.

H3267.definition: a primitive root; to be bold or obstinate.

H3268.definition: from יָעַז and אֵל; emboldened of God; Jaaziel, an Israelite.

H3269.definition: from יָעַז and יָהּ; emboldened of Jah; Jaazijah, an Israelite.

H3270.definition: lemma יַעֲזִיִר third vowel, corrected to יַעֲזֵיר; or יַעְזֵר; from עָזַר; helpful; Jaazer or Jazer, a place East of the Jordan.

H3272.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to יָעַץ; to counsel; reflexively, to consult.

H3273.definition: from יָעָה and אֵל; carried away of God; Jeiel, the name of six Israelites.

H3274.definition: from עוּשׁ; hasty; Jeish, the name of an Edomite and of a an Israelite.

H3275.definition: from the same as עָכָן; troublesome; Jakan, an Israelite.

H3276.definition: a primitive root; properly, to ascend; figuratively, to be valuable (objectively; useful, subjectively; benefited).
H3276.kjv: [idiom] at all, set forward, can do good, (be, have) profit, (able).

H3278.definition: the same as יָעֵל; Jael, a Canaanite.

H3279.definition: or יַעֲלָה; the same as יַעֲלָה or direct from יַעַל; Jaala or Jaalah, one of the Nethinim.

H3281.definition: from עָלַם; occult; Jalam, an Edomite.

H3282.definition: from an unused root meaning to pay attention; properly, heed; by implication, purpose (sake or account); used adverbially to indicate the reason or cause.
H3282.kjv: because (that), forasmuch ([phrase] as), seeing then, [phrase] that, [phrase] wheras, [phrase] why.

H3283.definition: from the same as יַעַן; the ostrich (probably from its answering cry.

H3285.definition: from the same as יָעֵן; responsive; Jaanai, an Israelite.

H3286.definition: a primitive root; to tire (as if from wearisome flight).

H3289.definition: a primitive root; to advise; reflexively, to deliberate or resolve.
H3289.kjv: advertise, take advise, advise (well), consult, (give, take) counsel(-lor), determine, devise, guide, purpose.

H3290.definition: from עָקַב; heel-catcher (i.e. supplanter); Jaakob, the Israelitish patriarch.

H3292.definition: from the same as עָקָן; Jaakan, an Idumaean.

H3293.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to thicken with verdure; a copse of bushes; hence, a forest; hence, honey in the comb (as hived in trees).

H3294.definition: a form of יַעֲרָה; Jarah, an Israelite.

H3296.definition: from the plural of יַעַר and the masculine plural active participle of אָרַג; woods of weavers; Jaare-Oregim, an Israelite.

H3297.definition: plural of יַעַר; forests; Jearim, a place in Palestine.

H3298.definition: from an unused root of uncertain signification and יָהּ; Jaareshjah, an Israelite.

H3299.definition: from עָשָׂה; they will do; Jaasu, an Israelite.

H3300.definition: from עָשָׂה and אֵל; made of God; Jaasiel, an Israelite.

H3301.definition: from פָּדָה and יָהּ; Jah will liberate; Jiphdejah, an Israelite.

H3302.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be bright, i.e. (by implication) beautiful.
H3302.kjv: be beautiful, be (make self) fair(-r), deck.

H3303.kjv: [phrase] beautiful, beauty, comely, fair(-est, one), [phrase] goodly, pleasant, well.

H3304.definition: from יָפָה by reduplication; very beautiful.

H3305.definition: xlit Yâphô corrected to Yâphôw; or יָפוֹא; (Ezra 3:7), from יָפָה; beautiful; Japho, a place in Palestine.

H3306.definition: a primitive root; properly, to breathe hard, i.e. (by implication) to sigh.

H3307.definition: from יָפַח; properly, puffing, i.e. (figuratively) meditating.

H3309.definition: from יָפַע; bright; Japhia, the name of a Canaanite, an Israelite, and a place in Palestine.

H3310.definition: from פָּלַט; he will deliver; Japhlet, an Israelite.

H3311.definition: patronymically from יַפְלֵט; a Japhletite or descendant of Japhlet.

H3312.definition: from פָּנָה; he will be prepared; Jephunneh, the name of two Israelites.

H3313.kjv: be light, shew self, (cause to) shine (forth).
