H3315.definition: from פָּתָה; expansion; Jepheth, a son of Noah; also his posterity.

H3316.definition: from פָּתַח; he will open; Jiphtach, an Israelite; also a place in Palestine.

H3317.definition: from פָּתַח and אֵל; God will open; Jiphtach-el, a place in Palestine.

H3318.definition: a primitive root; to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim..
H3318.kjv: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depart(-ing, -ure), draw forth, in the end, escape, exact, fail, fall (out), fetch forth (out), get away (forth, hence, out), (able to, cause to, let) go abroad (forth, on, out), going out, grow, have forth (out), issue out, lay (lie) out, lead out, pluck out, proceed, pull out, put away, be risen, [idiom] scarce, send with commandment, shoot forth, spread, spring out, stand out, [idiom] still, [idiom] surely, take forth (out), at any time, [idiom] to (and fro), utter.

H3320.definition: a primitive root; to place (any thing so as to stay); reflexively, to station, offer, continue.
H3320.kjv: present selves, remaining, resort, set (selves), (be able to, can, with-) stand (fast, forth, -ing, still, up).

H3321.definition: lemma יְצב missing vowel, corrected to יְצַב; xlit yᵉtsêb corrected to yᵉtsab; (Aramaic) corresponding to יָצַב; to be firm; hence, to speak surely.

H3322.definition: a primitive root; to place permanently.
H3322.kjv: establish, leave, make, present, put, set, stay.

H3323.definition: from צָהַר; oil (as producing light); figuratively, anointing.

H3324.definition: the same as יִצְהָר; Jitshar, an Israelite.

H3325.definition: patronymically from יִצְהָר; a Jitsharite or descendant of Jitshar.

H3326.definition: passive participle of יַצַע; spread, i.e. a bed; (architecture) an extension, i.e. wing or lean-to (a single story or collectively).

H3327.definition: from צָחַק; laughter (i.e. mochery); Jitschak (or Isaac), son of Abraham.

H3328.definition: from the same as צַחַר; he will shine; Jitschar, an Israelite.

H3330.definition: (Aramaic) from יְצַבlemma יְצב missing vowel, corrected to יְצַבxlit yᵉtsêb corrected to yᵉtsab; fixed, sure; concretely, certainty.

H3331.definition: a primitive root; to strew as a surface.

H3332.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pour out (transitive or intransitive); by implication, to melt or cast as metal; by extension, to place firmly, to stiffen or grow hard.
H3332.kjv: cast, cleave fast, be (as) firm, grow, be hard, lay out, molten, overflow, pour (out), run out, set down, stedfast.

H3333.definition: ytsukah; passive participle feminine of יָצַק; poured out, i.e. run into amould.

H3334.definition: a primitive root; to press (intransitive), i.e. be narrow; figuratively, be in distress.
H3334.kjv: be distressed, be narrow, be straitened (in straits), be vexed.

H3335.definition: probably identical with יָצַר (through the squeezing into shape); (compare יַצַע); to mould into a form; especially as apotter; figuratively, to determine (i.e. form a resolution).
H3335.kjv: [idiom] earthen, fashion, form, frame, make(-r), potter, purpose.

H3336.definition: from יָצַר; a form; figuratively, conception (i.e. purpose).
H3336.kjv: frame, thing framed, imagination, mind, work.

H3337.definition: the same as יֵצֶר; Jetser, an Israelite.

H3338.definition: passive participle of יָצַר; structure, i.e. limb or part.

H3339.definition: from יָצַר; formative; Jitsri, an Israelite.

H3340.definition: ; patronymically from יֵצֶר; a Jitsrite (collectively) or descendants of Jetser.

H3341.definition: a primitive root; to burn or set on fire; figuratively, to desolate.
H3341.kjv: burn (up), be desolate, set (on) fire (fire), kindle.

H3342.definition: from an unused root meaning to excavate; a trough (as dug out); specifically, a wine-vat (whether the lower one, into which the juice drains; or the upper, in which the grapes are crushed).

H3343.definition: from קָבַץ and אֵל; God will gather; Jekabtseel, a place in Palestine.

H3347.definition: from יָקַד and עַם; burning of (the) people; Jokdeam, a place in Palestine.

H3348.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to obey; obedient; Jakeh, a symbolical name (for Solomon).

H3349.definition: from the same as יָקֶה; obedience.

H3351.definition: from קוּם; properly, standing (extant), i.e. by implication, a living thing.

H3352.definition: from יָקֹשׁ; properly, entangling; hence, a snarer.

H3353.definition: passive participle of יָקֹשׁ; properly, entangled, i.e. by implication (intransitively) a snare, or (transitive) a snarer.

H3354.definition: from the same as יָקֶה and אֵל; obedience of God; Jekuthiel, an Israelite.

H3355.definition: from קָטֹן; he will be made little; Joktan, an Arabian patriarch.

H3356.definition: from קוּם; he will raise; Jakim, the name of two Israelites.

H3359.definition: from קוּם and יָהּ; Jah will rise; Jekamjah, the name of two Israelites.

H3360.definition: from קוּם and עַם; (the) people will rise; Jekamam, an Israelite.

H3361.definition: from קוּם and עַם; (the) people will be raised; Jokmeam, a place in Palestine.

H3362.definition: from קוּן and עַם; (the) people will be lamented; Jokneam, a place in Palestine.

H3363.definition: a primitive root; properly, to sever oneself, i.e. (by implication) to be dislocated; figuratively, to abandon; causatively, to impale (and thus allow to drop to pieces by rotting).
H3363.kjv: be alienated, depart, hang (up), be out of joint.

H3365.definition: a primitive root; properly, apparently, to be heavy, i.e. (figuratively) valuable; causatively, to make rare (figuratively, to inhibit).
H3365.kjv: be (make) precious, be prized, be set by, withdraw.

H3366.definition: from יָקַר; value, i.e. (concretely) wealth; abstractly, costliness, dignity.

H3368.kjv: brightness, clear, costly, excellent, fat, honourable women, precious, reputation.

H3369.definition: a primitive root; to ensnare (literally or figuratively).

H3370.definition: from יָקֹשׁ; insidious; Jokshan, an Arabian patriarch.

H3371.definition: probably from the same as יָקֶה and אֵל; veneration of God (compare יְקוּתִיאֵל); Joktheel, the name of a place in Palestine, and of one in Idumaea.

H3372.definition: a primitive root; to fear; morally, to revere; caus. to frighten.
H3372.kjv: affright, be (make) afraid, dread(-ful), (put in) fear(-ful, -fully, -ing), (be had in) reverence(-end), [idiom] see, terrible (act, -ness, thing).

H3374.definition: feminine of יָרֵא; fear (also used as infinitive); morally, reverence.

H3375.definition: xlit Yirôwn corrected to Yirʼôwn; from יָרֵא; fearfulness; Jiron, a place in Palestine.

H3376.definition: from יָרֵא and יָהּ; fearful of Jah; Jirijah, an Israelite.

H3377.definition: from רִיב; he will contend; Jareb, a symbolical name for Assyria.

H3378.definition: from רִיב and בַּעַל; Baal will contend; Jerubbaal, a symbolic name of Gideon.

H3379.definition: from רִיב and עַם; (the) people will contend; Jarobam, the name of two Israelite kings.

H3380.definition: from רִיב and בֹּשֶׁת; shame (i.e. the idol) will contend; Jerubbesheth, a symbolic name for Gideon.

H3381.definition: a primitive root; to descend (literally, to go downwards; or conventionally to a lower region, as the shore, a boundary, the enemy, etc.; or figuratively, to fall); causatively, to bring down (in all the above applications).
H3381.kjv: [idiom] abundantly, bring down, carry down, cast down, (cause to) come(-ing) down, fall (down), get down, go(-ing) down(-ward), hang down, [idiom] indeed, let down, light (down), put down (off), (cause to, let) run down, sink, subdue, take down.

H3382.definition: from יָרַד; a descent; Jered, the name of an antediluvian, and of an Israelite.

H3383.definition: from יָרַד; a descender; Jarden, the principal river of Palestine.

H3384.definition: or (2 Chronicles 26:15) יָרָא; a primitive root; properly, to flow as water (i.e. to rain); transitively, to lay or throw (especially an arrow, i.e. to shoot); figuratively, to point out (as if by aiming the finger), to teach.
H3384.kjv: ([phrase]) archer, cast, direct, inform, instruct, lay, shew, shoot, teach(-er,-ing), through.

H3385.definition: from יָרָה and אֵל; founded of God; Jeruel, a place in Palestine.

H3386.definition: perhaps denominative from יָרֵחַ; (born at the) new moon; Jaroach, an Israelite.

H3387.definition: from יָרָק; green, i.e. an herb.

H3388.definition: or יְרוּשָׁה feminine passive participle of יָרַשׁ; possessed; Jerusha or Jerushah, as Israelitess.

H3389.definition: rarely יְרוּשָׁלַיִם; a dual (in allusion to its two main hills (the true pointing, at least of the former reading, seems to be that of יְרוּשָׁלֵם)); probably from (the passive participle of) יָרָה and שָׁלַם; founded peaceful; Jerushalaim or Jerushalem, the capital city of Palestine.

H3391.definition: from a unused root of uncertain signification; a lunation, i.e. month.

H3392.definition: the same as יֶרַח; Jerach, an Arabian patriarch.

H3394.definition: from the same as יֶרַח; the moon.

H3395.definition: from רָחַם; compassionate; Jerocham, the name of seven or eight Israelites.

H3396.definition: from רָחַם and אֵל; God will compassionate; Jerachmeel, the name of three Israelites.

H3397.definition: patronymically from יְרַחְמְאֵל; a Jerachmeelite or descendant of Jerachmeel.

H3398.definition: probably of Egyptian origin; Jarcha, an Egyptian.

H3399.definition: a primitive root; to precipitate or hurl (rush) headlong; (intransitively) to be rash.

H3400.definition: from יָרָה and אֵל; thrown of God; Jeriel, an Israelite.

H3401.definition: from רִיב; literally he will contend; properly, adjective, contentious; used as noun, an adversary.

H3402.definition: the same as יָרִיב; Jarib, the name of three Israelites.

H3403.definition: from יָרִיב; contentious; Jeribai, an Israelite.

H3404.definition: or יְרִיָּהוּ; from יָרָה and יָהּ; Jah will throw; Jerijah, an Israelite.

H3405.definition: or יְרֵחוֹ; or variation (1 Kings 16:34) יְרִיחֹה; perhaps from יָרֵחַ; its month; or else from רוּחַ; fragrant; Jericho or Jerecho, a place in Palestine.

H3406.definition: or יְרֵימוֹת; or יְרֵמוֹת; feminine plural from רוּם; elevations; Jerimoth or Jeremoth, the name of twelve Israelites.
H3406.kjv: Jermoth, Jerimoth, and Ramoth (from the margin).

H3408.definition: plural of יְרִיעָה; curtains; Jerioth, an Israelitess.

H3409.definition: from an unused root meaning to be soft; the thigh (from its fleshy softness); by euphemistically the generative parts; figuratively, a shank, flank, side.

H3411.definition: feminine of יָרֵךְ; properly, the flank; but used only figuratively, the rear or recess.

H3412.definition: from רוּם; elevation; Jarmuth, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3413.definition: from רוּם; elevated; Jeremai, an Israelite.

H3414.definition: or יִרְמְיָהוּ; from רוּם and יָהּ; Jah will rise; Jirmejah, the name of eight or nine Israelites.

H3415.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be broken up (with any violent action) i.e. (figuratively) to fear; be grevious (only Isaiah 15:4.

H3416.definition: from רָפָא and אֵל; God will heal; Jirpeel, a place in Palestine.

H3418.definition: from יָרָק (in the sense of vacuity of color); properly, pallor, i.e. hence, the yellowish green of young and sickly vegetation; concretely, verdure, i.e. grass or vegetation.

H3419.definition: from the same as יֶרֶק; properly, green; concretely, a vegetable.

H3420.definition: from יֶרֶק; paleness, whether of persons (from fright), or of plants (from drought).

H3421.definition: from רוּק and עַם; people will be poured forth; Jorkeam, a place in Palestine.

H3422.definition: from the same as יֶרֶק; yellowishness.

H3423.definition: or יָרֵשׁ; a primitive root; to occupy (by driving out previous tenants, and possessing in their place); by implication, to seize, to rob, to inherit; also to expel, to impoverish, to ruin.
H3423.kjv: cast out, consume, destroy, disinherit, dispossess, drive(-ing) out, enjoy, expel, [idiom] without fail, (give to, leave for) inherit(-ance, -or) [phrase] magistrate, be (make) poor, come to poverty, (give to, make to) possess, get (have) in (take) possession, seize upon, succeed, [idiom] utterly.

H3425.definition: from יָרַשׁ; something occupied; a conquest; also a patrimony.

H3426.definition: perhaps from an unused root meaning to stand out, or exist; entity; used adverbially or as a copula for the substantive verb (הָיָה); there is or are (or any other form of the verb to be, as may suit the connection).
H3426.kjv: (there) are, (he, it, shall, there, there may, there shall, there should) be, thou do, had, hast, (which) hath, (I, shalt, that) have, (he, it, there) is, substance, it (there) was, (there) were, ye will, thou wilt, wouldest.

H3427.definition: a primitive root; properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry.
H3427.kjv: (make to) abide(-ing), continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-ing), ease self, endure, establish, [idiom] fail, habitation, haunt, (make to) inhabit(-ant), make to keep (house), lurking, [idiom] marry(-ing), (bring again to) place, remain, return, seat, set(-tle), (down-) sit(-down, still, -ting down, -ting (place) -uate), take, tarry.

H3428.definition: from יָשַׁב and אָב; seat of (his) father; Jeshebab, an Israelite.

H3429.definition: from the active participle of יָשַׁב and שֶׁבֶת, with a preposition and the article interposed; sitting in the seat; Joshebbash-Shebeth, an Israelite.

H3430.definition: from יָשַׁב and נֹב, with a pronominal suffix and a preposition interposed; his dwelling (is) in Nob; Jishbo-be-Nob, a Philistine.

H3431.definition: from שָׁבַח; he will praise; Jishbach, an Israelite.

H3432.definition: patronymically from יָשׁוּב; a Jashubite, or descendant of Jashub.

H3433.definition: from שׁוּב and לֶחֶם; returner of bread; Jashubi-Lechem, an Israelite.
H3433.kjv: Jashubi-lehem. (Prob. the text should be pointed יֹשְׁבֵי לֶחֶם and rendered '(they were) inhabitants of Lechem,' i.e. of Bethlehem (by contraction). Compare לַחְמִי).

H3434.definition: from שׁוּב and עַם; people will return; Jashobam, the name of two or three Israelites.

H3435.definition: from an unused root corresponding to שְׁבַק; he will leave; Jishbak, a son of Abraham.

H3436.definition: from יָשַׁב and קָשֶׁה; a hard seat; Joshbekashah, an Israelite.

H3437.definition: or יָשִׁיב; from שׁוּב; he will return; Jashub, the name of two Israelites.

H3438.definition: from שָׁוָה; he will level; Jishvah, an Israelite.

H3439.definition: from the same as יֶשַׁח and יָהּ; Jah will empty; Jeshochajah, an Israelite.

H3440.definition: from שָׁוָה; level; Jishvi, the name of two Israelites.

H3441.definition: patronymically from יִשְׁוִי; a Jishvite (collectively) or descendants of Jishvi.

H3442.definition: for יְהוֹשׁוּעַ; he will save; Jeshua, the name of ten Israelites, also of a place in Palestine.

H3444.definition: feminine passive participle of יָשַׁע; something saved, i.e. (abstractly) deliverance; hence, aid, victory, prosperity.
H3444.kjv: deliverance, health, help(-ing), salvation, save, saving (health), welfare.

H3445.definition: from an unused root meaning to gape (as the empty stomach); hunger.

H3446.definition: from שַׁחֲצוֹם; he will laugh; Jischak, the heir of Abraham.

H3448.definition: by Aramaic אִישַׁי; from the same as יֵשׁ; extant; Jishai, David's father.

H3449.definition: or יִשִּׁיָּהוּ; from נָשָׁה and יָהּ; Jah will lend; Jishshijah, the name of five Israelites.

H3450.definition: from שׂוּם and אֵל; God will place; Jesimael, an Israelite.

H3454.definition: from יָשִׁישׁ; aged; Jeshishai, an Israelite.

H3455.definition: a primitive root; to place; intransitively, to be placed.

H3456.definition: a primitive root; to lie waste.

H3457.definition: from יָשַׁם; desolate; Jishma, an Israelite.

H3458.definition: from שָׁמַע and אֵל; God will hear; Jishmael, the name of Abraham's oldest son, and of five Israelites.

H3459.definition: patronymically from יִשְׁמָעֵאל; a Jishmaelite or descendant of Jishmael.

H3460.definition: or יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּlemma יְשְׁמַעְיָהוּ first vowel, corrected to יִשְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from שָׁמַע and יָהּ; Jah will hear; Jishmajah, the name of two Israelites.

H3461.definition: from שָׁמַר; preservative; Jishmerai, an Israelite.

H3462.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate.

H3464.definition: the same as יָשֵׁן; Jashen, an Israelite.

H3466.definition: feminine of יָשָׁן; Jeshanah, a place in Palestine.

H3467.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor.
H3467.kjv: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.

H3468.definition: or יֵשַׁע; from יָשַׁע; liberty, deliverance, prosperity.

H3469.definition: from יָשַׁע; saving; Jishi, the name of four Israelites.

H3470.definition: or יְשַׁעְיָהוּ; from יָשַׁע and יָהּ; Jah has saved; Jeshajah, the name of seven Israelites.

H3471.definition: from an unused root meaning to polish; a gem supposed to be jasper (from the resemblance in name).

H3472.definition: perhaps from שָׁפָה; he will scratch; Jishpah, an Israelite.

H3473.definition: probably from the same as שָׁפָן; he will hide; Jishpan, an Israelite.

H3474.definition: a primitive root; to be straight or even; figuratively, to be (causatively, to make) right, pleasant, prosperous.
H3474.kjv: direct, fit, seem good (meet), [phrase] please (will), be (esteem, go) right (on), bring (look, make, take the) straight (way), be upright(-ly).

H3475.definition: from יָשַׁר; the right; Jesher, an Israelite.

H3477.kjv: convenient, equity, Jasher, just, meet(-est), [phrase] pleased well right(-eous), straight, (most) upright(-ly, -ness).

H3478.definition: from שָׂרָה and אֵל; he will rule as God; Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity.

H3480.definition: by variation from יָשָׁר and אֵל with directive enclitic; right towards God; Jesarelah, an Israelite.

H3481.definition: patronymically from יִשְׂרָאֵל; a Jisreelite or descendant of Jisrael.

H3482.definition: feminine of יִשְׂרְאֵלִי; a Jisreelitess or female descendant of Jisrael.

H3484.definition: from יָשַׁר; upright; Jeshurun, a symbolic name for Israel.

H3485.definition: (strictly yis-saws-kawr'); from נָשָׂא and שָׂכָר; he will bring a reward; Jissaskar, a son of Jacob.

H3486.definition: from an unused root meaning to blanch; gray-haired, i.e. an aged man.

H3487.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to אֵת; a sign of the object of a verb.

H3488.definition: xlit yᵉthiyb corrected to yᵉthib; (Aramaic) corresponding to יָשַׁב; to sit or dwell.

H3489.definition: from an unused root meaning to pin through or fast; a peg.

H3490.definition: from an unused root meaning to be lonely; a bereaved person.

H3491.definition: passive participle of יָתַר; properly, what is left, i.e. (by implication) a gleaning.

H3492.definition: from יָתַר; redundant; Jattir, a place in Palestine.

H3493.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to יַתִּיר; preeminent; as an adverb, very.

H3494.definition: probably from תָּלָה; it will hang, i.e. be high; Jithlah, a place in Palestine.

H3495.definition: from the same as יָתוֹם; orphanage; Jithmah, an Israelite.

H3496.definition: from an unused root meaning to endure, and אֵל; continued of God; Jathniel, an Israelite.

H3497.definition: lemma יְתְנָן first vowel, corrected to יִתְנָן; from the same as תַּנִּין; extensive; Jithnan, a place in Palestine.

H3498.definition: a primitive root; to jut over or exceed; by implication, to excel; (intransitively) to remain or be left; causatively, to leave, cause to abound, preserve.
H3498.kjv: excel, leave (a remnant), left behind, too much, make plenteous, preserve, (be, let) remain(-der, -ing, -nant), reserve, residue, rest.

H3499.definition: from יָתַר; properly, an overhanging, i.e. (by implication) an excess, superiority, remainder; also a small rope (as hanging free).
H3499.kjv: [phrase] abundant, cord, exceeding, excellancy(-ent), what they leave, that hath left, plentifully, remnant, residue, rest, string, with.

H3500.definition: the same as יֶתֶר; Jether, the name of five or six Israelites and of one Midianite.

H3501.definition: by variation for יִתְרָה; Jithra, an Israelite (or Ishmaelite).

H3502.definition: feminine of יֶתֶר; properly, excellence, i.e. (by implication) wealth.

H3503.definition: from יֶתֶר with pron. suffix; his excellence; Jethro, Moses' father-in-law.

H3505.definition: patronymically from יֶתֶר; a Jithrite or descendant of Jether.

H3506.definition: from יָתַר; excellent; Jithran, the name of an Edomite and of an Israelite.

H3507.definition: from יֶתֶר and עַם; excellence of people; Jithream, a son of David.

H3508.definition: feminine active participle of יָתַר; the lobe or flap of the liver (as if redundant or outhanging).

H3509.definition: of uncertain derivation; Jetheth, an Edomite.

H3510.definition: a primitive root; properly, to feel pain; by implication, to grieve; figuratively, to spoil.
H3510.kjv: grieving, mar, have pain, make sad (sore), (be) sorrowful.

H3511.definition: from כָּאַב; suffering (physical or mental), adversity.

H3512.definition: a primitive root; to despond; causatively, to deject.

H3513.definition: or כָּבֵד; a primitive root; to be heavy, i.e. in a bad sense (burdensome, severe, dull) or in a good sense (numerous, rich, honorable; causatively, to make weighty (in the same two senses).
H3513.kjv: abounding with, more grievously afflict, boast, be chargeable, [idiom] be dim, glorify, be (make) glorious (things), glory, (very) great, be grievous, harden, be (make) heavy, be heavier, lay heavily, (bring to, come to, do, get, be had in) honour (self), (be) honourable (man), lade, [idiom] more be laid, make self many, nobles, prevail, promote (to honour), be rich, be (go) sore, stop.

H3515.definition: from כָּבַד; heavy; figuratively in a good sense (numerous) or in a bad sense (severe, difficult, stupid).
H3515.kjv: (so) great, grievous, hard(-ened), (too) heavy(-ier), laden, much, slow, sore, thick.

H3516.definition: the same as כָּבֵד; the liver (as the heaviest of the viscera).

H3518.definition: a primitive root; to expire or (causatively) to extinguish (fire, light, anger).

H3519.definition: rarely כָּבֹד; from כָּבַד; properly, weight, but only figuratively in a good sense, splendor or copiousness.

H3520.definition: irregular feminine passive participle of כָּבַד; weightiness, i.e. magnificence, wealth.

H3521.definition: from the same as כֶּבֶל in the sense of limitation; sterile; Cabul, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3522.definition: from an unused root meaning to heap up; hilly; Cabon, a place in Palestine.

H3523.definition: from כָּבַר in the original sense of plaiting; a matrass (of intertwined materials).

H3524.definition: from כָּבַר; vast, whether in extent (figuratively, of power, mighty; of time, aged), or in number, many.
H3524.kjv: [phrase] feeble, mighty, most, much, strong, valiant.

H3525.definition: from an unused root meaning to twine or braid together; a fetter.

H3526.definition: a primitive root; to trample; hence, to wash (properly, by stamping with the feet), whether literal (including the fulling process) or figurative.

H3527.definition: a primitive root; properly, to plait together, i.e. (figuratively) to augment (especially in number or quantity, to accumulate).

H3528.definition: from כָּבַר; properly, extent of time, i.e. a great while; hence, long ago, formerly, hitherto.

H3529.definition: the same as כְּבָר; length; Kebar, a river of Mesopotamia.

H3530.definition: feminine of כְּבָר; properly, length, i.e. a measure (of uncertain dimension).

H3531.definition: from כָּבַר in its original sense; a sieve (as netted).

H3532.definition: from an unused root meaning to dominate; a ram (just old enough to butt).

H3533.definition: a primitive root; to tread down; hence, negatively, to disregard; positively, to conquer, subjugate, violate.
H3533.kjv: bring into bondage, force, keep under, subdue, bring into subjection.

H3534.definition: from כָּבַשׁ; a footstool (as trodden upon).

H3535.definition: or כַּבְשָׂה; feminine of כֶּבֶשׂ; a ewe.

H3536.definition: from כָּבַשׁ; a smelting furnace (as reducing metals).

H3537.definition: from an unused root meaning to deepen; properly, a pail; but generally of earthenware; a jar  for domestic purposes.

H3538.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to כָּזַב; false.

H3539.definition: from the same as כַּד in the sense of striking fire from a metal forged; a sparkling gem, probably the ruby.

H3540.definition: of foreign origin; Kedorlaomer, an early Persian king.

H3541.definition: from the prefix k and הוּא; properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now.
H3541.kjv: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.

H3543.definition: a primitive root; to be weak, i.e. (figuratively) to despond (causatively, rebuke), or (of light, the eye) to grow dull.
H3543.kjv: darken, be dim, fail, faint, restrain, [idiom] utterly.

H3544.kjv: somewhat dark, darkish, wax dim, heaviness, smoking.

H3545.definition: feminine of כֵּהֶה; properly, a weakening; figuratively, alleviation, i.e. cure.

H3546.definition: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to and כּוּל; to be able.

H3547.definition: a primitive root, apparently meaning to mediate in religious services; but used only as denominative from כֹּהֵן; to officiate as a priest; figuratively, to put on regalia.
H3547.kjv: deck, be (do the office of a, execute the, minister in the) priest('s office).

H3548.definition: active participle of כָּהַן; literally one officiating, a priest; also (by courtesy) an acting priest (although a layman).
H3548.kjv: chief ruler, [idiom] own, priest, prince, principal officer.

H3551.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to לַהַג in the sense of piercing; a window (as a perforation).

H3552.definition: of foreign derivation; Kub, a country near Egypt.

H3553.definition: from an unused root meaning to be high or rounded; a helmet (as arched).

H3554.definition: a primitive root; properly, to prick or penetrate; hence, to blister (as smarting or eating into).

H3556.definition: probably from the same as כַּבּוֹן (in the sense of rolling) or כָּוָה (in the sense of blazing); a star (as round or as shining); figuratively, a prince.

H3557.definition: a primitive root; properly, to keep in; hence, to measure; figuratively, to maintain (in various senses).
H3557.kjv: (be able to, can) abide, bear, comprehend, contain, feed, forbearing, guide, hold(-ing in), nourish(-er), be present, make provision, receive, sustain, provide sustenance (victuals).

H3558.definition: from an unused root meaning to store away; a jewel (probably gold beads).

H3559.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prosperous).
H3559.kjv: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make provision, (be, make) ready, right, set (aright, fast, forth), be stable, (e-) stablish, stand, tarry, [idiom] very deed.

H3560.definition: probably from כּוּן; established; Kun, a place in Syria.

H3561.definition: from כּוּן; something prepared, i.e. a sacrificial wafer.

H3562.definition: from כּוּן and יָהּ; Jah has sustained; Conanjah, the name of two Israelites.

H3563.definition: from an unused root meaning to hold together; a cup (as a container), often figuratively, a lot (as if a potion); also some unclean bird, probably an owl (perhaps from the cup-like cavity of its eye).

H3564.definition: from an unused root meaning properly, to dig through; a pot or furnace (as if excavated).

H3565.definition: from כּוּר and עָשָׁן; furnace of smoke; Cor-Ashan, a place in Palestine.

H3566.definition: or (Ezra 1:1 (last time),2) כֹּרֶשׁ; from the Persians; Koresh (or Cyrus), the Persian king.

H3568.definition: probably of foreign origin; Cush (or Ethiopia), the name of a son of Ham, and of his territory; also of an Israelite.

H3569.definition: patronymically from כּוּשׁ; a Cushite, or descendant of Cush.

H3570.definition: the same as כּוּשִׁי; Cushi, the name of two Israelites.

H3571.definition: feminine of כּוּשִׁי; a Cushite woman.

H3572.definition: perhaps from כּוּשׁ; Cushan, a region of Arabia.

H3573.definition: apparently from כּוּשָׁן and the dual of רִשְׁעָה; Cushan of double wickedness; Cushan-Rishathajim, a Mesopotamian king.

H3574.definition: from כָּשֵׁר; prosperity; in plural freedom.

H3575.definition: or (feminine) כּוּתָה; of foreign origin; Cuth or Cuthah, a province of Assyria.

H3576.definition: a primitive root; to lie (i.e. deceive), literally or figuratively.
H3576.kjv: fail, (be found a, make a) liar, lie, lying, be in vain.

H3577.definition: from כָּזַב; falsehood; literally (untruth) or figuratively (idol).
H3577.kjv: deceitful, false, leasing, + liar, lie, lying.

H3578.definition: from כָּזַב; fallacious; Cozeba, a place in Palestine.

H3579.definition: from כָּזַב; false; Cozbi, a Midianitess.

H3580.definition: from כָּזַב; falsified; Kezib, a place in Palestine.

H3581.definition: or (Daniel 11:6) כּוֹחַ; from an unused root meaning to be firm; vigor, literally (force, in a good or a bad sense) or figuratively (capacity, means, produce); also (from its hardiness) a large lizard.
H3581.kjv: ability, able, chameleon, force, fruits, might, power(-ful), strength, substance, wealth.

H3582.definition: a primitive root; to secrete, by act or word; hence (intensively) to destroy.

H3583.definition: a primitive root; to paint (with stibium).

H3584.definition: a primitive root; to be untrue, in word (to lie, feign, disown) or deed (to disappoint, fail, cringe).
H3584.kjv: deceive, deny, dissemble, fail, deal falsely, be found liars, (be-) lie, lying, submit selves.

H3585.definition: from כָּחַשׁ; literally a failure of flesh, i.e. emaciation; figuratively, hypocrisy.

H3587.definition: from כָּוָה; a brand or scar.

H3588.definition: a primitive particle (the full form of the prepositional prefix) indicating causal relations of all kinds, antecedent or consequent; (by implication) very widely used as a relative conjunction or adverb (as below); often largely modified by other particles annexed.
H3588.kjv: and, + (forasmuch, inasmuch, where-) as, assured(-ly), + but, certainly, doubtless, + else, even, + except, for, how, (because, in, so, than) that, + nevertheless, now, rightly, seeing, since, surely, then, therefore, + (al-) though, + till, truly, + until, when, whether, while, whom, yea, yet.

H3589.definition: from a primitive root meaning to strike; a crushing; figuratively, calamity.

H3590.definition: from the same as כִּיד (compare כַּדְכֹּד); properly, something struck off, i.e. a spark (as struck).

H3591.definition: from the same as כִּיד; (perhaps smaller than חֲנִיתlemma חֲניִת second vowel, corrected to חֲנִית); properly, something to strike with, i.e. a dart.

H3592.definition: the same as כִּידוֹן; Kidon, a place in Palestine.

H3594.definition: from כּוּן; properly, a statue, i.e. idol; but used (by euphemism) forsome heathen deity (perhaps corresponding to Priapus or Baal-peor).

H3595.definition: or כִּיֹּר; from the same as כּוּר; properly, something round (as excavated or bored), i.e. a chafing-dish forcoals or a caldron forcooking; hence (from similarity of form) a washbowl; also (for the same reason) a pulpit or platform.

H3596.definition: or כֵּלַי; from כּוּל in the sense of withholding; niggardly.

H3597.definition: from an unused root meaning to clap or strike with noise; a club or sledge-hammer.

H3598.definition: from the same as כּוּמָז; a cluster of stars, i.e. the Pleiades.

H3599.definition: a form for כּוֹס; a cup; also a bag formoney or weights.

H3600.definition: a form for כּוּר (only in the dual); a cooking range (consisting of two parallel stones, across which the boiler is set).

H3601.definition: from כָּשֵׁר; compare פֶּלֶךְ; literally a director, i.e. the spindle or shank of adistaff, by which it is twirled.

H3602.definition: from כֹּה; just so, referring to the previous or following context.
H3602.kjv: after that (this) manner, this matter, (even) so, in such a case, thus.

H3603.definition: from כָּרַר; a circle, i.e. (by implication) a circumjacent tract or region, especially the Ghor or valley of the Jordan; also a (round) loaf; also a talent (or large [round] coin).

H3605.definition: or (Jeremiah 33:8) כּוֹל; from כָּלַל; properly, the whole; hence, all, any or every (in the singular only, but often in a plural sense).
H3605.kjv: (in) all (manner, (ye)), altogether, any (manner), enough, every (one, place, thing), howsoever, as many as, (no-) thing, ought, whatsoever, (the) whole, whoso(-ever).

H3607.definition: a primitive root; to restrict, by act (hold back or in) or word (prohibit).
H3607.kjv: finish, forbid, keep (back), refrain, restrain, retain, shut up, be stayed, withhold.

H3609.definition: apparently from כָּלָא and אָב; restraint of (his) father; Kilab, an Israelite.

H3610.definition: dual of כֶּלֶא in the original sense of separation; two heterogeneities.

H3611.definition: from an unused root means. to yelp, or else to attack; a dog; hence (by euphemism) a male prostitute.

H3612.definition: perhaps a form of כֶּלֶב, or else from the same root in the sense of forcible; Caleb, the name of three Israelites.

H3613.definition: from כָּלֵב and אֶפְרָת; Caleb-Ephrathah, a place in Egypt (if the text is correct).

H3614.definition: probably by erroneous transcription for כָּלֵבִי; patronymically from כָּלֵב; a Calebite or descendant of Caleb.

H3615.definition: a primitive root; to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume).
H3615.kjv: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] have, leave (off), long, bring to pass, wholly reap, make clean riddance, spend, quite take away, waste.

H3617.definition: from כָּלָה; a completion; adverb, completely; also destruction.
H3617.kjv: altogether, (be, utterly) consume(-d), consummation(-ption), was determined, (full, utter) end, riddance.

H3618.definition: lemma כַּלָה missing dagesh, corrected to כַּלָּה; from כָּלַל; a bride (as if perfect); hence, a son's wife.

H3619.definition: xlit kᵉlûb corrected to kᵉlûwb; from the same as כֶּלֶב; a bird-trap (as furnished with a clap-stick or treadle to spring it); hence, a basket (as resembling a wicker cage).

H3620.definition: the same as כְּלוּבxlit kᵉlûb corrected to kᵉlûwb; Kelub, the name of two Israelites.

H3621.definition: a form of כָּלֵב; Kelubai, an Israelite.

H3622.definition: from כָּלָה; completed; Keluhai, an Israelite.

H3623.definition: denominative passive participle from כַּלָּהlemma כַּלָה missing dagesh, corrected to כַּלָּה; bridehood (only in the plural).

H3624.definition: from an unused root meaning to be complete; maturity.

H3625.definition: the same as כֶּלַח; Kelach, a place in Assyria.

H3626.definition: from כֹּל and חֹזֶה; every seer; Col-Chozeh, an Israelite.

H3627.definition: from כָּלָה; something prepared, i.e. any apparatus (as an implement, utensil, dress, vessel or weapon).
H3627.kjv: armour(-bearer), artillery, bag, carriage, [phrase] furnish, furniture, instrument, jewel, that is made of, [idiom] one from another, that which pertaineth, pot, [phrase] psaltery, sack, stuff, thing, tool, vessel, ware, weapon, [phrase] whatsoever.

H3628.definition: or כְּלוּא; from כְּלִי (compare כֶּלֶא); a prison.

H3629.definition: feminine of כְּלִי (only in the plural); a kidney (as an essential organ); figuratively, the mind (as the interior self).

H3630.definition: a form of כִּלָּיוֹן; Kiljon, an Israelite.

H3632.definition: from כָּלַל; complete; as noun, the whole (specifically, a sacrifice entirely consumed); as adverb, fully.
H3632.kjv: all, every whit, flame, perfect(-ion), utterly, whole burnt offering (sacrifice), wholly.

H3633.definition: from כּוּל; sustenance; Calcol, an Israelite.

H3636.definition: from כָּלַל; complete; Kelal, an Israelite.

H3637.definition: a primitive root; properly, to wound; but only figuratively, to taunt or insult.
H3637.kjv: be (make) ashamed, blush, be confounded, be put to confusion, hurt, reproach, (do, put to) shame.

H3638.definition: of foreign derivation; Kilmad, a place apparently in the Assyrian empire.

H3641.definition: or כַּלְנֵה; also כַּלְנוֹ; of foreign derivation; Calneh or Calno, a place in the Assyrian empire.

H3642.definition: a primitive root; to pine after.

H3643.definition: from כָּמַהּ; pining; Kimham, an Israelite.

H3644.definition: or כָּמוֹ; (compare כֵּן); a form of the prefix 'k-', but used separately  as, thus, so.
H3644.kjv: according to, (such) as (it were, well as), in comparison of, like (as, to, unto), thus, when, worth.

H3645.definition: or (Jeremiah 48:7) כְּמִישׁ; from an unused root meaning to subdue; the powerful; Kemosh, the god of the Moabites.

H3646.definition: from an unused root meaning to store up or preserve; 'cummin' (from its use as a condiment).

H3647.definition: a primitive root; to store away, i.e. (figuratively) in the memory.

H3648.definition: a primitive root; properly, to intertwine or contract, i.e. (by implication) to shrivel (as with heat); figuratively, to be deeply affected with passion (love or pity).

H3649.definition: from כָּמַר; properly, an ascetic (as if shrunk with self-maceration), i.e. an idolatrous priest (only in plural).

H3650.definition: redupl. from כָּמַר; obscuration (as if from shrinkage of light, i.e. an eclipse (only in plural).

H3651.definition: from כּוּן; properly, set upright; hence (figuratively as adjective) just; but usually (as adverb or conjunction) rightly or so (in various applications to manner, time and relation; often with other particles).
H3651.kjv: [phrase] after that (this, -ward, -wards), as... as, [phrase] (for-) asmuch as yet, [phrase] be (for which) cause, [phrase] following, howbeit, in (the) like (manner, -wise), [idiom] the more, right, (even) so, state, straightway, such (thing), surely, [phrase] there (where) -fore, this, thus, true, well, [idiom] you.

H3653.definition: the same as כֵּן, used as a noun; a stand, i.e. pedestal or station.
H3653.kjv: base, estate, foot, office, place, well.

H3654.definition: from כָּנַן in the sense of fastening; (from infixing its sting; used only in plural (and irregular in Exodus 8:17,18; Hebrews 13:14)); a gnat.

H3655.definition: a primitive root; to address by an additional name; hence, to eulogize.

H3656.definition: for כַּלְנֶה; Canneh, a place in Assyria.

H3658.definition: from a unused root meaning to twang; a harp.

H3659.definition: for יְכׇנְיָה; Conjah, an Israelite king.

H3660.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to כְּמוֹ; so or thus.

H3661.definition: a primitive root; to set out, i.e. plant.

H3662.definition: from כָּנַן; planted; Kenani, an Israelite.

H3663.definition: or כְּנַנְיָהוּ; from כָּנַן and יָהּ; Jah has planted; Kenanjah, an Israelite.

H3664.definition: a primitive root; to collect; hence, to enfold.

H3665.definition: a primitive root; properly, to bend the knee; hence, to humiliate, vanquish.
H3665.kjv: bring down (low), into subjection, under, humble (self), subdue.

H3666.definition: from כָּנַע in the sense of folding (compare כָּנַס); a package.

H3667.definition: from כָּנַע; humiliated; Kenaan, a son a Ham; also the country inhabited by him.

H3668.definition: feminine of כְּנַעַן; Kenaanah, the name of two Israelites.

H3669.definition: patrial from כְּנַעַן; a Kenaanite or inhabitant of Kenaan; by implication, a pedlar (the Canaanites standing for their neighbors the Ishmaelites, who conducted mercantile caravans).

H3670.definition: a primitive root; properly, to project laterally, i.e. probably (reflexive) to withdraw.

H3671.definition: from כָּנַף; an edge or extremity; specifically (of a bird or army) a wing, (of a garment or bedclothing) a flap, (of the earth) a quarter, (of a building) a pinnacle.
H3671.kjv: [phrase] bird, border, corner, end, feather(-ed), [idiom] flying, [phrase] (one an-) other, overspreading, [idiom] quarters, skirt, [idiom] sort, uttermost part, wing(-ed).

H3672.definition: or כִּנֶּרֶתlemma כִּנֶרֶת missing dagesh, corrected to כִּנֶּרֶת; respectively plural and singular feminine from the same as כִּנּוֹר; perhaps harp-shaped; Kinneroth or Kinnereth, a place in Palestine.

H3674.definition: from כָּנָה; a colleague (as having the same title).

H3677.definition: or כֶּסֶה; apparently from כָּסָה; properly, fulness or the full moon, i.e. its festival.

H3678.definition: or כִּסֵּה; from כָּסָה; properly, covered, i.e. a throne (as canopied).

H3680.definition: a primitive root; properly, to plump, i.e. fill up hollows; by implication, to cover (for clothing or secrecy).
H3680.kjv: clad self, close, clothe, conceal, cover (self), (flee to) hide, overwhelm. Compare כָּשָׂה.

H3681.definition: passive participle of כָּסָה; properly, covered, i.e. (as noun) a covering.

H3682.definition: from כָּסָה; a cover (garment); figuratively, a veiling.

H3683.definition: a primitive root; to cut off.

H3684.definition: from כָּסַל; properly, fat, i.e. (figuratively) stupid or silly.

H3685.definition: the same as כְּסִיל; any notable constellation; specifically Orion (as if a burly one).

H3686.definition: the same as כְּסִיל; Kesil, a place in Palestine.

H3688.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be fat, i.e. (figuratively) silly.

H3689.definition: from כָּסַל; properly, fatness, i.e. by implication (literally) the loin (as the seat of the leaf fat) or (generally) the viscera; also (figuratively) silliness or (in a good sense) trust.

H3690.definition: lemma כְּסִלָה first two vowels, corrected to כִּסְלָה; feminine of כֶּסֶל; in a good sense, trust; in a bad one, silliness.

H3691.definition: probably of foreign origin; Kisleu, the 9th Hebrew month.

H3692.definition: from כָּסַל; hopeful; Kislon, an Israelite.

H3693.definition: from כָּסַל; fertile; Kesalon, a place in Palestine.

H3694.definition: feminine plural of passive participle of כָּסַל; fattened; Kesulloth, a place in Palestine.

H3695.definition: a plural probably of foreign derivation; Casluchim, a people cognate to the Egyptians.

H3696.definition: from the feminine plural of כֶּסֶל and תָּבוֹר; flanks of Tabor; Kisloth-Tabor, a place in Palestine.

H3698.definition: from כָּסַם; spelt (from its bristliness as if just shorn).

H3700.definition: a primitive root; properly, to become pale, i.e. (by implication) to pine after; also to fear.

H3701.definition: from כָּסַף; silver (from its pale color); by implication, money.

H3703.definition: perhaps from כֶּסֶף; silvery; Casiphja, a place in Babylon.

H3704.definition: from כָּסָה; a cushion or pillow (as covering a seat or bed).

H3706.definition: (Aramaic) or כְּעֶת; (Aramaic), feminine of כְּעַן; thus (only in the formula 'and so forth').

H3707.definition: a primitive root; to trouble; by implication, to grieve, rage, be indignant.
H3707.kjv: be angry, be grieved, take indignation, provoke (to anger, unto wrath), have sorrow, vex, be wroth.

H3708.definition: or (in Job) כַּעַשׂ; from כַּעַס; vexation.
H3708.kjv: anger, angry, grief, indignation, provocation, provoking, [idiom] sore, sorrow, spite, wrath.

H3709.definition: from כָּפַף; the hollow hand or palm (so of the paw of an animal, of the sole, and even of the bowl of a dish or sling, the handle of a bolt, the leaves of a palm-tree); figuratively, power.
H3709.kjv: branch, [phrase] foot, hand((-ful), -dle, (-led)), hollow, middle, palm, paw, power, sole, spoon.

H3711.definition: a primitive root; properly, to bend, i.e. (figuratively) to tame or subdue.

H3712.definition: feminine of כַּף; a leaf of a palmtree.

H3713.definition: from כָּפַר; properly, a cover, i.e. (by implication) a tankard (or covered goblet); also white frost (as covering the ground).

H3714.definition: from an unused root meaning to connect; a girder.

H3715.definition: from כָּפַר; a village (as covered in by walls); also a young lion (perhaps as covered with a mane).

H3716.definition: feminine of כְּפִיר; the village (always with the art.); Kephirah, a place in Palestine.

H3717.definition: a primitive root; to fold together; figuratively, to repeat.

H3720.definition: from כָּפַן; hunger (as making to stoop with emptiness and pain).

H3722.definition: a primitive root; to cover (specifically with bitumen); figuratively, to expiate or condone, to placate or cancel.
H3722.kjv: appease, make (an atonement, cleanse, disannul, forgive, be merciful, pacify, pardon, purge (away), put off, (make) reconcile(-liation).

H3723.definition: from כָּפַר; a village (as protected by walls).

H3724.definition: from כָּפַר; properly, a cover, i.e. (literally) a village (as covered in); (specifically) bitumen (as used for coating), and the henna plant (as used for dyeing); figuratively, a redemption-price.
H3724.kjv: bribe, camphire, pitch, ransom, satisfaction, sum of money, village.

H3726.definition: from כָּפָר and עַמּוֹנִי, with the article interposed; village of the Ammonite; Kefar-ha-Ammoni, a place in Palestine.

H3727.definition: from כָּפַר; a lid (used only of the cover of the sacred Ark).

H3728.definition: a primitive root; to tread down; figuratively, to humiliate.

H3729.definition: (Aramaic) a root of uncertain correspondence; to fetter.

H3730.definition: or (Amos 9:1) כַּפְתּוֹר; probably from an unused root meaning to encircle; a chaplet; but used only in an architectonic sense, i.e. the capital of acolumn, or a wreath-like button or disk on the candelabrum.

H3731.definition: or (Amos 9:7) כַּפְתּוֹר; apparently the same as כַּפְתֹּר; Caphtor (i.e. a wreath-shaped island), the original seat of the Philistines.

H3732.definition: patrial from כַּפְתֹּר; a Caphtorite (collectively) or native of Caphtor.

H3733.definition: from כָּרַר in the sense of plumpness; a ram (as full-grown and fat), including a battering-ram (as butting); hence, a meadow (as for sheep); also a pad or camel's saddle (as puffed out).
H3733.kjv: captain, furniture, lamb, (large) pasture, ram. See also בֵּית כַּר, כָּרִי.

H3734.definition: from the same as כּוּר; properly, a deep round vessel, i.e. (specifically) a cor or measure for things dry.

H3735.definition: (Aramaic) probably corresponding to כָּרָה in the sense of piercing(figuratively); to grieve.

H3736.definition: from the same as כֶּבֶל; to gird or clothe.

H3737.definition: (Aramaic) from a verb corresponding to that of כַּרְבֵּל; a mantle.

H3738.definition: a primitive root; properly, to dig; figuratively, to plot; generally, to bore or open.

H3739.definition: usually assigned as a primitive root, but probably only a special application of כָּרָה (through the common idea of planning implied in a bargain); to purchase.

H3742.definition: of uncertain derivation; a cherub or imaginary figure.

H3743.definition: the same as כְּרוּב; Kerub, a place in Babylon.

H3745.definition: (Aramaic) probably of Greek origin; to proclaim.

H3746.definition: perhaps an abridged plural of כַּר in the sense of leader (of the flock); a life-guardsman.

H3747.definition: from כָּרַת; a cut; Kerith, a brook of Palestine.

H3748.definition: from כָּרַת; a cutting (of the matrimonial bond), i.e. divorce.

H3749.definition: expanded from the same as כַּבּוֹן; a rim or top margin.

H3750.definition: probably of foreign origin; the crocus.

H3751.definition: of foreign derivation; Karkemish, a place in Syria.

H3752.definition: of Persian origin; Karkas, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H3753.definition: from כָּרַר; a dromedary (from its rapid motion as if dancing).

H3754.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a garden or vineyard.
H3754.kjv: vines, (increase of the) vineyard(-s), vintage. See also בֵּית הַכֶּרֶם.

H3755.definition: active participle of an imaginary denominative from כֶּרֶם; a vinedresser.
H3755.kjv: vine dresser (as one or two words).

H3756.definition: from כֶּרֶם; gardener; Karmi, the name of three Israelites.

H3757.definition: patronymically from כַּרְמִי; a Karmite or descendant of Karmi.

H3758.definition: probably of foreign origin; carmine, a deep red.

H3759.definition: from כֶּרֶם; a planted field (garden, orchard, vineyard or park); by implication, garden produce.
H3759.kjv: full (green) ears (of corn), fruitful field (place), plentiful (field).

H3760.definition: the same as כַּרְמֶל; Karmel, the name of a hill and of a town in Palestine.

H3761.definition: patron from כַּרְמֶל; a Karmelite or inhabitant of Karmel (the town).

H3762.definition: feminine of כַּרְמְלִי; a Karmelitess or female inhabitant of Karmel.

H3763.definition: of uncertain derivation; Keran, an aboriginal Idumaean.

H3766.definition: a primitive root; to bend the knee; by implication, to sink, to prostrate.
H3766.kjv: bow (down, self), bring down (low), cast down, couch, fall, feeble, kneeling, sink, smite (stoop) down, subdue, [idiom] very.

H3767.definition: from כָּרַע; the leg (from the knee to the ankle) of men or locusts (only in the dual).

H3768.definition: of foreign origin; byssus or fine vegetable wool.

H3769.definition: a primitive root; to dance (i.e. whirl).

H3770.definition: by variation from קָרַס; the paunch or belly (as swelling out).

H3771.definition: of foreign origin; Karshena, a courtier of Xerxes.

H3772.definition: a primitive root; to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces).
H3772.kjv: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] want.

H3773.definition: passive participle feminine of כָּרַת; something cut, i.e. a hewn timber.

H3774.definition: probably from כָּרַת in the sense of executioner; (compare טַבָּח) (only collectively in the singular as plural); a Kerethite or life-guardsman.

H3775.definition: apparently by transposition for כֶּבֶשׂ; a young sheep.

H3776.definition: feminine of כֶּשֶׂב; a young ewe.

H3777.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Kesed, a relative of Abraham.

H3778.definition: (occasionally with enclitic) כַּשְׂדִּימָה; towards the Kasdites into Chaldea), patronymically from כֶּשֶׂד (only in the plural); a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed; by implication, a Chaldaean (as if so descended); also an astrologer (as if proverbial of that people.

H3779.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to כַּשְׂדִּי; a Chaldaean or inhabitant of Chaldaea; by implication, a Magian or professional astrologer.

H3780.definition: a primitive root; to grow fat (i.e. be covered with flesh).

H3781.definition: from כָּשַׁל; properly, a feller, i.e. an axe.

H3782.definition: a primitive root; to totter or waver (through weakness of the legs, especially the ankle); by implication, to falter, stumble, faint or fall.
H3782.kjv: bereave (from the margin), cast down, be decayed, (cause to) fail, (cause, make to) fall (down, -ing), feeble, be (the) ruin(-ed, of), (be) overthrown, (cause to) stumble, [idiom] utterly, be weak.

H3783.definition: from כָּשַׁל; properly, a tottering, i.e. ruin.

H3784.definition: a primitive root; properly, to whisper aspell, i.e. to inchant or practise magic.

H3787.definition: a primitive root properly, to be straight or right; by implication, to be acceptable; also to succeed or prosper.

H3789.definition: a primitive root; to grave, by implication, to write (describe, inscribe, prescribe, subscribe).

H3791.definition: from כָּתַב; something written, i.e. a writing, record or book.

H3793.definition: from כָּתַב; a letter or other mark branded on the skin.

H3794.definition: or כִּתִּיִּי; patrial from an unused name denoting Cyprus (only in the plural); a Kittite or Cypriote; hence, an islander in general, i.e. the Greeks or Romans on the shores opposite Palestine.

H3796.definition: from an unused root meaning to compact; a wall (as gathering inmates).

H3798.definition: lemma כְּתִלִישׁ first two vowels, corrected to כִּתְלִישׁ; from כֹּתֶל and אִישׁ; wall of a man; Kithlish, a place in Palestine.

H3799.definition: a primitive root; properly, to carve or engrave, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe indelibly.

H3800.definition: from כָּתַם; properly, something carved out, i.e. ore; hence, gold (pure as originally mined).

H3801.definition: or כֻּתֹּנֶת; from an unused root meaning to cover (compare כָּתֵף); a shirt.

H3802.definition: from an unused root meaning to clothe; the shoulder (proper, i.e. upper end of the arm; as being the spot where the garments hang); figuratively, side-piece or lateral projection of anything.

H3803.definition: a primitive root; to enclose; hence (in a friendly sense) to crown, (in a hostile one) to besiege; also to wait (as restraining oneself).
H3803.kjv: beset round, compass about, be crowned inclose round, suffer.

H3804.definition: from כָּתַר; properly, a circlet, i.e. a diadem.

H3805.definition: feminine active participle of כָּתַר; the capital of a column.

H3806.definition: a primitive root; to butt or pound.

H3807.definition: a primitive root; to bruise or violently strike.
H3807.kjv: beat (down, to pieces), break in pieces, crushed, destroy, discomfit, smite, stamp. l

H3808.definition: or לוֹא; or לֹה; (Deuteronomy 3:11), a primitive particle; not (the simple or abs. negation); by implication, no; often used with other particles.
H3808.kjv: [idiom] before, [phrase] or else, ere, [phrase] except, ig(-norant), much, less, nay, neither, never, no((-ne), -r, (-thing)), ([idiom] as though...,(can-), for) not (out of), of nought, otherwise, out of, [phrase] surely, [phrase] as truly as, [phrase] of a truth, [phrase] verily, for want, [phrase] whether, without.

H3810.definition: or לוֹ דבַר; (Samuel 9:4,5), or לִדְבִר; (Joshua 13:26), (probably rather לֹדְבַר ); from לֹא and דֹּבֶר; pastureless; Lo-Debar, a place in Palestine.

H3811.definition: a primitive root; to tire; (figuratively) to be (or make) disgusted.

H3812.definition: from לָאָה; weary; Leah, a wife of Jacob.

H3814.definition: from לָאַט (or perhaps for active participle of לוּט); properly, muffled, i.e. silently.

H3815.definition: from the prepositional prefix and אֵל; (belonging) to God; Lael an Israelite.

H3816.definition: xlit lᵉôm corrected to lᵉʼôm; or לְאוֹם; from an unused root meaning to gather; a community.

H3817.definition: plural of לְאֹם; communities; Leum mim, an Arabian.

H3818.definition: from לֹא and עַם with pronominal suffix; not my people; Lo-Ammi, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea.

H3819.definition: from לֹא and רָחַם; not pitied; Lo-Ruchamah, the symbolic name of a son of Hosea.

H3820.definition: a form of לֵבָב; the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything.
H3820.kjv: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom] I, kindly, midst, mind(-ed), [idiom] regard(-ed), [idiom] themselves, [idiom] unawares, understanding, [idiom] well, willingly, wisdom.

H3822.definition: plural of לָבִיא; lionesses; Lebaoth, a place in Palestine.

H3823.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be enclosed (as if with fat); by implication (as denominative from לֵבָב);  to unheart;  also as denominative from לָבִיבָה i.e.; (in a good sense) transport (with love), or (in a bad sense) stultify; to make cakes.

H3824.definition: from לָבַב; used also like לֵב; the heart (as the most interior organ).
H3824.kjv: [phrase] bethink themselves, breast, comfortably, courage, ((faint), (tender-) heart(-ed), midst, mind, [idiom] unawares, understanding.

H3828.definition: or לְבֹנָה; from לָבָן; frankincense (from its whiteness or perhaps that of its smoke).

H3829.definition: the same as לְבוֹנָה; Lebonah, a place in Palestine.

H3830.definition: or לְבֻשׁ; from לָבַשׁ; a garment (literally or figuratively); by implication (euphemistically) a wife.
H3830.kjv: apparel, clothed with, clothing, garment, raiment, vestment, vesture.

H3832.definition: a primitive root; to overthrow; intransposed, to fall.

H3833.definition: or (Ezekiel 19:2) לְבִיָּא; irregular masculine plural לְבָאִים; irregular feminine plural לְבָאוֹת; from an unused root meaning;  compare אֲרִי; to roar; a lion (properly, a lioness as the fiercer (although not a roarer;)).

H3834.definition: or rather לְבִבָה; from לָבַב in its original sense of fatness (or perhaps of folding); a cake (either as fried or turned).

H3835.definition: a primitive root; also as denominative from לְבֵנָה; to be (or become) white;  to make bricks.

H3837.definition: the same as לָבָן; Laban, a Mesopotamian; also a place in the Desert.

H3838.definition: or לְבָנָה; the same as לְבָנָה; Lebana or Lebanah, one of the Nethinim.

H3839.definition: from לָבַן; some sort of whitish tree, perhaps the storax.

H3840.definition: from לָבַן; properly, whiteness, i.e. (by implication) transparency.

H3841.definition: the same as לִבְנֶה; Libnah, a place in the Desert and one in Palestine.

H3842.definition: from לָבַן; properly, (the) white, i.e. the moon.

H3843.definition: from לָבַן; a brick (from the whiteness of the clay).

H3844.definition: from לְבַב; (the) white mountain (from its snow); Lebanon, a mountain range in Palestine.

H3845.definition: from לָבַן; white; Libni, an Israelite.

H3846.definition: patronymically from לִבְנִי; a Libnite or descendants of Libni (collectively).

H3847.definition: or לָבֵשׁ; a primitive root; properly, wrap around, i.e. (by implication) to put on agarment or clothe (oneself, or another), literally or figuratively.
H3847.kjv: (in) apparel, arm, array (self), clothe (self), come upon, put (on, upon), wear.

H3849.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to deepen or hollow (like כַּד); a log or measure forliquids.

H3850.definition: from an unused root of uncertain signification; Lod, a place in Palestine.

H3851.definition: from an usused root meaning to gleam; a flash; figuratively, a sharply polished blade or point of aweapon.

H3853.definition: plural of לַהַב; flames; Lehabim, a son of Mizraim, and his descendants.

H3854.definition: from an unused root meaning to be eager; intense mental application.

H3855.definition: from an unused root meaning to glow (compare לַהַב) or else to be earnest (compare לַהַג); Lahad, an Israelite.

H3856.definition: a primitive root meaning properly, to burn, i.e. (by implication); to be rabid (figuratively, insane); also (from the exhaustion of frenzy) to languish.

H3857.definition: a primitive root; properly, to lick, i.e. (by implication) to blaze.
H3857.kjv: burn (up), set on fire, flaming, kindle.

H3858.definition: from לָהַט; a blaze; also (from the idea of enwrapping) magic (as covert).

H3859.definition: a primitive root; properly, to burn in, i.e. (figuratively) to rankle.

H3860.definition: from the prepositional prefix meaning to or for and הֵן; popularly for if; hence, therefore.
H3860.kjv: for them (by mistake for prepositional suffix).

H3861.definition: xlit lâwhên corrected to lâhên; (Aramaic) corresponding to לָהֵן; therefore; also except.

H3862.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to gather; an assembly.

H3863.definition: or לֻא; or לוּ; a conditional particle; if; by implication (interj. as a wish) would that!.
H3863.kjv: if (haply), peradventure, I pray thee, though, I would, would God (that).

H3864.definition: or לֻבִּי; (Daniel 11:43), partrial from a name probably derived from an unused root meaning to thirst, i.e. a dry region; apparently; a Libyan or inhabitant of interior Africa (only in plural).

H3865.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Lud, the name of two nations.

H3866.definition: or לוּדִיִּי; patrial from לוּד; a Ludite or inhabitants of Lud (only in plural).

H3867.definition: a primitive root; properly, to twine, i.e. (by implication) to unite, to remain; also to borrow (as a form of obligation) or (caus.) to lend.
H3867.kjv: abide with, borrow(-er), cleave, join (self), lend(-er).

H3868.definition: a primitive root; (compare לָוָה, לוּט and לוּן); to turn aside , i.e. (literally) to depart, (figuratively) be perverse.

H3869.definition: probably of foreign origin; some kind of nuttree, perhaps the almond.

H3870.definition: probably from לוּז (as growing there); Luz, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3871.definition: or לֻחַ; from a primitive root; probably meaning to glisten; a tablet (as polished), of stone, wood or metal.

H3872.definition: or לֻחוֹת; (Jeremiah 48:5), from the same as לוּחַ; floored; Luchith, a place East of the Jordan.

H3873.definition: active participle of לָחַשׁ; (the) enchanter; Lochesh, an Israelite.

H3874.definition: a primitive root; to wrap up.

H3876.definition: the same as לוֹט; Lot, Abraham's nephew.

H3877.definition: from לוֹט; covering; Lotan, an Idumaean.

H3878.definition: from לָוָה; attached; Levi, a son of Jacob.

H3880.definition: from לָוָה; something attached, i.e. a wreath.

H3881.definition: or לֵוִי; patronymically from לֵוִי; a Levite or descendant of Levi.

H3882.definition: from לָוָה; a wreathed animal, i.e. a serpent (especially the crocodile or some other large sea-monster); figuratively, the constellation of the dragon; also as a symbol of Babylon.

H3883.definition: from an unused root meaning to fold back; a spiral step.

H3884.definition: or לוּלֵי; from לוּא and לֹא; if not.
H3884.kjv: except, had not, if (...not), unless, were it not that.

H3885.definition: or לִין; a primitive root; to stop (usually over night); by implication, to stay permanently; hence (in a bad sense) to be obstinate (especially in words, to complain).
H3885.kjv: abide (all night), continue, dwell, endure, grudge, be left, lie all night, (cause to) lodge (all night, in, -ing, this night), (make to) murmur, remain, tarry (all night, that night).

H3886.definition: a primitive root; to gulp; figuratively, to be rash.

H3887.definition: a primitive root; properly, to make mouths at, i.e. to scoff; hence (from the effort to pronounce a foreign language) to interpret, or (generally) intercede.
H3887.kjv: ambassador, have in derision, interpreter, make a mock, mocker, scorn(-er, -ful), teacher.

H3889.definition: from לוּשׁ; kneading; Lush, a place in Palestine.

H3890.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to לָוָה; properly, adhesion, i.e. (as preposition) with.

H3892.definition: from an unused root meaning to be new; fresh, i.e. unused or undried.

H3893.definition: from the same as לַח; freshness, i.e. vigor.

H3894.definition: or לָחֻם; passive participle of לָחַם; properly, eaten, i.e. food; also flesh, i.e. body.

H3895.definition: from an unused root meaning to be soft; the cheek (from its fleshiness); hence, the jaw-bone.

H3896.definition: a form of לְחִי; Lechi, a place in Palestine.

H3898.definition: a primitive root; to feed on; figuratively, to consume; by implication, to battle (as destruction).
H3898.kjv: devour, eat, [idiom] ever, fight(-ing), overcome, prevail, (make) war(-ring).

H3899.definition: from לָחַם; See also בֵּית לְעַפְרָה; food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it).
H3899.kjv: (shew-) bread, [idiom] eat, food, fruit, loaf, meat, victuals.

H3902.definition: from לֶחֶם; foodful; (or perhaps erroneous transcription) for בֵּית הַלַּחְמִי; Lachmi, an Israelite; or rather probably a brief form.

H3903.definition: probably by erroneous transcription for לַחְמָם; from לֶחֶם; food-like; Lachmam or Lachmas, a place in Palestine.

H3904.definition: (Aramaic) from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a concubine.

H3905.definition: a primitive root; properly, to press, i.e. (figuratively) to distress.
H3905.kjv: afflict, crush, force, hold fast, oppress(-or), thrust self.

H3907.definition: a primitive root; to whisper; by implication, to mumble aspell (as a magician).

H3908.definition: from לָחַשׁ; properly, a whisper, i.e. by implication, (in a good sense) a private prayer, (in a bad one) an incantation; concretely, an amulet.

H3909.definition: a form of לָאט or else participle from לוּט; properly, covered, i.e. secret; by implication, incantation; also secrecy or (adverb) covertly.

H3910.definition: probably from לוּט; a gum (from its sticky nature), probably ladanum.

H3911.definition: from an unused root meaning to hide; a kind of lizard (from its covert habits).

H3912.definition: masculine plural of passive participle of לָטַשׁ; hammered (i.e. oppressed) ones; Letushim, an Arabian tribe.

H3913.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hammer out (an edge), i.e. to sharpen.

H3914.definition: a form of לִוְיָה; a wreath.

H3915.definition: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as לוּל; properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity.

H3918.definition: from לוּשׁ in the sense of crushing; a lion (from his destructive blows).

H3919.definition: the same as לַיִשׁ; Laish, the name of two places in Palestine.

H3920.definition: a primitive root; to catch (in a net, trap or pit); generally, to capture or occupy; also to choose (by lot); figuratively, to cohere.
H3920.kjv: [idiom] at all, catch (self), be frozen, be holden, stick together, take.

H3921.definition: from לָכַד; something to capture with, i.e. a noose.

H3922.definition: from יָלַךְ; a journey; Lekah, a place in Palestine.

H3923.definition: xlit Lâchîysh corrected to Lâkîysh; from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Lakish, a place in Palestine.

H3924.definition: from the same as לוּל; a loop.

H3925.definition: a primitive root; properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive).
H3925.kjv: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

H3926.definition: a prolonged and separable form of the prepositional prefix; to or for.

H3927.definition: or לְמוֹאֵל; from לְמוֹ and אֵל; (belonging) to God; Lemuel or Lemoel, a symbolic name of Solomon.

H3929.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Lemek, the name of two antediluvian patriarchs.

H3932.definition: a primitive root; to deride; by implication (as if imitating a foreigner) to speak unintelligibly.
H3932.kjv: have in derision, laugh (to scorn), mock (on), stammering.

H3934.definition: from לָעַג; a buffoon; also a foreigner.

H3935.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; Ladah, an Israelite.

H3936.definition: from the same as לַעְדָּה; Ladan, the name of two Israelites.

H3937.definition: a primitive root; to speak in a foreign tongue.

H3938.definition: a primitive root; to swallow greedily; causatively, to feed.

H3939.definition: from an unused root supposed to mean to curse; wormwood (regarded as poisonous, and therefore accursed).

H3940.definition: or לַפִּד; from an unused root probably meaning to shine; a flambeau, lamp or flame.

H3941.definition: feminine plural of לַפִּיד; Lappidoth, the husband of Deborah.

H3942.definition: from the prepositional prefix (to or for) and פָּנִים; anterior.

H3943.definition: a primitive root; properly, to bend, i.e. (by implication) to clasp; also (reflexively) to turn around or aside.

H3946.definition: from an unused root thought to mean to stop up by a barricade; perhaps fortification; Lakkum, a place in Palestine.

H3947.definition: a primitive root; to take (in the widest variety of applications).
H3947.kjv: accept, bring, buy, carry away, drawn, fetch, get, infold, [idiom] many, mingle, place, receive(-ing), reserve, seize, send for, take (away, -ing, up), use, win.

H3948.definition: from לָקַח; properly, something received, i.e. (mentally) instruction (whether on the part of the teacher or hearer); also (in an active and sinister sense) inveiglement.

H3949.definition: from לָקַח; learned; Likchi, an Israelite.

H3950.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pick up, i.e. (generally) to gather; specifically, to glean.

H3952.definition: a primitive root; to lick or lap.

H3953.definition: a primitive root; to gather the after crop.

H3955.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; apparently juice, i.e.; (figuratively) vigor; also a sweet or fat cake.

H3956.definition: or לָשֹׁן; also (in plural) feminine לְשֹׁנָה; from לָשַׁן; the tongue (of man or animals), used literally (as the instrument of licking, eating, or speech), and figuratively (speech, an ingot, a fork of flame, a cove of water).
H3956.kjv: [phrase] babbler, bay, [phrase] evil speaker, language, talker, tongue, wedge.

H3957.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a room in a building (whether for storage, eating, or lodging).

H3958.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a gem, perhaps the jacinth.

H3959.definition: the same as לֶשֶׁם; Leshem, a place in Palestine.

H3960.definition: a primitive root; properly, to lick; but used only as a denominative from לָשׁוֹן; to wag the tongue, i.e. to calumniate.

H3961.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to לָשׁוֹן; speech, i.e. a nation.

H3962.definition: from an unused root thought to mean to break through; a boiling spring; Lesha, a place probably East of the Jordan.

H3963.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a measure for things dry.

H3966.definition: from the same as אוּד; properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated).
H3966.kjv: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore), well.

H3967.definition: or מֵאיָה; properly, a primitive numeral; a hundred; also as a multiplicative and a fraction.

H3968.definition: the same as מֵאָה; Meah, a tower in Jerusalem.

H3971.definition: usually מוּם; as if passive participle from an unused root probably meaning; to stain; a blemish (physically or morally).

H3972.definition: apparently a form of מאוּם; properly, a speck or point, i.e. (by implication) something; with negative, nothing.

H3974.definition: or מָאֹר; also (in plural) feminine מְאוֹרָה; or מְאֹרָה; from אוֹר; properly, a luminous body or luminary, i.e. (abstractly) light (as an element); figuratively, brightness, i.e.cheerfulness; specifically, a chandelier.

H3975.definition: feminine passive participle of אוֹר; something lighted, i.e. an aperture; by implication, a crevice or hole (of a serpent).

H3976.definition: from אָזַן; (only in the dual) a pair of scales.

H3978.definition: from אָכַל; an eatable (includ. provender, flesh and fruit).

H3979.definition: from אָכַל; something to eat with,i.e. a knife.

H3980.definition: from אָכַל; something eaten (by fire), i.e. fuel.

H3982.definition: from אָמַר; something (authoritatively) said, i.e. an edict.

H3984.definition: (Aramaic) probably from a root corresponding to אָנָה in the sense of an inclosure by sides; a utensil.

H3988.definition: a primitive root; to spurn; also (intransitively) to disappear.
H3988.kjv: abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, [idiom] utterly, vile person.

H3989.definition: from אָפָה; something baked, i.e. a batch.

H3990.definition: from the same as אָפֵל; something opaque.

H3991.definition: lemma מַאֲפֵלְיָה second vowel, corrected to מַאְפֵלְיָה; prolonged feminine of מַאֲפֵל; opaqueness.

H3992.definition: a primitive root; to be bitter or (causatively) to embitter, i.e. be painful.

H3993.kjv: lie in ambush, ambushment, lurking place, lying in wait.

H3995.definition: from בָּדַל; a separation, i.e. (concretely) a separate place.

H3996.definition: from בּוֹא; (with or without שֶׁמֶשׁ); an entrance (the place or the act); specifically sunset or the west; also (adverb with preposition) towards.
H3996.kjv: by which came, as cometh, in coming, as men enter into, entering, entrance into, entry, where goeth, going down, [phrase] westward. Compare מוֹבָא.

H3999.definition: from יָבַל in the sense of flowing; a deluge.

H4003.definition: from the same as בּוּקָה; emptiness.

H4004.definition: from בָּחַר; select, i.e. well fortified.

H4006.definition: the same as מִבְחָר; Mibchar, an Israelite.

H4007.definition: or מֶבָּט; from נָבַט; something expected, i.e. (abstractly) expectation.

H4008.definition: from בָּטָא; a rash utterance (hasty vow).

H4009.definition: from בָּטַח; properly, a refuge, i.e. (objective) security, or (subjective) assurance.

H4012.definition: from בָּנָה; built up; Mebunnai, an Israelite.

H4013.definition: also (in plural) feminine (Daniel 11:l5) מִבְצָרָה; from בָּצַר; a fortification, castle, or fortified city; figuratively, a defender.

H4014.definition: the same as מִבְצָר; Mibtsar, an Idumaean.

H4017.definition: from the same as בֶּשֶׂם; fragrant; Mibsam, the name of an Ishmaelite and of an Israelite.

H4019.definition: from the same as גָּבִישׁ; stiffening; Magbish, an Israelite, or a place in Palestine.

H4021.definition: from the same as גִּבְעָה; a cap (as hemispherical).

H4022.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to be eminent; properly, a distinguished thing; hence something valuable, as aproduct or fruit.

H4023.definition: (Zechariah אַבְדָן) or מְגִדּוֹ; from גָּדַד; rendezvous; Megiddon or Megiddo, a place in Palestine.

H4024.definition: or מִגְדֹּל; probably of Egyptian origin; Migdol, a place in Egypt.

H4025.definition: from מֶגֶד and אֵל; preciousness of God; Magdiel, an Idumaean.

H4026.definition: also (in plural) feminine מִגְדָּלָה; from גָּדַל; a tower (from its size or height); by analogy, a rostrum; figuratively, a (pyramidal) bed of flowers.
H4026.kjv: castle, flower, tower. Compare the names following.

H4027.definition: from מִגְדָּל and אֵל; tower of God; Migdal-El, a place in Palestine.

H4028.definition: from מִגְדָּל and גַּד; tower of Fortune; Migdal-Gad, a place in Palestine.

H4029.definition: from מִגְדָּל and עֵדֶר; tower of a flock; Migdal-Eder, a place in Palestine.

H4030.definition: from the same as מֶגֶד; preciousness, i.e. a gem.

H4031.definition: from גּוֹג; Magog, a son of Japheth; also a barbarous northern region.

H4032.definition: or (Lamentations 2:22) מָגוּר; from גּוּר in the sense of fearing; a fright (objective or subjective).

H4033.definition: or מָגֻר; from גּוּר in the sense of lodging; a temporary abode; by extension, a permanent residence.
H4033.kjv: dwelling, pilgrimage, where sojourn, be a stranger. Compare מָגוֹר.

H4035.definition: feminine of מָגוֹר or of מָגוּר; a fright; also a granary.

H4036.definition: from מָגוֹר and סָבִיב with the preposition inserted; affright from around; Magor-mis-Sabib, a symbolic name of Pashur.

H4037.definition: from גָּזַר; a cutting implement, i.e. a blade.

H4038.definition: from an unused root meaning to reap; a sickle.

H4041.definition: from the same as גַּם; properly, accumulation, i.e. impulse or direction.

H4042.definition: a denominative from מָגֵן; properly, to shield; encompass with; figuratively, to rescue, to hand safely over (i.e. surrender).

H4043.definition: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from גָּנַן; a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler); figuratively, a protector; also the scaly hide of the crocodile.
H4043.kjv: [idiom] armed, buckler, defence, ruler, [phrase] scale, shield.

H4044.definition: from מָגַן; a covering (in a bad sense), i.e. blindness or obduracy.

H4046.definition: from נָגַף; a pestilence; by analogy, defeat.

H4047.definition: apparently from גּוּף or נָגַף and עָשׁ; exterminator of (the) moth; Magpiash, an Israelite.

H4048.definition: a primitive root; to yield up; intensively, to precipitate.

H4051.definition: from מָגַר; precipice; Migron, a place in Palestine.

H4052.definition: from גָּרַע; a ledge or offset.

H4053.definition: from גָּרַף; something thrown off (by the spade), i.e. a clod.

H4054.definition: also (in plural) feminine (Ezekiel 27:28) מִגְרָשָׁה; from גָּרַשׁ; a suburb (i.e. open country whither flocks are driven from pasture); hence, the area around abuilding, or the margin of the sea.

H4055.definition: or מֵד; from מָדַד; properly, extent, i.e. height; also a measure; by implication, a vesture (as measured); also a carpet.
H4055.kjv: armour, clothes, garment, judgment, measure, raiment, stature.

H4057.definition: from דָבַר in the sense of driving; a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs).

H4058.definition: a primitive root; properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended.

H4060.definition: feminine of מַד; properly, extension, i.e. height or breadth; also a measure (including its standard); hence a portion (as measured) or a vestment; specifically, tribute (as measured).
H4060.kjv: garment, measure(-ing, meteyard, piece, size, (great) stature, tribute, wide.

H4061.definition: (Aramaic) or מִנְדָּה; (Aramaic), corresponding to מִדָּה; tribute in money.

H4062.definition: perhaps from the equivalent of דְּהַב; goldmaking, i.e. exactness.

H4063.definition: from an unused root meaning to stretch; properly, extent, i.e. measure; by implication, a dress (as measured).

H4066.definition: from דִּין; a contest or quarrel.
H4066.kjv: brawling, contention(-ous), discord, strife. Compare מִדְיָן, מְדָן.

H4067.definition: from the same as מֶדֶו; extensiveness, i.e. height.

H4068.definition: the same as מָדוֹן; Madon, a place in Palestine.

H4069.definition: or מַדֻּעַ; from מָה and the passive participle of יָדַע; what (is) known?; i.e. (by implication) (adverbially) why?.

H4070.definition: (Aramaic) or מְדֹר; (Aramaic), or מְדָר; (Aramaic), from דּוּר; a dwelling.

H4071.definition: or מְדֻרָה; from דּוּר in the sense of accumulation; a pile of fuel.

H4073.definition: from דָּחַף; a push, i.e. ruin.

H4074.definition: of foreign derivation; Madai, a country of central Asia.

H4075.definition: patrial from מָדַי; a Madian or native of Madai.

H4078.definition: from מָה and דַּי; what (is) enough, i.e. sufficiently.

H4080.definition: the same as מִדְיָן; Midjan, a son of Abraham; also his country and (collectively) his descendants.

H4082.definition: from דִּין; properly, a judgeship, i.e. jurisdiction; by implication, a district (as ruled by a judge); generally, a region.

H4084.definition: patronymical or patrial from מִדְיָן; a Midjanite or descendant (native) of Midjan.

H4086.definition: from the same as דֹּמֶן; dunghill; Madmen, a place in Palestine.
