H4087.definition: feminine from the same as דֹּמֶן; a dunghill.

H4088.definition: the same as מַדְמֵנָה; Madmenah, a place in Palestine.

H4089.definition: a variation for מַדְמֵנָה; Madmannah, a place in Palestine.

H4091.definition: the same as מְדָן; Medan, a son of Abraham.

H4093.definition: or מַדַּע; from יָדַע; intelligence or consciousness.

H4095.definition: from an unused root meaning to step; properly, a step; by implication, a steep or inaccessible place.

H4096.definition: from דָּרַךְ; a treading, i.e. a place for stepping on.

H4097.definition: from דָּרַשׁ; properly, an investigation, i.e. (by implication) a treatise or elaborate compilation.

H4098.definition: from דּוּשׁ; a threshing, i.e. (concretely and figuratively) down-trodden people.

H4099.definition: xlit Mᵉdâthâ corrected to Mᵉdâthâʼ; of Persian origin; Medatha, the father of Haman.

H4100.definition: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle; properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adverbial or conjunctive senses.
H4100.kjv: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.

H4102.definition: apparently a denominative from מָה; properly, to question or hesitate, i.e. (by implication) to be reluctant.

H4103.kjv: destruction, discomfiture, trouble, tumult, vexation, vexed.

H4104.definition: of Persian origin; Mehuman, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H4105.definition: from יָטַב (augmented) and אֵל; bettered of God; Mehetabel, the name of an Edomitish man and woman.

H4106.definition: or מָהִר; from מָהַר; quick; hence, skilful.

H4107.definition: a primitive root; properly, to cut down or reduce, i.e. by implication, to adulterate.

H4108.definition: from הָלַךְ; a walking (plural collectively), i.e. access.

H4109.definition: from הָלַךְ; a walk, i.e. a passage or a distance.

H4111.definition: from מַהֲלָל and אֵל; praise of God; Mahalalel, the name of an antediluvian patriarch and of an Israelite.

H4113.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; perhaps an abyss.

H4115.definition: from הָפַךְ; a wrench, i.e. the stocks.

H4116.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be liquid or flow easily, i.e. (by implication); to hurry (in a good or a bad sense); often used (with another verb) adverbially, promptly.
H4116.kjv: be carried headlong, fearful, (cause to make, in, make) haste(-n, -ily), (be) hasty, (fetch, make ready) [idiom] quickly, rash, [idiom] shortly, (be so) [idiom] soon, make speed, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] straightway, [idiom] suddenly, swift.

H4117.definition: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as מָהַר through the idea of readiness in assent); to bargain (for a wife), i.e. to wed.

H4118.definition: from מָהַר; properly, hurrying; hence (adverbially) in ahurry.
H4118.kjv: hasteth, hastily, at once, quickly, soon, speedily, suddenly.

H4119.definition: from מָהַר; a price (for a wife).

H4120.definition: feminine of מַהֵר; properly, a hurry; hence (adverbially) promptly.
H4120.kjv: hastily, quickly, shortly, soon, make (with) speed(-ily), swiftly.

H4121.definition: from מָהַר; hasty; Maharai, an Israelite.

H4122.definition: from מַהֵר and שָׁלָל and חוּשׁ and בַּז; hasting (is he (the enemy) to the) booty, swift (to the) prey; Maher-Shalal-Chash-Baz; the symbolical name of the son of Isaiah.

H4124.definition: from a prolonged form of the prepositional prefix m-and אָב; from (her (the mother's)) father; Moab, an incestuous son of Lot; also his territory and descendants.

H4125.definition: feminine מוֹאָבִיָּה; or מוֹאָבִיתxlit Môwâbîyth corrected to Môwʼâbîyth; patronymical from מוֹאָב; a Moabite or Moabitess, i.e. a descendant from Moab.

H4126.definition: by transp. for מָבוֹא; an entrance.

H4127.definition: a primitive root; to melt, i.e. literally (to soften, flow down, disappear), or figuratively (to fear, faint).
H4127.kjv: consume, dissolve, (be) faint(-hearted), melt (away), make soft.

H4129.definition: or rather מֹדָע; from יָדַע; an acquaintance.

H4131.definition: a primitive root; to waver; by implication, to slip, shake, fall.
H4131.kjv: be carried, cast, be out of course, be fallen in decay, [idiom] exceedingly, fall(-ing down), be (re-) moved, be ready, shake, slide, slip.

H4132.definition: from מוֹט; a wavering, i.e. fall; by implication, a pole (as shaking); hence, a yoke (as essentially a bent pole).

H4133.definition: feminine of מוֹט; a pole; by implication, an ox-bow; hence, a yoke (either literal or figurative).

H4134.definition: a primitive root; to become thin, i.e. (figuratively) be impoverished.

H4135.definition: a primitive root; to cut short, i.e. curtail (specifically the prepuce, i.e. to circumcise); by implication, to blunt; figuratively, to destroy.
H4135.kjv: circumcise(-ing), selves), cut down (in pieces), destroy, [idiom] must needs.

H4136.definition: or מוֹל; (Deuteronomy 1:1), or מוֹאל; (Nehemiah 12:38), or מֻל; (Numbers 22:5), from מוּל; properly, abrupt, i.e. a precipice; by implication, the front; used only adverbially (with prepositional prefix) opposite.
H4136.kjv: (over) against, before, (fore-) front, from, (God-) ward, toward, with.

H4137.definition: from יָלַד; birth; Moladah, a place in Palestine.

H4138.definition: from יָלַד; nativity (plural birth-place); by implication, lineage, native country; also offspring, family.

H4140.definition: from יָלַד; genitor; Molid, an Israelite.

H4141.definition: from סָבַב; a turn, i.e. circuit (of a building).

H4142.definition: or מֻסַבָּה; feminine of מוּסָב; a reversal, i.e. the backside (of a gem), fold (of a double-leaved door), transmutation (of a name).
H4142.kjv: being changed, inclosed, be set, turning.

H4145.definition: feminine of מוּסָד; a foundation; figuratively, an appointment.

H4146.definition: or מֹסָדָה; feminine of מוֹסָד; a foundation.

H4147.definition: also (in plural) feminine מוֹסֵרָה; or מֹסְרָה; from יָסַר; properly, chastisement, i.e. (by implication) a halter; figuratively, restraint.

H4148.definition: from יָסַר; properly, chastisement; figuratively, reproof, warning or instruction; also restraint.
H4148.kjv: bond, chastening(-eth), chastisement, check, correction, discipline, doctrine, instruction, rebuke.

H4149.definition: or (plural) מֹסְרוֹת feminine of מוֹסֵר; correction or corrections; Moserah or Moseroth, a place in the Desert.

H4150.definition: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from יָעַד; properly, an appointment, i.e. a fixed time or season; specifically, a festival; conventionally ayear; by implication, an assembly (as convened for a definite purpose); technically the congregation; by extension, the place of meeting; also a signal (as appointed beforehand).
H4150.kjv: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).

H4151.definition: from יָעַד; (as in מוֹעֵד); properly, an assembly  figuratively, a troop.

H4152.definition: from יָעַד; an appointed place, i.e. asylum.

H4153.definition: from מוֹעָד and יָהּ; assembly of Jah; Moadjah, an Israelite.

H4154.definition: feminine passive participle of מָעַד; properly, made to slip, i.e. dislocated.

H4155.definition: from עוּף; properly, covered, i.e. dark; abstractly, obscurity, i.e. distress.

H4158.definition: (Jeremiah 48:21) or מֵיפַעַת; or מֵפַעַת; from יָפַע; illuminative; Mophaath or Mephaath, a place in Palestine.

H4159.definition: or מֹפֵת; from יָפָה in the sense of conspicuousness; a miracle; by implication, a token or omen.

H4160.definition: a primitive root; to press, i.e. (figuratively) to oppress.

H4161.definition: or מֹצָאxlit môtsâ corrected to môtsâʼ; from יָצָא; a going forth, i.e. (the act) an egress, or (the place) an exit; hence, a source or product; specifically, dawn, the rising of the sun (the East), exportation, utterance, a gate, a fountain, a mine, a meadow (as producing grass).
H4161.kjv: brought out, bud, that which came out, east, going forth, goings out, that which (thing that) is gone out, outgoing, proceeded out, spring, vein, (water-) course (springs).

H4162.definition: the same as מוֹצָא; Motsa, the name of two Israelites.

H4163.definition: feminine of מוֹצָא; (marg.; compare צוֹאָה); a family descent; also a sewer; draught house.

H4164.definition: or מוּצָק; from יָצַק; narrowness; figuratively, distress.

H4165.definition: from עָגִיל; properly, fusion, i.e. literally, a casting (of metal); figuratively, a mass (of clay).

H4166.definition: or מֻצָקָה; from יָצַק; properly, something poured out, i.e. a casting (of metal); by implication, a tube (as cast).

H4167.definition: a primitive root; to jeer, i.e. (intens.) blaspheme.

H4168.definition: from יָקַד; a fire or fuel; abstractly, a conflagration.

H4170.definition: or מֹקֵשׁ; from יָקֹשׁ; a noose (for catching animals) (literally or figuratively); by implication, a hook (for the nose).

H4171.definition: a primitive root; to alter; by implication, to barter, to dispose of.

H4172.definition: or מֹרָא; or מוֹרָהxlit môrâh corrected to môwrâh; (Psalm 9:20), from יָרֵא; fear; by implication, a fearful thing or deed.
H4172.kjv: dread, (that ought to be) fear(-ed), terribleness, terror.

H4173.definition: or מֹרַג; from an unused root meaning to triturate; a threshing sledge.

H4174.definition: from יָרַד; a descent; as architecture, an ornamental appendage, perhaps a festoon.
H4174.kjv: going down, steep place, thin work.

H4175.definition: from יָרָה; (see יוֹרֶה); an archer; also teacher or teaching; also the early rain.

H4176.definition: or מֹרֶה; the same as מוֹרֶה; Moreh, a Canaanite; also a hill (perhaps named from him).

H4177.definition: from מוּר in the sense of shearing; a razor.

H4179.definition: or מֹרִיָּה; from רָאָה and יָהּ; seen of Jah; Morijah, a hill in Palestine.

H4180.definition: from יָרַשׁ; a possession; figuratively, delight.

H4182.definition: from יָרַשׁ and גַּת; possession of Gath; Moresheth-Gath, a place in Palestine.

H4183.definition: xlit Morashtîy corrected to Môwrashtîy; patrial from מוֹרֶשֶׁת גַּת; a Morashtite or inhabitant of Moresheth-Gath.

H4185.definition: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as מוּשׁ through the idea of receding by contact); to withdraw (both literally and figuratively, whether intransitive or transitive).
H4185.kjv: cease, depart, go back, remove, take away.

H4186.definition: or מֹשָׁב; from יָשַׁב; a seat; figuratively, a site; abstractly, a session; by extension an abode (the place or the time); by implication, population.
H4186.kjv: assembly, dwell in, dwelling(-place), wherein (that) dwelt (in), inhabited place, seat, sitting, situation, sojourning.

H4187.definition: or מֻשִּׁי; from מוּשׁ; sensitive; Mushi, a Levite.

H4188.definition: patronymical from מוּשִׁי; a Mushite (collectively) or descendants of Mushi.

H4189.definition: act participle feminine of מָשַׁךְ; something drawing, i.e. (figuratively) a cord.

H4191.definition: a primitive root; to die (literally or figuratively); causatively, to kill.
H4191.kjv: [idiom] at all, [idiom] crying, (be) dead (body, man, one), (put to, worthy of) death, destroy(-er), (cause to, be like to, must) die, kill, necro(-mancer), [idiom] must needs, slay, [idiom] surely, [idiom] very suddenly, [idiom] in (no) wise.

H4192.definition: (Psalm אֲבִירָם or מוּת לַבֵּן; from מוּת and בֵּן with the preposition and article interposed; 'To die for the son', probably the title of a popular song.

H4194.definition: from מוּת; death (natural or violent); concretely, the dead, their place or state (hades); figuratively, pestilence, ruin.

H4195.definition: from יָתַר; literally gain; figuratively, superiority.

H4197.definition: from an unused root meaning to mingle (water with wine); tempered wine.

H4198.definition: from an unused root meaning to suck out; exhausted.

H4199.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to faint with fear; terror; Mizzah, an Edomite.

H4200.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to gather in; a granary.

H4201.definition: or מְזֻזָה; from the same as זִיז; a door-post (as prominent).

H4204.definition: from זוּר in the sense of turning aside from truth; treachery, i.e. a plot.

H4205.definition: or מָזֹר; from זוּר in the sense of binding up; a bandage, i.e. remedy; hence, a sore (as needing a compress).

H4206.definition: or מֵזַח; from זָחַח; a belt (as movable).

H4207.definition: or (feminine) מִזְלָגָה; from an unused root meaning to draw up; a fork.

H4208.definition: apparently from נָזַל in the sense of raining; a constellation, i.e. Zodiacal sign (perhaps as affecting the weather).

H4209.definition: from זָמַם; a plan, usually evil (machination), sometimes good (sagacity).
H4209.kjv: (wicked) device, discretion, intent, witty invention, lewdness, mischievous (device), thought, wickedly.

H4210.definition: from זָמַר; properly, instrumental music; by implication, a poem set to notes.

H4212.definition: from זָמַר; a tweezer (only in the plural).

H4213.definition: from the same as זְעֵירxlit zeʻêyr corrected to zᵉʻêyr; fewness; by implication, as superl. diminutiveness.

H4214.definition: from זָרָה; a winnowing shovel (as scattering the chaff).

H4215.definition: apparently from זָרָה; properly, a scatterer, i.e. the north wind (as dispersing clouds; only in plural).

H4216.definition: apparently from נָזַר in the sense of distinction; some noted constellation (only in the plural), perhaps collectively, the zodiac.

H4217.definition: from זָרַח; sunrise, i.e. the east.

H4219.definition: from זָרַק; a bowl (as if for sprinkling).

H4220.definition: from מָחָה in the sense of greasing; fat; figuratively, rich.

H4221.definition: from the same as מֵחַ; fat, i.e. marrow.

H4222.definition: a primitive root; to rub or strike the hands together (in exultation).

H4223.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מָחָא; to strike in pieces; also to arrest; specifically to impale.

H4224.definition: or מַחֲבֹא; from חָבָא; a refuge.

H4225.definition: from חָבַר; a junction, i.e. seam or sewed piece.

H4226.definition: from חָבַר; a joiner, i.e. brace or cramp.

H4227.definition: from the same as חָבֵת; a pan for baking in.

H4229.definition: a primitive root; properly, to stroke or rub; by implication, to erase; also to smooth (as if with oil), i.e. grease or make fat; also to touch, i.e. reach to.
H4229.kjv: abolish, blot out, destroy, full of marrow, put out, reach unto, [idiom] utterly, wipe (away, out).

H4230.definition: from חוּג; an instrument for marking a circle, i.e. compasses.

H4231.definition: from an unused root meaning to enclose; a harbor (as shut in by the shore).

H4232.definition: or מְחִיּיָאֵל; from מָחָה and אֵל; smitten of God; Mechujael or Mechijael, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4233.definition: apparently a patrial, but from an unknown place (in the plural only for a singular); a Machavite or inhabitant of some place named Machaveh.

H4235.definition: the same as מָחוֹל; dancing; Machol, an Israelite.

H4238.definition: feminine plural from חָזָה; visions; Machazioth, an Israelite.

H4239.definition: from מָחָה; a stroke, i.e. battering-ram.

H4240.definition: from חוּד; junction; Mechida, one of the Nethinim.

H4241.definition: from חָיָה; preservation of life; hence, sustenance; also the live flesh, i.e. the quick.
H4241.kjv: preserve life, quick, recover selves, reviving, sustenance, victuals.

H4242.definition: from an unused root meaning to buy; price, payment, wages.

H4243.definition: the same as מְחִיר; price; Mechir, an Israelite.

H4244.definition: from חָלָה; sickness; Machlah, the name apparently of two Israelitesses.

H4246.definition: xlit mᵉchôwlâh corrected to mᵉchôlâh; feminine of מָחוֹל; a dance.

H4247.definition: from חָלַל; a cavern (as if excavated).

H4248.definition: from חָלָה; sick; Machlon, an Israelite.

H4249.definition: from חָלָה; sick; Machli, the name of two Israelites.

H4250.definition: patronymical from מַחְלִי; a Machlite or (collectively) descendants of Machli.

H4252.definition: from חָלַף; a (sacrificial) knife (as gliding through the flesh).

H4253.definition: from חָלַף; a ringlet of hair (as gliding over each other).

H4254.definition: from חָלַץ; a mantle (as easily drawn off).
H4254.kjv: changeable suit of apparel, change of raiment.

H4255.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מַחֲלֹקֶת; a section (of the Levites).

H4256.definition: from חָלַק; a section (of Levites, people or soldiers).
H4256.kjv: company, course, division, portion. See also סֶלַע הַמַּחְלְקוֹת.

H4257.definition: from חָלָה; sickness; 'Machalath', probably the title (initial word) of a popular song.

H4258.definition: the same as מַחֲלַת; sickness; Machalath, the name of an Ishmaelitess and of an Israelitess.

H4259.definition: patrial from אָבֵל מְחוֹלָה; a Mecholathite or inhabitant of Abel-Mecholah.

H4260.definition: a denominative from חֶמְאָה; something buttery (i.e. unctuous and pleasant), as (figuratively) flattery.

H4261.definition: from חָמַד; delightful; hence, a delight, i.e. object of affection or desire.

H4262.definition: or מַחְמוּד; from חָמַד; desired; hence, a valuable.

H4263.definition: from חָמַל; (by paronomasia with מַחְמָד) delight; properly, sympathy.

H4264.definition: from חָנָה; an encampment (of travellers or troops); hence, an army, whether literal (of soldiers) or figurative (of dancers, angels, cattle, locusts, stars; or even the sacred courts).
H4264.kjv: army, band, battle, camp, company, drove, host, tents.

H4265.definition: from מַחֲנֶה and דָּן; camp of Dan; Machaneh-Dan, a place in Palestine.

H4266.definition: dual of מַחֲנֶה; double camp; Machanajim, a place in Palestine.

H4268.definition: or מַחְסֶה; from חָסָה; a shelter (literally or figuratively).

H4270.definition: or מַחְסֹר; from חָסֵר; deficiency; hence, impoverishment.
H4270.kjv: lack, need, penury, poor, poverty, want.

H4271.definition: from מַחֲסֶה and יָהּ; refuge of (i.e. in) Jah; Machsejah, an Israelite.

H4272.definition: a primitive root; to dash asunder; by implication, to crush, smash or violently plunge; figuratively, to subdue or destroy.
H4272.kjv: dip, pierce (through), smite (through), strike through, wound.

H4274.definition: from חָצַב; properly, a hewing; concretely, a quarry.

H4275.definition: from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; a halving.

H4276.definition: from חָצָהlemma חָעָה ayin, corrected to חָצָה; a halving or the middle.

H4278.definition: from חָקַר; properly, scrutinized, i.e. (by implication) a recess.

H4279.definition: probably from אָחַר; properly, deferred, i.e. the morrow; usually (adverbially) tomorrow; indefinitely, hereafter.

H4280.definition: from the same as חֶרֶא; a sink.

H4283.definition: or מׇחֳרָתָם; (1 Samuel 30:17), feminine from the same as מָחָר; the morrow or (adverbially) tomorrow.

H4284.definition: or מַחֲשֶׁבֶת; from חָשַׁב; a contrivance, i.e. (concretely) a texture, machine, or (abstractly) intention, plan (whether bad, a plot; or good, advice).
H4284.kjv: cunning (work), curious work, device(-sed), imagination, invented, means, purpose, thought.

H4285.definition: from חָשַׁךְ; darkness; concretely, a dark place.

H4287.definition: probably from מָחָה; erasure; Machath, the name of two Israelites.

H4288.definition: from חָתָה; properly, a dissolution; concretely, a ruin, or (abstractly) consternation.

H4289.definition: the same as מְחִתָּה in the sense of removal; a pan for live coals.

H4290.definition: from חָתַר; a burglary; figuratively, unexpected examination.

H4291.definition: (Aramaic) or מְטָה; (Aramaic), apparently corresponding to מָצָא in the intransitive sense of being found present; to arrive, extend or happen.

H4292.definition: apparently a denominative from טִיט; a broom (as removing dirt (compare English 'to dust', i.e. remove dust)).

H4294.definition: or (feminine) מַטָּה; from נָטָה; a branch (as extending); figuratively, a tribe; also a rod, whether for chastising (figuratively, correction), ruling (a sceptre), throwing (a lance), or walking (a staff; figuratively, a support of life, e.g. bread).

H4295.definition: from עָוַר with directive enclitic appended; downward, below or beneath; often adverbially with or without prefixes.
H4295.kjv: beneath, down(-ward), less, very low, under(-neath).

H4296.definition: from נָטָה; a bed (as extended) forsleeping or eating; by analogy, a sofa, litter or bier.

H4297.definition: from נָטָה; a stretching, i.e. distortion (figuratively, iniquity).

H4300.definition: from טוּל in the sense of hammering out; an iron bar (as forged).

H4301.definition: or מַטְמֹן; or מַטְמֻן; from טָמַן; a secret storehouse; hence, a secreted valuable (buried); generally money.

H4302.definition: from נָטַע; something planted, i.e. the place (a garden or vineyard), or the thing (a plant, figuratively or men); by implication, the act, planting.

H4303.definition: or (feminine) מַטְעַמָּה; from טָעַם; a delicacy.

H4304.definition: from טָפַח; a wide cloak (for a woman).

H4307.definition: or מַטָּרָה; from נָטַר; a jail (as a guard-house); also an aim (as being closely watched).

H4308.definition: from טָרַד; propulsive; Matred, an Edomitess.

H4309.definition: from מָטַר; rainy; Matri, an Israelite.

H4310.definition: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as מָה is of things,; who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix.
H4310.kjv: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.

H4311.definition: from מַיִם and דֹּבֶא; water of quiet; Medeba, a place in Palestine.

H4312.definition: from יָדַד in the sense of loving; affectionate; Medad, an Israelite.

H4313.definition: from מַיִם and יֵרָקוֹן with the art. interposed; water of the yellowness; Me-haj-Jarkon, a place in Palestine.

H4314.definition: from מַיִם and זָהָב, water of gold; Me-Zahab, an Edomite.

H4316.definition: a variation for מִיכָה; Mica, the name of two Israelites.

H4317.definition: from מִי and (the prefix derivative from) כִּי and אֵל; who (is) like God?; Mikael, the name of an archangel and of nine Israelites.

H4318.definition: an abbreviated form of מִיכָיָה; Micah, the name of seven Israelites.

H4319.definition: a contr. for מִיכָיְהוּ; Mikehu, an Israelite prophet.

H4320.definition: from מִי and (the prefix derivative from) כִּי and יָהּ; who (is) like Jah?; Micajah, the name of two Israelites.

H4321.definition: or מִכָיְהוּ; (Jeremiah 36:11), abbreviated form for מִיכָיָהוּ; Mikajah, the name of three Israelites.

H4322.definition: for מִיכָיָה; Mikajah, the name of an Israelite and an Israelitess.

H4323.definition: from יָכֹל; properly, a container, i.e. a streamlet.

H4324.definition: apparently the same as מִיכָל; revulet; Mikal, Saul's daughter.

H4325.definition: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense); water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen.

H4326.definition: a form for מִנְיָמִין; Mijamin, the name of three Israelites.

H4327.definition: from an unused root meaning to portion out; a sort, i.e. species.

H4328.definition: properly, feminine passive participle of יָסַד; something founded, i.e. a foundation.

H4331.definition: from מוּשׁ; departure; Mesha, a place in Arabia; also an Israelite.

H4332.definition: from מִי and אֵל with the abbreviated form insep. relatively (see אֲשֶׁר) interposed; who (is) what God (is) ?; Mishael, the name of three Israelites.

H4333.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מִישָׁאֵל; Mishael, an Israelite.

H4334.definition: or מִישֹׁר; from יָשַׁר; a level, i.e. a plain (often used (with the article prefix) as a proper name of certain districts); figuratively, concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) justice (sometimes adverbially, justly).
H4334.kjv: equity, even place, plain, right(-eously), (made) straight, uprightness.

H4335.definition: borrowed from מֵישַׁךְ; Meshak, an Israelite.

H4336.definition: (Aramaic) of foreign origin and doubtful significance; name of מִישָׁאֵל; Meshak, the Babylonian.

H4337.definition: from יָשַׁע; safety; Mesha, an Israelite.

H4338.definition: a variation for מֵישָׁע; safety; Mesha, a Moabite.

H4339.definition: from יָשַׁר; evenness, i.e. (figuratively) prosperity or concord; also straightness, i.e. (figuratively) rectitude (only in plural with singular sense; often adverbially).
H4339.kjv: agreement, aright, that are equal, equity, (things that are) right(-eously, things), sweetly, upright(-ly, -ness).

H4340.definition: from יָתַר; (compare יֶתֶר); a cord (of a tent); or the string (of a bow).

H4341.definition: sometimes מַכְאוֹב; also (feminine Isaiah 53:3) מַכְאֹבָה; from כָּאַב; anguish or (figuratively) affliction.

H4343.definition: from the same as כַּבּוֹן; knoll; Macbena, a place in Palestine settled by him.

H4344.definition: patrial from מַכְבֵּנָא; a Macbannite or native of Macbena.

H4345.definition: from כָּבַר in the sense of covering (compare כְּבָרָה); a grate.

H4346.definition: from כָּבַר in the sense of covering; (compare מַכְבֵּר); a cloth (as netted).

H4347.definition: or (masculine) מַכֶּה; (plural only) from נָכָה; a blow (in 2 Chronicles 2:10, of the flail); by implication,; a wound; figuratively, carnage, also pestilence.
H4347.kjv: beaten, blow, plague, slaughter, smote, [idiom] sore, stripe, stroke, wound(-ed).

H4349.definition: from כּוּן; properly, a fixture, i.e. a basis; generally a place, especially as an abode.

H4350.definition: or מְכֹנָה; feminine of מָכוֹן; a pedestal, also a spot.

H4351.definition: or מְכֹרָה; from the same as כּוּר in the sense of dipping; origin (as if a mine).

H4352.definition: probably from מוּךְ; pining; Maki, an Israelite.

H4353.definition: from מָכַר; salesman; Makir, an Israelite.

H4354.definition: patronymical from מָכִיר; a Makirite or descendant of Makir.

H4355.definition: a primitive root; to tumble (in ruins); figuratively, to perish.

H4356.definition: or מִכְלָה; from כָּלָא; a pen (for flocks).

H4357.definition: from כָּלָה; completion (in plural concrete adverbial, wholly).

H4358.definition: from כָּלַל; perfection (i.e. concrete adverbial, splendidly).

H4360.definition: from כָּלַל; something perfect, i.e. a splendid garment.

H4362.definition: from the same as כַּמֹּן in the sense of hiding; treasure (as hidden).

H4363.definition: (Ezra 2:2 or מִכְמָשׁ; or מִכְמַשׁ; (Nehemiah 11:31), from כָּמַס; hidden; Mikmas or Mikmash, a place in Palestine.

H4364.definition: or מִכְמֹר; from כָּמַר in the sense of blackening by heat; a (hunter's) net (as dark from concealment).

H4365.definition: or מִכְמֹרֶת; feminine of מַכְמָר; a (fisher's) net.

H4366.definition: apparently from an unused root meaning to hide; concealment; Mikmethath, a place in Palestine.

H4367.definition: from מָה and נָדַב with a particle interposed; what (is) like (a) liberal (man) ?; Maknadbai, an Israelite.

H4368.definition: the same as מְכוֹנָה; a base; Mekonah, a place in Palestine.

H4369.definition: the same as מְכוֹנָה; a spot.

H4370.definition: from כָּמַס in the sense of hiding; (only in dual) drawers (from concealing the private parts).

H4371.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to enumerate; an assessment (as based upon a census).

H4372.definition: from כָּסָה; a covering, i.e. weatherboarding.

H4373.definition: feminine of מֶכֶס; an enumeration; by implication, a valuation.

H4374.definition: from כָּסָה; a covering, i.e. garment; specifically, a coverlet (for a bed), an awning (from the sun); also the omentum (as covering the intestines).
H4374.kjv: clothing, to cover, that which covereth.

H4375.definition: from כָּפַל; a fold; Makpelah, a place in Palestine.

H4376.definition: a primitive root; to sell, literally (as merchandise, a daughter in marriage, into slavery), or figuratively (to surrender).

H4380.definition: probably from the same as כּוּר in the sense of stabbing; a sword.

H4381.definition: from מָכַר; salesman; Mikri, an Israelite.

H4382.definition: patrial from an unused name (the same as מְכֵרָה) of a place in Palestine; a Mekerathite, or inhabitant of Mekerah.

H4383.definition: or מִכְשֹׁל; masculine from כָּשַׁל; a stumbling-block, literally or figuratively (obstacle, enticement (specifically an idol), scruple).
H4383.kjv: caused to fall, offence, [idiom] (no-) thing offered, ruin, stumbling-block.

H4384.definition: feminine from כָּשַׁל; a stumbling-block, but only figuratively (fall, enticement (idol)).

H4385.definition: from כָּתַב; a thing written, the characters, or a document (letter, copy, edict, poem).

H4387.definition: from כָּתַם; an engraving, i.e. (techn.) a poem.

H4388.definition: from כָּתַשׁ; a mortar; by analogy, a socket (of a tooth).

H4389.definition: the same as מַכְתֵּשׁ; dell; the Maktesh, a place in Jerusalem.

H4390.definition: or מָלָא; (Esther 7:5), a primitive root; to fill or (intransitively) be full of, in a wide application (literally and figuratively).
H4390.kjv: accomplish, confirm, [phrase] consecrate, be at an end, be expired, be fenced, fill, fulfil, (be, become, [idiom] draw, give in, go) full(-ly, -ly set, tale), (over-) flow, fulness, furnish, gather (selves, together), presume, replenish, satisfy, set, space, take a (hand-) full, [phrase] have wholly.

H4392.definition: from מָלֵא; full (literally or figuratively) or filling (literally); also (concretely) fulness; adverbially, fully.
H4392.kjv: [idiom] she that was with child, fill(-ed, -ed with), full(-ly), multitude, as is worth.

H4393.definition: rarely מְלוֹא; or מְלוֹ; (Ezekiel [41:8), from מָלֵא; fulness (literally or figuratively).
H4393.kjv: [idiom] all along, [idiom] all that is (there-) in, fill, ([idiom] that whereof...was) full, fulness, (hand-) full, multitude.

H4394.definition: from מָלֵא; a fulfilling (only in plural), i.e. (literally) a setting (of gems), or (technically) consecration (also concretely, a dedicatory sacrifice).

H4395.definition: feminine of מָלֵא; something fulfilled, i.e. abundance (of produce).

H4396.definition: feminine of מִלֻּא; a filling, i.e. setting (of gems).

H4397.definition: from an unused root meaning to despatch as a deputy; a messenger; specifically, of God, i.e. an angel (also a prophet, priest or teacher).

H4399.definition: from the same as מֲלְאָךְ; properly, deputyship, i.e. ministry; generally, employment (never servile) or work (abstractly or concretely); also property (as the result of labor).
H4399.kjv: business, [phrase] cattle, [phrase] industrious, occupation, ([phrase] -pied), [phrase] officer, thing (made), use, (manner of) work((-man), -manship).

H4400.definition: from the same as מֲלְאָךְ; a message.

H4401.definition: xlit Malʻâkîy corrected to Malʼâkîy; from the same as מֲלְאָךְ; ministrative; Malaki, a prophet.

H4402.definition: from מָלֵא; fulness, i.e. (concretely) a plump socket (of the eye).

H4403.definition: or מַלְבֻּשׁ; from לָבַשׁ; a garment, or (collectively) clothing.

H4405.definition: from מָלַל (plural masculine as if from מִלֶּה; a word; collectively, a discourse; figuratively, a topic.
H4405.kjv: [phrase] answer, by-word, matter, any thing (what) to say, to speak(-ing), speak, talking, word.

H4406.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מִלָּה; a word, command, discourse, or subject.

H4407.definition: or מִלֹּא; (2 Kings 12:20), from מָלֵא; a rampart (as filled in), i.e. the citadel.

H4408.definition: lemma מַלוּחַ missing dagesh, corrected to מַלּוּחַ; from מָלַח; sea-purslain (from its saltness).

H4409.definition: or מַלּוּכִי; (Nehemiah 12:14), from מָלַךְ; remnant; Malluk, the name of five Israelites.

H4410.definition: feminine passive participle of מָלַךְ; something ruled, i.e. a realm.

H4411.definition: from לוּן; a lodgment, i.e. caravanserai or encampment.

H4412.definition: feminine from לוּן; a hut, a hammock.

H4413.definition: apparently from מָלַל; I have talked (i.e. loquacious); Mallothi, an Israelite.

H4414.definition: a primitive root; also as denominative from מֶלַח; properly, to rub to pieces or pulverize; intransitively, to disappear as dust; to salt whether internally (to season with salt) or externally (to rub with salt).
H4414.kjv: [idiom] at all, salt, season, temper together, vanish away.

H4415.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מָלַח; to eat salt, i.e. (generally) subsist.

H4417.definition: from מָלַח; properly, powder, i.e. (specifically) salt (as easily pulverized and dissolved).

H4418.definition: from מָלַח in its original sense; a rag or old garment.

H4419.definition: from מָלַח in its second. sense; a sailor (as following 'the salt').

H4420.definition: from מָלַח (in its denominative sense); understood as land (אֶרֶץ); properly, salted (i.e. land), i.e. a desert.

H4421.definition: from לָחַם (in the sense of fighting); a battle (i.e. the engagement); generally, war (i.e. warfare).

H4422.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be smooth, i.e. (by implication) to escape (as if by slipperiness); causatively, to release or rescue; specifically, to bring forth young, emit sparks.
H4422.kjv: deliver (self), escape, lay, leap out, let alone, let go, preserve, save, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] surely.

H4423.definition: from מָלַט,; cement (from its plastic smoothness).

H4424.definition: from מֶלֶט and יָהּ; (whom) Jah has delivered; Melatjah, a Gibeonite.

H4425.definition: from מְלַל (in the sense of cropping (compare מוּל)); a head of grain (as cut off).

H4426.definition: from לוּץ; an aphorism; also a satire.

H4427.definition: a primitive root; to reign; inceptively, to ascend the throne; causatively, to induct into royalty; hence (by implication) to take counsel.
H4427.kjv: consult, [idiom] indeed, be (make, set a, set up) king, be (make) queen, (begin to, make to) reign(-ing), rule, [idiom] surely.

H4429.definition: the same as מֶלֶךְ; king; Melek, the name of two Israelites.

H4431.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to מָלַךְ in the sense of consultation; advice.

H4432.definition: from מָלַךְ; Molek (i.e. king), the chief deity of the Ammonites.

H4435.definition: a form of מַלְכָּה; queen; Milcah, the name of a Hebrewess and of an Israelite.

H4437.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מַלְכוּת; dominion (abstractly or concretely).

H4438.definition: or מַלְכֻת; or (in plural) מַלְכֻיָּה; from מָלַךְ; a rule; concretely, a dominion.

H4439.definition: from מֶלֶךְ and אֵל; king of (i.e. appointed by) God; Malkiel, an Israelite.

H4440.definition: patronymical from מַלְכִּיאֵל; a Malkielite or descendant of Malkiel.

H4441.definition: or מַלְכִּיָּהוּlemma מַלְכִּיָהוּ missing dagesh, corrected to מַלְכִּיָּהוּ; (Jeremiah [38:6), from מֶלֶךְ and יָהּ; king of (i.e. appointed by) Jah; Malkijah, the name of ten Israelites.

H4442.definition: from מֶלֶךְ and צֶדֶק; king of right; Malki-Tsedek, an early king in Palestine.

H4443.definition: from מֶלֶךְ and רוּם; king of a high one (i.e. of exaltation); Malkiram, an Israelite.

H4444.definition: from מֶלֶךְ and שׁוּעַ; king of wealth; Malkishua, an Israelite.

H4445.definition: or מִלְכּוֹם; from מֶלֶךְ for מֹלֶךְ; Malcam or Milcom, the national idol of the Ammonites.

H4447.definition: feminine active participle of מָלַךְ; queen; Moleketh, an Israelitess.

H4448.definition: a primitive root; to speak (mostly poetical) or say.

H4450.definition: from מָלַל; talkative; Milalai, an Israelite.

H4451.definition: from לָמַד; a goad for oxen.

H4452.definition: a primitive root; to be smooth, i.e. (figuratively) pleasant.

H4453.definition: of Persian derivation; the butler or other officer in the Babylonian court.

H4454.definition: a primitive root; to crack a joint; by implication, to wring the neck of afowl (without separating it).

H4455.definition: from לָקַח; transitively (in dual) the jaws (as taking food); intransitively, spoil (and captives) (as taken).

H4456.definition: from לָקַשׁ; (compare לֶקֶשׁ); the spring rain; figuratively, eloquence.

H4457.definition: or מַלְקָח; from לָקַח; (only in dual) tweezers.

H4458.definition: from an unused root meaning to spread out; a wardrobe (i.e. room where clothing is spread).

H4459.definition: transp. for מְתַלְּעָה; a grinder, i.e. back tooth.

H4460.definition: from מָגַר (in the sense of depositing); a granary.

H4462.definition: or (transp.) מוֹמֻכָן; (Esther 1:16), of Persian derivation; Memucan or Momucan, a Persian satrap.

H4463.definition: from מוּת; a mortal disease; concretely, a corpse.

H4464.definition: from an unused root meaning to alienate; a mongrel, i.e. born of aJewish father and aheathen mother.

H4465.definition: from מָכַר; merchandise; abstractly, a selling.
H4465.kjv: [idiom] ought, (that which cometh of) sale, that which...sold, ware.

H4467.definition: from מָלַךְ; dominion, i.e. (abstractly) the estate (rule) or (concretely) the country (realm).

H4469.definition: from מָסַךְ; mixture, i.e. (specifically) wine mixed (with water or spices).

H4470.definition: from an unused root meaning to grieve; sorrow.

H4471.definition: from מָרָא(in the sense of vigor); lusty; Mamre, an Amorite.

H4472.definition: from מָרַר; a bitterness, i.e. (figuratively) calamity.

H4473.definition: from מָשַׁח, in the sense of expansion; outspread (i.e. with outstretched wings).

H4474.definition: from מָשַׁל; a ruler or (abstractly) rule.

H4475.definition: feminine of מִמְשָׁל; rule; also (concretely in plural) a realm or a ruler.

H4476.definition: from the same as מֶשֶׁק; a possession.

H4477.definition: from מָתַק; something sweet (literally or figuratively).

H4478.definition: from מָה; literally a whatness (so to speak), i.e. manna (so called from the question about it).

H4479.definition: (Aramaic) from מָה; who or what (properly, interrogatively, hence, also indefinitely and relatively).

H4480.definition: or מִנִּי; or מִנֵּי; (constructive plural) (Isaiah 30:11); for מֵן; properly, a part of; hence (prepositionally), from or out of in many senses.
H4480.kjv: above, after, among, at, because of, by (reason of), from (among), in, [idiom] neither, [idiom] nor, (out) of, over, since, [idiom] then, through, [idiom] whether, with.

H4482.definition: from an unused root meaning to apportion; a part; hence,; a musical chord (as parted into strings).
H4482.kjv: in (the same) (Psalm 68:23), stringed instrument (Psalm 150:4), whereby (Psalm 45:8 (defective plural)).

H4483.definition: (Aramaic) or מְנָה; (Aramaic), corresponding to מָנָה; to count, appoint.

H4484.definition: xlit menêʼ corrected to mᵉnêʼ; (Aramaic) passive participle of מְנָא; numbered.

H4486.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מַדָּע; wisdom or intelligence.

H4487.definition: a primitive root; properly, to weigh out; by implication, to allot or constitute officially; also to enumerate or enroll.
H4487.kjv: appoint, count, number, prepare, set, tell.

H4488.definition: from מָנָה; properly, a fixed weight or measured amount, i.e. (techn.) a maneh or mina.

H4489.definition: from מָנָה; properly, something weighed out, i.e. (figuratively) a portion of time, i.e. an instance.

H4490.definition: from מָנָה; properly, something weighed out, i.e. (generally) a division; specifically (of food) a ration; also a lot.
H4490.kjv: such things as belonged, part, portion.

H4491.definition: from נָהַג; the driving (of a chariot).

H4492.definition: from נָהַר; properly, a channel or fissure, i.e. (by implication) a cavern.

H4493.definition: from נוּד; a nodding or toss (of the head in derision).

H4494.definition: from נוּחַ; quiet, i.e. (concretely) a settled spot, or (figuratively) a home.

H4495.definition: the same as מָנוֹחַ; rest; Manoach, an Israelite.

H4496.definition: or מְנֻחָה; feminine of מָנוֹחַ; repose or (adverbially) peacefully; figuratively, consolation (specifically, matrimony); hence (concretely) an abode.
H4496.kjv: comfortable, ease, quiet, rest(-ing place), still.

H4497.definition: from נוּן; a continuator, i.e. heir.

H4498.definition: from נוּס; a retreat (literally or figuratively); abstractly, a fleeing.
H4498.kjv: [idiom] apace, escape, way to flee, flight, refuge.

H4499.definition: or מְנֻסָה; feminine of מָנוֹס; retreat.

H4500.definition: from נִיר; a yoke (properly, for plowing), i.e. the frame of aloom.

H4501.definition: or מְנֹרָה; feminine of מָנוֹר (in the original sense of נִיר); a chandelier.

H4503.definition: from an unused root meaning to apportion, i.e. bestow; a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary).

H4504.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מִנְחָה; a sacrificial offering.

H4505.definition: from נָחַם; comforter; Menachem, an Israelite.

H4506.definition: from נוּחַ; rest; Manachath, the name of an Edomite and of a place in Moab.

H4507.definition: from מָנָה; the Apportioner, i.e. Fate (as an idol).

H4508.definition: of foreign derivation; Minni, an Armenian province.

H4509.definition: from מִן and יָמִין; from (the) right hand; Minjamin, the name of two Israelites.

H4511.definition: from the same as מֵן; enumeration; Minnith, a place East of the Jordan.

H4512.definition: from נָלָה; completion, i.e. (in produce) wealth.

H4513.definition: a primitive root; to debar (negatively or positively) from benefit or injury.

H4514.definition: or מַנְעֻל; from נָעַל; a bolt.

H4515.definition: xlit manʻâl corrected to minʻâl; from נָעַל; a bolt.

H4517.definition: from נוּעַ; a sistrum (so called from its rattling sound).

H4518.definition: from נָקָה; a sacrificial basin (for holding blood).

H4519.definition: from נָשָׁה; causing to forget; Menashsheh, a grandson of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, and its territory.

H4520.definition: from מְנַשֶּׁה; a Menashshite or descendant of Menashsheh.

H4521.definition: from מָנָה; an allotment (by courtesy, law or providence).

H4522.definition: or מִס; from מָסַס; properly, a burden (as causing to faint), i.e. a tax in the form of forced labor.

H4524.definition: plural masculine מְסִבִּים; or feminine מְסִבּוֹת; from סָבַב; a divan (as enclosing the room); abstractly (adverbial) around.
H4524.kjv: that compass about, (place) round about, at table.

H4525.definition: from סָגַר; a fastener, i.e. (of a person) a smith, (of a thing) a prison.

H4526.definition: from סָגַר; something enclosing, i.e. a margin (of a region, of a panel); concretely, a stronghold.

H4528.definition: from the same as סֶדֶר; a colonnade or internal portico (from its rows of pillars).

H4529.kjv: make to consume away, (make to) melt, water.

H4530.definition: from מָסַס (in the sense of flowing); abundance, i.e. (adverbially) liberally.

H4531.definition: from נָסָה; a testing, of men (judicial) or of God (querulous).

H4532.definition: the same as מַסָּה; Massah, a place in the Desert.

H4533.definition: apparently from an unused root meaning to cover; a veil.

H4535.definition: from נָסַח in the sense of staving off; a cordon, (adverbially) or (as a) military barrier.

H4537.definition: a primitive root; to mix, especially wine (with spices).

H4538.definition: from מָסַךְ; a mixture, i.e. of wine with spices.

H4539.definition: from סָכַךְ; a cover, i.e. veil.

H4540.definition: from סָכַךְ; a covering, i.e. garniture.

H4541.definition: from נָסַךְ; properly, a pouring over, i.e. fusion of metal (especially a cast image); by implication, a libation, i.e. league; concretely a coverlet (as if poured out).

H4543.definition: by transp. from כָּנַס; a magazine.

H4545.definition: from נָסַךְ in the sense of spreading out; something expanded, i.e. the warp in aloom (as stretched out to receive the woof).

H4546.definition: from סָלַל; a thoroughfare (as turnpiked), literally or figuratively; specifically a viaduct, a staircase.

H4548.definition: or מִסְמֵר; also (feminine) מַסְמְרָה; or מִסְמְרָה; or even מַשְׂמְרָה; (Ecclesiastes 12:11), from סָמַר; a peg (as bristling from the surface).

H4549.definition: a primitive root; to liquefy; figuratively, to waste (with disease), to faint (with fatigue, fear or grief).
H4549.kjv: discourage, faint, be loosed, melt (away), refuse, [idiom] utterly.

H4550.definition: from נָסַע; a departure (from striking the tents), i.e. march (not necessarily a single day's travel); by implication, a station (or point of departure).

H4551.definition: from נָסַע in the sense of projecting; a missile (spear or arrow); also a quarry (whence stones are, as it were, ejected).

H4554.definition: from an unused root meaning to collect; fodder.

H4555.definition: from סָפַח; a veil (as spread out).

H4556.definition: from סָפַח; scruf (as spreading over the surface).

H4557.definition: from סָפַר; a number, definite (arithmetical) or indefinite (large, innumerable; small, a few); also (abstractly) narration.
H4557.kjv: [phrase] abundance, account, [idiom] all, [idiom] few, (in-) finite, (certain) number(-ed), tale, telling, [phrase] time.

H4558.definition: the same as מֶלְקָח; number; Mispar, an Israelite.

H4559.definition: feminine of מַלְכוּ; enumeration; Mispereth, an Israelite.

H4560.definition: a primitive root; to sunder, i.e. (transitively) set apart, or (reflex.) apostatize.

H4564.definition: from סָתַר; properly, a hider, i.e. (abstractly) a hiding, i.e. aversion.

H4565.definition: from סָתַר; properly, a concealer, i.e. a covert.

H4568.definition: from עָבָה; properly, compact (part of soil), i.e. loam.

H4569.definition: or feminine מַעֲבָרָה; from עָבַר; a crossing-place (of a river, a ford; of a mountain, a pass); abstractly, a transit, i.e. (figuratively) overwhelming.

H4570.definition: or feminine מַעְגָּלָה; from the same as עָגֹל; a track (literally or figuratively); also a rampart (as circular).

H4572.definition: from עָדָה; ornamental; Maadai, an Israelite.

H4573.definition: from עָדָה and יָהּ; ornament of Jah; Maadjah, an Israelite.

H4574.definition: or (feminine) מַעֲדַנָּה; from עָדַן; a delicacy or (abstractly) pleasure (adverbially, cheerfully).

H4575.definition: by transitive from עָנַד; a bond, i.e. group.

H4577.definition: (Aramaic) or מְעָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to מֵעֶהxlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; only in plural the bowels.

H4578.definition: xlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; from an unused root probably meaning to be soft; used only in plural the intestines, or (collectively) the abdomen, figuratively, sympathy; by implication, a vest; by extension the stomach, the uterus (or of men, the seat of generation), the heart (figuratively).

H4579.definition: feminine of מֵעֶהxlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; the belly, i.e. (figuratively) interior.

H4580.definition: from עוּג; also with לָעֵג a table-buffoon, i.e.; a cake of bread; parasite.

H4581.definition: (also מָעוּז ); or מָעֹז (also מָעֻז; from עָזַז; a fortified place; figuratively, a defence.
H4581.kjv: force, fort(-ress), rock, strength(-en), ([idiom] most) strong (hold).

H4582.definition: from מָעַךְ; oppressed; Maok, a Philistine.

H4583.definition: or מָעִין; (1 Chronicles 4:41), from the same as עוֹנָה; an abode, of God (the Tabernacle or the Temple), men (their home) or animals (their lair); hence, a retreat (asylum).

H4584.definition: the same as מָעוֹן; a residence; Maon, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.
H4584.kjv: Maon, Maonites. Compare בֵּית בַּעַל מְעוֹן, מְעוּנִיlemma מְעוּנָי third vowel, corrected to מְעוּנִי.

H4586.definition: lemma מְעוּנָי third vowel, corrected to מְעוּנִי; or מְעִינִי; probably patrial from מָעוֹן; a Meunite, or inhabitant of Maon (only in plural).

H4587.definition: plural of מְעוֹנָה; habitative; Meonothai, an Israelite.

H4588.definition: from עוּף in the sense of covering with shade (compare מוּעָף); darkness.

H4589.definition: from עוּר; nakedness, i.e. (in plural) the pudenda.

H4590.definition: or מַעַזְיָהוּ; probably from עוּז (in the sense of protection) and יָהּ; rescue of Jah; Maazjah, the name of two Israelites.

H4591.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pare off, i.e. lessen; intransitively, to be (or causatively, to make) small or few (or figuratively, ineffective).
H4591.kjv: suffer to decrease, diminish, (be, [idiom] borrow a, give, make) few (in number, -ness), gather least (little), be (seem) little, ([idiom] give the) less, be minished, bring to nothing.

H4592.definition: or מְעָט; from מָעַט; a little or few (often adverbial or compar.).
H4592.kjv: almost (some, very) few(-er, -est), lightly, little (while), (very) small (matter, thing), some, soon, [idiom] very.

H4593.definition: passive adjective of מָעַט; thinned (as to the edge), i.e. sharp.

H4596.definition: from עָוָה; (compare עִי); a pile of rubbish (as contorted), i.e. a ruin.

H4597.definition: xlit Mâʻai corrected to Mâʻay; probably from מֵעֶהxlit mêʻâh corrected to mêʻeh; sympathetic; Maai, an Israelite.

H4598.definition: from מָעַל in the sense of covering; a robe (i.e. upper and outer garment).

H4599.definition: or מַעְיְנוֹ; (Psalm 114:8), or (feminine) מַעְיָנָה; from עַיִן (as a denominative in the sense of a spring); a fountain (also collectively), figuratively, a source (of satisfaction).

H4600.definition: a primitive root; to press, i.e. to pierce, emasculate, handle.

H4601.definition: or מַעֲכָת; (Joshua 13:13), from מָעַךְ; depression; Maakah (or Maakath), the name of a place in Syria, also of a Mesopotamian, of three Israelites, and of four Israelitesses and one Syrian woman.
H4601.kjv: Maachah, Maachathites. See also בֵּית מַעֲכָה.

H4602.definition: patrial from מַעֲכָה; a Maakathite, or inhabitant of Maakah.

H4603.definition: a primitive root; properly, to cover up; used only figuratively, to act covertly, i.e. treacherously.

H4604.kjv: falsehood, grievously, sore, transgression, trespass, [idiom] very.

H4605.definition: from עָלָה; properly, the upper part, used only adverbially with prefix upward, above, overhead, from the top, etc..
H4605.kjv: above, exceeding(-ly), forward, on ([idiom] very) high, over, up(-on, -ward), very.

H4606.definition: (Aramaic) from עֲלַל; (only in plural as singular) the setting (of the sun).

H4607.definition: from עָלָה; a raising (of the hands).

H4608.definition: from עָלָה; an elevation, i.e. (concretely) acclivity or platform; abstractly (the relation or state) a rise or (figuratively) priority.
H4608.kjv: ascent, before, chiefest, cliff, that goeth up, going up, hill, mounting up, stairs.

H4609.definition: feminine of מַעֲלֶה; elevation, i.e. the act (literally, a journey to a higher place, figuratively, a thought arising), or (concretely) the condition (literally, a step or grademark, figuratively, a superiority of station); specifically a climactic progression (in certain Psalms).
H4609.kjv: things that come up, (high) degree, deal, go up, stair, step, story.

H4610.definition: from מַעֲלֶה and (the plural of) עַקְרָב; Steep of Scorpions, a place in the Desert.
H4610.kjv: Maaleh-accrabim, the ascent (going up) of Akrabbim.

H4611.definition: from עָלַל; an act (good or bad).

H4616.definition: from עָנָה; properly, heed, i.e. purpose; used only adverbially, on account of (as a motive or an aim), teleologically, in order that.
H4616.kjv: because of, to the end (intent) that, for (to,... 's sake), [phrase] lest, that, to.

H4617.definition: from עָנָה; a reply (favorable or contradictory).

H4618.definition: from עָנָה, in the sense of depression or tilling; a furrow.

H4619.definition: from עָצָה; closure; Maats, an Israelite.

H4621.definition: from an unused root meaning to hew; an axe.

H4624.definition: from an unused root meaning to repress; a parapet.

H4625.definition: from עָקַשׁ; a crook (in a road).

H4626.definition: from עָרָה; a nude place, i.e. (literally) the pudenda, or (figuratively) a vacant space.

H4627.definition: from עָרַב, in the sense of trading; traffic; by implication, mercantile goods.

H4628.definition: or (feminine) מַעֲרָבָה; from עָרַב, in the sense of shading; the west (as a region of the evening sun).

H4629.definition: from עָרָה; a nude place, i.e. a common.

H4630.definition: feminine of מַעֲרֶה; an open spot.

H4632.definition: the same as מְעָרָה; cave; Mearah, a place in Palestine.

H4633.definition: from עָרַךְ; an arrangement, i.e. (figuratively) mental disposition.

H4634.definition: feminine of מַעֲרָךְ; an arrangement; concretely, a pile; specifically a military array.
H4634.kjv: army, fight, be set in order, ordered place, rank, row.

H4635.definition: from עָרַךְ; an arrangement, i.e. (concretely) a pile (of loaves).

H4636.definition: from עָרַם, in the sense of stripping; bare.

H4638.definition: a form of מַעֲרָה; waste; Maarath, a place in Palestine.

H4639.definition: from עָשָׂה; an action (good or bad); generally, a transaction; abstractly, activity; by implication, a product (specifically, a poem) or (generally) property.
H4639.kjv: act, art, [phrase] bakemeat, business, deed, do(-ing), labor, thing made, ware of making, occupation, thing offered, operation, possession, [idiom] well, (handy-, needle-, net-) work(ing, -manship), wrought.

H4640.definition: xlit Maʻsay corrected to Maʻăsay; from עָשָׂה; operative; Maasai, an Israelite.

H4641.definition: or מַעֲשֵׂיָהוּ; from מַעֲשֶׂה and יָהּ; work of Jah; Maasejah, the name of sixteen Israelites.

H4643.definition: or מַעֲשַׂר; and (in plural) feminine מַעַשְׂרָה; from עָשָׂר; a tenth; especially a tithe.

H4644.definition: of Egyptian origin; Moph, the capital of Lower Egypt.

H4645.definition: from פָּגַע; an object of attack.

H4646.definition: from נָפַח; a breathing out (of life), i.e. expiring.

H4647.definition: from נָפַח; the bellows (i.e. blower) of aforge.

H4648.definition: or מְפִבֹשֶׁת; probably from פָּאָה and בֹּשֶׁת; dispeller of shame (i.e. of Baal); Mephibosheth, the name of two Israelites.

H4649.definition: a plural apparently from נוּף; wavings; Muppim, an Israelite.

H4650.definition: from פּוּץ; a breaker, i.e. mallet.

H4651.definition: from נָפַל; a falling off, i.e. chaff; also something pendulous, i.e. a flap.

H4654.definition: or מַפֵּלָה; from נָפַל; something fallen, i.e. a ruin.

H4656.definition: from פָּלַץ; a terror, i.e. an idol.

H4657.definition: from an unused root meaning to balance; a poising.

H4658.definition: from נָפַל; fall, i.e. decadence; concretely, a ruin; specifically a carcase.

H4659.definition: or (feminine) מִפְעָלָה; from פָּעַל; a performance.

H4660.definition: from נָפַץ; a smiting to pieces.

H4661.definition: from נָפַץ; a smiter, i.e. a war club.

H4662.definition: from פָּקַד; an appointment, i.e. mandate; concretely, a designated spot; specifically, a census.

H4663.definition: the same as מִפְקָד; assignment; Miphkad, the name of a gate in Jerusalem.

H4664.definition: from פָּרַץlemma פּרַץ missing vowel, corrected to פָּרַץ; a break (in the shore), i.e. a haven.

H4665.definition: xlit miphreketh corrected to miphreqeth; from פָּרַק; properly, a fracture, i.e. joint (vertebrae) of the neck.

H4667.definition: from פָּשַׂע; a stride, i.e. (by euphemism) the crotch.

H4668.definition: from פָּתַח; an opener, i.e. a key.

H4669.definition: from פָּתַח; an aperture, i.e. (figuratively) utterance.

H4670.definition: from the same as פֶּתֶן; a stretcher, i.e. a sill.

H4671.definition: or מוֹץ; (Zephaniah 2:2), from מוּץ; chaff (as pressed out, i.e. winnowed or (rather) threshed loose).

H4672.definition: a primitive root; properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present.
H4672.kjv: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have (here), be here, hit, be left, light (up-) on, meet (with), [idiom] occasion serve, (be) present, ready, speed, suffice, take hold on.

H4673.definition: from נָצַב; a fixed spot; figuratively, an office, a military post.

H4674.definition: from נָצַב; a station, i.e. military post.

H4675.definition: or מִצָּבָה; feminine of מַצָּב; a military guard.

H4676.definition: feminine (causatively) participle of נָצַב; something stationed, i.e. a column or (memorial stone); by analogy, an idol.

H4677.definition: apparently from מָצָא and יָהּ; found of Jah; Metsobajah, a place in Palestine.

H4678.definition: from נָצַב; something stationary, i.e. a monumental stone; also the stock of atree.

H4679.definition: or מְצָד; or (feminine) מְצָדָה; from צוּד; a fastness (as a covert of ambush).

H4680.definition: a primitive root; to suck out; by implication, to drain, to squeeze out.

H4681.definition: active participle feminine of מָצָה; drained; Motsah, a place in Palestine.

H4682.definition: from מָצַץ in the sense of greedily devouring for sweetness; properly, sweetness; concretely, sweet (i.e. not soured or bittered with yeast); specifically, an unfermented cake or loaf, or (elliptically) the festival of Passover (because no leaven was then used).

H4684.definition: from צָהַל; a whinnying (through impatience for battle or lust).

H4685.definition: or (feminine) מְצוֹדָה; or מצֹדָה; from צוּד; also (by interchange for מְצַד); a net (for capturing animals or fishes);  afastness or (beseiging) tower.

H4686.definition: or (feminine) מְצוּדָה; or מְצֻדָה; for מָצוֹד; a net, or (abstractly) capture; also a fastness.
H4686.kjv: castle, defense, fort(-ress), (strong) hold, be hunted, net, snare, strong place.

H4687.definition: from צָוָה; a command, whether human or divine (collectively, the Law).

H4688.definition: or מְצֹלָה; also מְצוּלָה; or מְצֻלָה; from the same as צוּלָה; a deep place (of water or mud).

H4689.definition: from צוּק; a narrow place, i.e. (abstractly and figuratively) confinement or disability.

H4690.definition: or מָצֻק; from צוּק; something narrow, i.e. a column or hilltop.

H4691.definition: or מְצֻקָה; feminine of מָצוּק; narrowness, i.e. (figuratively) trouble.

H4692.definition: or מָצוּר; from צוּר; something hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of besiegers), (abstractly) a siege, (figuratively) distress; or (subjectively) a fastness.
H4692.kjv: besieged, bulwark, defence, fenced, fortress, siege, strong (hold), tower.

H4693.definition: the same as מָצוֹר in the sense of a limit; Egypt (as the border of Palestine).

H4694.definition: or מְצֻרָה; feminine of מָצוֹר; a hemming in, i.e. (objectively) a mound (of siege), or (subjectively) a rampart (of protection), (abstractly) fortification.

H4696.definition: from an unused root meaning to be clear, i.e. conspicuous; the forehead (as open and prominent).

H4697.definition: from the same as מֵצַח; a shinpiece of armor (as prominent), only plural.

H4698.definition: from צָלַל; a tinkler, i.e. a bell.

H4700.definition: from צָלַל; (only dual) double tinklers, i.e. cymbals.

H4701.definition: from צָנַף; a tiara, i.e. official turban (of a king or high priest).

H4703.definition: from צָעַד; a step; figuratively, companionship.

H4704.definition: feminine of מִצְעָר; properly, littleness; concretely, diminutive.

H4705.definition: from צָעַר; petty (in size or number); adverbially, a short (time).

H4706.definition: the same as מִצְעָר; Mitsar, a peak of Lebanon.

H4707.definition: from צָפָה; an observatory, especially formilitary purposes.

H4708.definition: the same as מִצְפֶּה; Mitspeh, the name of five places in Palestine.

H4709.definition: feminine of מִצְפֶּה; Mitspah, the name of two places in Palestine.
H4709.kjv: Mitspah. (This seems rather to be only an orthographic variation of מִצְפֶּה when 'in pause'.)

H4710.definition: from צָפַן; a secret (place or thing, perhaps, treasure).

H4712.definition: from קֵבָה; something tight, i.e. (figuratively) trouble.

H4713.definition: from מִצְרַיִם; a Mitsrite, or inhabitant of Mitsrajim.

H4714.definition: dual of מָצוֹר; Mitsrajim, i.e. Upper and Lower Egypt.

H4716.definition: from מָקַק; properly, a melting, i.e. putridity.

H4717.definition: from נָקַב; properly, a perforatrix, i.e. a hammer (as piercing).

H4718.definition: from נָקַב; properly, a perforator, i.e. a hammer (as piercing); also (intransitively) a perforation, i.e. a quarry.

H4719.definition: from the same as נָקֹד in the denominative sense of herding (compare נֹקֵד); fold; Makkedah, a place in Palestine.

H4720.definition: or מִקְּדָשׁ; (Exodus 15:17), from קָדַשׁ; a consecrated thing or place, especially, a palace, sanctuary (whether of Jehovah or of idols) or asylum.
H4720.kjv: chapel, hallowed part, holy place, sanctuary.

H4721.definition: or (feminine) מַקְהֵלָה; from קָהַל; an assembly.

H4722.definition: plural of מַקְהֵל (feminine); assemblies; Makheloth, a place in the Desert.

H4723.definition: or מִקְוֵה; (1 Kings 10:28), or מִקְוֵאlemma מִּקְוֵא extra dagesh, corrected to מִקְוֵא; (2 Chronicles 1:16), from קָוָה; something waited for, i.e. confidence (objective or subjective); also a collection, i.e. (of water) a pond, or (of men and horses) a caravan or drove.
H4723.kjv: abiding, gathering together, hope, linen yarn, plenty (of water), pool.

H4724.definition: feminine of מִקְוֶה; a collection, i.e. (of water) a reservoir.

H4725.definition: or מָקֹם; also (feminine) מְקוֹמָה; or מְקֹמָה; from קוּם; properly, a standing, i.e. a spot; but used widely of a locality (general or specific); also (figuratively) of a condition (of body or mind).
H4725.kjv: country, [idiom] home, [idiom] open, place, room, space, [idiom] whither(-soever).

H4726.definition: or מָקֹר; from קוּר; properly, something dug, i.e. a (general) source (of water, even when naturally flowing; also of tears, blood (by euphemism, of the female pudenda); figuratively, of happiness, wisdom, progeny).

H4728.definition: from לָקַח; something received, i.e. merchandise (purchased).

H4729.definition: from קָטַר; something to fume (incense) on i.e. a hearth place.

H4730.definition: feminine of מִקְטָר; something to fume (incense) in, i.e. a coal-pan.

H4731.definition: or (feminine) מַקְּלָה; from an unused root meaning apparently to germinate; a shoot, i.e. stick (with leaves on, or for walking, striking, guiding, divining).

H4732.definition: (or perhaps mik-kel-ohth') plural of (feminine) מַקֵּל; rods; Mikloth, a place in the Desert.

H4733.definition: from קָלַט in the sense of taking in; an asylum (as a receptacle).

H4734.definition: from קָלַע; a sculpture (probably in bas-relief).

H4735.definition: from קָנָה; something bought, i.e. property, but only livestock; abstractly, acquisition.
H4735.kjv: cattle, flock, herd, possession, purchase, substance.

H4736.definition: feminine of מִקְנֶה; properly, a buying, i.e. acquisition; concretely, a piece of property (land or living); also the sum paid.
H4736.kjv: (he that is) bought, possession, piece, purchase.

H4737.definition: from מִקְנֶה and יָהּ; possession of Jah; Miknejah, an Israelite.

H4739.definition: from קָצַץ; end; Makats, a place in Palestine.

H4740.definition: or מַקְצֹעַ; or (feminine) מַקְצֹעָה; from קָצַע in the denominative sense of bending; an angle or recess.

H4741.definition: from קָצַע; a scraper, i.e. a carving chisel.

H4742.definition: from קָצַע in the denominative sense of bending; an angle.

H4743.definition: ' a primitive root; to melt; figuratively, to flow, dwindle, vanish.
H4743.kjv: consume away, be corrupt, dissolve, pine away.

H4744.definition: from קָרָא; something called out, i.e. a public meeting (the act, the persons, or the place); also a rehearsal.

H4745.definition: from קָרָה; something met with, i.e. an accident or fortune.
H4745.kjv: something befallen, befalleth, chance, event, hap(-peneth).

H4746.definition: from קָרָה; properly, something meeting, i.e. a frame (of timbers).

H4747.definition: from the same as קַר; a cooling off.

H4748.definition: from קָשָׁה in the sense of knotting up round and hard; something turned (rounded), i.e. a curl (of tresses).

H4749.definition: feminine of מִקְשֶׁה; rounded work, i.e. moulded by hammering (repousse).
H4749.kjv: beaten (out of one piece, work), upright, whole piece.

H4750.definition: denominative from קִשֻּׁא; literally a cucumbered field, i.e. a cucumber patch.

H4751.definition: or (feminine) מָרָה; from מָרַר; bitter (literally or figuratively); also (as noun) bitterness, or (adverbially) bitterly.
H4751.kjv: [phrase] angry, bitter(-ly, -ness), chafed, discontented, [idiom] great, heavy.

H4752.definition: from מָרַר in its original sense of distillation; a drop.

H4753.definition: or מוֹר; from מָרַר; myrrh (as distilling in drops, and also as bitter).

H4754.definition: a primitive root; to rebel; hence (through the idea of maltreating) to whip, i.e. lash (self with wings, as the ostrich in running).

H4755.definition: for מַר feminine; bitter; Mara, a symbolic name of Naomi.

H4756.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to מָרָא in the sense of domineering; a master.

H4757.definition: of foreign derivation; Merodak-Baladan, a Babylonian king.

H4758.definition: from רָאָה; a view (the act of seeing); also an appearance (the thing seen), whether (real) a shape (especially if handsome, comeliness; often plural the looks), or (mental) a vision.
H4758.kjv: [idiom] apparently, appearance(-reth), [idiom] as soon as beautiful(-ly), countenance, fair, favoured, form, goodly, to look (up) on (to), look(-eth), pattern, to see, seem, sight, visage, vision.

H4759.definition: feminine of מַרְאֶה; a vision; also (causatively) a mirror.

H4760.definition: apparently feminine passive causative participle of רָאָה; something conspicuous, i.e. the craw of abird (from its prominence).

H4761.definition: denominative from רֹאשׁ; properly, headship, i.e. (plural for collective) dominion.

H4762.definition: or מַרֵשָׁה; formed like מַרְאָשָׁה; summit; Mareshah, the name of two Israelites and of a place in Palestine.

H4763.definition: formed like מַרְאָשָׁה; properly, a headpiece, i.e. (plural for adverbial) at (or as) the head-rest (or pillow).

H4764.definition: from רָבַב; increase; Merab, a daughter of Saul.

H4766.definition: from רָבָה; properly, increasing; as noun, greatness, or (adverbially) greatly.

H4767.definition: from רָבָה; abundance, i.e. a great quantity.

H4768.definition: from רָבָה; a multitude; also offspring; specifically interest (on capital).

H4769.definition: from רָבַץ; a reclining place, i.e. fold (for flocks).
H4769.kjv: couching place, place to lie down.

H4770.definition: from an unused root meaning to tie up; a stall (for cattle).

H4772.definition: denominative from רֶגֶל; (plural for collective) a footpiece, i.e. (adverbially) at the foot, or (direct.) the foot itself.

H4776.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to מָרַד; rebellion.

H4778.definition: the same as מֶרֶד; Mered, an Israelite.

H4779.definition: (Aramaic) from the same as מְרַד; rebellious.

H4781.definition: of foreign derivation; Merodak, a Babylonian idol.

H4782.definition: of foreign derivation; Mordecai, an Israelite.

H4784.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) bitter (or unpleasant); (figuratively) to rebel (or resist; causatively, to provoke).
H4784.kjv: bitter, change, be disobedient, disobey, grievously, provocation, provoke(-ing), (be) rebel (against, -lious).

H4785.definition: the same as מַר feminine; bitter; Marah, a place in the Desert.

H4787.definition: lemma מָרָה missing dagesh, corrected to מׇרָּה; a form of מֹרָה; trouble.

H4788.definition: from רוּד in the sense of maltreatment; an outcast; (abstractly) destitution.

H4789.definition: of uncertain derivation; Meroz, a place in Palestine.

H4791.definition: from רוּם; altitude, i.e. concretely (an elevated place), abstractly (elevation, figuratively (elation), or adverbially (aloft).
H4791.kjv: (far) above, dignity, haughty, height, (most, on) high (one, place), loftily, upward.

H4792.definition: formed like מָרוֹם; height; Merom, a lake in Palestine.

H4793.definition: from רוּץ; a run (the trial of speed).

H4794.definition: or מְרֻצָה; feminine of מֵרוֹץ; a race (the act), whether the manner or the progress.

H4795.definition: from מָרַק; properly, rubbed; but used abstractly, a rubbing (with perfumery).

H4796.definition: plural of מַר feminine; bitter springs; Maroth, a place in Palestine.

H4797.definition: from an unused root meaning to scream; a cry, i.e. (of job), a revel.

H4798.definition: formed like מִרְזַח; a cry, i.e. (of grief) a lamentation.

H4799.definition: a primitive root; properly, to soften by rubbing or pressure; hence (medicinally) to apply as an emollient.

H4800.definition: from רָחַב; enlargement, either literally (an open space, usually in a good sense), or figuratively (liberty).

H4801.definition: ; from רָחַק; remoteness, i.e. (concretely) a distant place; often (adverbially) from afar.
H4801.kjv: (a-, dwell in, very) far (country, off). See also בֵּית הַמֶּרְחָק.

H4803.definition: a primitive root; to polish; by implication, to make bald (the head), to gall (the shoulder); also, to sharpen.
H4803.kjv: bright, furbish, (have his) hair (be) fallen off, peeled, pluck off (hair).

H4804.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to מָרַט; to pull off.

H4805.definition: from מָרָה; bitterness, i.e. (figuratively) rebellion; concretely, bitter, or rebellious.

H4806.definition: from מָרָא in the sense of grossness, through the idea of domineering (compare מָרֵא); stall-fed; often (as noun) a beeve.

H4807.definition: from רִיב and בַּעַל; quarreller of Baal, Merib-Baal, an epithet of Gideon.

H4809.definition: the same as מְרִיבָה; Meribah, the name of two places in the Desert.

H4810.definition: from מְרִי and בַּעַל; rebellion of (i.e. against) Baal; Meri-Baal, an epithet of Gideon.

H4811.definition: from מָרָה; rebellion; Merajah, an Israelite.

H4812.definition: plural of מְרָיָה; rebellious; Merajoth, the name of two Israelites.

H4813.definition: from מְרִי; rebelliously; Mirjam, the name of two Israelitesses.

H4816.definition: perhaps from רָכַךְ; softness, i.e. (figuratively) fear.

H4817.definition: from רָכַב; a chariot; also a seat (in a vehicle).

H4820.definition: from רָמָה in the sense of deceiving; fraud.
H4820.kjv: craft, deceit(-ful, -fully), false, feigned, guile, subtilly, treachery.

H4821.definition: the same as מִרְמָה; Mirmah, an Israelite.

H4822.definition: plural from רוּם; heights; Meremoth, the name of two Israelites.

H4823.definition: from רָמַס; abasement (the act or the thing).

H4824.definition: patrial from an unused noun; a Meronothite, or inhabitant of some (otherwise unknown) Meronoth..

H4825.definition: of foreign derivation; Meres, a Persian.

H4826.definition: of foreign derivation; Marsena, a Persian.

H4827.definition: from רָעַע; used as (abstract) noun, wickedness.

H4828.definition: from רָעָה in the sense of companionship; a friend.

H4829.definition: from רָעָה in the sense of feeding; pasture (the place or the act); also the haunt of wild animals.

H4830.definition: from רָעָה in the sense of feeding; pasturage; concretely, a flock.

H4831.definition: from רָעַל; perhaps, earthquake; Maralah, a place in Palestine.

H4832.definition: from רָפָא; properly, curative, i.e. literally (concretely) a medicine, or (abstractly) a cure; figuratively (concretely) deliverance, or (abstractly) placidity.

H4834.definition: a primitive root; properly, to press, i.e. (figuratively) to be pungent or vehement; to irritate.

H4838.definition: a primitive root; to polish; by implication, to sharpen; also to rinse.

H4839.definition: from מָרַק; soup (as if a rinsing).

H4841.definition: feminine of מֶרְקָח; abstractly, a seasoning (with spicery); concretely, an unguentkettle (for preparing spiced oil).

H4842.definition: from רָקַח; an aromatic unguent; also an unguent-pot.
H4842.kjv: prepared by the apothecaries' art, compound, ointment.

H4843.definition: a primitive root; properly, to trickle (see מַר); but used only as a denominative from מַר; to be (causatively, make) bitter (literally or figuratively).
H4843.kjv: (be, be in, deal, have, make) bitter(-ly, -ness), be moved with choler, (be, have sorely, it) grieved(-eth), provoke, vex.

H4844.definition: or מְרוֹר; from מָרַר; a bitter herb.

H4846.definition: or מְרוֹרָה; from מָרַר; properly, bitterness; concretely, a bitter thing; specifically bile; also venom (of a serpent).

H4847.definition: from מָרַר; bitter; Merari, an Israelite.

H4848.definition: from מְרָרִי; a Merarite (collectively), or decendants of Merari.

H4849.definition: from רָשַׁע; a female wicked doer.

H4850.definition: dual of מַר feminine; double bitterness; Merathajim, an epithet of Babylon.

H4851.definition: of foreign derivation; Mash, a son of Aram, and the people descended from him.

H4852.definition: of foreign derivation; Mesha, a place in Arabia.

H4853.definition: from נָשָׂא; a burden; specifically, tribute, or (abstractly) porterage; figuratively, an utterance, chiefly adoom, especially singing; mental, desire.
H4853.kjv: burden, carry away, prophecy, [idiom] they set, song, tribute.

H4854.definition: the same as מַשָּׂא; burden; Massa, a son of Ishmael.

H4855.definition: from נָשָׁה; a loan; by implication, interest on adebt.

H4856.definition: from נָשָׂא; partiality (as a lifting up).

H4857.definition: from שָׁאַב; a trough for cattle to drink from.

H4858.definition: from נָשָׂא; a conflagration (from the rising of smoke).

H4861.definition: from שָׁאַל; request; Mishal, a place in Palestine.

H4863.definition: from שָׁאַר in the original sense of swelling; a kneading-trough (in which the dough rises).

H4864.definition: from נָשָׂא; properly, (abstractly) a raising (as of the hands in prayer), or rising (of flame); figuratively, an utterance; concretely, a beacon (as raised); a present (as taken), mess, or tribute; figuratively, a reproach (as a burden).
H4864.kjv: burden, collection, sign of fire, (great) flame, gift, lifting up, mess, oblation, reward.

H4865.definition: from שָׁבַץ; a brocade; by analogy, a (reticulated) setting of agem.

H4866.definition: from שָׁבַר; the orifice of the womb (from which the fetus breaks forth).

H4867.definition: from שָׁבַר; a breaker (of the sea).

H4869.definition: from שָׂגַב; properly, a cliff (or other lofty or inaccessible place); abstractly, altitude; figuratively, a refuge; defence, high fort (tower), refuge, Misgab, a place in Moab.

H4871.definition: a primitive root; to pull out (literally or figuratively).

H4872.definition: from מָשָׁה; drawing out (of the water), i.e. rescued; Mosheh, the Israelite lawgiver.

H4875.definition: or מְשֹׁאָה; from the same as שׁוֹא; (a) ruin, abstractly (the act) or concretely (the wreck).

H4877.definition: from שׁוּב; returned; Meshobab, an Israelite.

H4879.definition: lemma מְשׁוּגָּה extra dagesh, corrected to מְשׁוּגָה; from an unused root meaning to stray; mistake.

H4880.definition: or מִשּׁוֹט; from שׁוּט; an oar.

H4881.definition: or מְשֻׂכָה; from שׂוּךְ; a hedge.

H4882.definition: from an unused root meaning to plunder; spoilation.

H4883.definition: from an unused root meaning to rasp; a saw.

H4884.definition: from an unused root meaning apparently to divide; a measure (for liquids).

H4885.definition: from שׂוּשׂ; delight, concretely (the cause or object) or abstractly (the feeling).

H4886.definition: a primitive root; to rub with oil, i.e. to anoint; by implication, to consecrate; also to paint.

H4887.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to מָשַׁח; oil.

H4888.definition: or מׇשְׁחָה; from מָשַׁח; unction (the act); by implication, a consecratory gift.

H4889.definition: from שָׁחַת; destructive, i.e. (as noun) destruction, literally (specifically a snare) or figuratively (corruption).

H4891.definition: from שָׁחַר in the sense of day breaking; dawn.

H4894.definition: or מִשְׁטַח; from שָׁטַח; a spreading-place.

H4895.definition: from the same as שֹׁטֵט; enmity.

H4897.definition: from מָשָׁה; silk (as drawn from the cocoon).

H4898.definition: from an equiv. to שְׁזַב and אֵל; delivered of God; Meshezabel, an Israelite.

H4899.definition: from מָשַׁח; anointed; usually a consecrated person (as a king, priest, or saint); specifically, the Messiah.

H4900.definition: a primitive root; to draw, used in a great variety of applications (including to sow, to sound, to prolong, to develop, to march, to remove, to delay, to be tall, etc.).
H4900.kjv: draw (along, out), continue, defer, extend, forbear, [idiom] give, handle, make (pro-, sound) long, [idiom] sow, scatter, stretch out.

H4901.definition: from מָשַׁךְ; a sowing; also a possession.

H4902.definition: the same in form as מֶשֶׁךְ, but probably of foreign derivation; Meshek, a son of Japheth, and the people descended from him.

H4904.definition: from שָׁכַב; a bed (figuratively, a bier); abstractly, sleep; by euphemism, carnal intercourse.

H4905.definition: from שָׂכַל; instructive, i.e. a didactic poem.

H4906.definition: from the same as שֵׂכוּ; a figure (carved on stone, the wall, or any object); figuratively, imagination.

H4908.definition: from שָׁכַן; a residence (including a shepherd's hut, the lair of animals, figuratively, the grave; also the Temple); specifically, the Tabernacle (properly, its wooden walls).

H4909.definition: from שָׂכַר; wages or a reward.

H4910.kjv: (have, make to have) dominion, governor, [idiom] indeed, reign, (bear, cause to, have) rule(-ing, -r), have power.

H4911.definition: denominative from מָשָׁל; to liken, i.e. (transitively) to use figurative language (an allegory, adage, song or the like); intransitively, to resemble.
H4911.kjv: be(-come) like, compare, use (as a) proverb, speak (in proverbs), utter.

H4912.definition: apparently from מָשַׁל in some original sense of superiority in mental action; properly, a pithy maxim, usually of metaphorical nature; hence, a simile (as an adage, poem, discourse).

H4913.definition: for מִשְׁאָל; Mashal, a place in Palestine.

H4914.definition: xlit mᵉshôwl corrected to mᵉshôl; from מָשַׁל; a satire.

H4915.definition: (1) from מָשַׁל; (2) from מָשַׁל; empire; a parallel.

H4916.definition: or מִשְׁלֹחַ; also מִשְׁלָח; from שָׁלַח; a sending out, i.e. (abstractly) presentation (favorable), or seizure (unfavorable); also (concretely) a place of dismissal, or a business to be discharged.
H4916.kjv: to lay, to put, sending (forth), to set.

H4917.definition: feminine of מִשְׁלוֹחַ; a mission, i.e. (abstractly and favorable) release, or (concretely and unfavorable) an army.

H4918.definition: from שָׁלַם; allied; Meshullam, the name of seventeen Israelites.

H4919.definition: plural from שָׁלַם; reconciliations; Meshillemoth, an Israelite.

H4920.definition: or מְשֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from שָׁלַם and יָהּ; ally of Jah; Meshelemjah, an Israelite.

H4921.definition: from שָׁלַם; reconciliation; Meshillemith, an Israelite.

H4922.definition: feminine of מְשֻׁלָּם; Meshullemeth, an Israelitess.

H4923.definition: from שָׁמֵם; a waste or amazement.

H4924.definition: from שָׁמַן; fat, i.e. (literally and abstractly) fatness; but usually (figuratively and concretely) a rich dish, a fertile field, a robust man.

H4925.definition: from שָׁמַן; fatness; Mashmannah, an Israelite.

H4927.definition: the same as מִשְׁמָע; Mishma, the name of a son of Ishmael, and of an Israelite.

H4928.definition: feminine of מִשְׁמָע; audience, i.e. the royal court; also obedience, i.e. (concretely) a subject.

H4929.definition: from שָׁמַר; a guard (the man, the post or the prison); a deposit (figuratively); also (as observed) a usage (abstractly), or an example (concretely).
H4929.kjv: diligence, guard, office, prison, ward, watch.
