H4931.definition: feminine of מִשְׁמָר; watch, i.e. the act (custody), or (concretely) the sentry, the post; objectively preservation, or (concretely) safe; figuratively observance, i.e. (abstractly) duty or (objectively) a usage or party.
H4931.kjv: charge, keep, or to be kept, office, ordinace, safeguard, ward, watch.

H4932.definition: from שָׁנָה; properly, a repetition, i.e. a duplicate (copy of a document), or a double (in amount); by implication, a second (in order, rank, age, quality or location).
H4932.kjv: college, copy, double, fatlings, next, second (order), twice as much.

H4934.definition: from the same as שֹׁעַל; a hollow, i.e. a narrow passage.

H4936.definition: apparently from שָׁעָה; inspection; Misham, an Israelite.

H4937.definition: or מִשְׁעָן; from שָׁעַן; a support (concretely), i.e. (figuratively) a protector or sustenance.

H4938.definition: or מִשְׁעֶנֶת; feminine of מִשְׁעֵן; support (abstractly), i.e. (figuratively) sustenance or (concretely) a walking-stick.

H4940.definition: from שָׁפָה (compare שִׁפְחָה); a family, i.e. circle of relatives; figuratively, a class (of persons), a species (of animals) or sort (of things); by extension a tribe or people.

H4941.definition: from שָׁפַט; properly, a verdict (favorable or unfavorable) pronounced judicially, especially a sentence or formal decree (human or (participant's) divine law, individual or collective), including the act, the place, the suit, the crime, and the penalty; abstractly, justice, including a participant's right or privilege (statutory or customary), or even a style.
H4941.kjv: [phrase] adversary, ceremony, charge, [idiom] crime, custom, desert, determination, discretion, disposing, due, fashion, form, to be judged, judgment, just(-ice, -ly), (manner of) law(-ful), manner, measure, (due) order, ordinance, right, sentence, usest, [idiom] worthy, [phrase] wrong.

H4942.definition: from שָׁפָה; a stall for cattle (only dual).

H4943.definition: from an unused root meaning to hold; possession.

H4944.definition: from שָׁקַק; a traversing, i.e. rapid motion.

H4945.definition: from שָׁקָה; properly, causing to drink, i.e. a butler; by implication (intransitively), drink (itself); figuratively, a well-watered region.
H4945.kjv: butler(-ship), cupbearer, drink(-ing), fat pasture, watered.

H4947.definition: from שָׁקַף in its original sense of overhanging; a lintel.

H4948.definition: from שָׁקַל; weight (numerically estimated); hence, weighing (the act).

H4949.definition: or מִשְׁקֹלֶת; feminine of מִשְׁקָל or מַשְׁקוֹף; a weight, i.e. a plummet (with line attached).

H4950.definition: from שָׁקַע; a settling place (of water), i.e. a pond.

H4952.definition: from שָׁרָה in the sense of loosening; maceration, i.e. steeped juice.

H4953.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to שָׁרַק; a (musical) pipe (from its whistling sound).

H4954.definition: patrial from an unused noun from an unused root; probably meaning to stretch out; extension; a Mishraite, or inhabitant (collectively) of Mishra.

H4955.definition: from שָׂרַף; combustion, i.e. cremation (of a corpse), or calcination (of lime).

H4956.definition: from the plural of מִשְׂרָפָה and מַיִם; burnings of water; Misrephoth-Majim, a place in Palestine.

H4957.definition: a form for שׂוֹרֵק used denominatively; vineyard; Masrekah, a place in Idumaea.

H4958.definition: apparently from an unused root meaning to perforate, i.e. hollow out; a pan.

H4959.definition: a primitive root; to feel of; by implication, to grope.

H4960.definition: from שָׁתָה; drink, by implication, drinking (the act); also (by implication) a banquet or (generally) feast.

H4962.definition: from the same as מָתַי; properly, an adult (as of full length); by implication, a man (only in the plural).

H4963.definition: denominative from תֶּבֶן; straw in the heap.

H4964.definition: from an unused root meaning to curb; a bit.

H4965.definition: from מֶתֶג and אַמָּה with the art. interposed; bit of the metropolis; Metheg-ha-Ammah, an epithet of Gath.

H4967.definition: from מַת and אֵל, with the relative interposed; man who (is) of God; Methusael, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4968.definition: from מַת and שֶׁלַח; man of a dart; Methushelach, an antediluvian patriarch.

H4969.definition: a primitive root; to stretch out.

H4970.definition: from an unused root meaning to extend; properly, extent (of time); but used only adverbially (especially with other particle prefixes), when (either relative or interrogative).

H4971.definition: or מַתְכֻנֶת; from תָּכַן in the transferred sense of measuring; proportion (in size, number or ingredients).

H4972.definition: from מָה and תְּלָאָה; what a trouble!.

H4973.definition: contr. from יָלַע; properly, a biter, i.e. a tooth.

H4975.definition: from an unused root meaning to be slender; properly, the waist or small of the back; only in plural the loins.

H4977.definition: the same as מַתָּן; Mattan, the name of a priest of Baal, and of an Israelite.

H4979.definition: feminine of מַתָּן; a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe.

H4980.definition: the same as מַתָּנָה; Mattanah, a place in the Desert.

H4981.definition: probably patrial from an unused noun meaning slenderness; a Mithnite, or inhabitant of Methen.

H4982.definition: from מַתָּן; liberal; Mattenai, the name of three Israelites.

H4983.definition: or מַתַּנְיָהוּ; from מַתָּן and יָהּ; gift of Jah; Mattanjah, the name of ten Israelites.

H4984.definition: from נָשָׂא; (used as abstractly) supreme exaltation.

H4985.definition: a primitive root; to suck, by implication, to relish, or (intransitively) be sweet.

H4988.definition: from מָתַק; a dainty, i.e. (generally) food.

H4989.definition: feminine of מֹתֶק; sweetness; Mithkah, a place in the Desert.

H4990.definition: of Persian origin; Mithredath, the name of two Persians.

H4991.definition: feminine of מַתָּן abbreviated form; a present.

H4992.definition: for מַתִּתְיָה; gift of Jah; Mattattah, an Israelite.

H4993.definition: or מַתִּתְיָהוּ; from מַתָּת and יָהּ; gift of Jah; Mattithjah, the name of four Israelites.

H4994.definition: a primitive particle of incitement and entreaty, which may usually be rendered; 'I pray', 'now', or 'then'; added mostly to verbs (in the Imperative or Future), or to interjections, occasionally to an adverb or conjunction.
H4994.kjv: I beseech (pray) thee (you), go to, now, oh.

H4995.definition: apparently from נוּא in the sense of harshness from refusal; properly, tough, i.e. uncooked (flesh).

H4996.definition: of Egyptian origin; No (i.e. Thebes), the capital of Upper Egypt.

H4997.definition: or נאוֹדlemma נֹאוד vowel, corrected to נאוֹדxlit nôʼwd corrected to nʼôwd; also (feminine) נֹאדָה; from an unused root of uncertain signification; a (skin or leather) bag (for fluids).

H4998.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be at home, i.e. (by implication) to be pleasant (or suitable), i.e. beautiful.

H4999.definition: from נָאָה; a home; figuratively, a pasture.

H5000.definition: from נָאָה or נָוֶה; suitable, or beautiful.

H5001.definition: a primitive root; properly, to whisper, i.e. (by implication) to utter as aoracle.

H5003.definition: a primitive root; to commit adultery; figuratively, to apostatize.
H5003.kjv: adulterer(-ess), commit(-ing) adultery, woman that breaketh wedlock.

H5006.definition: a primitive root; in Ecclesiastes 12:5, by interchange for נוּץ, to bloom; to scorn.
H5006.kjv: abhor, (give occasion to) blaspheme, contemn, despise, flourish, [idiom] great, provoke.

H5011.definition: the same as נוֹב; fruit; Nob, a place in Palestine.

H5012.definition: a primitive root; to prophesy, i.e. speak (or sing) by inspiration (in prediction or simple discourse).

H5014.definition: a primitive root; to pierce; to be hollow, or (figuratively) foolish.

H5015.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Nebo, the name of a Babylonian deity, also of a mountain in Moab, and of a place in Palestine.

H5016.definition: from נָבָא; a prediction (spoken or written).

H5018.definition: xlit Nᵉbûwzarădân corrected to Nᵉbûwzarʼădân; of foreign origin; Nebuzaradan, a Babylonian general.

H5019.definition: or נְבֻּכַדְנֶאצַּר; (2 Kings 24:1,10), or נְבוּכַדְנֶצַּר; (Esther 2:6; Daniel 1:18), or נְבוּכַדְרֶאצַּר; or נְבוּכַדְרֶאצּוֹר; (Ezra 2:1; Jeremiah 49:28), or foreign derivation; Nebukadnetstsar (or -retstsar, or -retstsor), king of Babylon.

H5021.definition: of foreign derivation; Nebushazban, Nebuchadnezzar's chief eunuch.

H5022.definition: feminine plural from the same as נֹב; fruits; Naboth, an Israelite.

H5024.definition: a primitive root; to bark (as a dog).

H5025.definition: from נָבַח; a bark; Nobach, the name of an Israelite, and of a place East of the Jordan.

H5026.definition: of foreign origin; Nibchaz, a deity of the Avites.

H5027.definition: a primitive root; to scan, i.e. look intently at; by implication, to regard with pleasure, favor or care.
H5027.kjv: (cause to) behold, consider, look (down), regard, have respect, see.

H5028.definition: from נָבַט; regard; Nebat, the father of Jeroboam I.

H5030.definition: from נָבָא; a prophet or (generally) inspired man.

H5031.definition: feminine of נָבִיא; a prophetess or (generally) inspired woman; by implication, a poetess; by association a prophet's wife.

H5032.definition: or נְבָיֹת; feminine plural from נוּב; fruitfulnesses; Nebajoth, a son of Ismael, and the country settled by him.

H5033.definition: from an unused root meaning to burst forth; a fountain.

H5034.definition: a primitive root; to wilt; generally, to fall away, fail, faint; figuratively, to be foolish or (morally) wicked; causatively, to despise, disgrace.
H5034.kjv: disgrace, dishounour, lightly esteem, fade (away, -ing), fall (down, -ling, off), do foolishly, come to nought, [idiom] surely, make vile, wither.

H5035.definition: or נֵבֶל; from נָבֵל; a skin-bag for liquids (from collapsing when empty); hence, a vase (as similar in shape when full); also a lyre (as having a body of like form).

H5037.definition: the same as נָבָל; dolt; Nabal, an Israelite.

H5038.definition: from נָבֵל; a flabby thing, i.e. a carcase or carrion (human or bestial, often collectively); figuratively, an idol.
H5038.kjv: (dead) body, (dead) carcase, dead of itself, which died, (beast) that (which) dieth of itself.

H5039.definition: feminine of נָבָל; foolishness, i.e. (morally) wickedness; concretely, a crime; by extension, punishment.

H5040.definition: from נָבָל; properly, disgrace, i.e. the (female) pudenda.

H5041.definition: apparently from נָבָל and לָט; foolish secrecy; Neballat, a place in Palestine.

H5042.definition: a primitive root; to gush forth; figuratively, to utter (good or bad words); specifically, to emit (a foul odor).
H5042.kjv: belch out, flowing, pour out, send forth, utter (abundantly).

H5043.definition: (Aramaic) from an unused root meaning to shine; a light; plural (collectively) a chandelier.

H5044.definition: of uncertain derivation; Nibshan, a place in Palestine.

H5045.definition: from an unused root meaning to be parched; the south (from its drought); specifically, the Negeb or southern district of Judah, occasionally, Egypt (as south to Palestine).

H5046.definition: a primitive root; properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise.
H5046.kjv: bewray, [idiom] certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, [idiom] fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, [idiom] surely, tell, utter.

H5047.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָגַד; to flow (through the idea of clearing the way).

H5048.definition: from נָגַד; a front, i.e. part opposite; specifically a counterpart, or mate; usually (adverbial, especially with preposition) over against or before.
H5048.kjv: about, (over) against, [idiom] aloof, [idiom] far (off), [idiom] from, over, presence, [idiom] other side, sight, [idiom] to view.

H5050.definition: a primitive root; to glitter; causatively, to illuminate.

H5052.definition: the same as נֹגַהּ; Nogah, a son of David.

H5055.definition: a primitive root; to butt with the horns; figuratively, to war against.

H5057.definition: or נָגִד; from נָגַד; a commander (as occupying the front), civil, military or religious; generally (abstractly, plural), honorable themes.
H5057.kjv: captain, chief, excellent thing, (chief) governor, leader, noble, prince, (chief) ruler.

H5058.definition: or נְגִינַת; (Psalm 61:title), from נָגַן; properly, instrumental music; by implication, a stringed instrument; by extension, a poem set to music; specifically, an epigram.

H5059.definition: a primitive root; properly, to thrum, i.e. beat atune with the fingers; expectation. to play on astringed instrument; hence (generally), to make music.
H5059.kjv: player on instruments, sing to the stringed instruments, melody, ministrel, play(-er, -ing).

H5060.definition: a primitive root; properly, to touch, i.e. lay the hand upon (for any purpose; euphemistically, to lie with a woman); by implication, to reach (figuratively, to arrive, acquire); violently, to strike (punish, defeat, destroy, etc.).
H5060.kjv: beat, ([idiom] be able to) bring (down), cast, come (nigh), draw near (nigh), get up, happen, join, near, plague, reach (up), smite, strike, touch.

H5061.definition: from נָגַע; a blow (figuratively, infliction); also (by implication) a spot (concretely, a leprous person or dress).
H5061.kjv: plague, sore, stricken, stripe, stroke, wound.

H5062.definition: a primitive root; to push, gore, defeat, stub (the toe), inflict (a disease).
H5062.kjv: beat, dash, hurt, plague, slay, smite (down), strike, stumble, [idiom] surely, put to the worse.

H5063.definition: from נָגַף; a trip (of the foot); figuratively, an infliction (of disease).

H5064.definition: a primitive root; to flow; figuratively, to stretch out; causatively, to pour out or down; figuratively, to deliver over.
H5064.kjv: fall, flow away, pour down (out), run, shed, spilt, trickle down.

H5065.definition: a primitive root; to drive (an animal, a workman, a debtor, an army); by implication, to tax, harass, tyrannize.
H5065.kjv: distress, driver, exact(-or), oppress(-or), [idiom] raiser of taxes, taskmaster.

H5066.definition: a primitive root; to be or come (causatively, bring) near (for any purpose); euphemistically, to lie with a woman; as an enemy, to attack; religious to worship; causatively, to present; figuratively, to adduce an argument; by reversal, to stand back.
H5066.kjv: (make to) approach (nigh), bring (forth, hither, near), (cause to) come (hither, near, nigh), give place, go hard (up), (be, draw, go) near (nigh), offer, overtake, present, put, stand.

H5067.definition: from נוּד in the sense of piling up; a mound, i.e. wave.

H5068.definition: a primitive root; to impel; hence, to volunteer (as a soldier), to present spontaneously.
H5068.kjv: offer freely, be (give, make, offer self) willing(-ly).

H5069.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָדַב; be (or give) liberal(-ly).

H5070.definition: from נָדַב; liberal; Nadab, the name of four Israelites.

H5071.definition: from נָדַב; properly (abstractly) spontaneity, or (adjectively) spontaneous; also (concretely) a spontaneous or (by inference, in plural) abundant gift.
H5071.kjv: free(-will) offering, freely, plentiful, voluntary(-ily, offering), willing(-ly), offering).

H5072.definition: from נָדַב and יָהּ; largess of Jah; Nedabjah, an Israelite.

H5073.definition: (Aramaic) from a root meaning to stick; a layer (of building materials).

H5074.definition: a primitive root; properly, to wave to and fro (rarely to flap up and down); figuratively, to rove, flee, or (causatively) to drive away.
H5074.kjv: chase (away), [idiom] could not, depart, flee ([idiom] apace, away), (re-) move, thrust away, wander (abroad, -er, -ing).

H5076.definition: passive participle of נָדַד; properly, tossed; abstractly, a rolling (on the bed).

H5077.definition: or נָדָא; (2 Kings 17:21), a primitive root; properly, to toss; figuratively, to exclude, i.e. banish, postpone, prohibit.
H5077.kjv: cast out, drive, put far away.

H5078.definition: from נָדָה in the sense of freely flinging money; a bounty (for prostitution).

H5079.definition: from נָדַד; properly, rejection; by implication, impurity, especially personal (menstruation) or moral (idolatry, incest).
H5079.kjv: [idiom] far, filthiness, [idiom] flowers, menstruous (woman), put apart, [idiom] removed (woman), separation, set apart, unclean(-ness, thing, with filthiness).

H5080.definition: a primitive root; to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.).
H5080.kjv: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw.

H5081.definition: from נָדַב; properly, voluntary, i.e. generous; hence, magnanimous; as noun, a grandee (sometimes a tyrant).

H5082.definition: feminine of נָדִיב; properly, nobility, i.e. reputation.

H5083.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to give; a present (for prostitution).

H5084.definition: of uncertain derivation; a sheath (of a sword).

H5085.definition: (Aramaic) from the same as נָדָן; a sheath; figuratively, the body (as the receptacle of the soul).

H5086.definition: a primitive root; to shove asunder, i.e. disperse.
H5086.kjv: drive (away, to and fro), thrust down, shaken, tossed to and fro.

H5087.definition: a primitive root; to promise (pos., to do or give something to God).

H5088.definition: or נֵדֶר; from נָדַר; a promise (to God); also (concretely) a thing promised.

H5089.definition: from an unused root meaning to lament; lamentation.

H5090.definition: a primitive root; to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh.
H5090.kjv: acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth).

H5091.definition: a primitive root; to groan, i.e. bewail; hence (through the idea of crying aloud), to assemble (as if on proclamation).

H5094.definition: (Aramaic) or נְהִירוּ; (Aramaic), from the same as נְהָרָה; illumination, i.e. (figuratively) wisdom.

H5095.definition: a primitive root; properly, to run with asparkle, i.e. flow; hence (transitively), to conduct, and (by inference) to protect, sustain.

H5096.definition: or נַהֲלֹל; the same as נַהֲלֹל; Nahalal or Nahalol, a place in Palestine.

H5101.definition: a primitive root; to bray (as an ass), scream (from hunger).

H5102.definition: a primitive root; to sparkle, i.e. (figuratively) be cheerful; hence (from the sheen of a running stream) to flow, i.e. (figuratively) assemble.

H5103.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to נָהַר; a river, especially the Euphrates.

H5104.definition: from נָהַר; a stream (including the sea; expectation the Nile, Euphrates, etc.); figuratively, prosperity.

H5105.definition: from נָהַר in its original sense; daylight.

H5106.definition: a primitive root; to refuse, forbid, dissuade, or neutralize.
H5106.kjv: break, disallow, discourage, make of none effect.

H5107.definition: a primitive root; to germinate, i.e. (figuratively) to (causatively, make) flourish; also (of words), to utter.

H5108.definition: or נֵיב; from נוּב; produce, literally or figuratively.

H5109.definition: from נוֹב; fruitful; Nobai, an Israelite.

H5110.definition: a primitive root; to nod, i.e. waver; figuratively, to wander, flee, disappear; also (from shaking the head in sympathy), to console, deplore, or (from tossing the head in scorn) taunt.
H5110.kjv: bemoan, flee, get, mourn, make to move, take pity, remove, shake, skip for joy, be sorry, vagabond, way, wandering.

H5112.definition: lemma נוֹדּ extra dagesh, corrected to נוֹד; (only defective נֹד ); from נוּד; exile.

H5113.definition: the same as נוֹדlemma נוֹדּ extra dagesh, corrected to נוֹד; vagrancy; Nod, the land of Cain.

H5114.definition: from נָדַב; noble; Nodab, an Arab tribe.

H5115.definition: a primitive root; (compare נָוֶה); to rest (as at home); causatively (through the implied idea of beauty ), to celebrate (with praises).
H5115.kjv: keept at home, prepare an habitation.

H5116.definition: or (feminine) נָוָה; from נָוָה; (adjectively) at home; hence (by implication of satisfaction) lovely; also (noun) a home, of God (temple), men (residence), flocks (pasture), or wild animals (den).
H5116.kjv: comely, dwelling (place), fold, habitation, pleasant place, sheepcote, stable, tarried.

H5117.definition: a primitive root; to rest, i.e. settle down; used in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, intransitive, transitive and causative (to dwell, stay, let fall, place, let alone, withdraw, give comfort, etc.).
H5117.kjv: cease, be confederate, lay, let down, (be) quiet, remain, (cause to, be at, give, have, make to) rest, set down. Compare יָנִים.

H5119.definition: feminine of נוּחַ; quietude; Nochah, an Israelite.

H5121.definition: from נָוָה; residence; Navith, a place in Palestine.

H5122.definition: (Aramaic) or נְוָלִי; (Aramaic), from an unused root probably meaning to be foul; a sink.

H5123.definition: a primitive root; to slumber (from drowsiness).

H5125.definition: a primitive root; to resprout, i.e. propagate by shoots; figuratively, to be perpetual.

H5126.definition: or נוֹן; (1 Chronicles 7:27), from נוּן; perpetuity,; Nun or Non, the father of Joshua.

H5127.definition: a primitive root; to flit, i.e. vanish away (subside, escape; causatively, chase, impel, deliver).
H5127.kjv: [idiom] abate, away, be displayed, (make to) flee (away, -ing), put to flight, [idiom] hide, lift up a standard.

H5128.definition: a primitive root; to waver, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (as subjoined).
H5128.kjv: continually, fugitive, [idiom] make, to (go) up and down, be gone away, (be) move(-able, -d), be promoted, reel, remove, scatter, set, shake, sift, stagger, to and fro, be vagabond, wag, (make) wander (up and down).

H5129.definition: from יָעַד and יָהּ; convened of Jah; Noadjah, the name of an Israelite, and a false prophetess.

H5130.definition: a primitive root; to quiver (i.e. vibrate up and down, or rock to and fro); used in a great variety of applications (including sprinkling, beckoning, rubbing, bastinadoing, sawing, waving, etc.).
H5130.kjv: lift up, move, offer, perfume, send, shake, sift, strike, wave.

H5132.definition: a primitive root; properly, to flash; hence, to blossom (from the brilliancy of color); also, to fly away (from the quickness of motion).

H5133.definition: or נֹצָה; feminine active participle of נָצָה in the sense of flying; a pinion (or wing feather); often (collectively) plumage.

H5135.definition: (Aramaic) from an unused root (corresponding to that of נִיר) meaning to shine; fire.

H5136.definition: a primitive root; to be sick, i.e. (figuratively) distressed.

H5137.definition: a primitive root; to spirt, i.e. besprinkle (especially in expiation).

H5138.definition: from זוּד; something boiled, i.e. soup.

H5139.definition: or נָזִר; from נָזַר; separate, i.e. consecrated (as prince, a Nazirite); hence (figuratively from the latter) an unpruned vine (like an unshorn Nazirite).
H5139.kjv: Nazarite (by a false alliteration with Nazareth), separate(-d), vine undressed.

H5140.definition: a primitive root; to drip, or shed by trickling.
H5140.kjv: distil, drop, flood, (cause to) flow(-ing), gush out, melt, pour (down), running water, stream.

H5141.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; a nose-ring.

H5142.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of נֵזֶק; to suffer (causatively, inflict) loss.

H5143.definition: from an unused root meaning to injure; loss.

H5144.definition: a primitive root; to hold aloof, i.e. (intransitivey) abstain (from food and drink, from impurity, and even from divine worship (i.e. apostatize)); specifically, to set apart (to sacred purposes), i.e. devote.

H5145.definition: or נֵזֶר; from נָזַר; properly, something set apart, i.e. (abstractly) dedication (of a priet or Nazirite); hence (concretely) unshorn locks; also (by implication) a chaplet (especially of royalty).

H5146.definition: the same as נוּחַ; rest; Noach, the patriarch of the flood.

H5147.definition: from חָבָה; occult; Nachbi, an Israelite.

H5148.definition: a primitive root; to guide; by implication, to transport (into exile, or as colonists).
H5148.kjv: bestow, bring, govern, guide, lead (forth), put, straiten.

H5149.definition: from נָחַם; comforted; Nechum, an Israelite.

H5150.definition: or נִחֻם; from נָחַם; properly, consoled; abstractly, solace.

H5151.definition: from נָחַם; comfortable; Nachum, an Israelite prophet.

H5152.definition: from the same as נַחַר; snorer; Nochor, the name of the grandfather and a brother of Abraham.

H5153.definition: apparently passive participle of נָחַשׁ (perhaps in the sense of ringing), i.e. bell-metal; or from the red color of the throat of a serpent (נָחָשׁ, as denominative) when hissing); coppery, i.e. (figuratively) hard.

H5154.definition: or נְחֻשָׁה; feminine of נָחוּשׁ; copper.

H5155.definition: probably denominative from חָלִיל; a flute.

H5156.definition: from the same as נַחַר; a nostril.

H5157.definition: a primitive root; to inherit (as a (figurative) mode of descent), or (generally) to occupy; causatively, to bequeath, or (generally) distribute, instate.
H5157.kjv: divide, have (inheritance), take as a heritage, (cause to, give to, make to) inherit, (distribute for, divide (for, for an, by), give for, have, leave for, take (for)) inheritance, (have in, cause to, be made to) possess(-ion).

H5158.definition: or (feminine) נַחְלָה; (Psalm 124:4), or נַחֲלָה; (Ezekiel 47:19; Ezekiel 48:28), from נָחַל in its original sense; a stream, especially a winter torrent; (by implication) a (narrow) valley (in which a brook runs); also a shaft (of a mine).

H5159.definition: from נָחַל (in its usual sense); properly, something inherited, i.e. (abstractly) occupancy, or (concretely) an heirloom; generally an estate, patrimony or portion.
H5159.kjv: heritage, to inherit, inheritance, possession. Compare נַחַל.

H5160.definition: from נַחַל and אֵל; valley of God; Nachaliel, a place in the Desert.

H5161.definition: apparently a patronymic from an unused name (apparently passive participle of חָלַם); dreamed; a Nechelamite, or descendant of Nechlam.

H5162.definition: a primitive root; properly, to sigh, i.e. breathe strongly; by implication, to be sorry, i.e. (in a favorable sense) to pity, console or (reflexively) rue; or (unfavorably) to avenge (oneself).

H5163.definition: from נָחַם; consolation; Nacham, an Israelite.

H5166.definition: from נָחַם and יָהּ; consolation of Jah; Nechemjah, the name of three Israelites.

H5167.definition: from נָחַם; consolatory; Nachamani, an Israelite.

H5169.definition: a primitive root; to be urgent.

H5170.definition: and (feminine) נַחֲרָה; from an unused root meaning to snort or snore; a snorting.

H5171.definition: or נַחְרַי; from the same as נַחַר; snorer; Nacharai or Nachrai, an Israelite.

H5172.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hiss, i.e. whisper a (magic) spell; generally, to prognosticate.
H5172.kjv: [idiom] certainly, divine, enchanter, (use) [idiom] enchantment, learn by experience, [idiom] indeed, diligently observe.

H5173.definition: from נָחַשׁ; an incantation or augury.

H5175.definition: from נָחַשׁ; a snake (from its hiss).

H5176.definition: the same as נָחָשׁ; Nachash, the name of two persons apparently non-Israelite.

H5177.definition: from נָחַשׁ; enchanter; Nachshon, an Israelite.

H5178.definition: for נְחוּשָׁה; copper, hence, something made of that metal, i.e. coin, a fetter; figuratively, base (as compared with gold or silver).
H5178.kjv: brasen, brass, chain, copper, fetter (of brass), filthiness, steel.

H5179.definition: from נְחֹשֶׁת; copper; Nechushta, an Israelitess.

H5180.definition: from נְחֹשֶׁת; something made of copper, i.e. the copper serpent of the Desert.

H5181.definition: a primitive root; to sink, i.e. descend; causatively, to press or lead down.
H5181.kjv: be broken, (cause to) come down, enter, go down, press sore, settle, stick fast.

H5182.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָחַת; to descend; causatively, to bring away, deposit, depose.
H5182.kjv: carry, come down, depose, lay up, place.

H5183.definition: from נְחַת; also (intransitively; perhaps from נוּחַ); a descent, i.e. imposition, unfavorable (punishment) or favorable (food); restfulness.
H5183.kjv: lighting down, quiet(-ness), to rest, be set on.

H5184.definition: the same as נַחַת; quiet; Nachath, the name of an Edomite and of two Israelites.

H5186.definition: a primitive root; to stretch or spread out; by implication, to bend away (including moral deflection); used in a great variety of application.
H5186.kjv: [phrase] afternoon, apply, bow (down, -ing), carry aside, decline, deliver, extend, go down, be gone, incline, intend, lay, let down, offer, outstretched, overthrown, pervert, pitch, prolong, put away, shew, spread (out), stretch (forth, out), take (aside), turn (aside, away), wrest, cause to yield.

H5188.definition: from נָטַף; a pendant for the ears (especially of pearls).

H5189.definition: from נָטַשׁ; a tendril (as an offshoot).

H5190.definition: a primitive root; to lift; by implication, to impose.

H5193.definition: a primitive root; properly, to strike in, i.e. fix; specifically, to plant (literally or figuratively).

H5194.definition: from נָטַע; a plant; collectively, a plantation; abstractly, a planting.

H5195.definition: xlit nâṭîaʻ corrected to nâṭîyaʻ; from נָטַע; a plant.

H5196.definition: plural of נֶטַע; Netaim, a place in Palestine.

H5197.definition: a primitive root; to ooze, i.e. distil gradually; by implication, to fall in drops; figuratively, to speak by inspiration.

H5198.definition: from נָטַף; a drop; specifically, an aromatic gum (probably stacte).

H5199.definition: from נָטַף; distillation; Netophah, a place in Palestine.

H5200.definition: patronymic from נְטֹפָה; a Netophathite, or inhabitant of Netophah.

H5201.definition: a primitive root; to guard; figuratively, to cherish (anger).

H5203.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pound, i.e. smite; by implication (as if beating out, and thus expanding) to disperse; also, to thrust off, down, out or upon (inclusively, reject, let alone, permit, remit, etc.).
H5203.kjv: cast off, drawn, let fall, forsake, join (battle), leave (off), lie still, loose, spread (self) abroad, stretch out, suffer.

H5204.definition: a doubtful word; apparently from נָהָה; lamentation.

H5205.definition: from נוּד; motion (of the lips in speech).

H5206.definition: feminine of נִיד; removal, i.e. exile.

H5207.definition: or נִיחֹחַ; from נוּחַ; properly, restful, i.e. pleasant; abstractly, delight.

H5208.definition: (Aramaic) or נִיחֹחַ; (shorter) (Aramaic), corresponding to נִיחוֹחַ; pleasure.

H5210.definition: of foreign origin; Nineveh, the capital of Assyria.

H5212.definition: probably of foreign origin; Nisan, the first month of the Jewish sacred year.

H5214.definition: a root probably identical with that of נִיר, through the idea of the gleam of a fresh furrow; to till the soil.

H5215.definition: or נִר; from נִיר; properly, plowing, i.e. (concretely) freshly plowed land.

H5216.definition: or נִר; also נֵיר; or נֵר; or (feminine) נֵרָה; from a primitive root (see נִיר; נוּר) properly, meaning to glisten; a lamp (i.e. the burner) or light (literally or figuratively).

H5217.definition: a primitive root; to smite, i.e. drive away.

H5218.definition: or נָכָא; from נָכָא; smitten, i.e. (figuratively) afflicted.

H5219.definition: from נָכֵא; properly, a smiting, i.e. (concretely) an aromatic gum (perhaps styrax) (as powdered).

H5220.definition: from an unused root meaning to propagate; offspring.

H5221.definition: a primitive root; to strike (lightly or severely, literally or figuratively).
H5221.kjv: beat, cast forth, clap, give (wounds), [idiom] go forward, [idiom] indeed, kill, make (slaughter), murderer, punish, slaughter, slay(-er, -ing), smite(-r, -ing), strike, be stricken, (give) stripes, [idiom] surely, wound.

H5222.definition: from נָכָה; a smiter, i.e. (figuratively) traducer.

H5224.definition: probably of Egyptian origin; Neko, an Egyptian king.

H5225.definition: from כּוּן; prepared; Nakon, probably an Israelite.

H5226.definition: from an unused root meaning to be straightforward; properly, the fore part; used adverbially, opposite.

H5227.definition: from the same as נֵכַח; properly, the front part; used adverbially (especially with preposition), opposite, in front of, forward, in behalf of.

H5228.definition: from the same as נֵכַח; straightforward, i.e. (figuratively), equitable, correct, or (abstractly), integrity.

H5229.definition: feminine of נָכֹחַ; properly, straightforwardness, i.e. (figuratively) integrity, or (concretely) a truth.

H5230.definition: a primitive root; to defraud, i.e. act treacherously.

H5233.definition: from an unused root meaning to accumulate; treasure.

H5234.definition: a primitive root; properly, to scrutinize, i.e. look intently at; hence (with recognition implied), to acknowledge, be acquainted with, care for, respect, revere, or (with suspicion implied), to disregard, ignore, be strange toward, reject, resign, dissimulate (as if ignorant or disowning).
H5234.kjv: acknowledge, [idiom] could, deliver, discern, dissemble, estrange, feign self to be another, know, take knowledge (notice), perceive, regard, (have) respect, behave (make) self strange(-ly).

H5235.definition: or נֹכֶר; from נָכַר; something strange, i.e. unexpected calamity.

H5236.definition: ' from נָכַר; foreign, or (concretely) a foreigner, or (abstractly) heathendom.

H5237.definition: from נֶכֶר (second form); strange, in a variety of degrees and applications (foreign, non-relative, adulterous, different, wonderful).

H5238.definition: probably for נְכֹאת; spicery, i.e. (generally) valuables.

H5239.definition: apparently a primitive root; to complete.

H5241.definition: apparently for יְמוּאֵל; Nemuel, the name of two Israelites.

H5242.definition: from נְמוּאֵל; a Nemuelite, or descendant of Nemuel.

H5243.definition: a primitive root; to become clipped or (specifically) circumcised.

H5244.definition: feminine from נָמַל; an ant (probably from its almost bisected form).

H5246.definition: from an unused root meaning properly, to filtrate, i.e. be limpid (comp נִמְרָה and נִמְרִים); and thus to spot or stain as if by dripping; a leopard (from its stripes).

H5247.definition: from the same as נָמֵר; clear water; Nimrah, a place East of the Jordan.
H5247.kjv: Nimrah. See also בֵּית נִמְרָה, נִמְרִים.

H5248.definition: or נִמְרֹד; probably of foreign origin; Nimrod, a son of Cush.

H5249.definition: plural of a masculine corresponding to נִמְרָה; clear waters; Nimrim, a place East of the Jordan.

H5250.definition: probably from מָשָׁה; extricated; Nimshi, the (grand-) father of Jehu.

H5251.definition: from נָסַס; a flag; also a sail; by implication, a flagstaff; generally a signal; figuratively, a token.

H5252.definition: feminine participle passive of סָבַב; properly, an environment, i.e. circumstance or turn of affairs.

H5253.kjv: departing away, remove, take (hold), turn away.

H5254.definition: a primitive root; to test; by implication, to attempt.

H5255.definition: a primitive root; to tear away.

H5257.definition: from נָסַךְ; properly, something poured out, i.e. a libation; also a molten image; by implication, a prince (as anointed).

H5258.definition: a primitive root; to pour out, especially a libation, or to cast (metal); by analogy, to anoint aking.
H5258.kjv: cover, melt, offer, (cause to) pour (out), set (up).

H5259.definition: a primitive root (probably identical with נָסַךְ through the idea of fusion); to interweave, i.e. (figuratively) to overspread.

H5260.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָסַךְ; to pour out a libation.

H5262.definition: or נֵסֶךְ; from נָסַךְ; a libation; also a cast idol.

H5263.definition: a primitive root; to wane, i.e. be sick.

H5264.definition: a primitive root; to gleam from afar, i.e. to be conspicuous as a signal; or rather perhaps a denominative from נֵס (and identical with נָסַס, through the idea of a flag as fluttering in the wind); to raise a beacon.

H5265.definition: a primitive root; properly, to pull up, especially the tent-pins, i.e. start on ajourney.
H5265.kjv: cause to blow, bring, get, (make to) go (away, forth, forward, onward, out), (take) journey, march, remove, set aside (forward), [idiom] still, be on his (go their) way.

H5266.definition: a primitive root; to go up.

H5268.definition: lemma נְסִרֹךְ first vowel, corrected to נִסְרֹךְ; of foreign origin; Nisrok, a Babylonian idol.

H5269.definition: from נוּעַ; motion; Neah, a place in Palestine.

H5270.definition: from נוּעַ; movement; Noah, an Israelitess.

H5271.definition: or נָעֻר; and (feminine) נְעֻרָה; properly, passive participle from נַעַר as denominative; (only in plural collectively or emphatic form) youth, the state (juvenility) or the persons (young people).

H5272.definition: from נוּעַ and אֵל; moved of God; Neiel, a place in Palestine.

H5273.definition: from נָעֵם; delightful (objective or subjective, literal or figurative).

H5274.definition: a primitive root; also denominative from נַעַל; properly, to fasten up, i.e. with abar or cord; hence, to sandal, i.e. furnish with slippers.
H5274.kjv: bolt, inclose, lock, shoe, shut up.

H5275.definition: or (feminine) נַעֲלָה; from נָעַל; properly, a sandal tongue; by extension a sandal or slipper (sometimes as a symbol of occupancy, a refusal to marry, or of something valueless).

H5276.definition: a primitive root; to be agreeable (literally or figuratively).
H5276.kjv: pass in beauty, be delight, be pleasant, be sweet.

H5277.definition: from נָעֵם; pleasure; Naam, an Israelite.

H5278.definition: from נָעֵם; agreeableness, i.e. delight, suitableness, splendor or grace.

H5279.definition: feminine of נַעַם; pleasantness; Naamah, the name of an antediluvian woman, of an Ammonitess, and of a place in Palestine.

H5280.definition: patronymic from נַעֲמָן; a Naamanite, or descendant of Naaman (collectively).

H5281.definition: from נֹעַם; pleasant; Noomi, an Israelitess.

H5283.definition: the same as נַעֲמָן; Naaman, the name of an Israelite and of a Damascene.

H5284.definition: patrial from a place corresponding in name (but not identical) with נַעֲמָה; a Naamathite, or inhabitant of Naamah.

H5285.definition: from an unused root meaning to prick; probably a brier; by implication, a thicket of thorny bushes.

H5287.definition: a primitive root (probably identical with נָעַר, through the idea of the rustling of mane, which usually accompanies the lion's roar); to tumble about.
H5287.kjv: shake (off, out, self), overthrow, toss up and down.

H5288.definition: from נָעַר; (concretely) a boy (as active), from the age of infancy to adolescence; by implication, a servant; also (by interch. of sex), a girl (of similar latitude in age).
H5288.kjv: babe, boy, child, damsel (from the margin), lad, servant, young (man).

H5289.definition: from נָעַר in its derivative sense of tossing about; a wanderer.

H5291.definition: feminine of נַעַר; a girl (from infancy to adolescence).

H5292.definition: the same as נַעֲרָה; Naarah, the name of an Israelitess, and of a place in Palestine.

H5293.definition: from נַעַר; youthful; Naarai, an Israelite.

H5294.definition: from נַעַר and יָהּ; servant of Jah; Nearjah, the name of two Israelites.

H5295.definition: from נַעַר; juvenile; Naaran, a place in Palestine.

H5296.definition: from נָעַר; something shaken out, i.e. tow (as the refuse of flax).

H5297.definition: a variation of מֹף; Noph, the capital of Upper Egypt.

H5298.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to spring forth; a sprout; Nepheg, the name of two Israelites.

H5299.definition: from נוּף in the sense of lifting; a height; also a sieve.

H5301.definition: a primitive root; to puff, in various applications (literally, to inflate, blow hard, scatter, kindle, expire; figuratively, to disesteem).
H5301.kjv: blow, breath, give up, cause to lose (life), seething, snuff.

H5302.definition: from נָפַח; a gust; Nophach, a place in Moab.

H5303.definition: or נְפִל; from נָפַל; properly, a feller, i.e. a bully or tyrant.

H5304.definition: plural from an unused root meaning to scatter; expansions; Nephisim, a Temple-servant.

H5305.definition: from נָפַשׁ; refreshed; Naphish, a son of Ishmael, and his posterity.

H5306.definition: from an unused root meaning to glisten; shining; a gem, probably the garnet.

H5307.definition: a primitive root; to fall, in a great variety of applications (intransitive or causative, literal or figurative).
H5307.kjv: be accepted, cast (down, self, (lots), out), cease, die, divide (by lot), (let) fail, (cause to, let, make, ready to) fall (away, down, -en, -ing), fell(-ing), fugitive, have (inheritance), inferior, be judged (by mistake for פָּלַל), lay (along), (cause to) lie down, light (down), be ([idiom] hast) lost, lying, overthrow, overwhelm, perish, present(-ed, -ing), (make to) rot, slay, smite out, [idiom] surely, throw down.

H5309.definition: or נֵפֶל; from נָפַל; something fallen, i.e. an abortion.

H5310.definition: a primitive root; to dash to pieces, or scatter.
H5310.kjv: be beaten in sunder, break (in pieces), broken, dash (in pieces), cause to be discharged, dispersed, be overspread, scatter.

H5312.definition: (Aramaic) a primitive root; to issue; causatively, to bring out.

H5313.definition: (Aramaic) from נְפַק; an outgo, i.e. expense.

H5314.definition: a primitive root; to breathe; passively, to be breathed upon , i.e. (figuratively) refreshed (as if by a current of air).

H5315.definition: from נָפַשׁ; properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental).
H5315.kjv: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of) life ([idiom] in jeopardy), lust, man, me, mind, mortally, one, own, person, pleasure, (her-, him-, my-, thy-) self, them (your) -selves, [phrase] slay, soul, [phrase] tablet, they, thing, ([idiom] she) will, [idiom] would have it.

H5317.definition: from נוּף in the sense of shaking to pieces; a dripping i.e. of honey (from the comb).

H5318.definition: from פָּתַח; opened, i.e. a spring; Nephtoach, a place in Palestine.

H5319.definition: from פָּתַל; properly, wrestled; but used (in the plural) transitively, a struggle.

H5320.definition: plural of foreign origin,; Naphtuchim, an Egyptian tribe.

H5321.definition: from פָּתַל; my wrestling; Naphtali, a son of Jacob, with the tribe descended from him, and its territory.

H5322.definition: from נָצַץ; a flower (from its brilliancy); also a hawk (from it flashing speed).

H5323.definition: a primitive root; to go away.

H5324.definition: a primitive root; to station, in various applications (literally or figuratively).
H5324.kjv: appointed, deputy, erect, establish, [idiom] Huzzah (by mistake for a proper name), lay, officer, pillar, present, rear up, set (over, up), settle, sharpen, establish, (make to) stand(-ing, still, up, upright), best state.

H5325.definition: passive participle of נָצַב; fixed, i.e. a handle.

H5326.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to נָצַב; fixedness, i.e. firmness.

H5327.definition: a primitive root; properly, to go forth, i.e. (by implication) to be expelled, and (consequently) desolate; causatively, to lay waste; also (specifically), to quarrel.

H5329.definition: a primitive root;  also as denominative from נֶצַח; properly, to glitter from afar, i.e. to be eminent (as a superintendent, especially of the Temple services and its music); to be permanent.
H5329.kjv: excel, chief musician (singer), oversee(-r), set forward.

H5330.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָצַח; to become chief.

H5331.definition: or נֵצַח; from נָצַח; properly, a goal, i.e. the bright object at adistance travelled towards; hence (figuratively), splendor, or (subjectively) truthfulness, or (objectively) confidence; but usually (adverbially), continually (i.e. to the most distant point of view).
H5331.kjv: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

H5332.definition: probably identical with נֶצַח, through the idea of brilliancy of color; juice of the grape (as blood red).

H5333.definition: or נְצִב; from נָצַב; something stationary, i.e. a prefect, a military post, a statue.

H5334.definition: the same as נְצִיב; station; Netsib, a place in Palestine.

H5335.definition: from נָצַח; conspicuous; Netsiach, a Temple-servant.

H5336.definition: from נָצַר; properly, conservative; but used passively, delivered.

H5337.definition: a primitive root; to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense.
H5337.kjv: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

H5340.definition: a primitive root; to glare, i.e. be bright-colored.

H5341.definition: a primitive root; to guard, in a good sense (to protect, maintain, obey, etc.) or a bad one (to conceal, etc.).
H5341.kjv: besieged, hidden thing, keep(-er, -ing), monument, observe, preserve(-r), subtil, watcher(-man).

H5342.definition: from נָצַר in the sense of greenness as a striking color; a shoot; figuratively, a descendant.

H5343.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to נָקָה; clean.

H5344.definition: a primitive root; to puncture, literally (to perforate, with more or less violence) or figuratively (to specify, designate, libel).
H5344.kjv: appoint, blaspheme, bore, curse, express, with holes, name, pierce, strike through.

H5346.definition: the same as נֶקֶב; dell; Nekeb, a place in Palestine.

H5347.definition: from נָקַב; female (from the sexual form).

H5348.definition: from an unused root meaning to mark (by puncturing or branding); spotted.

H5349.definition: active participle from the same as נָקֹד; a spotter (of sheep or cattle), i.e. the owner or tender (who thus marks them).

H5350.definition: from the same as נָקֹד; a crumb (as broken to spots); also a biscuit (as pricked).

H5352.definition: a primitive root; to be (or make) clean (literally or figuratively); by implication (in an adverse sense) to be bare, i.e. extirpated.
H5352.kjv: acquit [idiom] at all, [idiom] altogether, be blameless, cleanse, (be) clear(-ing), cut off, be desolate, be free, be (hold) guiltless, be (hold) innocent, [idiom] by no means, be quit, be (leave) unpunished, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wholly.

H5353.definition: feminine of נָקֹד (in the figurative sense of marked); distinction; Nekoda, a Temple-servant.

H5355.definition: or נָקִיא; (Joel 4:19; Jonah [1:14), from נָקָה; innocent.
H5355.kjv: blameless, clean, clear, exempted, free, guiltless, innocent, quit.

H5356.definition: or נִקָּיֹן; from נָקָה; clearness (literally or figuratively).

H5357.definition: from an unused root meaning to bore; a cleft.

H5358.definition: a primitive root; to grudge, i.e. avenge or punish.
H5358.kjv: avenge(-r, self), punish, revenge (self), [idiom] surely, take vengeance.

H5360.definition: feminine of נָקָם; avengement, whether the act of the passion.

H5361.definition: a primitive root; to feel aversion.

H5362.definition: a primitive root; to strike with more or less violence (beat, fell, corrode); by implication (of attack) to knock together, i.e. surround or circulate.
H5362.kjv: compass (about, -ing), cut down, destroy, go round (about), inclose, round.

H5364.definition: from נָקַף; probably a rope (as encircling).

H5365.definition: a primitive root; to bore (penetrate, quarry).
H5365.kjv: dig, pick out, pierce, put (thrust) out.

H5367.definition: a primitive root; to entrap (with a noose), literally or figuratively.

H5368.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to נָקַשׁ; used in the sense of נָקַף; to knock.

H5369.definition: the same as נִיר; lamp; Ner, an Israelite.

H5370.definition: of foreign origin; Nergal, a Cuthite deity.

H5371.definition: from נֵרְגַּל and שַׁרְאֶצֶר; Nergal-Sharetser, the name of two Babylonians.

H5372.definition: from an unused root meaning to roll to pieces; a slanderer.

H5373.definition: of foreign origin; nard, an aromatic.

H5374.definition: or נֵרִיָּהוּ; from נִיר and יָהּ; light of Jah; Nerijah, an Israelite.

H5375.definition: or נָסָה; (Psalm 4:6 (אֲבַד)), a primitive root; to lift, in a great variety of applications, literal and figurative, absolute and relative.
H5375.kjv: accept, advance, arise, (able to, (armor), suffer to) bear(-er, up), bring (forth), burn, carry (away), cast, contain, desire, ease, exact, exalt (self), extol, fetch, forgive, furnish, further, give, go on, help, high, hold up, honorable ([phrase] man), lade, lay, lift (self) up, lofty, marry, magnify, [idiom] needs, obtain, pardon, raise (up), receive, regard, respect, set (up), spare, stir up, [phrase] swear, take (away, up), [idiom] utterly, wear, yield.

H5377.definition: a primitive root; to lead astray, i.e. (mentally) to delude, or (morally) to seduce.

H5378.definition: a primitive root (perhaps identical with נָשָׁא, through the idea of imposition); to lend on interest; by implication, to dun fordebt.

H5379.definition: passive participle feminine of נָשָׂא; something taken, i.e. a present.

H5380.definition: a primitive root; to blow; by implication, to disperse.

H5381.definition: a primitive root; to reach (literally or figuratively).
H5381.kjv: ability, be able, attain (unto), (be able to, can) get, lay at, put, reach, remove, wax rich, [idiom] surely, (over-) take (hold of, on, upon).

H5382.definition: a primitive root; to forget; figuratively, to neglect; causatively, to remit, remove.

H5383.definition: a primitive root (rather identical with נָשָׁה, in the sense of נָשָׁא); to lend or (by reciprocity) borrow on security or interest.
H5383.kjv: creditor, exact, extortioner, lend, usurer, lend on (taker on) usury.

H5384.definition: from נָשָׁה, in the sense of failure; rheumatic or crippled (from the incident to Jacob).

H5385.definition: or rather, נְשֻׂאָה; feminine. passive participle of נָשָׂא; something borne, i.e. a load.

H5387.definition: or נָשִׂא; from נָשָׂא; properly, an exalted one, i.e. a king or sheik; also a rising mist.
H5387.kjv: captain, chief, cloud, governor, prince, ruler, vapour.

H5391.definition: a primitive root; to strike with a sting (as a serpent); figuratively, to oppress with interest on a loan.

H5392.definition: from נָשַׁךְ; interest on a debt.

H5394.definition: a primitive root; to pluck off, i.e. divest, eject or drop.
H5394.kjv: cast (out), drive, loose, put off (out), slip.

H5395.definition: a primitive root; properly, to blow away, i.e. destroy.

H5397.definition: from נָשַׁם; a puff, i.e. wind, angry or vital breath, divine inspiration, intellect. or (concretely) an animal.

H5398.definition: a primitive root; to breeze, i.e. blow up fresh (as the wind).

H5399.definition: from נָשַׁף; properly, a breeze, i.e. (by implication) dusk (when the evening breeze prevails).
H5399.kjv: dark, dawning of the day (morning), night, twilight.

H5400.definition: a primitive root; to catch fire.

H5401.definition: a primitive root (identical with נָשַׂק, through the idea of fastening up; compare חָזַק, חָשַׁק); to kiss, literally or figuratively (touch); also (as a mode of attachment), to equip with weapons.

H5402.definition: or נֵשֶׁק; from נָשַׁק; military equipment, i.e. (collectively) arms (offensive or defensive), or (concretely) an arsenal.
H5402.kjv: armed men, armour(-y), battle, harness, weapon.

H5404.definition: from an unused root meaning to lacerate; the eagle (or other large bird of prey).

H5405.definition: a primitive root; properly, to eliminate, i.e. (intransitively) to dry up.

H5406.definition: probably of Persian origin; an epistle.

H5408.kjv: cut (in pieces), divide, hew in pieces.

H5410.definition: or (feminine) נְתִיבָה; or נְתִבָה; (Jeremiah 6:16), from an unused root meaning to tramp; a (beaten) track.

H5411.definition: or נָתוּן (Ezra 8:17), (the proper form as passive participle), from נָתַן; one given, i.e. (in the plural only); the Nethinim, or Temple-servants (as given to that duty).

H5413.definition: a primitive root; to flow forth (literally or figuratively); by implication, to liquify.

H5414.definition: a primitive root; to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.).
H5414.kjv: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver (up), direct, distribute, do, [idiom] doubtless, [idiom] without fail, fasten, frame, [idiom] get, give (forth, over, up), grant, hang (up), [idiom] have, [idiom] indeed, lay (unto charge, up), (give) leave, lend, let (out), [phrase] lie, lift up, make, [phrase] O that, occupy, offer, ordain, pay, perform, place, pour, print, [idiom] pull, put (forth), recompense, render, requite, restore, send (out), set (forth), shew, shoot forth (up), [phrase] sing, [phrase] slander, strike, (sub-) mit, suffer, [idiom] surely, [idiom] take, thrust, trade, turn, utter, [phrase] weep, [phrase] willingly, [phrase] withdraw, [phrase] would (to) God, yield.

H5416.definition: from נָתַן; given; Nathan, the name of five Israelites.

H5417.definition: xlit Nᵉthanêʼl corrected to Nᵉthanʼêl; from נָתַן and אֵל; given of God; Nethanel, the name of ten Israelites.

H5418.definition: or נְתַנְיָהוּ; from נָתַן and יָהּ; given of Jah; Nethanjah, the name of four Israelites.

H5419.definition: from נָתַן and מֶלֶךְ; given of (the) king; Nethan-Melek, an Israelite.

H5420.definition: a primitive root; to tear up.

H5422.definition: a primitive root; to tear down.
H5422.kjv: beat down, break down (out), cast down, destroy, overthrow, pull down, throw down.

H5423.definition: a primitive root; to tear off.
H5423.kjv: break (off), burst, draw (away), lift up, pluck (away, off), pull (out), root out.

H5425.definition: a primitive root; to jump, i.e. be violently agitated; causatively, to terrify, shake off, untie.
H5425.kjv: drive asunder, leap, (let) loose, [idiom] make, move, undo.

H5427.definition: from נָתַר; mineral potash (so called from effervescing with acid).

H5428.definition: a primitive root; to tear away.
H5428.kjv: destroy, forsake, pluck (out, up, by the roots), pull up, root out (up), [idiom] utterly. s

H5429.definition: from an unused root meaning to define; a seah, or certain measure (as determinative) forgrain.

H5430.definition: from סָאַן; perhaps a military boot (as aprotection from mud.

H5431.definition: a primitive root; to be miry; used only as denominative from סְאוֹן; to shoe, i.e. (active participle) a soldier shod.

H5432.definition: lemma סַאסְאָה missing dagesh, corrected to סַאסְּאָה; for סְאָה; measurement, i.e. moderation.

H5433.definition: a primitive root; to quaff to satiety, i.e. become tipsy.

H5434.definition: of foreign origin; Seba, a son of Cush, and the country settled by him.

H5435.definition: from סָבָא; potation, concretely (wine), or abstractly (carousal).

H5436.definition: patrial from סְבָא; a Sebaite, or inhabitant of Seba.

H5437.definition: a primitive root; to revolve, surround, or border; used in various applications, literally and figuratively.
H5437.kjv: bring, cast, fetch, lead, make, walk, [idiom] whirl, [idiom] round about, be about on every side, apply, avoid, beset (about), besiege, bring again, carry (about), change, cause to come about, [idiom] circuit, (fetch a) compass (about, round), drive, environ, [idiom] on every side, beset (close, come, compass, go, stand) round about, inclose, remove, return, set, sit down, turn (self) (about, aside, away, back).

H5439.definition: or (feminine) סְבִיבָה; from סָבַב; (as noun) a circle, neighbour, or environs; but chiefly (as adverb, with or without preposition) around.
H5439.kjv: (place, round) about, circuit, compass, on every side.

H5443.definition: (Aramaic) or שַׂבְּכָא; (Aramaic), from a root corresponding to סָבַךְ; a lyre.

H5444.definition: from סָבַךְ; copse-like; Sibbecai, an Israelite.

H5445.definition: a primitive root; to carry (literally or figuratively), or (reflexively) be burdensome; specifically, to be gravid.
H5445.kjv: bear, be a burden, carry, strong to labour.

H5447.definition: from סָבַל; a load (literally or figuratively).

H5448.definition: (only in the form סֻבָּל; from סָבַל; a load (figuratively).

H5451.definition: for שִׁבֹּל; an ear of grain.

H5452.definition: (Aramaic) a primitive root; to bear in mind, i.e. hope.

H5453.definition: dual from a root corresponding to סְבַר; double hope; Sibrajim, a place in Syria.

H5454.definition: or סַבְתָּה; probably of foreign derivation; Sabta or Sabtah, the name of a son of Cush, and the country occupied by his posterity.

H5455.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Sabteca, the name of a son of Cush, and the region settled by him.

H5456.definition: a primitive root; to prostrate oneself (in homage).

H5458.definition: from סָגַר; properly, shut up, i.e. the breast (as enclosing the heart); also gold (as generally shut up safely).

H5459.definition: feminine passive participle of an unused root meaning to shut up; wealth (as closely shut up).

H5461.definition: from an unused root meaning to superintend; a prefect of a province.

H5462.definition: a primitive root; to shut up; figuratively, to surrender.
H5462.kjv: close up, deliver (up), give over (up), inclose, [idiom] pure, repair, shut (in, self, out, up, up together), stop, [idiom] straitly.

H5464.definition: probably from סָגַר in the sense of sweeping away; a pouring rain.

H5465.definition: from an unused root meaning to estop; the stocks.

H5466.definition: from an unused root meaning to envelop; a wrapper, i.e. shirt.

H5467.definition: from an unused root meaning to scorch; burnt (i.e. volcanic or bituminous) district; Sedom, a place near the Dead Sea.

H5468.definition: from an unused root meaning to arrange; order.

H5469.definition: from an unused root meaning to be round; roundness.

H5470.definition: from the same as סַהַר; a dungeon (as surrounded by walls).

H5471.definition: of foreign derivation; So, an Egyptian king.

H5472.definition: a primitive root; properly, to flinch, i.e. (by implication) to go back, literally (to retreat) or figuratively (to apostatize).
H5472.kjv: backslider, drive, go back, turn (away, back).

H5473.definition: a primitive root (probably rather identical with סוּג through the idea of shrinking from a hedge; compare שׂוּג); to hem in, i.e. bind.

H5474.definition: from סָגַר; an inclosure, i.e. cage (for an animal).

H5475.definition: from יָסַד; a session, i.e. company of persons (in close deliberation); by implication, intimacy, consultation, a secret.

H5476.definition: from סוֹד; a confidant; Sodi, an Israelite.

H5477.definition: from an unused root meaning to wipe away; sweeping; Suach, an Israelite.

H5478.definition: from the same as סוּחַ; something swept away, i.e. filth.

H5479.definition: from שׂוּט; roving; Sotai, one of the Nethinim.

H5480.definition: a primitive root; properly, to smear over (with oil), i.e. anoint.

H5481.definition: (Aramaic) or סוּמְפֹּנְיָה; (Aramaic), or סִיפֹנְיָא; (Daniel 3:10) (Aramaic), of Greek origin; a bagpipe (with a double pipe).

H5482.definition: (rather to be written סְוֵנָה; for סְוֵן; i.e to Seven); of Egyptian derivation; Seven, a place in Upper Egypt.

H5483.definition: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy); a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight).

H5485.definition: from סוּס; horse-like; Susi, an Israelite.

H5486.definition: a primitive root; to snatch away, i.e. terminate.
H5486.kjv: consume, have an end, perish, [idiom] be utterly.

H5487.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to סוּף; to come to an end.

H5488.definition: probably of Egyptian origin; a reed, especially the papyrus.

H5489.definition: for סוּף (by ellipsis of יָם); the Reed (Sea).

H5492.kjv: Red Sea, storm, tempest, whirlwind, Red sea.

H5493.definition: or שׂוּר; (Hosea 9:12), a primitive root; to turn off (literal or figurative).
H5493.kjv: be(-head), bring, call back, decline, depart, eschew, get (you), go (aside), [idiom] grievous, lay away (by), leave undone, be past, pluck away, put (away, down), rebel, remove (to and fro), revolt, [idiom] be sour, take (away, off), turn (aside, away, in), withdraw, be without.

H5494.definition: probably passive participle of סוּר; turned off, i.e. deteriorated.

H5495.definition: the same as סוּר; Sur, a gate of the temple.

H5496.definition: perhaps denominative from שַׁיִת; properly, to prick, i.e. (figuratively) stimulate; by implication, to seduce.
H5496.kjv: entice, move, persuade, provoke, remove, set on, stir up, take away.

H5497.definition: probably from the same root as מַסְוֶה; covering, i.e. clothing.

H5498.definition: a primitive root; to trail along.

H5500.definition: a primitive root; to sweep away.

H5502.definition: a primitive root; to scrape off.

H5503.definition: a primitive root; to travel round (specifically as a pedlar); intensively, to palpitate.
H5503.kjv: go about, merchant(-man), occupy with, pant, trade, traffick.

H5505.definition: from סָחַר; an emporium; abstractly, profit (from trade).

H5507.definition: properly, active participle feminine of סָחַר; something surrounding the person, i.e. a shield.

H5508.definition: similar to סֹחֵרָה; probably a (black) tile (or tessara) forlaying borders with.

H5509.definition: or סוּג; (Ezekiel 22:18), from סוּג in the sense of refuse; scoria.

H5510.definition: probably of Persian origin; Sivan, the third Hebrew month.

H5511.definition: or סִיחֹן; from the same as סוּחַ; tempestuous; Sichon, an Amoritish king.

H5512.definition: of uncertain derivation; Sin the name of an Egyptian town and (probably) desert adjoining.

H5513.definition: from an otherwise unknown name of a man; a Sinite, or descendant of one of the sons of Canaan.

H5514.definition: of uncertain derivation; Sinai, mountain of Arabia.

H5515.definition: plural of an otherwise unknown name; Sinim, a distant Oriental region.

H5516.definition: of uncertain derivation; Sisera, the name of a Canaanitish king and of one of the Nethinim.

H5517.definition: or סִיעֲהָא; from an unused root meaning to converse; congregation; Sia or Siaha, one of the Nethinim.

H5518.definition: or (feminine) סִירָה; or סִרָה; (Jeremiah 52:18), from a primitive root meaning to boil up; a pot; also a thorn (as springing up rapidly); by implication, a hook.

H5519.definition: from סָכַךְ; properly, a thicket of men, i.e. a crowd.

H5520.definition: from סָכַךְ; a hut (as of entwined boughs); also a lair.

H5521.definition: feminine of סֹךְ; a hut or lair.
H5521.kjv: booth, cottage, covert, pavilion, tabernacle, tent.

H5523.definition: or סֻכֹּת; plural of סֻכָּה; booths; Succoth, the name of a place in Egypt and of three in Palestine.

H5524.definition: from סֻכּוֹת and the (irregular) plural of בַּת; booths of (the) daughters; brothels, i.e. idoalatrous tents forimpure purpose.

H5525.definition: patrial from an unknown name (perhaps סֹךְ); a Sukkite, or inhabitant of some place near Egypt (i.e. hut-dwellers).

H5526.definition: or שָׂכַךְ; (Exodus 33:22), a primitive root; properly, to entwine as ascreen; by implication, to fence in, cover over, (figuratively) protect.
H5526.kjv: cover, defence, defend, hedge in, join together, set, shut up.

H5527.definition: from סָכַךְ; inclosure; Secacah, a place in Palestine.

H5528.kjv: do (make, play the, turn into) fool(-ish, -ishly, -ishness).

H5529.definition: from סָכַל; silliness; concretely and collectively, dolts.

H5532.definition: a primitive root; to be familiar with; by implication, to minister to, be serviceable to, be customary.
H5532.kjv: acquaint (self), be advantage, [idiom] ever, (be, (un-)) profit(-able), treasurer, be wont.

H5533.definition: probably a denominative from שַׂכִּין; properly, to cut, i.e. damage; also to grow (causatively, make) poor.

H5534.definition: a primitive root; to shut up; by implication, to surrender.
H5534.kjv: stop, give over. See also סָגַר, שָׂכַר.

H5535.definition: a primitive root to be silent; by implication, to observe quietly.

H5536.definition: from סָלַל; properly, a willow twig (as pendulous), i.e. an osier; but only as woven into abasket.

H5537.definition: a primitive root; to suspend in a balance, i.e. weigh.

H5538.definition: from סָלַל; an embankment; Silla, a place in Jerusalem.

H5539.definition: a primitive root; probably to leap (with joy), i.e. exult.

H5540.definition: from סָלַד; exultation; Seled, an Israelite.

H5541.definition: a primitive root; to hang up, i.e. weigh, or (figuratively) contemn.

H5542.definition: from סָלָה; suspension (of music), i.e. pause.

H5543.definition: or סַלּוּא; or סָלוּא; or סַלַּי; from סָלָה; weighed; Sallu or Sallai, the name of two Israelites.

H5544.definition: or סַלּוֹן; from סָלָה; a prickle (as if pendulous).

H5548.definition: from an unused root. meaning to walk; walking; Salcah, a place East of the Jordan.

H5549.definition: a primitive root; to mound up (especially a turnpike); figurative, to exalt; reflexively, to oppose (as by a dam).
H5549.kjv: cast up, exalt (self), extol, make plain, raise up.

H5550.definition: or סוֹלְלָה; active participle feminine of סָלַל, but used passively; a military mound, i.e. rampart of besiegers.

H5553.definition: from an unused root meaning to be lofty; a craggy rock, literally or figuratively (a fortress).

H5554.definition: the same as סֶלַע; Sela, the rock-city of Idumaea.

H5555.definition: from סֶלַע and the plural of מַחֲלֹקֶת with the article interposed; rock of the divisions; Sela-ham-Machlekoth, a place in Palestine.

H5556.definition: apparently from the same as סֶלַע in the sense of crushing as with a rock, i.e. consuming; a kind of locust (from its destructiveness).

H5557.definition: a primitive root; properly, to wrench, i.e. (figuratively) to subvert.

H5560.definition: from an unused root meaning to strip; flour (as chipped off).

H5561.definition: from an unused root meaning to smell sweet; an aroma.

H5562.definition: of foreign origin; Samgar-Nebo, a Babylonian general.

H5563.definition: of uncertain derivation; a vine blossom; used also adverbially, abloom.

H5564.definition: a primitive root; to prop (literally or figuratively); reflexively, to lean upon or take hold of (in a favorable or unfavorable sense).
H5564.kjv: bear up, establish, (up-) hold, lay, lean, lie hard, put, rest self, set self, stand fast, stay (self), sustain.

H5565.definition: from סָמַךְ and יָהּ; supported of Jah; Semakjah, an Israelite.

H5566.definition: or סֵמֶל; from an unused root meaning to resemble; a likeness.

H5568.definition: a primitive root; to be erect, i.e. bristle as hair.

H5570.definition: from an unused root meaning to prick; thorny; Senaah, a place in Palestine.

H5571.definition: of foreign origin; Sanballat, a Persian satrap of Samaria.

H5572.definition: from an unused root meaning to prick; a bramble.

H5573.definition: the same as סְנֶה; thorn; Seneh, a crag in Palestine.

H5574.definition: or סְנֻאָה from the same as סְנָאָה; pointed; (used with the article as a proper name) Senuah, the name of two Israelites.

H5576.definition: of foreign origin; Sancherib, an Assyrian king.

H5577.definition: from an unused root meaning to be pointed; a twig (as tapering).

H5578.definition: feminine of a form of סַנְסִן; a bough; Sansannah, a place in Palestine.

H5580.definition: from the same as סוּס; a moth (from the agility of the fly).

H5581.definition: of uncertain derivation; Sismai, an Israelite.

H5582.definition: a primitive root; to suport (mostly figurative).
H5582.kjv: comfort, establish, hold up, refresh self, strengthen, be upholden.

H5585.definition: from סָעַף; a fissure (of rocks); also a bough (as subdivided).

H5586.definition: a primitive root; properly, to divide up; but used only as denominative from סָעִיף,; to disbranch (a tree).

H5587.definition: or שָׂעִף; from סָעַף; divided (in mind), i.e. (abstractly) a sentiment.

H5588.definition: from סָעַף; divided (in mind), i.e. (concretely) a skeptic.

H5590.definition: a primitive root; to rush upon; by implication, to toss (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative).
H5590.kjv: be (toss with) tempest(-uous), be sore, troubled, come out as a (drive with the, scatter with a) whirlwind.

H5591.definition: or (feminine) סְעָרָה; from סָעַר; a hurricane.

H5592.definition: from סָפַף, in its original sense of containing; a vestibule (as a limit); also a dish (for holding blood or wine).
H5592.kjv: bason, bowl, cup, door (post), gate, post, threshold.

H5593.definition: the same as סַף; Saph, a Philistine.

H5594.definition: a primitive root; properly, to tear the hair and beat the breasts (as Orientals do in grief); generally to lament; by implication, to wail.

H5595.definition: a primitive root; properly, to scrape (literally, to shave; but usually figuratively) together (i.e. to accumulate or increase) or away (i.e. to scatter, remove, or ruin; intransitively, to perish).
H5595.kjv: add, augment, consume, destroy, heap, join, perish, put.

H5596.definition: or שָׂפַח; (Isaiah 3:17), a primitive root; properly, to scrape out, but in certain peculiar senses (of removal or association).
H5596.kjv: abiding, gather together, cleave, smite with the scab.

H5597.definition: from סָפַח; the mange (as making the hair fall off).

H5598.definition: from סַף; bason-like; Sippai, a Philistine.

H5599.definition: from סָפַח; something (spontaneously) falling off, i.e. a self-sown crop; figuratively, a freshet.
H5599.kjv: (such) things as (which) grow (of themselves), which groweth of its own accord (itself).

H5600.definition: from סָפַן; a (sea-going) vessel (as ceiled with a deck).

H5601.definition: from סָפַר; a gem (perhaps used for scratching other substances), probably the sapphire.

H5602.definition: from an unused root meaning to depress; a basin (as deepened out).

H5603.definition: a primitive root; to hide by covering; specifically, to roof (passive participle as noun, a roof) or wainscot; figuratively, to reserve.

H5605.definition: a primitive root; properly, to snatch away, i.e. terminate; but used only as denominative from סַף (in the sense of a vestibule),; to wait at the threshold.

H5606.definition: or שָׂפַק; (1 Kings 20:10; Job 27:23; Isaiah 2:6), a primitive root; to clap the hands (in token of compact, derision, grief, indignation, or punishment); by implication of satisfaction, to be enough; by implication of excess, to vomit.

H5607.definition: or שֶׂפֶק; (Job 20:22; Job 36:18), from סָפַק; chastisement; also satiety.

H5608.definition: a primitive root; properly, to score with a mark as a tally or record, i.e. (by implication) to inscribe, and also to enumerate; intensively, to recount, i.e. celebrate; commune, (ac-) count.
H5608.kjv: declare, number, [phrase] penknife, reckon, scribe, shew forth, speak, talk, tell (out), writer.

H5609.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to סָפַר; a book.

H5611.definition: the same as סְפָר; Sephar, a place in Arabia.

H5612.definition: or (feminine) סִפְרָה; (Psalm 56:8 (אֲבֵדָה)), from סָפַר; properly, writing (the art or a document); by implication, a book.
H5612.kjv: bill, book, evidence, [idiom] learn(-ed) (-ing), letter, register, scroll.

H5613.definition: (Aramaic) from the same as סְפַר; a scribe (secular or sacred).

H5614.definition: of foreign derivation; Sepharad, a region of Assyria.

H5616.definition: patrial from סְפַרְוַיִם; a Sepharvite or inhabitant of Sepharvain.

H5618.definition: feminine active participle of סָפַר; a scribe (properly, female); Sophereth, a temple servant.

H5619.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be weighty; but used only in the sense of lapidation or its contrary (as if a delapidation).

H5621.definition: from an unused root meaning to sting; a thistle.

H5623.definition: of foreign derivation; Sargon, an Assyrian king.

H5624.definition: from a primitive root meaning to tremble; trembling; Sered, an Israelite.

H5625.definition: patron from סֶרֶד; a Seredite (collectively) or descendants of Sered.

H5626.definition: from סוּר; departure; Sirah, a cistern so-called.

H5627.definition: from סוּר; apostasy, crime; figuratively, remission.
H5627.kjv: [idiom] continual, rebellion, revolt(-ed), turn away, wrong.

H5628.definition: a primitive root; to extend (even to excess).
H5628.kjv: exceeding, hand, spread, stretch self, banish.

H5630.definition: for שִׁרְיוֹן; a coat of mail.

H5631.definition: or סָרִס; from an unused root meaning to castrate; a eunuch; by implication, valet (especially of the female apartments), and thus, a minister of state.

H5633.definition: from an unused root of uncertain meaning; an axle; figuratively, a peer.

H5635.definition: a primitive root; to cremate, i.e. to be (near) of kin (such being privileged to kindle the pyre).

H5636.definition: from סָרַף; a nettle (as stinging like a burn).

H5637.definition: a primitive root; to turn away, i.e. (morally) be refractory.
H5637.kjv: [idiom] away, backsliding, rebellious, revolter(-ing), slide back, stubborn, withdrew.

H5638.definition: from an unused root meaning to hide; winter (as the dark season).

H5639.definition: from סָתַר; hidden; Sethur, an Israelite.

H5640.definition: or שָׂתַם; (Numbers 24:15), a primitive root; to stop up; by implication, to repair; figuratively, to keep secret.
H5640.kjv: closed up, hidden, secret, shut out (up), stop.

H5641.definition: a primitive root; to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively.
H5641.kjv: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

H5642.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to סָתַר; to conceal; figuratively, to demolish.

H5643.definition: or (feminine) סִתְרָה; (Deuteronomy [32:38), from סָתַר; a cover (in a good or a bad, a literal or a figurative sense).
H5643.kjv: backbiting, covering, covert, [idiom] disguise(-th), hiding place, privily, protection, secret(-ly, place).

H5644.definition: from סֵתֶר; protective; Sithri, an Israelite,.

H5645.definition: (masculine and feminine); from עוּב; properly, an envelope, i.e. darkness (or density, 2 Chronicles 4:17); specifically, a (scud) cloud; also a copse.
H5645.kjv: clay, (thick) cloud, [idiom] thick, thicket. Compare עֲבִי.

H5646.definition: or עֹב; from an unused root meaning to cover; properly, equivalent to עָב; but used only as an architectural term,; an architrave (as shading the pillars).

H5647.definition: a primitive root; to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc..
H5647.kjv: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, self), (be, become) servant(-s), do (use) service, till(-er), transgress (from margin), (set a) work, be wrought, worshipper,

H5648.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to עָבַד; to do, make, prepare, keep, etc..
H5648.kjv: [idiom] cut, do, execute, go on, make, move, work.

H5651.definition: the same as עֶבֶד; Ebed, the name of two Israelites.

H5653.definition: from עָבַד; work; Abda, the name of two Israelites.

H5654.definition: from the active participle of עָבַד and אֱדֹם; worker of Edom; Obed-Edom, the name of five Israelites.

H5655.definition: from עָבַד and אֵל; serving God; Abdeel, an Israelite.

H5656.definition: or עֲבוֹדָה; from עָבַד; work of any kind.
H5656.kjv: act, bondage, [phrase] bondservant, effect, labour, ministering(-try), office, service(-ile, -itude), tillage, use, work, [idiom] wrought.

H5657.definition: passive participle of עָבַד; something wrought, i.e. (concretely) service.

H5658.definition: from עָבַד; servitude; Abdon, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites.

H5660.definition: from עָבַד; serviceable; Abdi, the name of two Israelites.

H5661.definition: from עֶבֶד and אֵל; servant of God; Abdiel, an Israelite.

H5662.definition: or עֹבַדְיָהוּ; active participle of עָבַד and יָהּ; serving Jah; Obadjah, the name of thirteen Israelites.

H5663.definition: from עֶבֶד and מֶלֶךְ; servant of a king; Ebed-Melek, a eunuch of Zedekeah.

H5664.definition: the same as עֲבֵד נְגוֹא; Abed-Nego, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions.

H5665.definition: (Aramaic) of foreign origin; Abed-Nego, the name of Azariah.

H5666.definition: a primitive root; to be dense.

H5667.definition: or עֲבֹט; from עָבַט; a pawn.

H5668.definition: or עָבֻר; passive participle of עָבַר; properly, crossed, i.e. (abstractly) transit; used only adverbially, on account of, in order that.
H5668.kjv: because of, for (...'s sake), (intent) that, to.

H5669.definition: the same as עָבוּר; passed, i.e. kept over; used only of stored grain.

H5670.definition: a primitive root; to pawn; causatively, to lend (on security); figuratively, to entangle.
H5670.kjv: borrow, break (ranks), fetch (a pledge), lend, [idiom] surely.

H5671.definition: from עָבַט; something pledged, i.e. (collectively) pawned goods.

H5672.definition: or עֳבִי]; from עָבָה; density, i.e. depth or width.

H5674.definition: a primitive root; to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation).
H5674.kjv: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, gender, get over, (make) go (away, beyond, by, forth, his way, in, on, over, through), have away (more), lay, meddle, overrun, make partition, (cause to, give, make to, over) pass(-age, along, away, beyond, by, -enger, on, out, over, through), (cause to, make) [phrase] proclaim(-amation), perish, provoke to anger, put away, rage, [phrase] raiser of taxes, remove, send over, set apart, [phrase] shave, cause to (make) sound, [idiom] speedily, [idiom] sweet smelling, take (away), (make to) transgress(-or), translate, turn away, (way-) faring man, be wrath.

H5676.definition: from עָבַר; properly, a region across; but used only adverbially (with or without a preposition) on the opposite side (especially of the Jordan; ususally meaning the east).
H5676.kjv: [idiom] against, beyond, by, [idiom] from, over, passage, quarter, (other, this) side, straight.

H5677.definition: the same as עֵבֶר; Eber, the name of two patriarchs and four Israelites.

H5678.definition: feminine of עֵבֶר; an outburst of passion.

H5680.definition: patronymic from עֵבֵר; an Eberite (i.e. Hebrew) or descendant of Eber.

H5681.definition: the same as עִבְרִי; Ibri, an Israelite.

H5682.definition: xlit ʻĂbârîm corrected to ʻĂbârîym; plural of עֵבֶר; regions beyond; Abarim, a place in Palestine.

H5683.definition: from עֵבֶר; transitional; Ebron, a place in Palestine.
