H7329.definition: a primitive root; to emaciate, i.e. make (become) thin (literally or figuratively).

H7331.definition: from רָזַן; prince; Rezon, a Syrian.

H7335.definition: a primitive root; to twinkle the eye (in mockery).

H7336.definition: a primitive root; probably to be heavy, i.e. (figuratively) honorable.

H7337.definition: a primitive root; to broaden (intransitive or transitive, literal or figurative).
H7337.kjv: be an en-(make) large(-ing), make room, make (open) wide.

H7339.definition: or רְחוֹב; from רָחַב; a width, i.e. (concretely) avenue or area.
H7339.kjv: broad place (way), street. See also בֵּית רְחוֹב.

H7340.definition: or רְחוֹב; the same as רְחֹב; Rechob, the name of a place in Syria, also of a Syrian and an Israelite.

H7342.definition: from רָחַב; roomy, in any (or every) direction, literally or figuratively.
H7342.kjv: broad, large, at liberty, proud, wide.

H7343.definition: the same as רָחָב; proud; Rachab, a Canaanitess.

H7344.definition: or רְחֹבֹת; plural of רְחֹב; streets; Rechoboth, a place in Assyria and one in Palestine.

H7345.definition: or רְחַבְיָהוּ; from רָחַב and יָהּ; Jah has enlarged; Rechabjah, an Israelite.

H7346.definition: from רָחַב and עַם; a people has enlarged; Rechabam, an Israelite king.

H7347.definition: from an unused root meaning to pulverize; a mill-stone.

H7348.definition: a form of רַחוּם; Rechum, the name of a Persian and of three Israelites.

H7350.definition: or רָחֹק; from רָחַק; remote, literally or figuratively, of place or time; specifically, precious; often used adverbially (with preposition).
H7350.kjv: (a-) far (abroad, off), long ago, of old, space, great while to come.

H7351.definition: from the same as רַהַט; a panel (as resembling a trough).

H7353.definition: from an unused root meaning to journey; a ewe (the females being the predominant element of a flock) (as a good traveller).

H7354.definition: the same as רָחֵל; Rachel, a wife of Jacob.

H7355.definition: a primitive root; to fondle; by implication, to love, especially to compassionate.
H7355.kjv: have compassion (on, upon), love, (find, have, obtain, shew) mercy(-iful, on, upon), (have) pity, Ruhamah, [idiom] surely.

H7356.definition: from רָחַם; compassion (in the plural); by extension, the womb (as cherishing the fetus); by implication, a maiden.
H7356.kjv: bowels, compassion, damsel, tender love, (great, tender) mercy, pity, womb.

H7357.definition: the same as רַחַם; pity; Racham, an Israelite.

H7360.definition: or (feminine) רָחָמָה; from רָחַם; a kind of vulture (supposed to be tender towards its young).

H7363.definition: a primitive root; to brood; by implication, to be relaxed.

H7364.definition: a primitive root; to lave (the whole or a part of a thing).

H7365.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to רָחַץ (probably through the accessory idea of ministering as a servant at the bath); to attend upon.

H7367.definition: feminine of רַחַץ; a bathing place.

H7368.definition: a primitive root; to widen (in any direction), i.e. (intransitively) recede or (transitively) remove (literally or figuratively, of place or relation).
H7368.kjv: (a-, be, cast, drive, get, go, keep (self), put, remove, be too, (wander), withdraw) far (away, off), loose, [idiom] refrain, very, (be) a good way (off).

H7371.definition: from רוּחַ; a winnowing-fork (as blowing the chaff away).

H7372.definition: a primitive root; to be moist.

H7374.definition: from an unused root meaning to tremble; terror.

H7375.definition: xlit ruwṭăphash corrected to ruṭăphash; a root compounded from רָטֹב and טָפַשׁ; to be rejuvenated.

H7376.definition: a primitive root; to dash down.

H7377.definition: from רָוָה; irrigation, i.e. a shower.

H7378.definition: or רוּב; a primitive root; properly, to toss, i.e. grapple; mostly figuratively, to wrangle, i.e. hold a controversy; (by implication) to defend.
H7378.kjv: adversary, chide, complain, contend, debate, [idiom] ever, [idiom] lay wait, plead, rebuke, strive, [idiom] thoroughly.

H7379.definition: or רִב; from רִיב; a contest (personal or legal).
H7379.kjv: [phrase] adversary, cause, chiding, contend(-tion), controversy, multitude (from the margin), pleading, strife, strive(-ing), suit.

H7380.definition: from רִיב; contentious; Ribai, an Israelite.

H7383.definition: or רִפָה; from רוּף; (only plural), grits (as pounded).

H7384.definition: or (probably by orthographical error) דִּיפַת; of foreign origin; Riphath, a grandson of Japheth and his descendants.

H7385.definition: from רוּק; emptiness; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain.
H7385.kjv: empty, to no purpose, (in) vain (thing), vanity.

H7386.definition: or (shorter) רֵק; from רוּק; empty; figuratively, worthless.

H7387.definition: from רֵיק; emptily; figuratively (objective) ineffectually, (subjective) undeservedly.
H7387.kjv: without cause, empty, in vain, void.

H7388.definition: from רוּר; saliva; by resemblance, broth.

H7389.definition: or רֵאשׁ; or רִישׁ; from רוּשׁ; poverty.

H7390.definition: from רָכַךְ; tender (literally or figuratively); by implication, weak.

H7392.definition: a primitive root; to ride (on an animal or in a vehicle); causatively, to place upon (for riding or generally), to despatch.
H7392.kjv: bring (on (horse-) back), carry, get (oneself) up, on (horse-) back, put, (cause to, make to) ride (in a chariot, on, -r), set.

H7393.definition: from רָכַב; a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone.
H7393.kjv: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

H7394.definition: from רָכַב; rider; Rekab, the name of two Arabs and of two Israelites.

H7395.kjv: chariot man, driver of a chariot, horseman.

H7397.definition: probably feminine from רָכַךְ; softness; Rekah, a place in Palestine.

H7398.definition: from passive participle of רָכַב; a vehicle (as ridden on).

H7399.definition: or רְכֻשׁ; from passive participle of רָכַשׁ; property (as gathered).

H7400.definition: from רָכַל; a scandal-monger (as travelling about).

H7401.definition: a primitive root; to soften (intransitively or transitively), used figuratively.
H7401.kjv: (be) faint(-hearted), mollify, (be, make) soft(-er), be tender.

H7402.definition: a primitive root; to travel for trading.

H7403.definition: from רָכַל; merchant; Rakal, a place in Palestine.

H7404.definition: feminine passive participle of רָכַל; trade (as peddled).

H7406.definition: from רָכַס; a mountain ridge (as of tied summits).

H7407.definition: from רָכַס; a snare (as of tied meshes).

H7408.definition: a primitive root; to lay up, i.e. collect.

H7409.definition: from רָכַשׁ; a relay of animals on a post-route (as stored up for that purpose); by implication, a courser.

H7410.definition: active participle of רוּם; high; Ram, the name of an Arabian and of an Israelite.

H7411.definition: a primitive root; to hurl; specifically, to shoot; figuratively, to delude or betray (as if causing to fall).
H7411.kjv: beguile, betray, (bow-) man, carry, deceive, throw.

H7412.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to רָמָה; to throw, set, (figuratively) assess.

H7413.definition: feminine active participle of רוּם; a height (as a seat of idolatry).

H7414.definition: the same as רָמָה; Ramah, the name of four places in Palestine.

H7415.definition: from רָמַם in the sense of breading (compare רוּם); a maggot (as rapidly bred), literally or figuratively.

H7416.definition: or רִמֹּן; from רָמַם; a pomegranate, the tree (from its upright growth) or the fruit (also an artificial ornament).

H7417.definition: or (shorter) (רִמֹּן; or רִמּוֹנוֹ; (1 Chronicles 6:62 (אֶבֶץ)), the same as רִמּוֹן; in Joshua 19:13: הַמְּתֹאָר is mistaken for part of a name; article with the passive participle of תָּאַר; the (one) marked off, i.e. which pertains).; Rimmon, the name of a Syrian deity, also of five places in Palestine.

H7418.definition: or רָמַת נֶגֶב; from the plural or construct form of רָמָה and נֶגֶב; heights (or height) of the South; Ramoth-Negeb or Ramath-Negeb, a place in Palestine.
H7418.kjv: south Ramoth, Ramath of the south.

H7420.definition: from an unused root meaning to hurl; a lance (as thrown); especially the iron point.

H7421.definition: for אֲרַמִּי; a Ramite, i.e. Aramaean.

H7422.definition: lemma רמְיָה missing vowel, corrected to רַמְיָה; from רוּם and יָהּ; Jah has raised; Ramjah, an Israelite.

H7423.kjv: deceit(-ful, -fully), false, guile, idle, slack, slothful.

H7424.definition: of foreign origin; a brood mare.

H7425.definition: from an unused root and יָהּ (perhaps meaning to deck); Jah has bedecked; Remaljah, an Israelite.

H7426.definition: a primitive root; to rise (literally or figuratively).
H7426.kjv: exalt, get (oneself) up, lift up (self), mount up.

H7427.definition: from the active participle of רָמַם; exaltation.

H7428.definition: from רִמּוֹן and פֶּרֶץ; pomegranate of the breach; Rimmon-Perets, a place in the Desert.

H7429.definition: a primitive root; to tread upon (as a potter, in walking or abusively).
H7429.kjv: oppressor, stamp upon, trample (under feet), tread (down, upon).

H7430.definition: a primitive root; properly, to glide swiftly, i.e. to crawl or move with short steps; by analogy to swarm.

H7431.definition: from רָמַשׂ; a reptile or any other rapidly moving animal.

H7432.definition: from רָמָה; height; Remeth, a place in Palestine.

H7433.definition: or רָמוֹת גִּלעָד; (2 Chronicles 22:5), from the plural of רָמָה and גִּלְעָד; heights of Gilad; Ramoth-Gilad, a place East of the Jordan.
H7433.kjv: Ramoth-gilead, Ramoth in Gilead. See also רָאמוֹת.

H7434.definition: from רָמָה and מִצְפֶּה with the article interpolated; height of the watch-tower; Ramath-ham-Mitspeh, a place in Palestine.

H7435.definition: patronymic of רָמָה; a Ramathite or inhabitant of Ramah.

H7436.definition: from the dual of רָמָה and the plural of the active participle of צָפָה; double height of watchers; Ramathajim-Tsophim, a place in Palestine.

H7437.definition: from רָמָה and לְחִי; height of a jaw-bone; Ramath-Lechi, a place in Palestine.

H7440.definition: from רָנַן; properly, a creaking (or shrill sound), i.e. shout (of joy or grief).
H7440.kjv: cry, gladness, joy, proclamation, rejoicing, shouting, sing(-ing), triumph.

H7441.definition: the same as רִנָּה; Rinnah, an Israelite.

H7442.definition: a primitive root; properly, to creak (or emit a stridulous sound), i.e. to shout (usually for joy).
H7442.kjv: aloud for joy, cry out, be joyful (greatly, make to) rejoice, (cause to) shout (for joy), (cause to) sing (aloud, for joy, out), triumph.

H7443.definition: from רָנַן; an ostrich (from its wail).

H7446.definition: from רָסַס; a ruin (as dripping to pieces); Rissah, a place in the Desert.

H7447.definition: from רָסַס; properly, dripping to pieces, i.e. a ruin; also a dew-drop.

H7448.definition: from an unused root meaning to curb; a halter (as restraining); by implication, the jaw.

H7449.definition: the same as רֶסֶן; Resen, a place in Assyrian.

H7450.definition: a primitive root; to comminute; used only as denominative from רָסִיס,; to moisten (with drops).

H7451.definition: from רָעַע; bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral); adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-ful), ill (favoured), [phrase] mark, mischief(-vous), misery, naught(-ty), noisome, [phrase] not please, sad(-ly), sore, sorrow, trouble, vex, wicked(-ly, -ness, one), worse(-st), wretchedness, wrong. (Incl. feminine raaah.

H7452.definition: from רוּעַ; a crash (of thunder), noise (of war), shout (of joy).

H7453.definition: or רֵיעַ; from רָעָה; an associate (more or less close).
H7453.kjv: brother, companion, fellow, friend, husband, lover, neighbour, [idiom] (an-) other.

H7454.definition: from רָעָה; a thought (as association of ideas).

H7455.definition: from רָעַע; badness (as marring), physically or morally.
H7455.kjv: [idiom] be so bad, badness, ([idiom] be so) evil, naughtiness, sadness, sorrow, wickedness.

H7456.kjv: (suffer to) famish, (be, have, suffer, suffer to) hunger(-ry).

H7457.definition: from רָעֵב; hungry (more or less intensely).

H7458.definition: from רָעֵב; hunger (more or less extensive).

H7460.definition: a primitive root; to shudder (more or less violently).

H7461.definition: or (feminine) רְעָדָהxlit rᵉâdâh corrected to rᵉʻâdâh; from רָעַד; a shudder.

H7462.definition: a primitive root; to tend a flock; i.e. pasture it; intransitively, to graze (literally or figuratively); generally to rule; by extension, to associate with (as a friend).
H7462.kjv: [idiom] break, companion, keep company with, devour, eat up, evil entreat, feed, use as a friend, make friendship with, herdman, keep (sheep) (-er), pastor, [phrase] shearing house, shepherd, wander, waste.

H7464.definition: feminine of רֵעַ; a female associate.

H7466.definition: for רְעִי in the sense of רֵעַ; friend; Reu, a postdiluvian patriarch.

H7467.definition: from the same as רְעוּ and אֵל; friend of God; Reuel, the name of Moses' father-in-law, also of an Edomite and an Israelite.

H7468.definition: from רָעָה in the sense of רֵעַ; a female associate; generally an additional one.

H7469.definition: probably from רָעָה; a feeding upon, i.e. grasping after.

H7472.definition: from רֵעַ; social; Rei, an Israelite.

H7473.definition: from active participle of רָעָה; pastoral; as noun, a shepherd.

H7474.definition: feminine of רֵעַ; a female associate.

H7475.definition: from רָעָה in the sense of רְעוּת; desire.

H7476.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to רַעְיוֹן; a grasp. i.e. (figuratively) mental conception.

H7477.definition: a primitive root; to reel, i.e. (figuratively) to brandish.

H7479.definition: feminine of רַעַל; a long veil (as fluttering).

H7480.definition: from רָעַל and יָהּ; made to tremble (i.e. fearful) of Jah; Reelajah, an Israelite.

H7481.definition: a primitive root; to tumble, i.e. be violently agitated; specifically, to crash (of thunder); figuratively, to irritate (with anger).
H7481.kjv: make to fret, roar, thunder, trouble.

H7482.definition: from רָעַם; a peal of thunder.

H7483.definition: feminine of רַעַם; the mane of a horse (as quivering in the wind).

H7484.definition: the same as רַעְמָה; Ramah, the name of a grandson of Ham, and of a place (perhaps founded by him).

H7485.definition: from רָעַם and יָהּ; Jah has shaken; Raamjah, an Israelite.

H7486.definition: or רַעַמְסֵס; of Egyptian origin; Rameses or Raamses, a place in Egypt.

H7487.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to רַעֲנָן; green, i.e. (figuratively) prosperous.

H7488.definition: from an unused root meaning to be green; verdant; by analogy, new; figuratively, prosperous.

H7489.definition: a primitive root; properly, to spoil (literally, by breaking to pieces); figuratively, to make (or be) good fornothing, i.e. bad (physically, socially or morally).
H7489.kjv: afflict, associate selves (by mistake for רָעָה), break (down, in pieces), [phrase] displease, (be, bring, do) evil (doer, entreat, man), show self friendly (by mistake for רָעָה), do harm, (do) hurt, (behave self, deal) ill, [idiom] indeed, do mischief, punish, still, vex, (do) wicked (doer, -ly), be (deal, do) worse.

H7492.definition: a primitive root; to break in pieces; figuratively, harass.

H7493.definition: a primitive root; to undulate (as the earth, the sky, etc.; also a field of grain), particularly through fear; specifically, to spring (as a locust).
H7493.kjv: make afraid, (re-) move, quake, (make to) shake, (make to) tremble.

H7494.kjv: commotion, confused noise, earthquake, fierceness, quaking, rattling, rushing, shaking.

H7495.definition: or רָפָה; a primitive root; properly, to mend (by stitching), i.e. (figuratively) to cure.
H7495.kjv: cure, (cause to) heal, physician, repair, [idiom] thoroughly, make whole. See רָפָה.

H7496.definition: from רָפָא in the sense of רָפָה; properly, lax, i.e. (figuratively) a ghost (as dead; in plural only).

H7497.definition: or רָפָה; from רָפָא in the sense of invigorating; a giant.
H7497.kjv: giant, Rapha, Rephaim(-s). See also בֵּית רָפָא.

H7498.definition: or רָפָה; probably the same as רָפָא; giant; Rapha or Raphah, the name of two Israelites.

H7499.definition: feminine passive participle of רָפָא; a medicament.

H7501.definition: from רָפָא and אֵל; God has cured; Rephael, an Israelite.

H7502.definition: a primitive root; to spread (a bed); by implication, to refresh.

H7503.definition: a primitive root; to slacken (in many applications, literal or figurative).
H7503.kjv: abate, cease, consume, draw (toward evening), fail, (be) faint, be (wax) feeble, forsake, idle, leave, let alone (go, down), (be) slack, stay, be still, be slothful, (be) weak(-en). See רָפָא.

H7504.definition: from רָפָה; slack (in body or mind).
H7504.kjv: weak. raphah, Raphah. See רָפָא, רָפָא. riphah. See רִיפָה.

H7505.definition: passive participle of רָפָא; cured; Raphu, an Israelite.

H7506.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to sustain; support; Rephach, an Israelite.

H7507.definition: from רָפַד; a railing (as spread along).

H7508.definition: plural of the masculine of the same as רְפִידָה; ballusters; Rephidim, a place in the Desert.

H7509.definition: from רָפָא and יָהּ; Jah has cured; Rephajah, the name of five Israelites.

H7511.definition: a primitive root; to trample, i.e. prostrate.

H7513.definition: from רָפַס; a raft (as flat on the water).

H7515.definition: a primitive root; to trample, i.e. roil water.

H7517.definition: probably from רָפָה; a stall for cattle (from their resting there).

H7519.definition: a primitive root; to run; also to delight in.

H7520.definition: a primitive root; probably to look askant, i.e. (figuratively) be jealous.

H7521.definition: a primitive root; to be pleased with; specifically, to satisfy adebt.
H7521.kjv: (be) accept(-able), accomplish, set affection, approve, consent with, delight (self), enjoy, (be, have a) favour(-able), like, observe, pardon, (be, have, take) please(-ure), reconcile self.

H7522.definition: or רָצֹן; from רָצָה; delight (especially as shown).
H7522.kjv: (be) acceptable(-ance, -ed), delight, desire, favour, (good) pleasure, (own, self, voluntary) will, as...(what) would.

H7523.definition: a primitive root; properly, to dash in pieces, i.e. kill (a human being), especially to murder.
H7523.kjv: put to death, kill, (man-) slay(-er), murder(-er).

H7524.definition: from רָצַח; a crushing; specifically, a murder-cry.

H7525.definition: from רָצָה; delight; Ritsjah, an Israelite.

H7526.definition: probably for רָצוֹן; Retsin, the name of a Syrian and of an Israelite.

H7528.definition: a denominative from רֶצֶף; to tessellate, i.e. embroider (as if with bright stones).

H7529.definition: for רֶשֶׁף; a red-hot stone (for baking).

H7530.definition: the same as רֶצֶף; Retseph, a place in Assyrian.

H7531.definition: feminine of רֶצֶף; a hot stone; also a tessellated pavement.

H7532.definition: the same as רִצְפָּה; Ritspah, an Israelitess.

H7533.definition: a primitive root; to crack in pieces, literally or figuratively.
H7533.kjv: break, bruise, crush, discourage, oppress, struggle together.

H7534.definition: from רָקַק in its original sense; emaciated (as if flattened out).

H7535.definition: the same as רַק as a noun; properly, leanness, i.e. (figuratively) limitation; only adverbial, merely, or conjunctional, although.
H7535.kjv: but, even, except, howbeit howsoever, at the least, nevertheless, nothing but, notwithstanding, only, save, so (that), surely, yet (so), in any wise.

H7537.definition: a primitive root; to decay (as by worm-eating).

H7540.definition: a primitive root; properly, to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy).

H7541.definition: feminine of רַק; properly, thinness, i.e. the side of the head.

H7542.definition: from רַק; thinness; Rakkon, a place in Palestine.

H7544.definition: from רָקַח; properly, perfumery, i.e. (by implication) spicery (for flavor).

H7548.definition: feminine of רַקֻּחַ; a female perfumer.

H7549.definition: from רָקַע; properly, an expanse, i.e. the firmament or (apparently) visible arch of the sky.

H7550.definition: from, רָקַק in its original sense; a thin cake.

H7551.definition: a primitive root; to variegate color, i.e. embroider; by implication, to fabricate.

H7552.definition: from רָקַם; versi-color; Rekem, the name of a place in Palestine, also of a Midianite and an Israelite.

H7553.definition: from רָקַם; variegation of color; specifically, embroidery.
H7553.kjv: broidered (work), divers colours, (raiment of) needlework (on both sides).

H7554.definition: a primitive root; to pound the earth (as a sign of passion); by analogy to expand (by hammering); by implication, to overlay (with thin sheets of metal).
H7554.kjv: beat, make broad, spread abroad (forth, over, out, into plates), stamp, stretch.

H7555.definition: from רָקַע; beaten out, i.e. a (metallic) plate.

H7557.definition: from רָקַק in its original sense of diffusing; a beach (as expanded shingle); Rakkath, a place in Palestine.

H7558.definition: from an unused root meaning to have leave; a permit.

H7561.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, do or declare) wrong; by implication, to disturb, violate.
H7561.kjv: condemn, make trouble, vex, be (commit, deal, depart, do) wicked(-ly, -ness).

H7563.definition: from רָשַׁע; morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person.
H7563.kjv: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

H7565.definition: from שָׂרַף; a live coal; by analogy lightning; figuratively, an arrow, (as flashing through the air); specifically, fever.
H7565.kjv: arrow, (burning) coal, burning heat, [phrase] spark, hot thunderbolt.

H7566.definition: the same as רֶשֶׁף; Resheph, an Israelite.

H7568.definition: from יָרַשׁ; a net (as catching animals).

H7573.definition: a primitive root; to yoke up (to the pole of a vehicle).

H7574.definition: or רֹתֶם; from רָתַם; the Spanish broom (from its pole-like stems).

H7575.definition: feminine of רֶתֶם; Rithmah, a place in the Desert.

H7577.definition: feminine passive participle of רָתַק; something fastened, i.e. a chain.

H7579.definition: a primitive root; to bale up water.

H7580.definition: a primitive root; to rumble or moan.

H7581.definition: from שָׁאַג; a rumbling or moan.

H7582.definition: a primitive root; to rush; by implication, to desolate.

H7583.definition: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of whirling to giddiness); to stun, i.e. (intransitively) be astonished.

H7585.definition: or שְׁאֹל; from שָׁאַל; Hades or the world of the dead (as if a subterranean retreat), including its accessories and inmates.

H7586.definition: passive participle of שָׁאַל; asked; Shaul, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites.

H7587.definition: patronymic from שִׂטְנָה; a Shaulite or descendant of Shaul.

H7588.definition: from שָׁאָה; uproar (as of rushing); by implication, destruction.

H7589.definition: from an unused root meaning to push aside; contempt.

H7590.definition: for active part of שׂוּט (compare שְׁאָט); one contemning.

H7592.definition: or שָׁאֵל; a primitive root; to inquire; by implication, to request; by extension, to demand.
H7592.kjv: ask (counsel, on), beg, borrow, lay to charge, consult, demand, desire, [idiom] earnestly, enquire, [phrase] greet, obtain leave, lend, pray, request, require, [phrase] salute, [idiom] straitly, [idiom] surely, wish.

H7594.definition: from שָׁאַל; request; Sheal, an Israelite.

H7595.definition: (Aramaic) from שְׁאֵל; properly, a question (at law), i.e. judicial decision or mandate.

H7596.definition: or שֵׁלָה; (1 Samuel 1:17), from שָׁאַל; a petition; by implication, a loan.

H7597.definition: or שַׁלְתִּיאֵל; from שָׁאַל and אֵל; I have asked God; Shealtiel, an Israelite.

H7599.definition: a primitive root; to loll, i.e. be peaceful.
H7599.kjv: be at ease, be quiet, rest. See also בֵּית שְׁאָן.

H7600.definition: from שָׁאַן; secure; in a bad sense, haughty.
H7600.kjv: that is at ease, quiet, tumult. Compare שַׁלְאֲנָן.

H7602.definition: a primitive root; to inhale eagerly; figuratively, to cover; by implication, to be angry; also to hasten.
H7602.kjv: desire (earnestly), devour, haste, pant, snuff up, swallow up.

H7603.definition: from שָׁאַר; barm or yeast-cake (as swelling by fermentation).

H7604.definition: a primitive root; properly, to swell up, i.e. be (causatively, make) redundant.
H7604.kjv: leave, (be) left, let, remain, remnant, reserve, the rest.

H7607.definition: from שָׁאַר; flesh (as swelling out), as living or forfood; generally food of any kind; figuratively, kindred by blood.
H7607.kjv: body, flesh, food, (near) kin(-sman, -swoman), near (nigh) (of kin).

H7608.definition: feminine of שְׁאֵר; female kindred by blood.

H7609.definition: the same as שַׁאֲרָה; Sheerah, an Israelitess.

H7610.definition: from שְׁאָר and שׁוּב; a remnant will return; Shear-Jashub, the symbolic name of one of Isaiah's sons.

H7611.definition: from שָׁאַר; a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion.
H7611.kjv: that had escaped, be left, posterity, remain(-der), remnant, residue, rest.

H7613.definition: from נָשָׂא; an elevation or leprous scab; figuratively, elation or cheerfulness; exaltation in rank or character.
H7613.kjv: be accepted, dignity, excellency, highness, raise up self, rising.

H7614.definition: of foreign origin; Sheba, the name of three early progenitors of tribes and of an Ethiopian district.

H7615.definition: patronymic from שְׁבָא; a Shebaite or descendant of Sheba.

H7616.definition: from an unused root meaning to break up; a fragment, i.e. ruin.

H7617.definition: a primitive root; to transport into captivity.
H7617.kjv: (bring away, carry, carry away, lead, lead away, take) captive(-s), drive (take) away.

H7618.definition: from an unused root (probably identical with that of שָׁבָה through the idea of subdivision into flashes or streamers (compare שָׁבִיב) meaning to flame; a gem (from its sparkle), probably the agate.

H7619.definition: or שׁוּבָאֵל; from שָׁבָה (abbreviated form) or שׁוּב and אֵל; captive (or returned) of God; Shebuel or Shubael, the name of two Israelites.

H7620.definition: or שָׁבֻעַ; also (feminine) שְׁבֻעָה; properly, passive participle of שָׁבַע as a denominative of שֶׁבַע; literally, sevened, i.e. a week (specifically, of years).

H7621.definition: feminine passive participle of שָׁבַע; properly, something sworn, i.e. an oath.

H7622.definition: or שְׁבִית; from שָׁבָה; exile, concretely, prisoners; figuratively, a former state of prosperity.

H7623.definition: a primitive root; properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words).
H7623.kjv: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.

H7624.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁבַח; to adulate, i.e. adore.

H7626.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off; a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) or (figuratively) a clan.
H7626.kjv: [idiom] correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe.

H7627.definition: of foreign origin; Shebat, a Jewish month.

H7628.definition: from שְׁבוּ; exiled; captured; as noun, exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively); by extension, booty.
H7628.kjv: captive(-ity), prisoners, [idiom] take away, that was taken.

H7629.definition: from שָׁבָה; captor; Shobi, an Ammonite.

H7632.definition: from the same as שָׁבָב; flame (as split into tongues).

H7633.definition: feminine of שְׁבִי; exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively).

H7634.definition: feminine of the same as שֹׁבִי; captivation; Shobjah, an Israelite.

H7635.definition: from the same as שֹׁבֶל; a track or passage-way (as if flowing along).

H7636.definition: from an unused root meaning to interweave; a netting for the hair.

H7637.definition: or שְׁבִעִי; ordinal from שִׁבְעִים; seventh.

H7638.definition: from an unused root meaning to intwine; a netting (ornament to the capital of a column).

H7639.definition: feminine of שָׂבָךְ; a net-work, i.e. (in hunting) a snare, (in architecture) a ballustrade; also a reticulated ornament to apillar.

H7640.definition: from an unused root meaning to flow; a lady's train (as trailing after her).

H7641.definition: or (feminine) שִׁבֹּלֶת; from the same as שֹׁבֶל; a stream (as flowing); also an ear of grain (as growing out); by analogy, a branch.
H7641.kjv: branch, channel, ear (of corn), (water-)flood, Shibboleth. Compare סִבֹּלֶת.

H7642.definition: from the same as שֹׁבֶל; a snail (as if floating in its own slime).

H7643.definition: or (feminine) שִׂבְמָה; probably from בָּשָׂם; spice; Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab.

H7644.definition: or שֶׁבְנָה; from an unused root meaning to grow; growth; Shebna or Shebnah, an Israelite.

H7645.definition: or שְׁבַנְיָהוּ; from the same as שֶׁבְנָא and יָהּ; Jah has grown (i.e. prospered); Shebanjah, the name of three or four Israelites.

H7646.definition: or שָׂבֵעַ; a primitive root; to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively).
H7646.kjv: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.

H7648.definition: from שָׂבַע; satisfaction (of food or (figuratively) joy).

H7649.definition: from שָׂבַע; satiated (in a pleasant or disagreeable sense).

H7650.definition: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from שֶׁבַע; to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times).
H7650.kjv: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for שָׂבַע), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.

H7651.definition: or (masculine) (שִׁבְעָה); from שָׁבַע; a primitive cardinal number; seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number.

H7652.definition: the same as שֶׁבַע; seven; Sheba, the name of a place in Palestine, and of two Israelites.

H7654.kjv: (to have) enough, [idiom] till...be full, (un-) satiable, satisfy, [idiom] sufficiently.

H7656.definition: masculine of שֶׁבַע; seven(-th); Shebah, a well in Palestine.

H7658.definition: prolonged for the masculine of שֶׁבַע; seven.

H7660.definition: a primitive root; to interweave (colored) threads in squares; by implication (of reticulation) to inchase gems in gold.

H7662.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of שׁוֹבֵק; to quit, i.e. allow to remain.

H7663.definition: erroneously שָׁבַר; (Nehemiah 2:13,15), a primitive root; to scrutinize; by implication (of watching) to expect (with hope and patience).

H7665.definition: a primitive root; to burst (literally or figuratively).
H7665.kjv: break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for שָׂבַר).

H7666.definition: denominative from שֶׁבֶר; to deal in grain.

H7667.definition: or שֵׁבֶר; from שָׁבַר; a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream).
H7667.kjv: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.

H7668.definition: the same as שֶׁבֶר; grain (as if broken into kernels).

H7669.definition: the same as שֶׁבֶר; Sheber, an Israelite.

H7670.definition: from שָׁבַר; rupture, i.e. a pang; figuratively, ruin.

H7671.definition: plural of שֶׁבֶר; ruins; Shebarim, a place in Palestine.

H7672.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁבַץ; to entangle, i.e. perplex.

H7673.definition: a primitive root; to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific).
H7673.kjv: (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away.

H7674.kjv: cease, sit still, loss of time.

H7675.definition: infinitive of יָשַׁב; properly, session; but used also concretely, an abode or locality.

H7676.definition: intensive from שָׁבַת; intermission, i.e (specifically) the Sabbath.

H7677.definition: from שַׁבָּת; a sabbatism or special holiday.

H7678.definition: from שַׁבָּת; restful; Shabbethai, the name of three Israelites.

H7679.definition: ; a primitive root; to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud.

H7681.definition: probably from שָׁגָה; erring; Shage, an Israelite.

H7682.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively.
H7682.kjv: defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong.

H7683.definition: a primitive root; to stray, i.e. (figuratively) sin (with more or less apology).
H7683.kjv: [idiom] also for that, deceived, err, go astray, sin ignorantly.

H7684.definition: from שָׁגַג; a mistake or inadvertent transgression; error, ignorance, at unawares.

H7685.definition: a primitive root; to enlarge (especially upward, also figuratively).

H7686.definition: a primitive root; to stray (causatively, mislead), usually (figuratively) to mistake, especially (morally) to transgress; by extension (through the idea of intoxication) to reel, (figuratively) be enraptured.
H7686.kjv: (cause to) go astray, deceive, err, be ravished, sin through ignorance, (let, make to) wander.

H7687.definition: from שָׂגַב; aloft; Segub, the name of two Israelites.

H7688.definition: a primitive root; to peep, i.e. glance sharply at.

H7690.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שַׂגִּיא; large (in size, quantity or number, also adverbial); exceeding, great(-ly).

H7692.definition: or שִׁגָּיֹנָה; from שָׁגָה; properly, aberration, i.e. (technically) a dithyramb or rambling poem.

H7693.definition: a primitive root; to copulate with.

H7696.definition: a primitive root; to rave through insanity.

H7698.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to eject; the fetus (as finally expelled).

H7699.definition: or שֹׁד; probably from שׁוּד (in its original sense) contracted; the breast of a woman or animal (as bulging).

H7701.definition: or שׁוֹד; (Job 5:21), from שׁוּד; violence, ravage.
H7701.kjv: desolation, destruction, oppression, robbery, spoil(-ed, -er, -ing), wasting.

H7702.definition: a primitive root; to abrade, i.e. harrow afield.

H7703.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be burly, i.e. (figuratively) powerful (passively, impregnable); by implication, to ravage.
H7703.kjv: dead, destroy(-er), oppress, robber, spoil(-er), [idiom] utterly, (lay) waste.

H7704.definition: or שָׂדַי; from an unused root meaning to spread out; a field (as flat).
H7704.kjv: country, field, ground, land, soil, [idiom] wild.

H7705.definition: from שָׁדַד; a wife (as mistress of the house).

H7707.definition: from the same as שָׂדֶה and אוּר; spreader of light; Shedejur, an Israelite.

H7708.definition: plural from the same as שָׂדֶה; flats; Siddim, a valley in Palestine.

H7709.definition: apparently from שָׂדֶה; a cultivated field.

H7713.definition: from an unused root meaning to regulate; a row, i.e. rank (of soldiers), story (of rooms).

H7714.definition: probably of foreign origin; Shadrak, the Babylonian name of one of Daniel's companions.

H7716.definition: or שֵׂי; probably from שָׁאָה through the idea of pushing out to graze; a member of a flock, i.e. a sheep or goat.
H7716.kjv: (lesser, small) cattle, ewe, goat, lamb, sheep. Compare זֶה.

H7717.definition: from an unused root meaning to testify; a witness.

H7718.definition: from an unused root probably mean to blanch; a gem, probably the beryl (from its pale green color).

H7719.definition: the same as שֹׁהַם; Shoham, an Israelite.

H7720.definition: from the same as סַהַר; a round pendant for the neck.
H7720.kjv: ornament, round tire like the moon.

H7721.definition: from an unused root (akin to נָשָׂא and שׁוֹא) meaning to rise; a rising.

H7722.definition: or (feminine) שׁוֹאָה; or שֹׁאָה; from an unused root meaning to rush over; a tempest; by implication, devastation.

H7723.definition: or שַׁו; from the same as שׁוֹא in the sense of desolating; evil (as destructive), literally (ruin) or morally (especially guile); figuratively idolatry (as false, subjective), uselessness (as deceptive, objective; also adverbially, in vain).

H7724.definition: from the same as שָׁוְא; false; Sheva, an Israelite.

H7725.definition: a primitive root; to turn back (hence, away) transitively or intransitively, literally or figuratively (not necessarily with the idea of return to the starting point); generally to retreat; often adverbial, again.
H7725.kjv: ((break, build, circumcise, dig, do anything, do evil, feed, lay down, lie down, lodge, make, rejoice, send, take, weep)) [idiom] again, (cause to) answer ([phrase] again), [idiom] in any case (wise), [idiom] at all, averse, bring (again, back, home again), call (to mind), carry again (back), cease, [idiom] certainly, come again (back), [idiom] consider, [phrase] continually, convert, deliver (again), [phrase] deny, draw back, fetch home again, [idiom] fro, get (oneself) (back) again, [idiom] give (again), go again (back, home), (go) out, hinder, let, (see) more, [idiom] needs, be past, [idiom] pay, pervert, pull in again, put (again, up again), recall, recompense, recover, refresh, relieve, render (again), requite, rescue, restore, retrieve, (cause to, make to) return, reverse, reward, [phrase] say nay, send back, set again, slide back, still, [idiom] surely, take back (off), (cause to, make to) turn (again, self again, away, back, back again, backward, from, off), withdraw.

H7727.definition: the same as שׁוֹבָב; rebellious; Shobab, the name of two Israelites.

H7728.definition: from שׁוּב; apostate, i.e. heathenish or (actually) heathen.

H7730.definition: for סֹבֶךְ; a thicket, i.e. interlaced branches.

H7731.definition: perhaps for שׂוֹבֶךְ; Shobak, a Syrian.

H7732.definition: from the same as שֹׁבֶל; overflowing; Shobal, the name of an Edomite and two Israelites.

H7733.definition: active participle from a primitive root meaning to leave (compare שְׁבַק); forsaking; Shobek, an Israelite.

H7735.definition: a primitive root; to hedge in.

H7736.definition: a primitive root; properly, to swell up, i.e. figuratively (by implication of insolence) to devastate.

H7737.definition: a primitive root; properly, to level, i.e. equalize; figuratively, to resemble; by implication, to adjust (i.e. counterbalance, be suitable, compose, place, yield, etc.).
H7737.kjv: avail, behave, bring forth, compare, countervail, (be, make) equal, lay, be (make, a-) like, make plain, profit, reckon.

H7740.definition: from שָׁוָה; plain; Shaveh, a place in Palestine.

H7741.definition: from the same as שָׁוֵה and the dual of קִרְיָה; plain of a double city; Shaveh-Kirjathajim, a place East of the Jordan.

H7742.definition: a primitive root; to muse pensively.

H7743.definition: a primitive root; to sink, literally or figuratively.

H7744.definition: from שׁוּחַ; dell; Shuach, a son of Abraham.

H7746.definition: the same as שׁוּחָה; Shuchah, an Israelite.

H7747.definition: xlit Shûchîy corrected to Shûwchîy; patronymic from שׁוּחַ; a Shuchite or descendant of Shuach.

H7748.definition: from שׁוּחַ; humbly; Shucham, an Israelite.

H7750.definition: or (by permutation) סוּט; a primitive root; to detrude, i.e. (intransitively and figuratively) become derelict (wrongly practise; namely, idolatry).

H7751.definition: a primitive root; properly, to push forth; (but used only figuratively) to lash, i.e. (the sea with oars) to row; by implication, to travel.
H7751.kjv: go (about, through, to and fro), mariner, rower, run to and fro.

H7752.definition: from שׁוּט; a lash (literally or figuratively).

H7753.definition: a primitive root; to entwine, i.e. shut in (for formation, protection or restraint).

H7754.definition: or (feminine) שׂוֹכָה; from שׂוּךְ; a branch (as interleaved).

H7755.definition: or שֹׂכֹה; or שׂוֹכוֹ; from שׂוּךְ; Sokoh or Soko, the name of two places in Palestine.

H7756.definition: probably patronymic from a name corresponding to שׂוֹךְ (feminine); a Sukathite or descendant of an unknown Israelite named Sukah.

H7757.definition: from an unused root meaning to hang down; a skirt; by implication, a bottom edge.

H7758.definition: or שֵׁילָל; (Micah 1:8), from שָׁלַל; nude (especially bare-foot); by implication, captive.

H7759.definition: from שָׁלַם; peaceful (with the article always prefixed, making it a pet name); the Shulammith, an epithet of Solomon's queen.

H7760.definition: or שִׂים; a primitive root; to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically).
H7760.kjv: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, impute, lay (down, up), leave, look, make (out), mark, [phrase] name, [idiom] on, ordain, order, [phrase] paint, place, preserve, purpose, put (on), [phrase] regard, rehearse, reward, (cause to) set (on, up), shew, [phrase] stedfastly, take, [idiom] tell, [phrase] tread down, (over-)turn, [idiom] wholly, work.

H7762.definition: from an unused root meaning to exhale; garlic (from its rank odor).

H7763.definition: or שֹׁמֵר; active participle of שָׁמַר; keeper; Shomer, the name of two Israelites.

H7764.definition: from an unused root meaning to rest; quiet; Shuni, an Israelite.

H7765.definition: patronymic from שׁוּנִי; a Shunite (collectively) or descendants of Shuni.

H7766.definition: probably from the same as שׁוּנִי; quietly; Shunem, a place in Pal.

H7767.definition: patrial from שׁוּנֵם; a Shunammitess, or female inhabitant of Shunem.

H7768.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be free; but used only causatively and reflexively, to halloo (for help, i.e. freedom from some trouble).

H7770.definition: the same as שׁוּעַ; Shua, a Canaanite.

H7771.definition: from שָׁוַע in the original sense of freedom; a noble, i.e. liberal, opulent; also (as noun in the derived sense) a halloo.

H7772.definition: the same as שׁוֹעַ; rich; Shoa, an Oriental people.

H7774.definition: from שָׁוַע; wealth; Shua, an Israelitess.

H7776.definition: or שֻׁעָל; from the same as שֹׁעַל; a jackal (as a burrower).

H7777.definition: the same as שׁוּעָל; Shual, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H7778.definition: or שֹׁעֵר active participle of שָׁעַר (as denominative from שַׁעַר); a janitor.

H7779.definition: a primitive root; properly, to gape, i.e. snap at; figuratively, to overwhelm.

H7780.definition: from שָׁפַךְ; poured; Shophak, a Syrian.

H7781.definition: patronymic from שְׁפוּפָם; a Shuphamite (collectively) or descendants of Shephupham.

H7782.definition: or שֹׁפָר; from שָׁפַר in the original sense of incising; a cornet (as giving a clear sound) or curved horn.

H7783.definition: a primitive root; to run after or over, i.e. overflow.

H7784.definition: from שׁוּק; a street (as run over).

H7785.definition: from שׁוּק; the (lower) leg (as a runner).

H7786.definition: a primitive root; properly, to vanquish; by implication, to rule (causatively, crown).
H7786.kjv: make princes, have power, reign. See סוּר.

H7787.definition: a primitive root (identical with שׂוּר through the idea of reducing to pieces; compare מַשּׂוֹר); to saw.

H7788.definition: a primitive root; properly, to turn, i.e. travel about (as a harlot or a merchant).

H7789.definition: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of going round for inspection); to spy out, i.e. (generally) survey, (for evil) lurk for, (for good) care for.
H7789.kjv: behold, lay wait, look, observe, perceive, regard, see.

H7790.definition: from שִׁימוֹן; a foe (as lying in wait).

H7791.definition: from שׁוּר; a wall (as going about).

H7793.definition: the same as שׁוּר; Shur, a region of the Desert.

H7794.definition: from שׁוּר; a bullock (as a traveller).
H7794.kjv: bull(-ock), cow, ox, wall (by mistake for שׁוּר).

H7795.definition: from שׂוּר in the primitive sense of סוּר; properly, a ring, i.e. (by analogy) a row (adverbially).

H7796.definition: the same as שֹׂרֵק; a vine; Sorek, a valley in Palestine.

H7797.definition: or שִׂישׂ; a primitive root; to be bright, i.e. cheerful.
H7797.kjv: be glad, [idiom] greatly, joy, make mirth, rejoice.

H7798.definition: from שׂוּשׂ; joyful; Shavsha, an Israelite.

H7799.definition: or שׁוֹשָׁן; or שֹׁשָׁן; and (feminine) שׁוֹשַׁנָּה; from שׂוּשׂ; a lily (from its whiteness), as aflower of architectural ornament; also a (straight) trumpet (from the tubular shape).

H7800.definition: the same as שׁוּשַׁן; Shushan, a place in Persia.

H7801.definition: (Aramaic) of foreign origin; a Shushankite (collectively) or inhabitants of some unknown place in Assyrian.

H7802.definition: or (plural of former) שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּתlemma שׁוֹשַׁנִּיס עֵדוּת samekh, corrected to שׁוֹשַׁנִּים עֵדוּת; from שׁוּשַׁן and עֵדוּת; lily (or trumpet) of assemblage; Shushan-Eduth or Shoshannim-Eduth, the title of a popular song.

H7803.definition: probably from שָׁאָה and the same as תֶּלַח; crash of breakage; Shuthelach, the name of two Israelites.

H7804.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to עָזַב; to leave, i.e. (causatively) free.

H7805.definition: a primitive root; to tan (by sunburning); figuratively (as if by a piercing ray) to scan.

H7806.definition: a primitive root; to twist (a thread of straw).

H7809.definition: a primitive root; to donate, i.e. bribe.

H7810.definition: from שָׁחַד; a donation (venal or redemptive).

H7811.definition: a primitive root; to swim; causatively, to inundate.

H7812.definition: a primitive root; to depress, i.e. prostrate (especially reflexive, in homage to royalty or God).
H7812.kjv: bow (self) down, crouch, fall down (flat), humbly beseech, do (make) obeisance, do reverence, make to stoop, worship.

H7814.definition: or שְׂחֹק; from שָׂחַק; laughter (in merriment or defiance).
H7814.kjv: derision, laughter(-ed to scorn, -ing), mocked, sport.

H7815.definition: from שָׁחַר; dinginess, i.e. perhaps soot.

H7817.definition: a primitive root; to sink or depress (reflexive or causative).
H7817.kjv: bend, bow (down), bring (cast) down, couch, humble self, be (bring) low, stoop.

H7818.definition: a primitive root; to tread out, i.e. squeeze (grapes).

H7819.definition: a primitive root; to slaughter (in sacrifice or massacre).
H7819.kjv: kill, offer, shoot out, slay, slaughter.

H7820.definition: a primitive root (identical with שָׁחַט through the idea of striking); to hammer out.

H7822.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to burn; inflammation, i.e. an ulcer.

H7823.definition: or סָחִישׁ; from an unused root apparently meaning to sprout; aftergrowth.

H7824.definition: from the same as שַׁחַף; a board (as chipped thin).

H7825.definition: from שָׁחָה; a pit-fall (literally or figuratively).

H7826.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to roar; a lion (from his characteristic roar).

H7827.definition: lemma שְׁחֶלֶת second vowel, corrected to שְׁחֵלֶת; apparently from the same as שַׁחַל through some obscure idea, perhaps that of peeling off by concussion of sound; a scale or shell, i.e. the aromatic mussel..

H7828.definition: from an unused root meaning to peel, i.e. emaciate; the gull (as thin).

H7829.definition: from the same as שַׁחַף; emaciation.

H7830.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to strut; haughtiness (as evinced by the attitude).

H7831.definition: from the same as שַׁחַץ; proudly; Shachatsom, a place in Palestine.

H7832.definition: a primitive root; to laugh (in pleasure or detraction); by implication, to play.
H7832.kjv: deride, have in derision, laugh, make merry, mock(-er), play, rejoice, (laugh to) scorn, be in (make) sport.

H7833.definition: a primitive root; to comminate (by trituration or attrition).

H7834.definition: from שָׁחַק; a powder (as beaten small); by analogy, a thin vapor; by extension, the firmament.

H7835.definition: a primitive root (identical with שָׁחַר through the idea of the duskiness of early dawn); to be dim or dark (in color).

H7836.definition: a primitive root; properly, to dawn, i.e. (figuratively) be (up) early at any task (with the implication of earnestness); by extension, to search for (with painstaking).
H7836.kjv: (do something) betimes, enquire early, rise (seek) betimes, seek diligently) early, in the morning).

H7837.definition: from שָׁחַר; dawn (literal, figurative or adverbial).
H7837.kjv: day(-spring), early, light, morning, whence riseth.

H7838.definition: or שָׁחוֹר; from שָׁחַר; properly, dusky, but also (absol.) jetty.

H7839.definition: from שָׁחַר; a dawning, i.e. (figuratively) juvenescence.

H7841.definition: from שָׁחַר and יָהּ; Jah has sought; Shecharjah, an Israelite.

H7842.definition: dual of שַׁחַר; double dawn; Shacharajim, an Israelite.

H7843.definition: a primitive root; to decay, i.e. (causatively) ruin (literally or figuratively).
H7843.kjv: batter, cast off, corrupt(-er, thing), destroy(-er, -uction), lose, mar, perish, spill, spoiler, [idiom] utterly, waste(-r).

H7845.definition: from שׁוּחַ; a pit (especially as a trap); figuratively, destruction.

H7846.definition: or סֵט; from שׂוּט; a departure from right, i.e. sin.

H7847.definition: a primitive root; to deviate from duty.

H7848.definition: feminine of a derivative (only in the plural שִׁטִּים; meaning the sticks of wood) from the same as שֹׁטֵט; the acacia (from its scourging thorns).
H7848.kjv: shittah, shittim. See also בֵּית הַשִּׁטָּה.

H7849.kjv: all abroad, enlarge, spread, stretch out.

H7850.definition: active participle of an otherwise unused root meaning (properly, to pierce; but only as a denominative from שׁוֹט); to flog; a goad.

H7851.definition: the same as the plural of שִׁטָּה; acacia trees; Shittim, a place East of the Jordan.

H7852.definition: a primitive root; properly, to lurk for, i.e. persecute.

H7853.definition: a primitive root; to attack, (figuratively) accuse.

H7854.definition: from שָׂטַן; an opponent; especially (with the article prefixed) Satan, the arch-enemy of good.

H7856.definition: the same as שִׂטְנָה; Sitnah, the name of a well in Pal.

H7857.definition: a primitive root; to gush; by implication, to inundate, cleanse; by analogy, to gallop, conquer.
H7857.kjv: drown, (over-) flow(-whelm, rinse, run, rush, (throughly) wash (away).

H7858.definition: or שֵׁטֶף; from שָׁטַף; a deluge (literally or figuratively).

H7860.definition: active participle of an otherwise unused root probably meaning to write; properly, a scribe, i.e. (by analogy or implication) an official superintendent or magistrate.

H7861.definition: from the same as שֹׁטֵר; magisterial; Shitrai, an Israelite.

H7862.definition: probably from שָׁוָה; a gift (as available).

H7863.definition: from the same as שׂוֹא by permutation; elevation.

H7865.definition: from שִׂיא; peak; Sion, the summit of Mount Hermon.

H7866.definition: xlit Shîʼyôwn corrected to Shîyʼôwn; from the same as שׁוֹא; ruin; Shijon, a place in Palestine.

H7867.definition: a primitive root; properly, to become aged, i.e. (by implication) to grow gray.

H7870.definition: by permutation from שׁוּב; a return (of property).

H7873.definition: from שׂוּג; a withdrawal (into a private place).

H7874.definition: lemma שׂיד missing vowel, corrected to שִׂיד; a primitive root probably meaning to boil up (compare שׁוּד); used only as denominative from שִׂיד; to plaster.

H7875.definition: from שִׂידlemma שׂיד missing vowel, corrected to שִׂיד; lime (as boiling when slacked).

H7876.definition: a primitive root; to keep in memory; be unmindful. (Render Deuteronomy 32:18, 'A Rock bore thee, thou must recollect.

H7877.definition: of unknown derivation; Shiza, an Israelite.

H7878.definition: a primitive root; to ponder, i.e. (by implication) converse (with oneself, and hence, aloud) or (transitively) utter.
H7878.kjv: commune, complain, declare, meditate, muse, pray, speak, talk (with).

H7879.definition: from שִׂיחַ; a contemplation; by implication, an utterance.
H7879.kjv: babbling, communication, complaint, meditation, prayer, talk.

H7880.definition: from שִׂיחַ; a shoot (as if uttered or put forth), i.e. (generally) shrubbery.

H7881.definition: feminine of שִׂיחַ; reflection; be extension, devotion.

H7883.definition: or שִׁחוֹר; or שִׁחֹר; probably from שָׁחַר; dark, i.e. turbid; Shichor, a stream of Egypt.

H7884.definition: from the same as שִׁיחוֹר and לָבַן; darkish whiteness; Shichor-Libnath, a stream of Palestine.

H7885.definition: from שׁוּט; also compare שׁוֹט; an oar; a scourge (figuratively).

H7886.definition: from שָׁלָה; tranquil; Shiloh, an epithet of the Messiah.

H7887.definition: or שִׁלֹה; or שִׁילוֹ; or שִׁלוֹ; from the same as שִׁילֹה; Shiloh, a place in Palestine.

H7888.definition: or שִׁילֹנִי; or שִׁלֹנִי; from שִׁילֹה; a Shilonite or inhabitant of Shiloh.

H7889.definition: apparently for יְשִׁימוֹן; desert; Shimon, an Israelite.

H7890.definition: from an unused root meaning to urinate; urine.

H7891.definition: or (the original form) שׁוּר; (1 Samuel 18:6), a primitive root (rather identical with שׁוּר through the idea of strolling minstrelsy); to sing.
H7891.kjv: behold (by mistake for שׁוּר), sing(-er, -ing man, -ing woman).

H7892.definition: or feminine שִׁירָה; from שִׁיר; a song; abstractly, singing.

H7893.definition: from an unused root meaning to bleach, i.e. whiten;  See שֵׁשׁ.; white, i.e. marble..

H7894.definition: from the same as שַׁיִשׁ; whiteness; Shisha, an Israelite.

H7895.definition: or שׁוּשַׁק; of Egyptian derivation; Shishak, an Egyptian king.

H7896.definition: a primitive root; to place (in a very wide application).
H7896.kjv: apply, appoint, array, bring, consider, lay (up), let alone, [idiom] look, make, mark, put (on), [phrase] regard, set, shew, be stayed, [idiom] take.

H7897.definition: from שִׁית; a dress (as put on).

H7898.definition: from שִׁית; scrub or trash, i.e. wild growth of weeds or briers (as if put on the field).

H7899.definition: from סָכַךְ in the sense of שׂוּךְ; a brier (as of a hedge).

H7900.definition: from סָכַךְ in the sense of שׂוּךְ; a booth (as interlaced).

H7901.definition: a primitive root; to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose).
H7901.kjv: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

H7902.definition: from שָׁכַב; a lying down (of dew, or for the sexual act).

H7903.definition: lemma שֶׁכֹבֶת first vowel, corrected to שְׁכֹבֶת; from שָׁכַב; a (sexual) lying with.

H7904.definition: a primitive root; to roam (through lust).
H7904.kjv: in the morning (by mistake for שָׁכַם).

H7905.definition: feminine of שֹׂךְ in the sense of שֵׂךְ; a dart (as pointed like a thorn).

H7906.definition: from an unused root apparently meaning to surmount; an observatory (with the article); Seku, a place in Palestine.

H7907.definition: from the same as שֵׂכוּ; observant, i.e. (concretely) the mind.

H7910.definition: or שִׁכֹּר; from שָׁכַר; intoxicated, as astate or a habit.

H7911.definition: or שָׁכֵחַ; a primitive root; to mislay, i.e. to be oblivious of, from want of memory or attention.

H7912.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁכַח through the idea of disclosure of a covered or forgotten thing; to discover (literally or figuratively).

H7914.definition: feminine from the same as שֵׂכוּ; a conspicuous object.

H7915.definition: intensive perhaps from the same as שֵׂכוּ in the sense of שׂוּךְ; a knife (as pointed or edged).

H7916.definition: from שָׂכַר; a man at wages  by the day or year.

H7918.definition: a primitive root; to weave (i.e. lay) a trap; figuratively, (through the idea of secreting) to allay (passions; physically, abate a flood).
H7918.kjv: appease, assuage, make to cease, pacify, set.

H7919.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, make or act) circumspect and hence, intelligent.
H7919.kjv: consider, expert, instruct, prosper, (deal) prudent(-ly), (give) skill(-ful), have good success, teach, (have, make to) understand(-ing), wisdom, (be, behave self, consider, make) wise(-ly), guide wittingly.

H7921.definition: a primitive root; properly, to miscarry, i.e. suffer abortion; by analogy, to bereave (literally or figuratively).
H7921.kjv: bereave (of children), barren, cast calf (fruit, young), be (make) childless, deprive, destroy, [idiom] expect, lose children, miscarry, rob of children, spoil.

H7922.definition: or שֵׂכֶל; from שָׂכַל; intelligence; by implication, success.
H7922.kjv: discretion, knowledge, policy, prudence, sense, understanding, wisdom, wise.

H7923.definition: plural from שָׁכֹל; childlessness (by continued bereavements).
H7923.kjv: to have after loss of others.

H7925.definition: a primitive root; properly, to incline (the shoulder to a burden); but used only as denominative from שְׁכֶם; literally, to load up (on the back of man or beast), i.e. to start early in the morning.
H7925.kjv: (arise, be up, get (oneself) up, rise up) early (betimes), morning.

H7926.definition: from שָׁכַם; the neck (between the shoulders) as the place of burdens; figuratively, the spur of ahill.

H7927.definition: the same as שְׁכֶם; ridge; Shekem, a place in Palestine.

H7928.definition: for שְׁכֶם; Shekem, the name of a Hivite and two Israelites.

H7930.definition: patronymic from שֶׁכֶם; a Shikmite (collectively), or descendants of Shekem.

H7931.definition: a primitive root (apparently akin (by transmission) to שָׁכַב through the idea of lodging; compare סִכְלוּת, שָׁכַם); to reside or permanently stay (literally or figuratively).
H7931.kjv: abide, continue, (cause to, make to) dwell(-er), have habitation, inhabit, lay, place, (cause to) remain, rest, set (up).

H7934.definition: from שָׁכַן; a resident; by extension, a fellow-citizen.

H7935.definition: or (prolonged) שְׁכַנְיָהוּ; from שָׁכַן and יָהּ; Jah has dwelt; Shekanjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H7936.definition: or (by permutation) סָכַר; (Ezra 4:5), a primitive root (apparently akin (by prosthesis) to כָּרָה through the idea of temporary purchase; compare שָׁכַר); to hire.
H7936.kjv: earn wages, hire (out self), reward, [idiom] surely.

H7937.definition: a primitive root; to become tipsy; in a qualified sense, to satiate with astimulating drink or (figuratively) influence.
H7937.kjv: (be filled with) drink (abundantly), (be, make) drunk(-en), be merry. (Superlative of שָׁקָה.)

H7939.definition: from שָׂכַר; payment of contract; concretely, salary, fare, maintenance; by implication, compensation, benefit.

H7940.definition: the same as שָׂכָר; recompense; Sakar, the name of two Israelites.

H7941.definition: from שָׁכַר; an intoxicant, i.e. intensely alcoholic liquor.

H7942.definition: for שִׁכָּרוֹן; drunkenness, Shikkeron, a place in Palestine.

H7944.definition: from שָׁלָה abbreviated form; a fault.

H7945.definition: for the rel. אֲשֶׁר; used with prepositional prefix, and often followed by some pronominal affix; on account of, whatsoever, whichsoever.

H7947.definition: a primitive root; to space off; intensive (evenly) to make equidistant.

H7948.definition: from שָׁלַב; a spacer or raised interval, i.e. the stile in aframe or panel.

H7949.definition: a primitive root; properly, meaning to be white; used only as denominative from שֶׁלֶג; to be snow-white (with the linen clothing of the slain).

H7950.definition: from שָׁלַג; snow (probably from its whiteness).

H7951.definition: or שָׁלַו; (Job 3:26), a primitive root; to be tranquil, i.e. secure or successful.
H7951.kjv: be happy, prosper, be in safety.

H7952.definition: a primitive root (probably identical with שָׁלָה through the idea of educing); to mislead.

H7953.definition: a primitive root (rather cognate (by contraction) to the base of נָשַׁל, שָׁלַל and their congeners through the idea of extracting); to draw out or off, i.e. remove (the soul by death).

H7954.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁלָה; to be secure.

H7955.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to שָׁלָה; a wrong.

H7956.definition: the same as שְׁאֵלָה (shortened); request; Shelah, the name of a postdiluvian patriarch and of an Israelite.

H7957.definition: from the same as לַהַב with sibilant prefix; a flare of fire.

H7958.definition: or שְׂלָיו; by orthographical variation from שָׁלָה through the idea of sluggishness; the quail collectively (as slow in flight from its weight).

H7960.definition: (Aramaic) or שָׁלוּת; (Aramaic), from the same as שָׁלָה; a fault.

H7961.definition: or שָׁלֵיו; feminine שְׁלֵוָה; from שָׁלָה; tranquil; (in a bad sense) careless; abstractly, security.
H7961.kjv: (being) at ease, peaceable, (in) prosper(-ity), quiet(-ness), wealthy.

H7964.definition: or שִׁלֻּחַ; from שָׁלַח; (only in plural) a dismissal, i.e. (of a wife) divorce (especially the document); also (of a daughter) dower.

H7965.definition: or שָׁלֹם; from שָׁלַם; safe, i.e. (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare, i.e. health, prosperity, peace.
H7965.kjv: [idiom] do, familiar, [idiom] fare, favour, [phrase] friend, [idiom] great, (good) health, ([idiom] perfect, such as be at) peace(-able, -ably), prosper(-ity, -ous), rest, safe(-ty), salute, welfare, ([idiom] all is, be) well, [idiom] wholly.

H7966.definition: or שִׁלֻּם; from שָׁלַם; a requital, i.e. (secure) retribution, (venal) a fee.

H7967.definition: or (shorter) שַׁלֻּם; the same as שִׁלּוּם; Shallum, the name of fourteen Israelites.

H7968.definition: probably for שַׁלּוּם; Shallun, an Israelite.

H7969.definition: or שָׁלֹשׁ; masculine שְׁלוֹשָׁה; or שְׁלֹשָׁה; a primitive number; three; occasionally (ordinal) third, or (multiple) thrice.
H7969.kjv: [phrase] fork, [phrase] often(-times), third, thir(-teen, -teenth), three, [phrase] thrice. Compare שָׁלִישׁ.

H7970.definition: or שְׁלֹשִׁים; multiple of שָׁלוֹשׁ; thirty; or (ordinal) thirtieth.

H7971.definition: a primitive root; to send away, for, or out (in a great variety of applications).
H7971.kjv: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring (on the way), cast (away, out), conduct, [idiom] earnestly, forsake, give (up), grow long, lay, leave, let depart (down, go, loose), push away, put (away, forth, in, out), reach forth, send (away, forth, out), set, shoot (forth, out), sow, spread, stretch forth (out).

H7973.definition: from שָׁלַח; a missile of attack, i.e. spear; also (figuratively) a shoot of growth; i.e. branch.
H7973.kjv: dart, plant, [idiom] put off, sword, weapon.

H7974.definition: the same as שֶׁלַח; Shelach, a postdiluvian patriarch.
H7974.kjv: Salah, Shelah. Compare שִׁלֹחַlemma שִׁלֹּחַ extra dagesh, corrected to שִׁלֹחַ.

H7975.definition: lemma שִׁלֹּחַ extra dagesh, corrected to שִׁלֹחַ; or (in imitation of שֶׁלַח) שֶׁלַח; (Nehemiah 3:15), from שָׁלַח; rill; Shiloach, a fountain of Jerusalem.

H7977.definition: from שֶׁלַח; missive, i.e. armed; Shilchi, an Israelite.

H7978.definition: plural of שֶׁלַח; javelins or sprouts; Shilchim, a place in Palestine.

H7979.definition: from שָׁלַח; a table (as spread out); by implication, a meal.

H7980.definition: a primitive root; to dominate, i.e. govern; by implication, to permit.
H7980.kjv: (bear, have) rule, have dominion, give (have) power.

H7982.definition: from שָׁלַט; probably a shield (as controlling, i.e. protecting the person).

H7988.definition: feminine from שָׁלָה; a fetus or babe (as extruded in birth).

H7989.definition: from שָׁלַט; potent; concretely, a prince or warrior.
H7989.kjv: governor, mighty, that hath power, ruler.

H7990.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שַׁלִּיט; mighty; abstractly, permission; concretely, a premier.

H7991.definition: or שָׁלוֹשׁ; (1 Chronicles 11:11; 1 Chronicles 12:18), or שָׁלֹשׁ; (2 Samuel 23:13), from שָׁלוֹשׁ; a triple, i.e. (as a musical instrument) a triangle (or perhaps rather threestringed lute); also (as an indefinite, great quantity) a three-fold measure (perhaps a treble ephah); also (as an officer) a general of the third rank (upward, i.e. the highest).
H7991.kjv: captain, instrument of musick, (great) lord, (great) measure, prince, three (from the margin).

H7992.definition: ordinal from שָׁלוֹשׁ; third; feminine athird (part); by extension, a third (day, year or time); specifically, a third-story cell).

H7993.definition: a primitive root; to throw out, down or away (literally or figuratively).
H7993.kjv: adventure, cast (away, down, forth, off, out), hurl, pluck, throw.

H7994.definition: from שָׁלַךְ; bird of prey, usually thought to be the pelican (from casting itself into the sea).

H7996.definition: the same as שַׁלֶּכֶת; Shalleketh, a gate in Jerusalem.

H7997.definition: a primitive root; to drop or strip; by implication, to plunder.
H7997.kjv: let fall, make self a prey, [idiom] of purpose, (make a, (take)) spoil.

H7999.definition: a primitive root; to be safe (in mind, body or estate); figuratively, to be (causatively, make) completed; by implication, to be friendly; by extension, to reciprocate (in various applications).
H7999.kjv: make amends, (make an) end, finish, full, give again, make good, (re-) pay (again), (make) (to) (be at) peace(-able), that is perfect, perform, (make) prosper(-ous), recompense, render, requite, make restitution, restore, reward, [idiom] surely.

H8000.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁלַם; to complete, to restore.

H8002.definition: from שָׁלַם; properly, requital, i.e. a (voluntary) sacrifice in thanks.

H8003.definition: from שָׁלַם; complete (literally or figuratively); especially friendly.
H8003.kjv: full, just, made ready, peaceable, perfect(-ed), quiet, Shalem (by mistake for a name), whole.

H8004.definition: the same as שָׁלֵם; peaceful; Shalem, an early name of Jerusalem.

H8006.definition: the same as שִׁלֵּם; Shillem, an Israelite.

H8007.definition: probably for שַׂלְמָה; clothing; Salma, the name of two Israelites.

H8009.definition: the same as שַׂלְמָה; clothing; Salmah, an Israelite.

H8010.definition: from שָׁלוֹם; peaceful; Shelomah, David's successor.

H8012.definition: from שַׂלְמָה; investiture; Salmon, an Israelite.

H8013.definition: feminine plural of שָׁלוֹם; pacifications; Shelomoth, the name of two Israelites.
H8013.kjv: Shelomith (from the margin), Shelomoth. Compare שְׁלֹמִית.

H8014.definition: from שַׂלְמָה; clothed; Salmai, an Israelite.

H8015.definition: from שָׁלוֹם; peaceable; Shelomi, an Israelite.

H8016.definition: patronymically from שִׁלֵּם; a Shilemite (collectively) or descendants of Shillem.

H8017.definition: lemma שִׁלֻמִיאֵל corrected to שְׁלֻמִיאֵל; from שָׁלוֹם and אֵל; peace of God; Shelumiel, an Israelite.

H8018.definition: or שֶׁלֶמְיָהוּ; from שֶׁלֶם and יָהּ; thankoffering of Jah; Shelemjah, the name of nine Israelites.

H8019.definition: or שׁלוֹמִית; (Ezra 8:10), from שָׁלוֹם; peaceableness; Shelomith, the name of five Israelites and three Israelitesses.

H8020.definition: of foreign derivation; Shalman, a king apparently of Assyria.

H8022.definition: of foreign derivation; Shalmaneser, an Assyrian king.

H8023.definition: the same as שִׁילוֹנִי; Shiloni, an Israelite.

H8024.definition: from שֵׁלָה; a Shelanite (collectively), or descendants of Shelah.

H8025.definition: a primitive root; to pull out, up or off.

H8026.definition: from שָׁלַף; extract; Sheleph, a son of Jokthan.

H8027.definition: a primitive root perhaps originally to intensify, i.e. treble; but apparently used only as denominative from שָׁלוֹשׁ,; to be (causatively, make) triplicate (by restoration, in portions, strands, days or years).
H8027.kjv: do the third time, (divide into, stay) three (days, -fold, parts, years old).

H8028.definition: from שָׁלַשׁ; triplet; Shelesh, an Israelite.

H8029.definition: from שָׁלַשׁ; a descendant of the third degree, i.e. great grandchild.

H8030.definition: feminine from the same as שֶׁלֶשׁ; triplication; Shilshah, an Israelite.

H8031.definition: feminine from שָׁלַשׁ; trebled land; Shalishah, a place in Palestine.

H8032.definition: or שִׁלְשֹׁם; from the same as שֶׁלֶשׁ; trebly, i.e. (in time) day before yesterday.
H8032.kjv: [phrase] before (that time, -time), excellent things (from the margin), [phrase] heretofore, three days, [phrase] time past.

H8033.definition: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, אֲשֶׁר); there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence.
H8033.kjv: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.

H8034.definition: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare שָׁמַיִם); an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character.

H8035.definition: the same as שֵׁם; name; Shem, a son of Noah (often includ. his posterity).

H8037.definition: from שָׁמֵם; desolation; Shamma, an Israelite.

H8038.definition: apparently from שֵׁם and אֵבֶר; name of pinion, i.e. illustrious; Shemeber, a king of Zeboim.

H8039.definition: perhaps for שִׁמְעָה; Shimah, an Israelite.

H8040.definition: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as שִׂמְלָה (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up); properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand.

H8041.definition: a primitive root (denominative from שְׂמֹאול); to use the left hand or pass in that direction).

H8042.definition: from שְׂמֹאול; situated on the left side.

H8043.definition: for שִׁמְאָה (compare אֲבִיָּם); Shimam, an Israelite.

H8044.definition: of uncertain derivation; Shamgar, an Israelite judge.

H8045.kjv: destory(-uction), bring to nought, overthrow, perish, pluck down, [idiom] utterly.

H8047.definition: from שָׁמֵם; ruin; by implication, consternation.

H8048.definition: the same as שַׁמָּה; Shammah, the name of an Edomite and four Israelites.

H8049.definition: for שַׁמָּה; desolation; Shamhuth, an Israelite.

H8050.definition: from the passive participle of שָׁמַע and אֵל; heard of God; Shemuel, the name of three Israelites.

H8051.definition: from שָׁמֵם; renowned; Shammua, the name of four Israelites.

H8052.definition: feminine passive participle of שָׁמֵם; something heard, i.e. an announcement.
H8052.kjv: bruit, doctrine, fame, mentioned, news, report, rumor, tidings.

H8053.definition: passive participle of שִׁמְצָה; observed; Shamur, an Israelite.

H8054.definition: plural of שַׁמָּה; ruins; Shammoth, an Israelite.

H8055.definition: a primitive root; probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome.
H8055.kjv: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.

H8057.definition: from שָׂמֵחַ; blithesomeness or glee, (religious or festival).
H8057.kjv: [idiom] exceeding(-ly), gladness, joy(-fulness), mirth, pleasure, rejoice(-ing).

H8058.definition: a primitive root; to fling down; incipiently to jostle; figuratively, to let alone, desist, remit.
H8058.kjv: discontinue, overthrow, release, let rest, shake, stumble, throw down.

H8059.definition: from שָׁמַט; remission (of debt) or suspension of labor).

H8060.definition: from שַׁמְלַי; destructive; Shammai, the name of three Israelites.

H8061.definition: apparently from שֵׁם and יָדַע; name of knowing; Shemida, an Israelite.

H8062.definition: patronymically from שְׁמִידָע; a Shemidaite (collectively) or descendants of Shemida.

H8063.definition: from סָמַךְ; a run (as sustaining the Oriental sitter).

H8064.definition: dual of an unused singular שָׁמֶה; from an unused root meaning to be lofty; the sky (as aloft; the dual perhaps alluding to the visible arch in which the clouds move, as well as to the higher ether where the celestial bodies revolve).

H8067.definition: feminine of שְׁמִינִי; probably an eight-stringed lyre.

H8068.definition: from שָׁמַר in the original sense of pricking; a thorn; also (from its keenness for scratching) a gem, probably the diamond.

H8069.definition: the same as שָׁמִיר; Shamir, the name of two places in Palestine.

H8070.definition: or שְׁמָרִימוֹת; probably from שֵׁם and plural of רָמָה; name of heights; Shemiramoth, the name of two Israelites.

H8071.definition: perhaps by permutation for the feminine of סֶמֶל (through the idea of a cover assuming the shape of the object beneath); a dress, especially a mantle.
H8071.kjv: apparel, cloth(-es, -ing), garment, raiment. Compare שַׂלְמָה.

H8072.definition: probably for the same as שִׂמְלָה; Samlah, an Edomite.

H8073.definition: for שַׂלְמַי; Shamlai, one of the Nethinim.

H8074.definition: a primitive root; to stun (or intransitively, grow numb), i.e. devastate or (figuratively) stupefy (both usually in a passive sense).
H8074.kjv: make amazed, be astonied, (be an) astonish(-ment), (be, bring into, unto, lay, lie, make) desolate(-ion, places), be destitute, destroy (self), (lay, lie, make) waste, wonder.

H8077.definition: or שִׁמָמָה; feminine of שָׁמֵם; devastation; figuratively, astonishment.

H8079.definition: probably from שָׁמֵם (in the sense of poisoning); a lizard (from the superstition of its noxiousness).

H8080.definition: a primitive root; to shine, i.e. (by analogy) be (causatively, make) oily or gross.

H8081.definition: from שָׁמַן; grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness.
H8081.kjv: anointing, [idiom] fat (things), [idiom] fruitful, oil(-ed), ointment, olive, [phrase] pine.

H8082.definition: from שָׁמַן; greasy, i.e. gross; figuratively, rich.

H8083.definition: or שְׁמוֹנֶה; feminine שְׁמֹנָה; or שְׁמוֹנָה; apparently from שָׁמֵן through the idea of plumpness; a cardinal number, eight (as if a surplus above the 'perfect' seven); also (as ordinal) eighth.

H8084.definition: or שְׁמוֹנִים; multiple from שְׁמֹנֶה; eighty, also eightieth.

H8085.definition: a primitive root; to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.).
H8085.kjv: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, make to) hear(-ken, tell), [idiom] indeed, listen, make (a) noise, (be) obedient, obey, perceive, (make a) proclaim(-ation), publish, regard, report, shew (forth), (make a) sound, [idiom] surely, tell, understand, whosoever (heareth), witness.

H8087.definition: for the same as שֵׁמַע; Shema, the name of a place in Palestine and of four Israelites.

H8088.definition: from שָׁמַע; something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement; abstractly, audience.
H8088.kjv: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings.

H8090.definition: for שֶׁמַע; Shema, a place in Palestine.

H8091.definition: from שָׁמַע; obedient; Shama, an Israelite.

H8092.definition: for שִׁמְעָה; Shima, the name of four Israelites.

H8093.definition: feminine of שֵׁמַע; annunciation; Shimah, an Israelite.

H8095.definition: from שָׁמַע; hearing; Shimon, one of Jacob's sons, also the tribe descended from him.

H8096.definition: from שֵׁמַע; famous; Shimi, the name of twenty Israelites.
H8096.kjv: Shimeah (from the margin), Shimei, Shimhi, Shimi.

H8097.definition: patronymically from שִׁמְעִי; a Shimite (collectively) or descendants of Shimi.

H8098.definition: or שְׁמַעְיָהוּ; from שָׁמַע and יָהּ; Jah has heard; Shemajah, the name of twenty-five Israelites.

H8099.definition: patronymically from שִׁמְעוֹן; a Shimonite (collectively) or descendants of Shimon.

H8100.definition: feminine of שֵׁמַע; annunciation; Shimath, an Ammonitess.

H8101.definition: patronymically from שִׁמְעָה; a Shimathite (collectively) or descendants of Shimah.

H8102.definition: from an unused root meaning to emit a sound; an inkling.

H8103.definition: feminine of שֶׁמֶץ; scornful whispering (of hostile spectators).

H8104.definition: a primitive root; properly, to hedge about (as with thorns), i.e. guard; generally, to protect, attend to, etc..
H8104.kjv: beward, be circumspect, take heed (to self), keep(-er, self), mark, look narrowly, observe, preserve, regard, reserve, save (self), sure, (that lay) wait (for), watch(-man).

H8105.definition: from שָׁמַר; something preserved, i.e. the settlings (plural only) of wine.

H8106.definition: the same as שֶׁמֶר; Shemer, the name of three Israelites.

H8108.definition: feminine of an unused noun from שָׁמַר meaning a guard; watchfulness.

H8109.definition: feminine of passive participle of שָׁמַר; something guarded, i.e. an eye-lid.

H8110.definition: from שֶׁמֶר in its original sense; guardianship; Shimron, the name of an Israelite and of a place in Palestine.

H8111.definition: from the active participle of שָׁמַר; watch-station; Shomeron, a place in Palestine.

H8112.definition: from שִׁמְרוֹן and a derivative of מָרָא; guard of lashing; Shimron-Meron, a place in Palestine.

H8113.definition: from שֶׁמֶר in its original sense; watchful; Shimri, the name of four Israelites.

H8114.definition: or שְׁמַרְיָהוּ; from שָׁמַר and יָהּ; Jah has guarded; Shemarjah, the name of four Israelites.

H8115.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שֹׁמְרוֹן; Shomrain, a place in Palestine.

H8116.definition: feminine of שִׁמְרִי; female guard; Shimrith, a Moabitess.

H8117.definition: lemma שׁמְרֹנִי missing vowel, corrected to שִׁמְרֹנִי; patronymically from שִׁמְרוֹן; a Shimronite (collectively) or descendants of Shimron.

H8118.definition: patrial from שֹׁמְרוֹן; a Shomeronite (collectively) or inhabitants of Shomeron.

H8119.definition: from שָׁמַר; guardship; Shimrath, an Israelite.

H8120.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of שֶׁמֶשׁ through the idea of activity implied in day-light; to serve.

H8121.definition: from an unused root meaning to be brilliant; the sun; by implication, the east; figuratively, a ray, i.e. (architectural) a notched battlement.
H8121.kjv: [phrase] east side(-ward), sun (rising), [phrase] west(-ward), window. See also בֵּית שֶׁמֶשׁ.

H8123.definition: from שֶׁמֶשׁ; sunlight; Shimshon, an Israelite.

H8124.definition: (Aramaic) from שֶׁמֶשׁ; sunny; Shimshai, a Samaritan.

H8125.definition: apparently from שֶׁמֶשׁ; sunlike; Shamsherai, an Israelite.

H8126.definition: patronymically from an unused name from שׁוּם probably meaning garlic-smell; a Shumathite (collectively) or descendants of Shumah.

H8127.definition: from שָׁנַן; compare  שֶׁנְהַבִּים; a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff.

H8129.definition: the same as שֵׁן; crag; Shen, a place in Palestine.

H8134.definition: probably from שָׁנָא and אָב; a father has turned; Shinab, a Canaanite.

H8137.definition: xlit Shenatstsar corrected to Shenʼatstsar; apparently of Babylonian origin; Shenatstsar, an Israelite.

H8138.definition: a primitive root; to fold, i.e. duplicate (literally or figuratively); by implication, to transmute (transitive or intransitive).
H8138.kjv: do (speak, strike) again, alter, double, (be given to) change, disguise, (be) diverse, pervert, prefer, repeat, return, do the second time.

H8141.definition: (in plural or (feminine) שָׁנָה; from שָׁנָה; a year (as a revolution of time).

H8143.definition: from שֵׁן and the plural apparently of a foreign word; probably, tooth of elephants, i.e. ivory tusk.

H8144.definition: of uncertain derivation; crimson, properly, the insect or its color, also stuff dyed with it.

H8145.definition: from שָׁנָה; properly, double, i.e. second; also adverbially, again.
