H8147.definition: dual of שֵׁנִי; feminine שְׁתַּיִם; two; also (as ordinal) twofold.
H8147.kjv: both, couple, double, second, twain, [phrase] twelfth, [phrase] twelve, [phrase] twenty (sixscore) thousand, twice, two.

H8148.definition: from שָׁנַן; something pointed, i.e. a gibe.

H8149.definition: or שְׂנִיר; from an unused root meaning to be pointed; peak; Shenir or Senir, a summit of Lebanon.

H8150.definition: a primitive root; to point (transitive or intransitive); intensively, to pierce; figuratively, to inculcate.

H8151.definition: a primitive root; to compress (with a belt).

H8152.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Shinar, a plain in Babylonia.

H8154.definition: or שָׁשָׂה; (Isaiah 10:13), a primitive root; to plunder.

H8156.definition: a primitive root; to split or tear; figuratively, to upbraid.

H8158.definition: a primitive root; to cut in pieces, i.e. slaughter.

H8159.definition: a primitive root; to gaze at or about (properly, for help); by implication, to inspect, consider, compassionate, be nonplussed (as looking around in amazement) or bewildered.
H8159.kjv: depart, be dim, be dismayed, look (away), regard, have respect, spare, turn.

H8160.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to שָׁעָה; properly, a look, i.e. a moment.

H8161.definition: feminine from an unused root meaning to stamp; a clatter (of hoofs).

H8162.definition: probably of foreign derivation; linsey-woolsey, i.e. cloth of linen and wool carded and spun together.
H8162.kjv: garment of divers sorts, linen and wollen.

H8163.definition: or שָׂעִר; from שָׂעַר; shaggy; as noun, a he-goat; by analogy, a faun.
H8163.kjv: devil, goat, hairy, kid, rough, satyr.

H8164.definition: formed the same as שָׂעִיר; a shower (as tempestuous).

H8165.definition: formed like שָׂעִיר; rough; Seir, a mountain of Idumaea and its aboriginal occupants, also one in Palestine.

H8167.definition: formed as שְׂעִירָה; roughness; Seirah, a place in Palestine.

H8168.definition: from an unused root meaning to hollow out; the palm; by extension, a handful.

H8169.definition: or שַׁעֲלַבִּין; plural from שׁוּעָל; fox-holes; Shaalbim or Shaalabbin, a place in Palestine.

H8170.definition: patrial from שַׁעַלְבִים; a Shaalbonite or inhabitant of Shaalbin.

H8171.definition: plural of שׁוּעָל; foxes; Shaalim, a place in Palestine.

H8172.definition: a primitive root; to support one's self.
H8172.kjv: lean, lie, rely, rest (on, self), stay.

H8173.definition: a primitive root; (in a good acceptation) to look upon (with complacency), i.e. fondle, please or amuse (self); (in a bad one) to look about (in dismay), i.e. stare.
H8173.kjv: cry (out) (by confusion with שָׁוַע), dandle, delight (self), play, shut.

H8174.definition: from סָעַף; fluctuation; Shaaph, the name of two Israelites.

H8175.definition: a primitive root; to storm; by implication, to shiver, i.e. fear.
H8175.kjv: be (horribly) afraid, fear, hurl as a storm, be tempestuous, come like (take away as with) a whirlwind.

H8176.definition: a primitive root; to split or open, i.e. (literally, but only as denominative from שַׁעַר); compare see שׁוֹעֵר; to act as gatekeeper; (figuratively) to estimate.

H8178.definition: from שָׂעַר; a tempest; also a terror.
H8178.kjv: affrighted, [idiom] horribly, [idiom] sore, storm. See שֵׂעָר.

H8179.definition: from שָׁעַר in its original sense; an opening, i.e. door or gate.

H8180.definition: from שָׁעַר; a measure (as a section).

H8181.definition: or שַׂעַר; (Isaiah 7:20), from שָׂעַר in the sense of dishevelling; hair (as if tossed or bristling).

H8182.definition: from שָׁעַר; harsh or horrid, i.e. offensive.

H8184.definition: or שְׂעוֹרָה (feminine meaning the plant); and (masculine meaning the grain); also שְׂעֹר; or שְׂעוֹר; from שָׂעַר in the sense of roughness; barley (as villose).

H8186.definition: or שַׁעֲרִירִיָּה; or שַׁעֲרֻרִת; feminine from שָׁעַר in the sense of שָׂעַר; something fearful.

H8187.definition: from שָׁעַר and יָהּ; Jah has stormed; Shearjah, an Israelite.

H8188.definition: masculine plural of שְׂעֹרָה; barley grains; Seorim, an Israelite.

H8189.definition: dual of שַׁעַר; double gates; Shaarajim, a place in Palestine.

H8190.definition: of Persian derivation; Shaashgaz, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H8192.definition: a primitive root; to abrade, i.e. bare.

H8193.definition: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from סָפָה or שָׁפָה through the idea of termination (compare סוֹף); the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.).
H8193.kjv: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.

H8194.definition: from שָׁפָה in the sense of clarifying; a cheese (as strained from the whey).

H8195.definition: or שְׁפִי; from שָׁפָה; baldness (compare שְׁפִי); Shepho or Shephi, an Idumaean.

H8196.definition: or שְׁפוּט; from שָׁפַט; a judicial sentence, i.e. punishment.

H8197.definition: or שְׁפוּפָן; from the same as שְׁפִיפֹן; serpent-like; Shephupham or Shephuphan, an Israelite.

H8198.definition: feminine from an unused root meaning to spread out (as a family; see מִשְׁפָּחָה); a female slave (as a member of the household).

H8199.definition: a primitive root; to judge, i.e. pronounce sentence (for or against); by implication, to vindicate or punish; by extenssion, to govern; passively, to litigate (literally or figuratively).
H8199.kjv: [phrase] avenge, [idiom] that condemn, contend, defend, execute (judgment), (be a) judge(-ment), [idiom] needs, plead, reason, rule.

H8201.definition: from שָׁפַט; a sentence, i.e. infliction.

H8202.definition: from שָׁפַט; judge; Shaphat, the name of four Israelites.

H8203.definition: or שְׁפַטְיָהוּ; from שָׁפַט and יָהּ; Jah has judged; Shephatjah, the name of ten Israelites.

H8204.definition: from שָׁפַט; judge-like; Shiphtan, an Israelite.

H8205.definition: from שָׁפָה; bareness; concretely, a bare hill or plain.

H8206.definition: plural of an unused noun from the same as שְׁפִיפֹן and meaning the same; serpents; Shuppim, an Israelite.

H8207.definition: from an unused root meaning the same as שׁוּף; a kind of serpent (as snapping), probably the cerastes or horned adder.

H8208.definition: from שָׁפַר; beautiful; Shaphir, a place in Palestine.

H8209.definition: (Aramaic) intensive of a form corresponding to שָׁפִיר; beautiful.

H8210.definition: a primitive root; to spill forth (blood, a libation, liquid metal; or even a solid, i.e. to mound up); also (figuratively) to expend (life, soul, complaint, money, etc.); intensively, to sprawl out.
H8210.kjv: cast (up), gush out, pour (out), shed(-der, out), slip.

H8211.definition: from שָׁפַךְ; an emptying place, e.g. an ash-heap.

H8212.definition: feminine of a derivative from שָׁפַךְ; a pipe (for pouring forth, e.g. wine), i.e. the penis.

H8213.definition: a primitive root; to depress or sink (expectation figuratively, to humiliate, intransitive or transitive).
H8213.kjv: abase, bring (cast, put) down, debase, humble (self), be (bring, lay, make, put) low(-er).

H8217.definition: from שָׁפֵל; depressed, literally or figuratively.

H8219.definition: from שָׁפֵל; Lowland, i.e. (with the article) the maritime slope of Palestine.

H8221.definition: probably from שָׁפָה; bare spot; Shepham, a place in or near Palestine.

H8222.definition: from שָׂפָה; the beard (as a lippiece).

H8223.definition: formed like שְׁפָם; baldly; Shapham, an Israelite.

H8224.definition: feminine plural of שְׁפָם; Siphmoth, a place in Palestine.

H8225.definition: patrial from שְׁפָם; a Shiphmite or inhabitant of Shepham.

H8226.definition: a primitive root; to conceal (as a valuable).

H8227.definition: from שָׂפַן; a species of rockrabbit (from its hiding), i.e. probably the hyrax.

H8228.definition: from an unused root meaning to abound; resources.

H8230.definition: from שֶׁפַע; copious; Shiphi, an Israelite.

H8231.definition: a primitive root; to glisten, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) fair.

H8232.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁפַר; to be beautiful.

H8234.definition: the same as שֶׁפֶר; Shepher, a place in the Desert.

H8236.definition: the same as שִׁפְרָה; Shiphrah, an Israelitess.

H8237.definition: from שָׁפַר; splendid, i.e. a tapestry or canopy.

H8238.definition: (Aramaic) from שָׁפַר; the dawn (as brilliant with aurora).

H8239.definition: a primitive root; to locate, i.e. (generally) hang on or (figuratively) establish, reduce.

H8240.definition: from שָׁפַת; a (double) stall (for cattle); also a (two-pronged) hook (for flaying animals on).

H8241.definition: from שָׁטַף (for alliteration with קֶצֶף); an outburst (of anger).

H8242.definition: from שָׁקַק; properly, a mesh (as allowing a liquid to run through), i.e. coarse loose cloth or sacking (used in mourning and for bagging); hence, a bag (for grain, etc.).

H8245.definition: a primitive root; to be alert, i.e. sleepless; hence to be on the lookout (whether for good or ill).

H8246.definition: a denominative from שָׁקֵד; to be (intensively, make) almond-shaped.
H8246.kjv: make like (unto, after the fashion of) almonds.

H8247.definition: from שָׁקַד; the almond (tree or nut; as being the earliest in bloom).

H8248.definition: a primitive root; to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to.
H8248.kjv: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See שָׁכַר, שָׁתָה.

H8250.definition: from שָׁקָה; a beverage; moisture, i.e. (figuratively) refreshment.

H8251.definition: or שִׁקֻּץ; from שָׁקַץ; disgusting, i.e. filthy; especially idolatrous or (concretely) an idol.

H8252.definition: a primitive root; to repose (usually figurative).
H8252.kjv: appease, idleness, (at, be at, be in, give) quiet(-ness), (be at, be in, give, have, take) rest, settle, be still.

H8254.definition: a primitive root; to suspend or poise (especially in trade).

H8255.definition: from שָׁקַל; probably a weight; used as a commercial standard.

H8256.definition: or (feminine) שִׁקְמָה; of uncertain derivation; a sycamore (usually the tree).

H8257.definition: (abbreviated Amos 8:8); a primitive root; to subside; by implication, to be overflowed, cease; causatively, to abate, subdue.
H8257.kjv: make deep, let down, drown, quench, sink.

H8259.definition: a primitive root; properly, to lean out (of a window), i.e. (by implication) peep or gaze (passively, be a spectacle).

H8260.definition: from שָׁקַף; a loophole (for looking out), to admit light and air.

H8261.definition: passive participle of שָׁקַף; (compare שֶׁקֶף); an embrasure or opening  with bevelled jam.

H8262.definition: a primitive root; to be filthy, i.e. (intensively) to loathe, pollute.
H8262.kjv: abhor, make abominable, have in abomination, detest, [idiom] utterly.

H8263.definition: from שָׁקַץ; filth, i.e. (figuratively and specifically) an idolatrous object.

H8264.definition: a primitive root; to course (like a beast of prey); by implication, to seek greedily.
H8264.kjv: have appetite, justle one against another, long, range, run (to and fro).

H8265.definition: a primitive root; to ogle, i.e. blink coquettishly.

H8266.definition: a primitive root; to cheat, i.e. be untrue (usually in words).

H8267.definition: from שָׁקַר; an untruth; by implication, a sham (often adverbial).
H8267.kjv: without a cause, deceit(-ful), false(-hood, -ly), feignedly, liar, [phrase] lie, lying, vain (thing), wrongfully.

H8269.definition: from שָׂרַר; a head person (of any rank or class).
H8269.kjv: captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.

H8270.definition: from שָׁרַר; (compare שָׁרִיר); a string (as twisted ), i.e. (specifically) the umbilical cord (also figuratively, as the centre of strength).

H8271.definition: (Aramaic) a root corresponding to that of שֵׁרוּת; to free, separate; figuratively, to unravel, commence; by implication (of unloading beasts) to reside.

H8272.definition: of foreign derivation; Sharetser, the name of an Assyrian and an Israelite.

H8273.definition: from an unused root meaning to glare; quivering glow (of the air), expectation. the mirage.

H8274.definition: from שָׁרָב and יָהּ; Jah has brought heat; Sherebjah, the name of two Israelites.

H8275.definition: for שֵׁבֶט; a rod of empire.

H8277.definition: a primitive root; (compare שֶׂרֶד); properly, to puncture, i.e. (figuratively through the idea of slipping out) to escape or survive.

H8278.definition: from שָׂרַד; stitching (as pierced with a needle).

H8279.definition: from שָׂרַד; a (carpenter's) scribing-awl (for pricking or scratching measurements).

H8282.definition: feminine of שַׂר; a mistress, i.e. female noble.

H8283.definition: the same as שָׂרָה; Sarah, Abraham's wife.

H8284.definition: probably feminine of שׁוּר; a fortification (literally or figuratively).

H8285.definition: from שָׁרַר in its original sense of pressing; a wrist-band (as compact or clasping).

H8286.definition: from שָׂרַג; tendril; Serug, a postdiluvian patriarch.

H8287.definition: probably from שָׁרָה (in the sense of dwelling (compare שְׁרֵא) and חֵן; abode of pleasure; Sharuchen, a place in Palestine.

H8288.definition: from שָׂרַךְ; a thong (as laced or tied).

H8289.definition: probably abridged from יָשַׁר; plain, Sharon, the name of a place in Palestine.

H8290.definition: patrial from שָׁרוֹן; a Sharonite or inhabitant of Sharon.

H8291.definition: passive participle from the same as שֹׂרֵק; a grapevine.

H8292.definition: or (by permutation) שְׁרִיקָה; feminine passive participle of שָׁרַק; a whistling (in scorn); by analogy, a piping.

H8294.definition: by permutation for סֶרַח; superfluity; Serach, an Israelitess.

H8296.definition: and שָׂרֶטֶת; from שָׂרַט; an incision.

H8297.definition: from שַׂר; dominative; Sarai, the wife of Abraham.

H8298.definition: probably from שָׁרַר; hostile; Sharay, an Israelite.

H8301.definition: the same as שָׂרִיד; Sarid, a place in Palestine.

H8302.definition: or שִׁרְיֹן; and שִׁרְיָן; also (feminine) שִׁרְיָה; and שִׁרְיֹנָה; from שָׁרָה in the original sense of turning; a corslet (as if twisted).
H8302.kjv: breastplate, coat of mail, habergeon, harness. See סִרְיֹן.

H8303.definition: and שִׂרְיֹן; the same as שְׂרָיָה (i.e. sheeted with snow); Shirjon or Sirjon, a peak of the Lebanon.

H8304.definition: or שְׂרָיָהוּ; from שָׂרָה and יָהּ; Jah has prevailed; Serajah, the name of nine Israelites.

H8305.definition: from the same as שֹׂרֵק in the original sense of piercing; hetchelling (or combing flax), i.e. (concretely) tow (by extension, linen cloth).

H8306.definition: from שָׁרַר in the original sense as in שֹׁר (compare שֹׁרֶר); a cord, i.e. (by analogy) sinew.

H8307.definition: from שָׁרַר in the sense of twisted, i.e. firm; obstinacy.

H8309.definition: probably by an orthographical error for שְׁדֵמָה; a common.

H8310.definition: of foreign derivation; Sarsekim, a Babylonian general.

H8311.definition: a primitive root; to prolong, i.e. (reflex) be deformed by excess of members.
H8311.kjv: stretch out self, (have any) superfluous thing.

H8313.definition: a primitive root; to be (causatively, set) on fire.
H8313.kjv: (cause to, make a) burn((-ing), up) kindle, [idiom] utterly.

H8314.definition: from שָׂרַף; burning, i.e. (figuratively) poisonous (serpent); specifically, a saraph or symbolical creature (from their copper color).

H8315.definition: the same as שָׂרָף; Saraph, an Israelite.

H8317.definition: a primitive root; to wriggle, i.e. (by implication) swarm or abound.
H8317.kjv: breed (bring forth, increase) abundantly (in abundance), creep, move.

H8318.definition: from שָׁרַץ; a swarm, i.e. active mass of minute animals.

H8319.definition: a primitive root; properly, to be shrill, i.e. to whistle or hiss (as a call or in scorn).

H8320.definition: from שָׁרַק; bright red (as piercing to the sight), i.e. bay.

H8321.definition: or שׂוֹרֵק; and (feminine) שֹׂרֵקָה; from שָׁרַק in the sense of redness (compare שָׂרֻק); a vine stock (properly, one yielding purple grapes, the richest variety).

H8323.definition: a primitive root; to have (transitively, exercise; reflexively, get) dominion.
H8323.kjv: [idiom] altogether, make self a prince, (bear) rule.

H8324.definition: a primitive root; to be hostile (only active participle an opponent).

H8325.definition: from שָׁרַר; hostile; Sharar, an Israelite.

H8326.definition: from שָׁרַר in the sense of twisting (compare שֹׁר); the umbilical cord, i.e. (by extension) a bodice.

H8327.definition: a primitive root; to root, i.e. strike into the soil, or (by implication) to pluck from it.

H8328.definition: from שָׁרַשׁ; a root (literally or figuratively).

H8329.definition: the same as שֶׁרֶשׁ; Sheresh, an Israelite.

H8331.definition: from שָׁרַשׁ; a chain (as rooted, i.e. linked).

H8332.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to שָׁרַשׁ; eradication, i.e. (figuratively) exile.

H8333.definition: from שָׁרַשׁ (compare שַׁרְשָׁה); a chain; (architectural) probably a garland.

H8334.definition: a primitive root; to attend as a menial or worshipper; figuratively, to contribute to.

H8335.definition: infinitive of שָׁרַת; service (in the Temple).

H8336.definition: or (for alliteration with מֶשִׁי) שְׁשִׁי; for שַׁיִשׁ; bleached stuff, i.e. white linen or (by analogy) marble.

H8337.definition: masculine שִׁשָּׁה; a primitive number; compare שׂוּשׂ; six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand); as ord. sixth.

H8338.definition: xlit shâwshâw corrected to shâshâʼ; a primitive root; apparently,; to annihilate.
H8338.kjv: leave by the sixth part (by confusion with שָׁשָׁה).

H8339.definition: of foreign derivation; Sheshbatstsar, Zerubbabel's Persian name.

H8341.definition: a denominative from שֵׁשׁ; to sixth or divide into sixths.

H8342.definition: or שָׂשֹׂן; from שׂוּשׂ; cheerfulness; specifically, welcome.

H8343.definition: perhaps from שֵׁשׁ; whitish; Shashai, an Israelite.

H8344.definition: probably for שָׁשַׁי; Sheshai, a Canaanite.

H8345.definition: from שֵׁשׁ; sixth, ord. or (feminine) fractional.

H8347.definition: of foreign derivation; Sheshak, a symbolic name of Babylon.

H8348.definition: perhaps for שׁוּשַׁן; lily; Sheshan, an Israelite.

H8349.definition: probably from the base of שׁוֹק; pedestrian; Shashak, an Israelite.

H8350.definition: perhaps from the base of שָׁרַר in the sense of that of שָׂרֻק; red ochre (from its piercing color).

H8352.definition: from שִׁית; put, i.e. substituted; Sheth, third son of Adam.

H8354.definition: a primitive root; to imbibe (literally or figuratively).
H8354.kjv: [idiom] assuredly, banquet, [idiom] certainly, drink(-er, -ing), drunk ([idiom] -ard), surely. (Prop. intensive of שָׁקָה.)

H8356.definition: from שִׁית; a basis, i.e. (figuratively) political or moral support.

H8357.definition: from שִׁית; the seat (of the person).

H8359.definition: from שִׁית; a fixture, i.e. the warp in weaving.

H8363.definition: xlit shᵉthiyl corrected to shᵉthil; from שָׁתַל; a sprig (as if transplanted), i.e. sucker.

H8364.definition: patronymically from שׁוּתֶלַח; a Shuthalchite (collectively) or descendants of Shuthelach.

H8366.definition: a primitive root; (causatively) to make water, i.e. urinate.

H8368.definition: a primitive root; to break out (as an eruption).

H8369.definition: of foreign derivation; Shethar, a Persian satrap.

H8370.definition: of foreign derivation; Shethar-Bozenai, a Persian officer.

H8371.definition: a primitive root; to place, i.e. array; reflex. to lie.

H8372.definition: and (feminine) תָּאָה; (Ezekiel 40:12), from (the base of) תָּאָה; a room (as circumscribed).

H8374.definition: a primitive root (probably identical with תָּאַב through the idea of puffing disdainfully at; compare אָיַב); to loathe (morally).

H8376.definition: a primitive root; to mark off, i.e. (intensively) designate.

H8377.definition: and תּוֹא; (the original form), from תָּאָה; a species of antelope (probably from the white stripe on the cheek).

H8378.definition: from אָוָה (abbreviated); a longing; by implication, a delight (subjectively, satisfaction, objectively, a charm).
H8378.kjv: dainty, desire, [idiom] exceedingly, [idiom] greedily, lust(ing), pleasant. See also קִבְרוֹת הַתַּאֲוָה.

H8379.definition: from תָּאָה; a limit, i.e. full extent.

H8380.definition: or תָּאֹם; from תָּאַם; a twin (in plural only), literally or figuratively.

H8382.definition: a primitive root; to be complete; but used only as denominative from תָּאוֹם,; to be (causatively, make) twinned, i.e. (figuratively) duplicate or (architectural) jointed.

H8384.definition: or (in the singular, feminine) תְּאֵנָה; perhaps of foreign derivation; the fig (tree or fruit).

H8385.definition: or תֹּאֲנָה; from אָנָה; an opportunity or (subjectively) purpose.

H8387.definition: from תַּאֲנָה and שִׁילֹה; approach of Shiloh; Taanath-Shiloh, a place in Palestine.

H8388.definition: a primitive root; to delineate; reflex. to extend.
H8388.kjv: be drawn, mark out, (Rimmon-) methoar (by union with רִמּוֹן).

H8389.definition: from תָּאַר; outline, i.e. figure or appearance.
H8389.kjv: [phrase] beautiful, [idiom] comely, countenance, [phrase] fair, [idiom] favoured, form, [idiom] goodly, [idiom] resemble, visage.

H8390.definition: perhaps from אֲרַע; Taarea, an Israelite.

H8391.definition: from אָשַׁר; a species of cedar (from its erectness).

H8392.definition: perhaps of foreign derivation; a box.

H8393.definition: from בּוֹא; income, i.e. produce (literally or figuratively).

H8394.definition: and (feminine) תְּבוּנָה; or תּוֹבֻנָה; from בִּין; intelligence; by implication, an argument; by extension, caprice.

H8395.definition: from בּוּס; a treading down, i.e. ruin.

H8396.definition: from a root corresponding to תְּבַר; broken region; Tabor, a mountain in Palestine, also a city adjacent.

H8397.definition: apparently from בָּלַל; mixture, i.e. unnatural bestiality.

H8398.definition: from יָבַל; the earth (as moist and therefore inhabited); by extension, the globe; by implication, its inhabitants; specifically, a particular land, as Babylonia, Palestine.

H8400.definition: from בָּלַל in the original sense of flowing; a cataract (in the eye).

H8401.definition: probably from בָּנָה; properly, material, i.e. (specifically) refuse haum or stalks of grain (as chopped in threshing and used for fodder).

H8402.definition: xlit Tibni corrected to Tibnîy; from תֶּבֶן; strawy; Tibni, an Israelite.

H8403.definition: from בָּנָה; structure; by implication, a model, resemblance.

H8404.definition: from בָּעַר; burning; Taberah, a place in the Desert.

H8405.definition: from the same as בּוּץ; whiteness; Tebets, a place in Palestine.

H8406.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שָׁבַר; to be fragile (figuratively).

H8407.definition: or תִּגְלַת פְּלֶסֶר; or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנְאֶסֶר or תִּלְגַּת פִּלְנֶסֶר; of foreign derivation; Tiglath-Pileser or Tilgath-pilneser, an Assyryrian king.

H8410.definition: apparently from דָּהַר; enduring; a species of hard-wood or lasting tree (perhaps oak).

H8411.definition: (Aramaic) from דּוּר in the original sense of enduring; permanence, i.e. (adverb) constantly.

H8412.definition: or תַּמֹּר; (1 Kings 9:18), apparently from תָּמָר; palm-city; Tadmor, a place near Palestine.

H8413.definition: perhaps from דְּחַל; fearfulness; Tidal, a Canaanite.

H8414.definition: from an unused root meaning to lie waste; a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert; figuratively, a worthless thing; adverbially, in vain.
H8414.kjv: confusion, empty place, without form, nothing, (thing of) nought, vain, vanity, waste, wilderness.

H8415.definition: or תְּהֹם; (usually feminine) from הוּם; an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea or the subterranean watersupply).

H8416.definition: from הָלַל; laudation; specifically (concretely) a hymn.

H8417.definition: feminine of an unused noun (apparently from הָלַל) meaning bluster; braggadocio, i.e. (by implication) fatuity.

H8419.definition: from הָפַךְ; a perversity or fraud.

H8420.definition: from תָּוָה; a mark; by implication, a signature.

H8421.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שׁוּב, to come back; specifically (transitive and ellip.) to reply.

H8422.definition: or תֻּבַל; probably of foreign derivation; Tubal, a postdiluvian patriarch and his posterity.

H8423.definition: apparently from יָבַל (compare יְבוּל) and קַיִן; offspring of Cain; Tubal-Kajin, an antidiluvian patriarch.

H8424.definition: from יָגָה; depression (of spirits); concretely a grief.

H8425.definition: or תֹּגַרְמָה; probably of foreign derivation; Togarmah, a son of Gomer and his posterity.

H8426.definition: from יָדָה; properly, an extension of the hand, i.e. (by implication) avowal, or (usually) adoration; specifically, a choir of worshippers.

H8427.definition: a primitive root; to mark out, i.e. (primitive) scratch or (definite) imprint.

H8428.definition: a primitive root (or perhaps identical with תָּוָה through a similar idea from scraping to pieces); to grieve.

H8429.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to תָּמַהּ or perhaps to שָׁאָה through the idea of sweeping to ruin (compare תָּוָה); to amaze, i.e. (reflex. by implication) take alarm.

H8430.definition: from an unused root meaning to depress; humble; Toach, an Israelite.

H8432.definition: from an unused root meaning to sever; a bisection, i.e. (by implication) the centre.
H8432.kjv: among(-st), [idiom] between, half, [idiom] (there-, where-), in(-to), middle, mid(-night), midst (among), [idiom] out (of), [idiom] through, [idiom] with(-in).

H8433.definition: and תּוֹכַחַת; from יָכַח; chastisement; figuratively (by words) correction, refutation, proof (even in defence).
H8433.kjv: argument, [idiom] chastened, correction, reasoning, rebuke, reproof, [idiom] be (often) reproved.

H8434.definition: from יָלַד; posterity; Tolad, a place in Palestine.

H8435.definition: or תֹּלְדָה; from יָלַד; (plural only) descent, i.e. family; (figuratively) history.

H8436.definition: xlit Tûwlôn corrected to Tûwlôwn; from תָּלַל; suspension; Tulon, an Israelite.

H8437.definition: from יָלַל; causing to howl, i.e. an oppressor.

H8438.definition: and (feminine) תּוֹלֵעָה; or תּוֹלַעַת; or תֹּלַעַת; from יָלַע; a maggot (as voracious); specifically (often with ellipsis of שָׁנִי); the crimson-grub, but used only (in this connection) of the colorfrom it, and cloths dyed therewith.

H8439.definition: the same as תּוֹלָע; worm; Tola, the name of two Israelites.

H8440.definition: patronymically from תּוֹלָע; a Tolaite (collectively) or descendants of Tola.

H8441.definition: or תֹּעֵבַה; feminine active participle of תַּעָב; properly, something disgusting (morally), i.e. (as noun) an abhorrence; especially idolatry or (concretely) an idol.

H8442.definition: feminine active participle of תָּעָה; mistake, i.e. (morally) impiety, or (political) injury.

H8443.definition: from יָעַף; (only in plural collective) weariness, i.e. (by implication) toil (treasure so obtained) or speed.

H8444.definition: or תֹּצָאָה; from יָצָא; (only in plural collective) exit, i.e. (geographical) boundary, or (figuratively) deliverance, (actively) source.

H8445.definition: from the same as יִקָּהָה; obedience; Tokahath, an Israelite.

H8446.definition: a primitive root; to meander (causatively, guide) about, especially fortrade or reconnoitring.
H8446.kjv: chap(-man), sent to descry, be excellent, merchant(-man), search (out), seek, (e-) spy (out).

H8447.definition: or תֹּר; from תּוּר; a succession, i.e. a string or (abstractly) order.

H8448.definition: probably the same as תּוֹר; a manner (as a sort of turn).

H8449.definition: or תֹּר; probably the same as תּוֹר; a ring-dove, often (figuratively) as a term of endearment.

H8450.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding (by permutation) to שׁוֹר; a bull.

H8451.definition: or תֹּרָה; from יָרָה; a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch.

H8452.definition: probably feminine of תּוֹר; a custom.

H8453.definition: or תֹּשָׁב; (1 Kings 17:1), from יָשַׁב; a dweller (but not outlandish (נׇכְרִי)); especially (as distinguished from a native citizen (active participle of יָשַׁב) and a temporary inmate (גֵּר) or mere lodger (לוּן)); resident alien.

H8454.definition: or תֻּשִׁיָּה; from an unused root probably meaning to substantiate; support or (by implication) ability, i.e. (direct) help, (in purpose) an undertaking, (intellectual) understanding.
H8454.kjv: enterprise, that which (thing as it) is, substance, (sound) wisdom, working.

H8455.definition: from an unused root meaning to smite; a club.

H8456.definition: a primitive root; to lop off.

H8457.definition: or תַּזְנֻת; from זָנָה; harlotry, i.e. (figuratively) idolatry.

H8458.definition: or תַּחְבּוּלָה; from חָבַל as denominative from חֶבֶל; (only in plural) properly, steerage (as a management of ropes), i.e. (figuratively) guidance or (by implication) a plan.

H8459.definition: from an unused root meaning to depress; abasement; Tochu, an Israelite.

H8460.definition: (Aramaic) or תּחֹת; (Aramaic), corresponding to תַּחַת; beneath.

H8461.definition: probably for חַכְמוֹנִי; sagacious; Tachkemoni, an Israelite.

H8462.definition: from חָלַל in the sense of opening; a commencement; rel. original (adverb, -ly).

H8463.definition: or תַּחֲלֻא; from חָלָא; a malady.

H8464.definition: from חָמַס; a species of unclean bird (from its violence), perhaps an owl.

H8465.definition: probably from חָנָה; station; Tachan, the name of two Israelites.

H8466.definition: from חָנָה; (only plural collectively) an encampment.

H8468.definition: the same as תְּחִנָּה; Techinnah, an Israelite.

H8469.definition: or (feminine) תַּחֲנוּנָה; from חָנַן; earnest prayer.

H8470.definition: patronymically from תַּחַן; a Tachanite (collectively) or descendants of Tachan.

H8471.definition: or תְּחַפְנְחֵס; (Ezekiel 30:18), or תַּחְפְּנֵס; (Jeremiah 2:16), of Egyptian derivation; Tachpanches, Techaphneches or Tachpenes, a place in Egypt.

H8472.definition: of Egyptian derivation; Tachpenes, an Egyptian woman.

H8473.definition: from חָרָה in the original sense of חוּר or חוּר; a linen corslet (as white or hollow).

H8474.definition: a facitious root from חָרָה through the idea of the heat of jealousy; to vie with a rival.

H8476.definition: probably of foreign derivation; a (clean) animal with fur, probably a species of antelope.

H8477.definition: the same as תַּחַשׁ; Tachash, a relative of Abraham.

H8478.definition: from the same as תּוֹחַ; the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc..
H8478.kjv: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

H8480.definition: the same as תַּחַת; Tachath, the name of a place in the Desert, also of three Israelites.

H8482.definition: from תַּחַת; lowermost; as noun (feminine plural) the depths (figuratively, a pit, the womb).

H8483.definition: apparently from the plural masculine of תַּחְתִּי or תַּחַת and חֹדֶשׁ; lower (ones) monthly; Tachtim-Chodshi, a place in Palestine.

H8485.definition: or תֵּמָא; probably of foreign derivation; Tema, a son of Ishmael, and the region settled by him.

H8486.definition: or תֵּמָן; denominative from יָמִין; the south (as being on the right hand of a person facing the east).

H8487.definition: or תֵּמָן; the same as תֵּימָן; Teman, the name of two Edomites, and of the region and descendant of one of them.

H8488.definition: probably for תֵּימָנִי; Temeni, an Israelite.

H8489.definition: patronymically from תֵּימָן; a Temanite or descendant of Teman.

H8490.definition: or תִּמָרָה; from the same as תָּמָר; a column, i.e. cloud.

H8491.definition: patrial or patronymically from an unused noun of uncertain meaning; a Titsite or descendant or inhabitant of an unknown Tits.

H8492.definition: or תִּירֹשׁ; from יָרַשׁ in the sense of expulsion; must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out); by implication (rarely) fermented wine.

H8493.definition: probably from יָרֵא; fearful, Tirja, an Israelite.

H8494.definition: probably of foreign derivation; Tiras, a son of Japheth.

H8495.definition: from an unused root meaning to butt; a buck or he-goat (as given to butting).

H8496.definition: or תּוֹך; (Psalm 72:14), from the same base as תָּוֶךְ (in the sense of cutting to pieces); oppression.

H8497.definition: a primitive root; to strew, i.e. encamp.

H8498.definition: feminine passive participle of תָּכַן; adjustment, i.e. structure; by implication, equipage.

H8499.definition: from כּוּן; or probably identical with תְּכוּנָה; something arranged or fixed, i.e. a place.

H8500.definition: or תּוּכִּי; probably of foreign derivation; some imported creature, probably a peacock.

H8501.definition: from an unused root meaning; to dissever, i.e. crush.

H8503.definition: from כָּלָה; completion; by implication, an extremity.

H8504.definition: probably for שְׁחֶלֶת; the cerulean mussel, i.e. the color (violet) obtained therefrom or stuff dyed therewith.

H8505.definition: a primitive root; to balance, i.e. measure out (by weight or dimension); figuratively, arrange, equalize, through the idea of levelling (ment. estimate, test).
H8505.kjv: bear up, direct, be (un-)equal, mete, ponder, tell, weigh.

H8507.definition: the same as תֹּכֶן; Token, a place in Palestine.

H8509.definition: apparently from an unused root meaning to encompass; a wrapper or robe.

H8510.definition: by contraction from תָּלַל; a mound.

H8511.definition: a primitive root; to suspend; figuratively (through hesitation) to be uncertain; by implication (of mental dependence) to habituate.

H8512.definition: from תֵּל and אָבִיב; mound of green growth; Tel-Abib, a place in Chaldaea.

H8515.definition: or תְּלַשַּׂר; of foreign derivation; Telassar, a region of Assyria.

H8518.definition: a primitive root; to suspend (especially to gibbet).

H8519.definition: or תּלֻנָּה; from לוּן in the sense of obstinacy; a grumbling.

H8520.definition: probably from an unused root meaning to dissever; breach; Telach, an Israelite.

H8521.definition: from תֵּל and the feminine of חֲרָשִׁים; mound of workmanship; Tel-Charsha, a place in Babylonia.

H8522.definition: probably from תָּלָה; a quiver (as slung).

H8523.definition: (Aramaic) or תַּלְתִּי; (Aramaic), ordinal from תְּלָת; third.

H8524.definition: a primitive root; to pile up, i.e. elevate.

H8525.definition: from an unused root meaning to accumulate; a bank or terrace.

H8526.definition: from תֶּלֶם; ridged; Talmai, the name of a Canaanite and a Syrian.

H8528.definition: from תֵּל and מֶלַח; mound of salt; Tel-Melach, a place in Babylonia.

H8529.definition: a denominative from תּוֹלָע; to crimson, i.e. dye that color.

H8530.definition: feminine from an unused root meaning to tower; something tall, i.e. (plural collective) slenderness.

H8532.definition: (Aramaic) masculine תְּלָתָה; (Aramaic), or תְּלָתָא; (Aramaic), corresponding to שָׁלוֹשׁ; three or third.

H8533.definition: (Aramaic) multiple of תְּלָת; ten times three.

H8534.definition: by reduplication, from תָּלַל through the idea of vibration; a trailing bough (as pendulous).

H8535.definition: from תָּמַם; complete; usually (morally) pious; specifically, gentle, dear.
H8535.kjv: coupled together, perfect, plain, undefiled, upright.

H8537.definition: from תָּמַם; completeness; figuratively, prosperity; usually (morally) innocence.
H8537.kjv: full, integrity, perfect(-ion), simplicity, upright(-ly, -ness), at a venture. See תֻּמִּים.

H8539.definition: a primitive root; to be in consternation.
H8539.kjv: be amazed, be astonished, marvel(-lously), wonder.

H8540.definition: (Aramaic) from a root corresponding to תָּמַהּ; a miracle.

H8542.definition: of uncertain derivation; Tammuz, a Phoenician deity.

H8543.definition: or תְּמֹל; probably for אֶתְמוֹל; sometimes with  שִׁלְשׁוֹם; properly, ago, i.e. a (short or long) time since; especially yesterday, or  day before yesterday.
H8543.kjv: [phrase] before (-time), [phrase] these (three) days, [phrase] heretofore, [phrase] time past, yesterday.

H8544.definition: or תְּמֻנָה; from מִין; something portioned (i.e. fashioned) out, as ashape, i.e. (indefinitely) phantom, or (specifically) embodiment, or (figuratively) manifestation (of favor).

H8547.definition: of uncertain derivation; Temach, one of the Nethinim.

H8548.definition: from an unused root meaning to stretch; properly, continuance (as indefinite extension); but used only (attributively as adjective) constant (or adverbially, constantly); ellipt. the regular (daily) sacrifice.

H8549.definition: from תָּמַם; entire (literally, figuratively or morally); also (as noun) integrity, truth.
H8549.kjv: without blemish, complete, full, perfect, sincerely (-ity), sound, without spot, undefiled, upright(-ly), whole.

H8550.definition: plural of תֹּם; perfections, i.e. (techn.) one of the epithets of the objects in the high-priest's breastplate as an emblem of complete Truth.

H8551.definition: a primitive root; to sustain; by implication, to obtain, keep fast; figuratively, to help, follow close.

H8552.definition: a primitive root; to complete, in a good or a bad sense, literal, or figurative, transitive or intransitive.
H8552.kjv: accomplish, cease, be clean (pass-) ed, consume, have done, (come to an, have an, make an) end, fail, come to the full, be all gone, [idiom] be all here, be (make) perfect, be spent, sum, be (shew self) upright, be wasted, whole.

H8553.definition: from מָנָה; a portion assigned; Timnah, the name of two places in Palestine.

H8554.definition: patrial from תִּמְנָה; a Timnite or inhabitant of Timnah.

H8555.definition: from מָנַע; restraint; Timna, the name of two Edomites.

H8556.definition: or תִּמְנַת סֶרַח; from תִּמְנָה and חֶרֶס; portion of (the) sun; Timnath-Cheres, a place in Palestine.

H8558.definition: from an unused root meaning to be erect; a palm tree.

H8559.definition: the same as תָּמָר; Tamar, the name of three women and a place.

H8560.definition: from the same root as תָּמָר; a palm trunk.

H8561.definition: (plural or (feminine) תִּמֹּרָה; (singular and plural), from the same root as תָּמָר; (architectural) a palm-like pilaster (i.e. umbellate).

H8562.definition: or תַּמְרֻק; or תַּמְרִיק; from מָרַק; properly, a scouring, i.e. soap or perfumery forthe bath; figuratively, a detergent.

H8564.definition: from the same root as תָּמָר; an erection, i.e. pillar (probably for a guide-board).

H8565.definition: from an unused root probably meaning to elongate; a monster (as preternaturally formed), i.e. a sea-serpent (or other huge marine animal); also a jackal (or other hideous land animal).

H8566.definition: a primitive root; to present (a mercenary inducement), i.e. bargain with (a harlot).

H8567.definition: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of attributing honor); to ascribe (praise), i.e. celebrate, commemorate.

H8568.definition: probably feminine of תַּן; a female jackal.

H8569.definition: from נוּא; alienation; by implication, enmity.

H8571.definition: perhaps from the same as אֲנָךְ through the idea of protraction; a pinnacle, i.e. extremity.

H8573.definition: from נוּף; a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings.

H8575.definition: or תַּנְחֻם; and (feminine) תַּנְחוּמָה; from נָחַם; compassion, solace.

H8577.definition: or תַּנִּים; (Ezekiel 29:3), intensive from the same as תַּן; a marine or land monster, i.e. sea-serpent or jackal.

H8580.definition: from נָשַׁם; properly, a hard breather, i.e. the name of two unclean creatures, a lizard and abird (both perhaps from changing color through their irascibility), probably the tree-toad and the water-hen.

H8581.definition: a primitive root; to loathe, i.e. (morally) detest.
H8581.kjv: (make to be) abhor(-red), (be, commit more, do) abominable(-y), [idiom] utterly.

H8582.definition: a primitive root; to vacillate, i.e. reel or stray (literally or figuratively); also causative of both.
H8582.kjv: (cause to) go astray, deceive, dissemble, (cause to, make to) err, pant, seduce, (make to) stagger, (cause to) wander, be out of the way.

H8583.definition: or תֹּעִי; from תָּעָה; error; Tou or Toi, a Syrian king.

H8584.definition: from עוּד; attestation, i.e. a precept, usage.

H8585.definition: from עָלָה; a channel (into which water is raised for irrigation); also a bandage or plaster (as placed upon a wound).
H8585.kjv: conduit, cured, healing, little river, trench, watercourse.

H8586.definition: from עָלַל; caprice (as a fit coming on), i.e. vexation; concretely a tyrant.

H8588.definition: or תַּעֲנֻג; and (feminine) תַּעֲנֻגָה; from עָנַג; luxury.

H8589.definition: from עָנָה; affliction (of self), i.e. fasting.

H8590.definition: or תַּעְנָךְ; of uncertain derivation; Taanak or Tanak, a place in Palestine.

H8591.definition: a primitive root; to cheat; by analogy, to maltreat.

H8593.definition: from עָרָה; a knife or razor (as making bare); also a scabbard (as being bare, i.e. empty).

H8594.definition: from עָרַב; suretyship, i.e. (concretely) a pledge.

H8597.definition: or תִּפְאֶרֶת; from פָּאַר; ornament (abstractly or concretely, literally or figuratively).
H8597.kjv: beauty(-iful), bravery, comely, fair, glory(-ious), honour, majesty.

H8598.definition: from נָפַח; an apple (from its fragrance), i.e. the fruit or the tree (probably includ. others of the pome order, as the quince, the orange, etc.).

H8599.definition: the same as תַּפּוּחַ; Tappuach, the name of two places in Palestine, also of an Israelite.

H8601.definition: from אָפָה; cookery, i.e. (concretely) a cake.

H8602.definition: from an unused root meaning to smear; plaster (as gummy) or slime; (figuratively) frivolity.

H8603.definition: from the same as תָּפֵל; quagmire; Tophel, a place near the Desert.

H8604.definition: from the same as תָּפֵל; frivolity.

H8605.definition: from פָּלַל; intercession, supplication; by implication, a hymn.

H8607.definition: from פָּסַח; ford; Tiphsach, a place in Mesopotamia.

H8608.definition: a primitive root; to drum, i.e. play (as) on the tambourine.

H8610.definition: a primitive root; to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably.
H8610.kjv: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, [idiom] surely, surprise, take.

H8611.definition: from the base of תָּפַף; a smiting, i.e. (figuratively) contempt.

H8612.definition: the same as תֹּפֶת; Topheth, a place near Jerusalem.

H8613.definition: probably a form of תֹּפֶת; Tophteh, a place of cremation.

H8614.definition: (Aramaic) perhaps from שָׁפַט; judicial, i.e. a lawyer.

H8615.definition: from קָוָה; (compare קָוֶה); literally a cord (as an attachment); figuratively, expectancy.
H8615.kjv: expectation(-ted), hope, live, thing that I long for.

H8616.definition: the same as תִּקְוָה; Tikvah, the name of two Israelites.

H8619.definition: from תָּקַע (in the musical sense); a trumpet.

H8620.definition: a form of תָּקוֹעַ; Tekoa, a place in Palestine.

H8621.definition: or תְּקֹעִי; patronymically from תְּקוֹעַ; a Tekoite or inhabitant of Tekoah.

H8622.definition: or תְּקֻפָה; from נָקַף; a revolution, i.e. (of the sun) course, (of time) lapse.

H8626.definition: a primitive root; to equalize, i.e. straighten (intransitive or transitive); figuratively, to compose.

H8627.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to תָּקַן; to straighten up, i.e. confirm.

H8628.definition: a primitive root; to clatter, i.e. slap (the hands together), clang (an instrument); by analogy, to drive (a nail or tent-pin, a dart, etc.); by implication, to become bondsman by handclasping).
H8628.kjv: blow (a trumpet), cast, clap, fasten, pitch (tent), smite, sound, strike, [idiom] suretiship, thrust.

H8629.definition: from תָּקַע; a blast of a trumpet.

H8631.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to תָּקַף; to become (causatively, make) mighty or (figuratively) obstinate.

H8634.definition: probably for תַּרְעֵלָה; a reeling; Taralah, a place in Palestine.

H8636.definition: from רָבָה; multiplication, i.e. percentage or bonus in addition to principal.

H8637.definition: a denominative from רָגַל; to cause to walk.

H8638.definition: a denominative from רָגַם in the sense of throwing over; to transfer, i.e. translate.

H8639.definition: from רָדַם; a lethargy or (by implication) trance.

H8640.definition: of foreign derivation; Tirhakah, a king of Kush.

H8641.definition: or תְּרֻמָה; (Deuteronomy 12:11), from רוּם; a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute.

H8642.definition: formed as תְּרוּמָה; a sacrificial offering.

H8643.definition: from רוּעַ; clamor, i.e. acclamation of joy or a battle-cry; especially clangorof trumpets, as an alarum.
H8643.kjv: alarm, blow(-ing) (of, the) (trumpets), joy, jubile, loud noise, rejoicing, shout(-ing), (high, joyful) sound(-ing).

H8644.definition: from רוּף in the sense of its congener רָפָא; a remedy.

H8645.definition: probably from רָזָה; a species of tree (apparently from its slenderness), perhaps the cypress.

H8646.definition: of uncertain derivation; Terach, the father of Abraham; also a place in the Desert.

H8647.definition: of uncertain derivation; Tirchanah, an Israelite.

H8648.definition: (Aramaic) feminine תַּרְתֵּין; corresponding to שְׁנַיִם; two.

H8649.definition: and תַּרְמוּת; or תַּרְמִית; from רָמָה; fraud.

H8650.definition: probably for אֹרֶן; a pole (as a mast or flagstaff).

H8651.definition: (Aramaic) corresponding to שַׁעַר; a door; by implication, a palace.

H8654.definition: patrial from an unused name meaning gate; a Tirathite or inhabitant of an unknown Tirah.

H8655.definition: plural from רָפָא; a healer; Teraphim (singular or plural) a family idol.

H8656.definition: from רָצָה; delightsomeness; Tirtsah, a place in Palestine; also an Israelitess.

H8657.definition: of foreign derivation; Teresh, a eunuch of Xerxes.

H8658.definition: probably of foreign derivation (compare תַּרְשִׁישׁ); a gem, perhaps the topaz.

H8659.definition: probably the same as תַּרְשִׁישׁ (as the region of the stone, or the reverse); Tarshish, a place on the Mediterranean, hence, the ephithet of a merchant vessel (as if for or from that port); also the name of a Persian and of an Israelite.

H8660.definition: of foreign derivation; Tirshatha, the title of a Persian deputy or governor.

H8661.definition: of foreign derivation; Tartan, an Assyrian.

H8662.definition: of foreign derivation; Tartak, a deity of the Avvites.

H8663.definition: from שׁוֹא; a crashing or loud clamor.

H8664.definition: patrial from an unused name meaning recourse; a Tishbite or inhabitant of Tishbeh (in Gilead).

H8666.definition: or תְּשֻׁבָה; from שׁוּב; a recurrence (of time or place); a reply (as returned).

H8667.definition: from שׂוּם; a deposit, i.e. pledging.

H8668.definition: or תְּשֻׁעָה; from שָׁוַע in the sense of יָשַׁע; rescue (literal or figurative, persons, national or spiritual).

H8669.definition: from שׁוּק in the original sense of stretching out after; a longing.

H8670.definition: from שׁוּר in the sense of arrival; a gift.

H8672.definition: or (masculine) תִּשְׁעָה; perhaps from שָׁעָה through the idea of a turn to the next or full number ten; nine or (ordinal) ninth.

H8674.definition: of foreign derivation; Tattenai, a Persian.

G1.definition: of Hebrew origin; the first letter of the alphabet; figuratively, only (from its use as a numeral) the first: --Alpha. Often used (usually , before a vowel) also in composition (as a contraction from ἄνευ) in the sense of privation; so, in many words, beginning with this letter.
G1.kjv: occasionally in the sense of union (as a contraction of ἅμα).

G4.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and βάρος.
G4.kjv: weightless, i.e. (figuratively) not burdensome:--from being burdensome.

G7.kjv: Abijah, the name of two Israelites:--Abia.

G11.kjv: Abraham, the Hebrew patriarch:--Abraham. (In Acts 7:16 the text should probably read Jacob.)

G12.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and a variation of βυθός.

G15.kjv: to be a well-doer (as a favor or a duty):--(when) do good (well).

G17.kjv: a well-doer, i.e. virtuous:--them that do well.

G18.kjv: "good" (in any sense, often as noun):--benefit, good(-s, things), well. Compare καλός.

G21.kjv: properly, to jump for joy, i.e. exult:--be (exceeding) glad, with exceeding joy, rejoice (greatly).

G22.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and γάμος.

G23.definition: from  (much) and  (grief; akin to the base of ἀγκάλη).
G23.kjv: to be greatly afflicted, i.e. (figuratively) indignant:--be much (sore) displeased, have (be moved with, with) indignation.

G25.kjv: to love (in a social or moral sense):--(be-)love(-ed). Compare φιλέω.

G26.definition: from ἀγαπάω; love, i.e. affection or benevolence.
G26.kjv: specially (plural) a love-feast:--(feast of) charity(-ably), dear, love.

G29.kjv: properly, to be a courier, i.e. (by implication) to press into public service:--compel (to go).

G30.definition: from  (a pail, perhaps as bent; compare the base of ἀγκάλη).

G32.definition: from  (probably derived from ἄγω; compare ἀγέλη) (to bring tidings); a messenger; especially an "angel".

G33.kjv: properly, lead, i.e. come on:--go to.

G35.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and γενεαλογέω.

G36.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and γένος.
G36.kjv: properly, without kin, i.e. (of unknown descent, and by implication) ignoble:--base things.

G37.definition: from ἅγιος; to make holy, i.e. (ceremonially) purify or consecrate.

G38.definition: from ἁγιάζω; properly, purification, i.e. (the state) purity.

G39.kjv: a sacred thing (i.e. spot):--holiest (of all), holy place, sanctuary.

G40.kjv: sacred (physically, pure, morally blameless or religious, ceremonially, consecrated):--(most) holy (one, thing), saint.

G46.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and the same as γναφεύς.

G48.kjv: to make clean, i.e. (figuratively) sanctify (ceremonially or morally):--purify (self).

G50.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and νοιέω; not to know (through lack of information or intelligence).
G50.kjv: by implication, to ignore (through disinclination):--(be) ignorant(-ly), not know, not understand, unknown.

G53.kjv: properly, clean, i.e. (figuratively) innocent, modest, perfect:--chaste, clean, pure.

G56.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and γνῶσις.
G56.kjv: ignorance (properly, the state):--ignorance, not the knowledge.

G57.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and γνωστός.

G58.definition: from  (to gather; probably akin to ἐγείρω); properly, the town-square (as a place of public resort).
G58.kjv: by implication, a market or thoroughfare:--market(-place), street.

G59.definition: from ἀγορά; properly, to go to market, i.e. (by implication) to purchase.

G60.definition: from ἀγορά; relating to the market-place, i.e. forensic (times).

G62.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and γράμμα.

G63.definition: from ἀγρός and αὐλέω (in the sense of αὐλή).
G63.kjv: to camp out:--abide in the field.

G66.kjv: wild (as pertaining to the country), literally (natural) or figuratively (fierce):--wild, raging.

G67.definition: apparently from ἄγριος and ἵππος; wild-horse tamer.

G68.definition: from ἄγω; a field (as a drive for cattle); genitive case, the country.
G68.kjv: specially, a farm, i.e. hamlet:--country, farm, piece of ground, land.

G69.definition: ultimately from Α (as negative particle) and ὕπνος.
G69.kjv: to be sleepless, i.e. keep awake:--watch.

G71.definition: a primary verb; properly, to lead.
G71.kjv: by implication, to bring, drive, (reflexively) go, (specially) pass (time), or (figuratively) induce:--be, bring (forth), carry, (let) go, keep, lead away, be open.

G72.kjv: a bringing up, i.e. mode of living:--manner of life.

G73.definition: from ἄγω; properly, a place of assembly (as if led), i.e. (by implication) a contest (held there).
G73.kjv: figuratively, an effort or anxiety:--conflict, contention, fight, race.

G74.kjv: a struggle (properly, the state), i.e. (figuratively) anguish:--agony.

G75.kjv: to struggle, literally (to compete for a prize), figuratively (to contend with an adversary), or genitive case (to endeavor to accomplish something):--fight, labor fervently, strive.

G76.definition: of Hebrew origin (אָדָם); Adam, the first man.

G77.definition: from Α (as negative particle); and δαπάνη.

G80.definition: from Α (as a connective particle) and  (the womb).
G80.kjv: a brother (literally or figuratively) near or remote (much like Α):--brother.

G81.kjv: brotherhood (properly, the feeling of brotherliness), i.e. the (Christian) fraternity:--brethren, brotherhood.

G82.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and δῆλος.

G85.definition: from a derivative of  (to be sated to loathing).
G85.kjv: to be in distress (of mind):--be full of heaviness, be very heavy.

G86.definition: from Α (as negative particle) and εἴδω.
G86.kjv: properly, unseen, i.e. "Hades" or the place (state) of departed souls:--grave, hell.

G87.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of διακρίνω.

G88.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of διά and λείπω.

G89.kjv: uninterruptedly, i.e. without omission (on an appropriate occasion):--without ceasing.

G90.definition: from a derivative of a compound of Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of διαφθείρω.

G91.kjv: to be unjust, i.e. (actively) do wrong (morally, socially or physically):--hurt, injure, be an offender, be unjust, (do, suffer, take) wrong.

G92.kjv: a wrong done:--evil doing, iniquity, matter of wrong.

G93.definition: from ἄδικος; (legal) injustice (properly, the quality, by implication, the act).
G93.kjv: morally, wrongfulness (of character, life or act):--iniquity, unjust, unrighteousness, wrong.

G94.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and δίκη; unjust; by extension wicked; by implication, treacherous.

G96.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and δόκιμος; unapproved, i.e. rejected.
G96.kjv: by implication, worthless (literally or morally):--castaway, rejected, reprobate.

G97.definition: from Α (as a negative particle); and δόλος.

G98.kjv: Adramyttene or belonging to Adramyttium:--of Adramyttium.

G101.kjv: to be unable, i.e. (passively) impossible:--be impossible.

G102.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and δυνατός; unable, i.e. weak (literally or figuratively).
G102.kjv: passively, impossible:--could not do, impossible, impotent, not possible, weak.

G104.definition: from an obsolete primary noun (apparently meaning continued duration); "ever," by qualification regularly.

G106.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and ζύμη; unleavened, i.e. (figuratively) uncorrupted.
G106.kjv: (in the neutral plural) specially (by implication) the Passover week:--unleavened (bread).

G108.kjv: Azotus (i.e. Ashdod), a place in Palestine:--Azotus.

G109.definition: from  (to breathe unconsciously, i.e. respire; by analogy, to blow).

G110.definition: from a compound of Α (as a negative particle) and θάνατος.

G111.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of  (statute; from the base of τίθημι); illegal.

G112.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and θεός.

G113.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of τίθημι (in the sense of enacting).

G114.definition: from a compound of Α (as a negative particle) and a derivative of τίθημι.
G114.kjv: to set aside, i.e. (by implication) to disesteem, neutralize or violate:--cast off, despise, disannul, frustrate, bring to nought, reject.

G116.definition: plural of  (the goddess of wisdom, who was reputed to have founded the city).
G116.kjv: Athenæ, the capitol of Greece:-- Athens.

G117.kjv: an Athenæan or inhabitant of Athenæ:--Athenian.

G118.definition: from  (a contest in the public lists).
G118.kjv: to contend in the competitive games:--strive.

G120.definition: from a compound of Α (as a negative particle) and θυμός.
G120.kjv: to be spiritless, i.e. disheartened:--be dismayed.

G121.definition: from Α (as a negative particle) and probably a derivative of τίθημι (meaning a penalty).

G123.definition: from aisso (to rush) and ἅλς (in the sense of the sea).
G123.kjv: a beach (on which the waves dash):--shore.

G124.kjv: an Ægyptian or inhabitant of Ægyptus:--Egyptian.

G125.kjv: Ægyptus, the land of the Nile:--Egypt.

G126.kjv: everduring (forward and backward, or forward only):--eternal, everlasting.

G127.definition: perhaps from Α (as a negative particle) and εἴδω (through the idea of downcast eyes).
G127.kjv: bashfulness, i.e. (towards men), modesty or (towards God) awe:--reverence, shamefacedness.

G128.definition: from  (to scorch) and  (the face, from ὀπτάνομαι).

G129.definition: of uncertain derivation; blood, literally (of men or animals), figuratively (the juice of grapes) or specially (the atoning blood of Christ).

G130.definition: from αἷμα and a derivative of ἐκχέω.
G130.kjv: an effusion of blood:--shedding of blood.

G131.kjv: to flow blood, i.e. have a hæmorrhage:--diseased with an issue of blood.

G133.kjv: a praising (the act), i.e. (specially) a thank(-offering):--praise.

G135.definition: from a derivative of αἶνος (in its primary sense).
G135.kjv: an obscure saying ("enigma"), i.e. (abstractly) obscureness:--X darkly.

G136.definition: apparently a prime word; properly, a story, but used in the sense of ἔπαινος.

G137.definition: of Hebrew origin (a derivative of עַיִן, place of springs).

Compare αὑτοῦ.

G1108.kjv: knowing (the act), i.e. (by implication) knowledge:--knowledge, science.

G1151.definition: probably from the base of δαμάζω.

G1153.kjv: a Damascene or inhabitant of Damascus:--Damascene.

G1155.definition: from δάνειον; to loan on interest.

G1156.definition: from  (a gift); probably akin to the base of δίδωμι.
