G1404.kjv: a fabulous kind of serpent (perhaps as supposed to fascinate):--dragon.

G1405.definition: perhaps akin to the base of δράκων (through the idea of capturing).

G1406.kjv: a drachma or (silver) coin (as handled):--piece (of silver).

G1409.definition: a feminine diminutive of Drusus (a Roman name).
G1409.kjv: Drusilla, a member of the Herodian family:--Drusilla.

G1410.kjv: to be able or possible:--be able, can (do, + -not), could, may, might, be possible, be of power.

G1411.kjv: specially, miraculous power (usually by implication, a miracle itself):--ability, abundance, meaning, might(-ily, -y, -y deed), (worker of) miracle(-s), power, strength, violence, mighty (wonderful) work.

G1413.kjv: a ruler or officer:--of great authority, mighty, potentate.

G1415.definition: from δύναμαι; powerful or capable (literally or figuratively).
G1415.kjv: neuter possible:--able, could, (that is) mighty (man), possible, power, strong.

G1416.definition: prolonged forms of an obsolete primary         (to sink).

G1418.definition: a primary inseparable particle of uncertain derivation; used only in composition as a prefix.
G1418.kjv: hard, i.e. with difficulty:--+ hard, + grievous, etc.

G1419.definition: from δυσ- and a derivative of βαστάζω.

G1420.definition: from δυσ- and a comparative of ἐντός (meaning a bowel).

G1421.definition: from δυσ- and a presumed derivative of ἑρμηνεύω.
G1421.kjv: difficult of explanation:--hard to be uttered.

G1422.kjv: properly, fastidious about eating (peevish), i.e. (genitive case) impracticable:--hard.

G1424.kjv: the sun-set, i.e. (by implication) the western region:--west.

G1425.definition: from δυσ- and a derivative of νοιέω.
G1425.kjv: difficult of perception:--hard to be understood.

G1426.definition: from a compound of δυσ- and φήμη.

G1427.kjv: two and ten, i.e. a dozen:--twelve.

G1430.kjv: properly, an edifice, i.e. (specially) a roof:--housetop.

G1432.definition: accusative case of δωρεά as adverb.
G1432.kjv: gratuitously (literally or figuratively):--without a cause, freely, for naught, in vain.

G1436.kjv: properly, let it be, i.e. (as interjection) aha!:--let alone.

G1437.definition: from εἰ and ἄν; a conditional particle; in case that, provided, etc..
G1437.kjv: often used in connection with other particles to denote indefiniteness or uncertainty:--before, but, except, (and) if, (if) so, (what-, whither-)soever, though, when (-soever), whether (or), to whom, (who-)so(-ever). See μή.

G1438.definition: from a reflexive pronoun otherwise obsolete and the genitive case (dative case or accusative case) of αὐτός.
G1438.kjv: him- (her-, it-, them-, also (in conjunction with the personal pronoun of the other persons) my-, thy-, our-, your-) self (selves), etc.:--alone, her (own, -self), (he) himself, his (own), itself, one (to) another, our (thine) own(-selves), + that she had, their (own, own selves), (of) them(-selves), they, thyself, you, your (own, own conceits, own selves, -selves).

G1439.kjv: to let be, i.e. permit or leave alone:--commit, leave, let (alone), suffer. See also ἔα.

G1440.definition: from ἕβδομος and a modified form of δέκα.

G1447.kjv: Hebraistically or in the Jewish (Chaldee) language:--in (the) Hebrew (tongue).

G1448.kjv: to make near, i.e. (reflexively) approach:--approach, be at hand, come (draw) near, be (come, draw) nigh.

G1450.kjv: pledged (as if articulated by a member), i.e. a bondsman:--surety.

G1451.definition: from a primary verb  (to squeeze or throttle; akin to the base of ἀγκάλη).
G1451.kjv: near (literally or figuratively, of place or time):--from , at hand, near, nigh (at hand, unto), ready.

G1452.definition: neuter of the comparative of ἐγγύς.

G1453.definition: probably akin to the base of ἀγορά (through the idea of collecting one's faculties); to waken (transitively or intransitively), i.e. rouse (literally, from sleep, from sitting or lying, from disease, from death.
G1453.kjv: or figuratively, from obscurity, inactivity, ruins, nonexistence):--awake, lift (up), raise (again, up), rear up, (a-)rise (again, up), stand, take up.

G1455.definition: from ἐν and a derivative of καθίημι.
G1455.kjv: subinduced, i.e. surreptitiously suborned as a lier-in-wait:--spy.

G1456.definition: neuter plural of a presumed compound from ἐν and καινός.
G1456.kjv: innovatives, i.e. (specially) renewal (of religious services after the Antiochian interruption):--dedication.

G1458.kjv: to call in (as a debt or demand), i.e. bring to account (charge, criminate, etc.):--accuse, call in question, implead, lay to the charge.

G1459.kjv: to leave behind in some place, i.e. (in a good sense) let remain over, or (in a bad sense) to desert:--forsake, leave.

G1460.kjv: to settle down in a place, i.e. reside:--dwell among.

G1461.definition: from ἐν and a derivative of κέντρον.
G1461.kjv: to prick in, i.e. ingraft:--graff in(-to).

G1462.kjv: an accusation, i.e. offence alleged:--crime laid against, laid to charge.

G1463.definition: middle voice from ἐν and  (to gird).
G1463.kjv: to engirdle oneself (for labor), i.e. figuratively (the apron as being a badge of servitude) to wear (in token of mutual deference):--be clothed with.

G1465.kjv: to cut into, i.e. (figuratively) impede, detain:--hinder, be tedious unto.

G1467.kjv: to exercise self-restraint (in diet and chastity):--can(-not) contain, be temperate.

G1468.kjv: strong in a thing (masterful), i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) self-controlled (in appetite, etc.):--temperate.

G1469.kjv: to judge in, i.e. count among:--make of the number.

G1470.kjv: to conceal in, i.e. incorporate with:--hid in.

G1471.definition: from ἐν and the base of κῦμα.
G1471.kjv: swelling inside, i.e. pregnant:--great with child.

G1473.definition: a primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic):--I, me. For the other cases and the plural see ἐμέ, ἐμοί, ἐμοῦ, ἡμᾶς, ἡμεῖς, ἡμῖν, ἡμῶν, etc.

G1474.kjv: to raze:--lay even with the ground.

G1479.kjv: voluntary (arbitrary and unwarranted) piety, i.e. sanctimony:--will worship.

G1480.kjv: to accustom, i.e. (neuter passive participle) customary:--custom.

G1481.kjv: the governor (not king) of a district:--ethnarch.

G1483.kjv: as a Gentile:--after the manner of Gentiles.

G1484.definition: probably from ἔθω; a race (as of the same habit), i.e. a tribe.
G1484.kjv: specially, a foreign (non-Jewish) one (usually, by implication, pagan):--Gentile, heathen, nation, people.

G1485.kjv: a usage (prescribed by habit or law):--custom, manner, be wont.

G1486.definition: a primary verb; to be used (by habit or conventionality).
G1486.kjv: neuter perfect participle usage:--be custom (manner, wont).

G1487.kjv: if, whether, that, etc.:--forasmuch as, if, that, (al-)though, whether. Often used in connection or composition with other particles, especially as in εἴγε, εἰ δὲ μή(γε), εἰ καί, εἰ μή, εἰ μή τι, εἴ περ, εἴ πως, εἴ τις, ἐκ. See also ἐάν.

G1488.definition: second person singular present of εἰμί.

G1489.kjv: if indeed, seeing that, unless, (with negative) otherwise:--if (so be that, yet).

G1490.definition: from εἰ, δέ, and μή (sometimes with γέ added).
G1490.kjv: but if not:--(or) else, if (not, otherwise), otherwise.

G1491.kjv: a view, i.e. form (literally or figuratively):--appearance, fashion, shape, sight.

G1492.definition: a primary verb; used only in certain past tenses, the others being borrowed from the equivalent ὀπτάνομαι and ὁράω; properly, to see (literally or figuratively).
G1492.kjv: by implication, (in the perfect tense only) to know:--be aware, behold, X can (+ not tell), consider, (have) know(-ledge), look (on), perceive, see, be sure, tell, understand, wish, wot. Compare ὀπτάνομαι.

G1493.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of εἴδωλον.

G1494.definition: neuter of a compound of εἴδωλον and a presumed derivative of θύω.
G1494.kjv: an image-sacrifice, i.e. part of an idolatrous offering:--(meat, thing that is) offered (in sacrifice, sacrificed) to (unto) idols.

G1496.definition: from εἴδωλον and the base of λατρεύω.
G1496.kjv: an image- (servant or) worshipper (literally or figuratively):--idolater.

G1497.definition: from εἶδος; an image (i.e. for worship).
G1497.kjv: by implication, a heathen god, or (plural) the worship of such:--idol.

G1498.definition: optative (i.e. English subjunctive) present of εἰμί (including the other person).
G1498.kjv: might (could, would, or should) be:--mean, + perish, should be, was, were.

G1500.definition: probably from εἴκω (through the idea of failure).
G1500.kjv: idly, i.e. without reason (or effect):--without a cause, (in) vain(-ly).

G1502.kjv: properly, to be weak, i.e. yield:--give place.

G1503.definition: apparently a primary verb (perhaps akin to εἴκω through the idea of faintness as a copy).

G1504.kjv: a likeness, i.e. (literally) statue, profile, or (figuratively) representation, resemblance:--image.

G1506.kjv: judged by sunlight, i.e. tested as genuine (figuratively):--pure, sincere.

G1507.definition: a prolonged form of a primary but defective verb  (of the same meaning).
G1507.kjv: to coil or wrap:--roll together. See also ἑλίσσω.

G1508.kjv: if not:--but, except (that), if not, more than, save (only) that, saving, till.

G1509.definition: from εἰ μή and the neuter of τὶς.

G1510.definition: the first person singular present indicative; a prolonged form of a primary and defective verb.
G1510.kjv: I exist (used only when emphatic):--am, have been, X it is I, was. See also εἶ, εἴην, εἶναι, εἰσί, ἦν, ἔσομαι, ἐσμέν, ἐστέ, ἐστί, κέρδος, ἴσθι, ὦ.

G1511.kjv: to exist:--am, was. come, is, X lust after, X please well, there is, to be, was.

G1512.kjv: if perhaps:--if so be (that), seeing, though.

G1514.kjv: to be (act) peaceful:--be at (have, live in) peace, live peaceably.

G1515.definition: probably from a primary verb  (to join); peace (literally or figuratively).
G1515.kjv: by implication, prosperity:--one, peace, quietness, rest, + set at one again.

G1517.kjv: to be a peace-maker, i.e. (figuratively) to harmonize:--make peace.

G1519.definition: a primary preposition; to or into (indicating the point reached or entered), of place, time, or (figuratively) purpose (result, etc.).
G1519.kjv: also in adverbial phrases:--(abundant-)ly, against, among, as, at, (back-)ward, before, by, concerning, + continual, + far more exceeding, for (intent, purpose), fore, + forth, in (among, at, unto, -so much that, -to), to the intent that, + of one mind, + never, of, (up-)on, + perish, + set at one again, (so) that, therefore(-unto), throughout, til, to (be, the end, -ward), (here-)until(-to), …ward, (where-)fore, with. Often used in composition with the same general import, but only with verbs (etc.) expressing motion (literally or figuratively).

G1520.kjv: one:--a(-n, -ny, certain), + abundantly, man, one (another), only, other, some. See also εἷς καθ’ εἷς, μηδείς, μία, οὐδείς.

G1521.kjv: to introduce (literally or figuratively):--bring in(-to), (+ was to) lead into.

G1525.kjv: to enter (literally or figuratively):--X arise, come (in, into), enter in(-to), go in (through).

G1526.definition: 3rd person plural present indicative of εἰμί.
G1526.kjv: they are:--agree, are, be, dure, X is, were.

G1527.definition: from εἷς repeated with κατά inserted.

G1529.kjv: an entrance (literally or figuratively):--coming, enter(-ing) in (to).

G1531.kjv: to enter (literally or figuratively):--come (enter) in, go into.

G1533.kjv: to carry inward (literally or figuratively):--bring (in), lead into.

G1534.kjv: a particle of succession (in time or logical enumeration), then, moreover:--after that(-ward), furthermore, then. See also ἔπειτα.

G1536.kjv: if any:--he that, if a(-ny) man('s thing, from any, ought), whether any, whosoever.

G1537.definition: a primary preposition denoting origin (the point whence action or motion proceeds), from, out (of place, time, or cause; literal or figurative; direct or remote):--after, among, X are, at, betwixt(-yond), by (the means of), exceedingly, (+ abundantly above), for(- th), from (among, forth, up), + grudgingly, + heartily, X heavenly, X hereby, + very highly, in, …ly, (because, by reason) of, off (from), on, out among (from, of), over, since, X thenceforth, through, X unto, X vehemently, with(-out). Often used in composition, with the same general import.

G1538.kjv: each or every:--any, both, each (one), every (man, one, woman), particularly.

G1539.definition: as if from ἕκαστος and τότε.

G1542.definition: from ἑκατόν and a presumed derivative of πλάσσω.

G1543.kjv: the captain of one hundred men:--centurion.

G1544.kjv: to eject (literally or figuratively):--bring forth, cast (forth, out), drive (out), expel, leave, pluck (pull, take, thrust) out, put forth (out), send away (forth, out).

G1545.definition: from a compound of ἐκ and the base of βάσις (meaning to go out).
G1545.kjv: an exit (literally or figuratively):--end, way to escape.

G1546.kjv: ejection, i.e. (specially) a throwing overboard of the cargo:--+ lighten the ship.

G1547.definition: from ἐκ and a form of γαμίσκω (compare ἐκγαμίσκω).
G1547.kjv: to marry off a daughter:--give in marriage.

G1549.definition: neuter of a derivative of a compound of ἐκ and γίνομαι.

G1551.kjv: to accept from some source, i.e. (by implication) to await:--expect, look (tarry) for, wait (for).

G1553.definition: from a compound of ἐκ and δῆμος.
G1553.kjv: to emigrate, i.e. (figuratively) vacate or quit:--be absent.

G1554.kjv: to give forth, i.e. (specially) to lease:--let forth (out).

G1555.definition: from ἐκ and a compound of διά and ἡγέομαι.

G1558.kjv: carrying justice out, i.e. a punisher:--a (re-)venger.

G1559.kjv: to pursue out, i.e. expel or persecute implacably:--persecute.

G1560.definition: from ἐκ and a derivative of δίδωμι.
G1560.kjv: given out or over, i.e. surrendered:--delivered.

G1562.definition: from ἐκ and the base of δύνω.
G1562.kjv: to cause to sink out of, i.e. (specially as of clothing) to divest:--strip, take off from, unclothe.

G1565.kjv: often intensified by the article prefixed:--he, it, the other (same), selfsame, that (same, very), X their, X them, they, this, those. See also οὗτος.

G1567.kjv: to search out, i.e. (figuratively)investigate, crave, demand, (by Hebraism) worship:--en- (re-)quire, seek after (carefully, diligently).

G1570.definition: from ἐκ and a derivative of τίθημι.
G1570.kjv: put out, i.e. exposed to perish:--cast out.

G1573.kjv: to be (bad or) weak, i.e. (by implication) to fail (in heart):--faint, be weary.

G1574.definition: from ἐκ and the base of κέντρον.

G1577.definition: from a compound of ἐκ and a derivative of καλέω.
G1577.kjv: a calling out, i.e. (concretely) a popular meeting, especially a religious congregation (Jewish synagogue, or Christian community of members on earth or saints in heaven or both):--assembly, church.

G1578.kjv: to deviate, i.e. (absolutely) to shun (literally or figuratively), or (relatively) to decline (from piety):--avoid, eschew, go out of the way.

G1581.definition: from ἐκ and κόπτω; to exscind.
G1581.kjv: figuratively, to frustrate:--cut down (off, out), hew down, hinder.

G1582.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and κρεμάννυμι.
G1582.kjv: to hang upon the lips of a speaker, i.e. listen closely:--be very attentive.

G1585.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and λανθάνω.

G1586.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and λέγω (in its primary sense).

G1591.definition: from ἐκ and the base of μασσάομαι.
G1591.kjv: to knead out, i.e. (by analogy) to wipe dry:--wipe.

G1593.kjv: (by analogy) to slip off, i.e. quietly withdraw:--convey self away.

G1595.definition: neuter of a derivative from ἑκών.

G1596.definition: adverb from the same as ἑκούσιον.

G1597.kjv: long ago, for a long while:--of a long time, of old.

G1600.definition: from ἐκ and a form of πέτομαι.
G1600.kjv: to fly out, i.e. (by analogy) to extend:--stretch forth.

G1601.definition: from ἐκ and πίπτω; to drop away; specially, be driven out of one's course.
G1601.kjv: figuratively, to lose, become inefficient:--be cast, fail, fall (away, off), take none effect.

G1607.kjv: to depart, be discharged, proceed, project:--come (forth, out of), depart, go (forth, out), issue, proceed (out of).

G1608.kjv: to be utterly unchaste:--give self over to fornication.

G1610.kjv: to uproot:--pluck up by the root, root up.

G1611.kjv: a displacement of the mind, i.e. bewilderment, "ecstasy":--+ be amazed, amazement, astonishment, trance.

G1614.kjv: to extend:--cast, put forth, stretch forth (out).

G1617.definition: neuter of the comparative of ἐκτενής.

G1620.definition: from ἐκ and τίθημι; to expose.

G1622.kjv: figuratively (as a preposition) aside from, besides:--but, except(-ed), other than, out of, outside, unless, without.

G1624.definition: from ἐκ and the base of τροπή.
G1624.kjv: to deflect, i.e. turn away (literally or figuratively):--avoid, turn (aside, out of the way).

G1625.kjv: to rear up to maturity, i.e. (genitive case) to cherish or train:--bring up, nourish.

G1626.definition: from a comparative of ἐκ and  (to wound).
G1626.kjv: a miscarriage (abortion), i.e. (by analogy) untimely birth:--born out of due time.

G1627.kjv: to bear out (literally or figuratively):--bear, bring forth, carry forth (out).

G1630.kjv: frightened out of one's wits:-- sore afraid, exceedingly fear.

G1632.definition: from ἐκ and  (to pour); to pour forth.
G1632.kjv: figuratively, to bestow:--gush (pour) out, run greedily (out), shed (abroad, forth), spill.

G1636.definition: feminine of a presumed derivative from an obsolete primary.
G1636.kjv: an olive (the tree or the fruit):--olive (berry, tree).

G1637.definition: neuter of the same as ἐλαία.

G1638.kjv: an olive-orchard, i.e. (specially) the Mount of Olives:--Olivet.

G1640.definition: comparative of the same as ἐλάχιστος.
G1640.kjv: smaller (in size, quantity, age or quality):--less, under, worse, younger.

G1641.kjv: to diminish, i.e. fall short:--have lack.

G1642.kjv: to lessen (in rank or influence):--decrease, make lower.

G1643.definition: a prolonged form of a primary verb (obsolete except in certain tenses as an alternative of this) of uncertain affinity.
G1643.kjv: to push (as wind, oars or dæmonical power):--carry, drive, row.

G1645.definition: probably akin to ἐλαύνω and the base of ἐλάσσων.

G1646.definition: superlative of  (short); used as equivalent to μικρός.
G1646.kjv: least (in size, amount, dignity, etc.):--least, very little (small), smallest.

G1651.kjv: to confute, admonish:--convict, convince, tell a fault, rebuke, reprove.

G1653.kjv: to compassionate (by word or deed, specially, by divine grace):--have compassion (pity on), have (obtain, receive, shew) mercy (on).

G1654.kjv: compassionateness, i.e. (as exercised towards the poor) beneficence, or (concretely) a benefaction:--alms(-deeds).

G1656.kjv: compassion (human or divine, especially active):--(+ tender) mercy.

G1657.kjv: freedom (legitimate or licentious, chiefly moral or ceremonial):--liberty.

G1658.definition: probably from the alternate of ἔρχομαι.
G1658.kjv: unrestrained (to go at pleasure), i.e. (as a citizen) not a slave (whether freeborn or manumitted), or (genitive case) exempt (from obligation or liability):--free (man, woman), at liberty.

G1659.kjv: to liberate, i.e. (figuratively) to exempt (from moral, ceremonial or mortal liability):--deliver, make free.

G1661.kjv: elephantine, i.e. (by implication) composed of ivory:--of ivory.

G1664.definition: of Hebrew origin (אֵל and הוֹד); God of majesty.

G1669.kjv: to cause to ulcerate, i.e. (passively) be ulcerous:--full of sores.

G1670.kjv: to drag (literally or figuratively):--draw. Compare ἑλίσσω.

G1671.kjv: Hellas (or Greece), a country of Europe:--Greece.

G1672.definition: from Ἑλλάς; a Hellen (Grecian) or inhabitant of Hellas.
G1672.kjv: by extension a Greek-speaking person, especially a non-Jew:-- Gentile, Greek.

G1676.definition: adverb from the same as Ἑλληνιστής.
G1676.kjv: Hellenistically, i.e. in the Grecian language:--Greek.

G1677.definition: from ἐν and λόγος (in the sense of account).
G1677.kjv: to reckon in, i.e. attribute:--impute, put on account.

G1679.kjv: to expect or confide:--(have, thing) hope(-d) (for), trust.

G1680.definition: from a primary  (to anticipate, usually with pleasure).
G1680.kjv: expectation (abstractly or concretely) or confidence:--faith, hope.

G1682.definition: of Chaldean origin (אֱלָהּ with pronominal suffix) my God:--Eloi.

G1683.definition: genitive case compound of ἐμοῦ and αὐτός.
G1683.kjv: of myself so likewise the dative case        , and accusative case        :--me, mine own (self), myself.

G1684.definition: from ἐν and the base of βάσις.
G1684.kjv: to walk on, i.e. embark (aboard a vessel), reach (a pool):--come (get) into, enter (into), go (up) into, step in, take ship.

G1685.kjv: to throw on, i.e. (figuratively) subject to (eternal punishment):--cast into.

G1686.kjv: to whelm on, i.e. wet (a part of the person, etc.) by contact with a fluid:--dip.

G1687.definition: from ἐν and a presumed derivative of the base of βάσις; equivalent to ἐμβαίνω.

G1688.definition: from ἐν and  (to mount; causative of ἐμβαίνω).
G1688.kjv: to place on, i.e. transfer (aboard a vessel):--put in.

G1689.kjv: to look on, i.e. (relatively) to observe fixedly, or (absolutely) to discern clearly:--behold, gaze up, look upon, (could) see.

G1690.definition: from ἐν and  (to snort with anger).
G1690.kjv: to have indignation on, i.e. (transitively) to blame, (intransitively) to sigh with chagrin, (specially) to sternly enjoin:--straitly charge, groan, murmur against.

G1693.kjv: to rave on, i.e. rage at:--be mad against.

G1694.definition: of Hebrew origin (עִמָּנוּאֵל); God with us.

G1696.kjv: to stay in the same place, i.e. (figuratively) persevere:--continue.

G1699.definition: from the oblique cases of ἐγώ (ἐμοί, ἐμοῦ, ἐμέ).

G1703.kjv: a derider, i.e. (by implication) a false teacher:--mocker, scoffer.

G1704.kjv: to perambulate on a place, i.e. (figuratively) to be occupied among persons:--walk in.

G1705.definition: from ἐν and the base of πλεῖστος.
G1705.kjv: to fill in (up), i.e. (by implication) to satisfy (literally or figuratively):--fill.

G1706.kjv: to fall on, i.e. (literally) to be entrapped by, or (figuratively) be overwhelmed with:--fall among (into).

G1707.kjv: to entwine, i.e. (figuratively) involve with:--entangle (in, self with).

G1709.kjv: to inhale, i.e. (figuratively) to be animated by (bent upon):--breathe.

G1710.kjv: to travel in (a country as a pedlar), i.e. (by implication) to trade:--buy and sell, make merchandise.

G1713.definition: from ἐν and the base of πορεύομαι.

G1714.definition: from ἐν and  (to blow a flame).
G1714.kjv: to enkindle, i.e. set on fire:--burn up.

G1715.kjv: in front of (in place (literally or figuratively) or time):--against, at, before, (in presence, sight) of.

G1717.definition: from a compound of ἐν and φαίνω.

G1718.kjv: to exhibit (in person) or disclose (by words):--appear, declare (plainly), inform, (will) manifest, shew, signify.

G1719.kjv: in fear, i.e. alarmed:--affrighted, afraid, tremble.

G1720.kjv: to blow at or on:--breathe on.

G1721.definition: from ἐν and a derivative of φύω.

G1722.definition: a primary preposition denoting (fixed) position (in place, time or state), and (by implication) instrumentality (medially or constructively), i.e. a relation of rest (intermediate between εἰς and ἐκ); "in," at, (up-)on, by, etc.:--about, after, against, + almost, X altogether, among, X as, at, before, between, (here-)by (+ all means), for (… sake of), + give self wholly to, (here-)in(-to, -wardly), X mightily, (because) of, (up-)on, (open-)ly, X outwardly, one, X quickly, X shortly, (speedi-)ly, X that, X there(-in, -on), through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), under, when, where(-with), while, with(-in). Often used in compounds, with substantially the same import.
G1722.kjv: rarely with verbs of motion, and then not to indicate direction, except (elliptically) by a separate (and different) preposition.

G1723.definition: from ἐν and a derivative of ἀγκάλη.
G1723.kjv: to take in one's arms, i.e. embrace:--take up in arms.

G1724.kjv: in the sea, i.e. marine:--thing in the sea.

G1726.kjv: (adverbially) in the presence (view) of:--before, in the presence of.

G1728.kjv: to commence on:--rule (by mistake for ἄρχω).

G1729.definition: from a compound of ἐν and δέω (in the sense of lacking).

G1731.kjv: to indicate (by word or act):--do, show (forth).

G1733.definition: from (the neuter of) εἷς and δέκα.

G1735.definition: third person singular present of a compound of ἐν and δέχομαι.
G1735.kjv: (impersonally) it is accepted in, i.e. admitted (possible):--can (+ not) be.

G1736.definition: from a compound of ἐν and δῆμος.
G1736.kjv: to be in one's own country, i.e. home (figuratively):--be at home (present).

G1737.kjv: to invest (with a garment):--clothe in, wear.

G1739.definition: from a compound of ἐν and a derivative of the base of δῆμος.

G1741.kjv: in glory, i.e. splendid, (figuratively) noble:--glorious, gorgeous(-ly), honourable.

G1742.kjv: apparel (especially the outer robe):--clothing, garment, raiment.

G1743.kjv: to empower:--enable, (increase in) strength(-en), be (make) strong.

G1744.kjv: to sink (by implication, wrap (compare ἐνδύω) on, i.e. (figuratively) sneak:--creep.

G1746.definition: from ἐν and δύνω (in the sense of sinking into a garment).
G1746.kjv: to invest with clothing (literally or figuratively):--array, clothe (with), endue, have (put) on.

G1747.definition: feminine from ἐν and the base of ἑδραῖος.
G1747.kjv: an ambuscade, i.e. (figuratively) murderous purpose:--lay wait. See also ἔνεδρον.

G1748.kjv: to lurk, i.e. (figuratively) plot assassination:--lay wait for.

G1749.definition: neuter of the same as ἐνέδρα.
G1749.kjv: an ambush, i.e. (figuratively) murderous design:--lying in wait.

G1750.definition: from ἔννομος and the base of εἱλίσσω.

G1751.kjv: to be within (neuter participle plural):--such things as … have. See also ἔνι.

G1752.kjv: on account of:--because, for (cause, sake), (where-)fore, by reason of, that.

G1754.kjv: to be active, efficient:--do, (be) effectual (fervent), be mighty in, shew forth self, work (effectually in).

G1758.definition: from ἐν and ἔχω; to hold in or upon, i.e. ensnare.
G1758.kjv: by implication, to keep a grudge:--entangle with, have a quarrel against, urge.

G1759.definition: from a prolonged form of ἐν.
G1759.kjv: properly, within, i.e. (of place) here, hither:--(t-)here, hither.

G1760.definition: from a compound of ἐν and θυμός.

G1762.definition: contraction for the third person singular present indicative of ἔνειμι.
G1762.kjv: impersonally, there is in or among:--be, (there) is.

G1764.kjv: to place on hand, i.e. (reflexively) impend, (participle) be instant:--come, be at hand, present.

G1768.definition: from a (tenth) multiple of ἐννέα and ἐννέα itself.

G1769.kjv: dumb (as making signs), i.e. silent from astonishment:--speechless.

G1770.kjv: to nod at, i.e. beckon or communicate by gesture:--make signs.

G1771.definition: from a compound of ἐν and νοῦς.

G1772.kjv: (subjectively) legal, or (objectively) subject to:--lawful, under law.

G1773.definition: neuter of a compound of ἐν and νύξ.

G1776.kjv: to crowd in, i.e. (figuratively) to annoy:--trouble.

G1777.kjv: liable to (a condition, penalty or imputation):--in danger of, guilty of, subject to.

G1779.definition: from a compound of ἐν and τάφος.
G1779.kjv: to inswathe with cerements for interment:--bury.

G1781.definition: from ἐν and the base of τέλος.

G1782.definition: from the same as ἐνθάδε; hence (literally or figuratively).
G1782.kjv: (repeated) on both sides:--(from) hence, on either side.

G1784.kjv: valued (figuratively):--dear, more honourable, precious, in reputation.

G1785.kjv: injunction, i.e. an authoritative prescription:--commandment, precept.

G1788.definition: from ἐν and the base of τροπή; to invert, i.e. (figuratively and reflexively) in a good sense, to respect.
G1788.kjv: or in a bad one, to confound:--regard, (give) reference, shame.

G1793.definition: from ἐν and τυγχάνω; to chance upon, i.e. (by implication) confer with.
G1793.kjv: by extension to entreat (in favor or against):--deal with, make intercession.

G1794.definition: from ἐν and  (to twist; probably akin to εἱλίσσω).
G1794.kjv: to entwine, i.e. wind up in:--wrap in (together).

G1795.definition: from ἐν and a derivative of τύπος.

G1798.kjv: something seen in sleep, i.e. a dream (vision in a dream):--dream.

G1799.definition: neuter of a compound of ἐν and a derivative of ὀπτάνομαι.
G1799.kjv: in the face of (literally or figuratively):--before, in the presence (sight) of, to.

G1801.definition: middle voice from a compound of ἐν and οὖς.
G1801.kjv: to take in one's ear, i.e. to listen:--hearken.

G1804.definition: from ἐκ and the base of ἄγγελος.

G1805.definition: from ἐκ and ἀγοράζω; to buy up, i.e. ransom.
G1805.kjv: figuratively, to rescue from loss (improve opportunity):--redeem.

G1806.kjv: to lead forth:--bring forth (out), fetch (lead) out.

G1807.definition: from ἐκ and αἱρέομαι; actively, to tear out; middle voice, to select.
G1807.kjv: figuratively, to release:--deliver, pluck out, rescue.

G1809.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and αἰτέω.

G1810.definition: from ἐκ and the base of αἰφνίδιος.

G1811.kjv: to follow out, i.e. (figuratively) to imitate, obey, yield to:--follow.

G1812.definition: plural ordinal from ἕξ and ἑκατόν.

G1813.kjv: to smear out, i.e. obliterate (erase tears, figuratively, pardon sin):--blot out, wipe away.

G1816.kjv: to start up out of the ground, i.e. germinate:--spring up.

G1817.definition: from ἐκ and ἀνίστημι; objectively, to produce, i.e. (figuratively) beget.
G1817.kjv: subjectively, to arise, i.e. (figuratively) object:--raise (rise) up.

G1819.definition: from ἐκ and a derivative of the same as αἰφνίδιος.
G1819.kjv: of a sudden, i.e. unexpectedly:--suddenly. Compare ἐξαίφνης.

G1820.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and ἀπορέω.
G1820.kjv: to be utterly at a loss, i.e. despond:--(in) despair.

G1821.kjv: to send away forth, i.e. (on a mission) to despatch, or (peremptorily) to dismiss:--send (away, forth, out).

G1822.definition: from ἐκ and a derivative of ἄρτιος; to finish out (time).
G1822.kjv: figuratively, to equip fully (a teacher):--accomplish, thoroughly furnish.

G1823.kjv: to lighten forth, i.e. (figuratively) to be radiant (of very white garments):--glistening.

G1824.definition: from ἐκ and the genitive case singular feminine of αὐτός (ὥρα being understood).
G1824.kjv: from that hour, i.e. instantly:--by and by, immediately, presently, straightway.

G1825.kjv: to rouse fully, i.e. (figuratively) to resuscitate (from death), release (from infliction):--raise up.

G1826.kjv: to issue, i.e. leave (a place), escape (to the shore):--depart, get (to land), go out.

G1827.kjv: to convict fully, i.e. (by implication) to punish:--convince.

G1828.kjv: to drag forth, i.e. (figuratively) to entice (to sin):--draw away.

G1829.definition: from a comparative of ἐκ and a presumed  (to spue).

G1831.kjv: to issue (literally or figuratively):--come (forth, out), depart (out of), escape, get out, go (abroad, away, forth, out, thence), proceed (forth), spread abroad.

G1832.definition: third person singular present indicative of a compound of ἐκ and εἰμί; so also         neuter present participle of the same (with or without some form of εἰμί expressed).
G1832.kjv: impersonally, it is right (through the figurative idea of being out in public):--be lawful, let, X may(-est).

G1833.kjv: to test thoroughly (by questions), i.e. ascertain or interrogate:--ask, enquire, search.

G1834.kjv: to consider out (aloud), i.e. rehearse, unfold:--declare, tell.

G1836.definition: from ἔχω (in the sense of taking hold of, i.e. adjoining).

G1837.definition: middle voice from ἐκ and ἠχέω.
G1837.kjv: to "echo" forth, i.e. resound (be generally reported):--sound forth.

G1839.kjv: to put (stand) out of wits, i.e. astound, or (reflexively) become astounded, insane:--amaze, be (make) astonished, be beside self (selves), bewitch, wonder.

G1840.kjv: to have full strength, i.e. be entirely competent:--be able.

G1843.kjv: to acknowledge or (by implication, of assent) agree fully:--confess, profess, promise.

G1844.kjv: to exact an oath, i.e. conjure:--adjure.

G1845.kjv: one that binds by an oath (or spell), i.e. (by implication) an "exorcist" (conjurer):--exorcist.

G1846.kjv: to dig out, i.e. (by extension) to extract (an eye), remove (roofing):--break up, pluck out.

G1847.definition: from ἐκ and a derivative of the neuter of οὐδείς.
G1847.kjv: to make utterly nothing of, i.e. despise:--set at nought. See also ἐξουθενέω.

G1848.definition: a variation of ἐξουδενόω and meaning the same:--contemptible, despise, least esteemed, set at nought.

G1849.definition: from ἔξεστι (in the sense of ability).
G1849.kjv: privilege, i.e. (subjectively) force, capacity, competency, freedom, or (objectively) mastery (concretely, magistrate, superhuman, potentate, token of control), delegated influence:--authority, jurisdiction, liberty, power, right, strength.

G1850.kjv: to control:--exercise authority upon, bring under the (have) power of.

G1851.definition: from a compound of ἐκ and ἔχω (meaning to stand out).

G1854.kjv: out(-side, of doors), literally or figuratively:--away, forth, (with-)out (of, -ward), strange.

G1856.definition: from ἐκ and  (to push); to expel.
G1856.kjv: by implication, to propel:--drive out, thrust in.

G1858.kjv: to observe a festival:--keep the feast.

G1860.definition: from ἐπαγγέλλω; an announcement (for information, assent or pledge.
G1860.kjv: especially a divine assurance of good):--message, promise.

G1861.definition: from ἐπί and the base of ἄγγελος.
G1861.kjv: to announce upon (reflexively), i.e. (by implication) to engage to do something, to assert something respecting oneself:--profess, (make) promise.

G1862.kjv: a self-committal (by assurance of conferring some good):--promise.

G1863.kjv: to superinduce, i.e. inflict (an evil), charge (a crime):--bring upon.

G1868.definition: from ἐπί and the base of αἰνέω; laudation.

G1869.kjv: to raise up (literally or figuratively):--exalt self, poise (lift, take) up.

G1870.kjv: to feel shame for something:--be ashamed.

G1874.definition: from ἐπί and the base of ἀκροατής.

G1875.definition: from ἐπί and ἄν; a particle of indefinite contemporaneousness.

G1876.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of ἐπί and ἀνάγκη.

G1877.definition: from ἐπί and ἀνάγω; to lead up on, i.e. (technical) to put out (to sea).

G1879.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and ἀναπαύω; to settle on.

G1880.kjv: to come up on, i.e. return:--come again, return.

G1881.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and ἀνίστημι.
G1881.kjv: to stand up on, i.e. (figuratively) to attack:--rise up against.

G1882.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and ἀνορθόω.
G1882.kjv: a straightening up again, i.e. (figuratively) rectification (reformation):-- correction.

G1883.kjv: up above, i.e. over or on (of place, amount, rank, etc.):--above, more than, (up-)on, over.

G1885.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and ἄρχω (meaning a governor of a district, "eparch").
G1885.kjv: a special region of government, i.e. a Roman præfecture:--province.

G1886.definition: from ἐπί and an equivalent of αὐλή.
G1886.kjv: a hut over the head, i.e. a dwelling:--habitation.

G1887.kjv: occurring on the succeeding day, i.e. (ἡμέρα being implied) to-morrow:--day following, morrow, next day (after).

G1888.definition: from ἐπί and αὐτός and (the dative case singular of) a derivative of  (a thief).
G1888.kjv: in theft itself, i.e. (by analogy) in actual crime:--in the very act.

G1890.kjv: to foam upon, i.e. (figuratively) to exhibit (a vile passion):--foam out.

G1891.definition: from ἐπί (in the sense of devoted to) and  (Venus).

G1892.kjv: to rouse upon, i.e. (figuratively) to excite against:--raise, stir up.

G1893.kjv: thereupon, i.e. since (of time or cause):--because, else, for that (then, -asmuch as), otherwise, seeing that, since, when.

G1894.kjv: since now, i.e. (of time) when, or (of cause) whereas:--after that, because, for (that, -asmuch as), seeing, since.

G1896.definition: and other moods and persons of the same tense; from ἐπί and εἴδω.
G1896.kjv: to regard (favorably or otherwise):--behold, look upon.

G1898.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and εἰσάγω.

G1900.definition: from ἐπί and (the accusative case plural neuter of) ἐκεῖνος.
G1900.kjv: upon those parts of, i.e. on the further side of:--beyond.

G1901.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and ἐκτείνω.

G1902.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and ἐνδύω.
G1902.kjv: to invest upon oneself:--be clothed upon.

G1903.kjv: a wrapper, i.e. outer garment:--fisher's coat.

G1904.kjv: to supervene, i.e. arrive, occur, impend, attack, (figuratively) influence:--come (in, upon).

G1905.kjv: to ask for, i.e. inquire, seek:--ask (after, questions), demand, desire, question.

G1907.definition: from ἐπί and ἔχω; to hold upon, i.e. (by implication) to retain; (by extension) to detain.
G1907.kjv: (with implication, of νοῦς) to pay attention to:--give (take) heed unto, hold forth, mark, stay.

G1908.definition: from a comparative of ἐπί and (probably)  (threats).
G1908.kjv: to insult, slander:--use despitefully, falsely accuse.

G1909.definition: a primary preposition; properly, meaning superimposition (of time, place, order, etc.), as a relation of distribution (with the genitive case), i.e. over, upon, etc.; of rest (with the dative case) at, on, etc..
G1909.kjv: of direction (with the accusative case) towards, upon, etc.:--about (the times), above, after, against, among, as long as (touching), at, beside, X have charge of, (be-, (where-))fore, in (a place, as much as, the time of, -to), (because) of, (up-)on (behalf of), over, (by, for) the space of, through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), with. In compounds it retains essentially the same import, at, upon, etc. (literally or figuratively).

G1910.definition: from ἐπί and the base of βάσις.
G1910.kjv: to walk upon, i.e. mount, ascend, embark, arrive:--come (into), enter into, go abroad, sit upon, take ship.

G1911.definition: from ἐπί and βάλλω; to throw upon (literal or figurative, transitive or reflexive; usually with more or less force); specially (with ἑαυτοῦ implied) to reflect.
G1911.kjv: impersonally, to belong to:--beat into, cast (up-)on, fall, lay (on), put (unto), stretch forth, think on.

G1912.definition: from ἐπί and βαρέω; to be heavy upon, i.e. (pecuniarily) to be expensive to.
G1912.kjv: figuratively, to be severe towards:--be chargeable to, overcharge.

G1913.definition: from ἐπί and a reduplicated derivative of the base of βάσις (compare ἀναβιβάζω).
G1913.kjv: to cause to mount (an animal):--set on.

G1914.kjv: to gaze at (with favor, pity or partiality):--look upon, regard, have respect to.

G1917.definition: from a presumed compound of ἐπί and βούλομαι.
G1917.kjv: a plan against someone, i.e. a plot:--laying (lying) in wait.

G1918.definition: from ἐπί and a derivative of γάμος.
G1918.kjv: to form affinity with, i.e. (specially) in a levirate way:--marry.

G1919.kjv: worldly (physically or morally):--earthly, in earth, terrestrial.

G1920.kjv: to arrive upon, i.e. spring up (as a wind):--blow.

G1921.definition: from ἐπί and γινώσκω; to know upon some mark, i.e. recognize.
G1921.kjv: by implication, to become fully acquainted with, to acknowledge:--(ac-, have, take)know(-ledge, well), perceive.

G1922.kjv: recognition, i.e. (by implication) full discernment, acknowledgement:--(ac-)knowledge(-ing, - ment).

G1924.kjv: to inscribe (physically or mentally):--inscription, write in (over, thereon).

G1926.kjv: to admit (as a guest or (figuratively) teacher):--receive.

G1927.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and δῆμος.
G1927.kjv: to make oneself at home, i.e. (by extension) to reside (in a foreign country):--(be) dwelling (which were) there, stranger.

G1928.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and διατάσσω.
G1928.kjv: to appoint besides, i.e. supplement (as a codicil):--add to.

G1929.kjv: to give over (by hand or surrender):--deliver unto, give, let (+ (her drive)), offer.

G1930.definition: from ἐπί and a derivative of ὀρθός.
G1930.kjv: to straighten further, i.e. (figuratively) arrange additionally:--set in order.

G1931.kjv: to set fully (as the sun):--go down.

G1932.kjv: suitableness, i.e. (by implication) equity, mildness:--clemency, gentleness.

G1933.kjv: appropriate, i.e. (by implication) mild:--gentle, moderation, patient.

G1934.definition: from ἐπί and ζητέω; to search (inquire) for.
G1934.kjv: intensively, to demand, to crave:--desire, enquire, seek (after, for).

G1937.kjv: to set the heart upon, i.e. long for (rightfully or otherwise):--covet, desire, would fain, lust (after).

G1939.kjv: a longing (especially for what is forbidden):--concupiscence, desire, lust (after).

G1941.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and καλέω; to entitle.
G1941.kjv: by implication, to invoke (for aid, worship, testimony, decision, etc.):--appeal (unto), call (on, upon), surname.

G1944.definition: from ἐπί and a derivative of καταράομαι.

G1945.kjv: to rest upon (literally or figuratively):--impose, be instant, (be) laid (there-, up-)on, (when) lay (on), lie (on), press upon.

G1946.kjv: an Epicurean or follower of Epicurus:--Epicurean.

G1947.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and a (prolonged) form of the base of κοράσιον (in the sense of servant).

G1949.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and λαμβάνω; to seize (for help, injury, attainment, or any other purpose.
G1949.kjv: literally or figuratively):--catch, lay hold (up-)on, take (by, hold of, on).

G1950.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and λανθάνω; to lose out of mind.
G1950.kjv: by implication, to neglect:--(be) forget(-ful of).

G1951.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and λέγω.

G1952.kjv: to leave upon, i.e. (figuratively) to be insufficient for:--fail.

G1956.kjv: to solve further, i.e. (figuratively) to explain, decide:--determine, expound.

G1958.kjv: carefulness, i.e. kind attention (hospitality):--+ refresh self.

G1959.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and the same as μέλω.
G1959.kjv: to care for (physically or otherwise):--take care of.

G1960.definition: adverb from a derivative of ἐπιμελέομαι.

G1961.kjv: to stay over, i.e. remain (figuratively, persevere):--abide (in), continue (in), tarry.

G1962.kjv: to nod at, i.e. (by implication) to assent:--consent.

G1963.kjv: attention of the mind, i.e. (by implication) purpose:--thought.

G1965.kjv: on oath, i.e. (falsely) a forswearer:--perjured person.

G1966.definition: feminine singular participle of a comparative of ἐπί and  (to go).
G1966.kjv: supervening, i.e. (ἡμέρα or νύξ being expressed or implied) the ensuing day or night:--following, next.

G1967.definition: perhaps from the same as ἐπιοῦσα; tomorrow's; but more probably from ἐπί and a derivative of the present participle feminine of εἰμί.

G1968.definition: from ἐπί and πίπτω; to embrace (with affection) or seize (with more or less violence.
G1968.kjv: literally or figuratively):--fall into (on, upon) lie on, press upon.

G1969.kjv: to chastise, i.e. (with words) to upbraid:--rebuke.

G1971.kjv: to dote upon, i.e. intensely crave possession (lawfully or wrongfully):--(earnestly) desire (greatly), (greatly) long (after), lust.

G1973.definition: from ἐπί and a derivative of the latter part of ἐπιποθέω.
G1973.kjv: yearned upon, i.e. greatly loved:--longed for.

G1975.kjv: to journey further, i.e. travel on (reach):--come.

G1976.definition: from ἐπί and the base of ῥαφίς.
G1976.kjv: to stitch upon, i.e. fasten with the needle:--sew on.

G1977.kjv: to throw upon (literally or figuratively):--cast upon.

G1978.definition: from ἐπί and some form of the base of σημαίνω.

G1979.definition: from a compound of ἐπί and a derivative of σῖτος.

G1980.definition: middle voice from ἐπί and the base of σκοπός; to inspect, i.e. (by implication) to select.
G1980.kjv: by extension, to go to see, relieve:--look out, visit.

G1981.kjv: to tent upon, i.e. (figuratively) abide with :--rest upon.

G1982.definition: from ἐπί and a derivative of σκιά; to cast a shade upon, i.e. (by analogy) to envelop in a haze of brilliancy.
G1982.kjv: figuratively, to invest with preternatural influence:--overshadow.

G1983.definition: from ἐπί and σκοπέω; to oversee.
G1983.kjv: by implication, to beware:--look diligently, take the oversight.

G1984.definition: from ἐπισκέπτομαι; inspection (for relief); by implication, superintendence.
G1984.kjv: specially, the Christian "episcopate":--the office of a "bishop", bishoprick, visitation.

G1985.definition: from ἐπί and σκοπός (in the sense of ἐπισκοπέω).
G1985.kjv: a superintendent, i.e. Christian officer in genitive case charge of a (or the) church (literally or figuratively):--bishop, overseer.

G1986.kjv: to draw over, i.e. (with ἀκροβυστία implied) efface the mark of circumcision (by recovering with the foreskin):--become uncircumcised.

G1987.definition: apparently a middle voice of ἐφίστημι (with νοῦς implied).
G1987.kjv: to put the mind upon, i.e. comprehend, or be acquainted with:--know, understand.

G1988.definition: from ἐπί and a presumed derivative of ἵστημι.

G1989.kjv: to enjoin (by writing), i.e. (genitive case) to communicate by letter (for any purpose):--write (a letter, unto).

G1991.kjv: to support further, i.e. reestablish:--confirm, strengthen.

G1993.kjv: to put something over the mouth, i.e. (figuratively) to silence:--stop mouths.

G1994.kjv: to revert (literally, figuratively or morally):--come (go) again, convert, (re-)turn (about, again).

G1996.kjv: to collect upon the same place:--gather (together).

G1997.kjv: especially a Christian meeting (for worship):--assembling (gathering) together.

G3335.definition: from μετά and λαμβάνω; to participate.
G3335.kjv: genitive case, to accept (and use):--eat, have, be partaker, receive, take.

G3361.definition: a primary particle of qualified negation (whereas οὐ expresses an absolute denial); (adverb) not, (conjunction) lest.

Often used in compounds in substantially the same relations. See also ἐὰν μή, ἵνα μή, οὐ μή, μῆκος, μηκύνω, μήν, μὴ οὐκ.

G3362.kjv: if not, i.e. unless:--X before, but, except, if, no, (if, + whosoever) not.

G3367.kjv: not even one (man, woman, thing):--any (man, thing), no (man), none, not (at all, any man, a whit), nothing, + without delay.

G3371.kjv: no further:--any longer, (not) henceforth, hereafter, no henceforward (longer, more, soon), not any more.

G3373.kjv: to lengthen, i.e. (middle voice) to enlarge:--grow up.

G3378.kjv: as interrogative and negative, is it not that?:--neither (followed by no), + never, not. Compare οὐ μή.

G3387.kjv: whether any:--any (sometimes unexpressed except by the simple interrogative form of the sentence).

G3404.definition: from a primary  (hatred); to detest (especially to persecute).

G3433.kjv: with difficulty:--hardly, scarce(-ly), + with much work.

G3552.kjv: to be sick, i.e. (by implication, of a diseased appetite) to hanker after (figuratively, to harp upon):--dote.

G3661.definition: adverb from a compound of the base of ὁμοῦ and θυμός.

G3670.kjv: to assent, i.e. covenant, acknowledge:--con- (pro-)fess, confession is made, give thanks, promise.

G3672.definition: adverb of present passive participle of ὁμολογέω.

G3673.definition: from the base of ὁμοῦ and τέχνη.

G3674.definition: genitive case of  (the same; akin to ἅμα) as adverb.
G3674.kjv: at the same place or time:--together.

G3675.definition: from the base of ὁμοῦ and φρήν.

G3676.definition: adverb from the base of ὁμοῦ.
G3676.kjv: at the same time, i.e. (conjunctionally) notwithstanding, yet still:--and even, nevertheless, though but.

G3678.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of ὄνος.

G3683.definition: from a derivative of ὀνίνημι and φόρος; profit-bearer.

G3686.definition: from a presumed derivative of the base of γινώσκω (compare ὀνίνημι).

G3689.definition: adverb of the oblique cases of ὤν.
G3689.kjv: really:--certainly, clean, indeed, of a truth, verily.

G3691.definition: probably akin to the base of ἀκμήν ("acid"); keen.

G3692.definition: probably from ὀπτάνομαι; a hole (as if for light), i.e. cavern.

G3693.definition: from  (regard; from ὀπτάνομαι) with enclitic of source.
G3693.kjv: from the rear (as a secure aspect), i.e. at the back (adverb and preposition of place or time):--after, backside, behind.

G3694.kjv: or as noun):--after, back(-ward), (+ get) behind, + follow.

G3695.kjv: to equip (with weapons (middle voice and figuratively)):--arm self.

G3696.definition: probably from a primary  (to be busy about).
G3696.kjv: an implement or utensil or tool (literally or figuratively, especially, offensive for war):--armour, instrument, weapon.

G3697.kjv: of what kind that, i.e. how (as) great (excellent) (specially, as an indefinite correlative to the definite antecedent τοιοῦτος of quality):--what manner (sort) of, such as whatsoever.

G3699.kjv: what(-ever) where, i.e. at whichever spot:--in what place, where(-as, -soever), whither (+ soever).

G3700.definition: a (middle voice) prolonged form of the primary (middle voice)        ;    which is used for it in certain                                   tenses; and both as alternate of                                   ὁράω; to gaze (i.e. with wide-open eyes, as at something remarkable; and thus differing from βλέπω, which denotes simply voluntary observation; and from εἴδω, which expresses merely mechanical, passive or casual vision; while θεάομαι, and still more emphatically its intensive θεωρέω, signifies an earnest but more continued inspection.
G3700.kjv: and σκοπέω a watching from a distance):--appear, look, see, shew self.

G3701.definition: from a presumed derivative of ὀπτάνομαι.

G3702.definition: from an obsolete verb akin to  (to "steep").

G3703.definition: apparently from the base of ὀψέ and ὥρα.
G3703.kjv: properly, even-tide of the (summer) season (dog-days), i.e. (by implication) ripe fruit:--fruit.

G3704.kjv: what(-ever) how, i.e. in the manner that (as adverb or conjunction of coincidence, intentional or actual):--because, how, (so) that, to, when.

G3705.kjv: something gazed at, i.e. a spectacle (especially supernatural):--sight, vision.

G3706.kjv: the act of gazing, i.e. (externally) an aspect or (internally) an inspired appearance:--sight, vision.

G3707.kjv: gazed at, i.e. (by implication) capable of being seen:--visible.

G3708.kjv: passively, to appear:--behold, perceive, see, take heed.

G3709.definition: from ὀρέγομαι; properly, desire (as a reaching forth or excitement of the mind), i.e. (by analogy), violent passion (ire, or (justifiable) abhorrence).
G3709.kjv: by implication punishment:--anger, indignation, vengeance, wrath.

G3710.kjv: to provoke or enrage, i.e. (passively) become exasperated:--be angry (wroth).

G3712.kjv: a stretch of the arms, i.e. a fathom:--fathom.

G3713.definition: middle voice of apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary (compare ὄρος).
G3713.kjv: to stretch oneself, i.e. reach out after (long for):--covet after, desire.

G3714.kjv: mountainous, i.e. (feminine by implication, of χώρα) the Highlands (of Judæa):--hill country.

G3715.kjv: excitement of the mind, i.e. longing after:--lust.

G3716.definition: from a compound of ὀρθός and πούς.
G3716.kjv: to be straight-footed, i.e. (figuratively) to go directly forward:--walk uprightly.

G3717.definition: probably from the base of ὄρος.
G3717.kjv: right (as rising), i.e. (perpendicularly) erect (figuratively, honest), or (horizontally) level or direct:--straight, upright.

G3720.kjv: relating to the dawn, i.e. matutinal (as an epithet of Venus, especially brilliant in the early day):--morning.

G3721.kjv: in the dawn, i.e. up at day-break:--early.

G3722.definition: from the same as ὄρος; dawn (as sun-rise, rising of light).

G3723.kjv: in a straight manner, i.e. (figuratively) correctly (also morally):--plain, right(-ly).

G3724.kjv: to mark out or bound ("horizon"), i.e. (figuratively) to appoint, decree, specify:--declare, determine, limit, ordain.

G3725.definition: neuter of a derivative of an apparently primary  (a bound or limit).
G3725.kjv: a boundary-line, i.e. (by implication) a frontier (region):--border, coast.

G3726.definition: from ὅρκος; to put on oath, i.e. make swear.

G3727.definition: from  (a fence; perhaps akin to ὅριον).
G3727.kjv: a limit, i.e. (sacred) restraint (specially, an oath):--oath.

G3728.definition: from a compound of ὅρκος and a derivative of ὀμνύω.

G3729.kjv: to start, spur or urge on, i.e. (reflexively) to dash or plunge:--run (violently), rush.

G3732.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of ὄρνις.

G3733.definition: probably from a prolonged form of the base of ὄρος.
G3733.kjv: a bird (as rising in the air), i.e. (specially), a hen (or female domestic fowl):--hen.

G3734.definition: from a compound of the base of ὅριον and a derivative of τίθημι.

G3735.definition: probably from an obsolete  (to rise or "rear"; perhaps akin to αἴρω; compare ὄρνις).
G3735.kjv: a mountain (as lifting itself above the plain):--hill, mount(-ain).

G3736.kjv: to "burrow" in the ground, i.e. dig:--dig.

G3738.definition: middle voice from  (a row or ring).

G3739.definition: probably a primary word (or perhaps a form of the article ὁ).

G3740.kjv: how (i.e. with ἄν, so) many times as:--as oft(-en) as.

G3741.kjv: and from ἅγιος, which relates to purity from defilement), i.e. hallowed (pious, sacred, sure):--holy, mercy, shalt be. 342

G3745.kjv: as (much, great, long, etc.) as:--all (that), as (long, many, much) (as), how great (many, much), (in-)asmuch as, so many as, that (ever), the more, those things, what (great, -soever), wheresoever, wherewithsoever, which, X while, who(-soever).

G3748.definition: from ὅς and τὶς; which some, i.e. any that.
G3748.kjv: also (definite) which same:--X and (they), (such) as, (they) that, in that they, what(-soever), whereas ye, (they) which, who(-soever). Compare ὅτι.

G3749.definition: from  ("oyster") (a tile, i.e. terra cotta); earthen-ware, i.e. clayey.

G3751.definition: of uncertain affinity; the loin (externally), i.e. the hip.

G3754.definition: neuter of ὅστις as conjunction; demonstrative, that (sometimes redundant).

G3755.definition: for the genitive case of ὅστις (as adverb).

G3756.definition: a primary word; the absolute negative (compare μή) adverb.

G3757.definition: genitive case of ὅς as adverb.
G3757.kjv: at which place, i.e. where:--where(-in), whither(-soever).

G3761.kjv: not however, i.e. neither, nor, not even:--neither (indeed), never, no (more, nor, not), nor (yet), (also, even, then) not (even, so much as), + nothing, so much as.

G3767.kjv: (adverbially) certainly, or (conjunctionally) accordingly:--and (so, truly), but, now (then), so (likewise then), then, therefore, verily, wherefore.

G3770.kjv: celestial, i.e. belonging to or coming from the sky:--heavenly.

G3795.kjv: a relish to other food (as if cooked sauce), i.e. (specially), fish (presumably salted and dried as a condiment):--fish.

G3798.kjv: feminine (as noun) afternoon (early eve) or nightfall (later eve):--even(-ing, (-tide)).

G3800.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of the same as ὀψάριον.

G3801.lemma: ὁ ὢν καί ὁ ἦν καί ὁ ἐρχόμενος
G3801.xlit: ho ṑn kaí ho ēn kaí ho erchómenos
G3801.pron: ho own kahee ho ane kahee ho er-khom'-en-os
G3801.definition: a phrase combining ὁ with the present participle and imperfect of εἰμί and the present participle of ἔρχομαι by means of καί.

G3804.definition: from a presumed derivative of πάθος; something undergone, i.e. hardship or pain.

G3806.kjv: properly, suffering ("pathos"), i.e. (subjectively) a passion (especially concupiscence):-- (inordinate) affection, lust.

G3808.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of παῖς.

G3809.definition: from παιδεύω; tutorage, i.e. education or training.

G3810.kjv: a trainer, i.e. teacher or (by implication) discipliner:--which corrected, instructor.

G3814.kjv: a girl, i.e. (specially), a female slave or servant:--bondmaid(-woman), damsel, maid(-en).

G3816.kjv: and by eminence to God):--child, maid(-en), (man) servant, son, young man.

G3817.definition: a primary verb; to hit (as if by a single blow and less violently than τύπτω).
G3817.kjv: specially, to sting (as a scorpion):--smite, strike.

G3818.definition: feminine of an adjective of uncertain derivation.

G3819.definition: probably another form for πάλιν (through the idea of retrocession); (adverbially) formerly, or (by relatively) sometime since.

G3820.kjv: antique, i.e. not recent, worn out:--old.

G3822.kjv: to make (passively, become) worn out, or declare obsolete:--decay, make (wax) old.

G3823.definition: from  (to vibrate; another form for βάλλω).

G3824.definition: from πάλιν and γένεσις; (spiritual) rebirth (the state or the act), i.e. (figuratively) spiritual renovation.

G3825.definition: probably from the same as πάλη (through the idea of oscillatory repetition).
G3825.kjv: (adverbially) anew, i.e. (of place) back, (of time) once more, or (conjunctionally) furthermore or on the other hand:--again.

G3826.definition: dative case (adverb) of a compound of πᾶς and πλῆθος.
G3826.kjv: in full multitude, i.e. concertedly or simultaneously:--all at once.

G3828.definition: from a compound of πᾶς and πυρά; every-tribal, i.e. heterogeneous (χώρα being implied).

G3829.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πᾶς and a derivative of δέχομαι.

G3831.definition: from πᾶς and a derivative of ἀγορά.
G3831.kjv: a mass-meeting, i.e. (figuratively) universal companionship:--general assembly.

G3833.definition: from a compound of πᾶς and ὅπλον.

G3834.kjv: adroitness, i.e. (in a bad sense) trickery or sophistry:--(cunning) craftiness, subtilty.

G3837.definition: genitive case (as adverb of place) of a presumed derivative of πᾶς.

G3838.kjv: full-ended, i.e. entire (neuter as noun, completion):--+ in (no) wise, uttermost.

G3840.kjv: from (i.e. on) all sides:--on every side, round about.

G3841.kjv: the all-ruling, i.e. God (as absolute and universal sovereign):--Almighty, Omnipotent.

G3842.kjv: every when, i.e. at all times:--alway(-s), ever(-more).

G3843.kjv: specially, at all events, (with negative, following) in no event:--by all means, altogether, at all, needs, no doubt, in (no) wise, surely.

G3844.kjv: i.e. (with genitive case) from beside (literally or figuratively), (with dative case) at (or in) the vicinity of (objectively or subjectively), (with accusative case) to the proximity with (local (especially beyond or opposed to) or causal (on account of):--above, against, among, at, before, by, contrary to, X friend, from, + give (such things as they), + that (she) had, X his, in, more than, nigh unto, (out) of, past, save, side…by, in the sight of, than, (there-)fore, with. In compounds it retains the same variety of application.

G3845.definition: from παρά and the base of βάσις.
G3845.kjv: to go contrary to, i.e. violate a command:--(by) transgress(-ion).

G3846.kjv: to throw alongside, i.e. (reflexively) to reach a place, or (figuratively) to liken:--arrive, compare.

G3849.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of βιάζω.

G3850.kjv: a similitude ("parable"), i.e. (symbolic) fictitious narrative (of common life conveying a moral), apothegm or adage:--comparison, figure, parable, proverb.

G3851.definition: from παρά and the middle voice of βουλεύω.

G3853.definition: from παρά and the base of ἄγγελος.
G3853.kjv: to transmit a message, i.e. (by implication) to enjoin:--(give in) charge, (give) command(-ment), declare.

G3854.definition: from παρά and γίνομαι; to become near, i.e. approach (have arrived).

G3855.kjv: to lead near, i.e. (reflexively or intransitively) to go along or away:--depart, pass (away, by, forth).

G3856.kjv: to show alongside (the public), i.e. expose to infamy:--make a public example, put to an open shame.

G3857.kjv: a park, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise"):--paradise.

G3858.kjv: to accept near, i.e. admit or (by implication) delight in:--receive.

G3859.definition: from a compound of παρά and διατρίβω.

G3860.kjv: to surrender, i.e yield up, intrust, transmit:--betray, bring forth, cast, commit, deliver (up), give (over, up), hazard, put in prison, recommend.

G3861.definition: from παρά and δόξα (in the sense of seeming).

G4115.kjv: to widen (literally or figuratively):--make broad, enlarge.

G4121.definition: from πλείων; to do, make or be more, i.e. increase (transitively or intransitively).

G4122.kjv: to be covetous, i.e. (by implication) to over-reach:--get an advantage, defraud, make a gain.

G4123.kjv: holding (desiring) more, i.e. eager for gain (avaricious, hence a defrauder):--covetous.

G4124.kjv: avarice, i.e. (by implication) fraudulency, extortion:--covetous(-ness) practices, greediness.

G4127.definition: from πλήσσω; a stroke; by implication, a wound.

G4128.kjv: a fulness, i.e. a large number, throng, populace:--bundle, company, multitude.

G4130.definition: a prolonged form of a primary            (which appears only as an alternate in                          certain tenses and in the reduplicated form                          pimplemi); to "fill" (literally or figuratively (imbue, influence, supply)).

G4133.kjv: moreover (besides), i.e. albeit, save that, rather, yet:--but (rather), except, nevertheless, notwithstanding, save, than.

G4134.definition: from πλήθω; replete, or covered over.

G4135.kjv: to carry out fully (in evidence), i.e. completely assure (or convince), entirely accomplish:--most surely believe, fully know (persuade), make full proof of.

G4137.kjv: to make replete, i.e. (literally) to cram (a net), level up (a hollow), or (figuratively) to furnish (or imbue, diffuse, influence), satisfy, execute (an office), finish (a period or task), verify (or coincide with a prediction), etc.:--accomplish, X after, (be) complete, end, expire, fill (up), fulfil, (be, make) full (come), fully preach, perfect, supply.

G4138.kjv: repletion or completion, i.e. (subjectively) what fills (as contents, supplement, copiousness, multitude), or (objectively) what is filled (as container, performance, period):--which is put in to fill up, piece that filled up, fulfilling, full, fulness.

G4139.definition: neuter of a derivative of  (near); (adverbially) close by.
G4139.kjv: as noun, a neighbor, i.e. fellow (as man, countryman, Christian or friend):--near, neighbour.

G4140.definition: from a presumed derivative of πλήθω.

G4141.definition: apparently another form of πλάσσω (through the idea of flattening out).
G4141.kjv: to pound, i.e. (figuratively) to inflict with (calamity):--smite. Compare τύπτω.

G4142.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of πλοῖον.

G4144.kjv: a sail, i.e. navigation:--course, sailing, voyage.

G4147.kjv: to be (or become) wealthy (literally or figuratively):--be increased with goods, (be made, wax) rich.

G4149.kjv: wealth (as fulness), i.e. (literally) money, possessions, or (figuratively) abundance, richness, (specially), valuable bestowment:--riches.

G4150.definition: a prolonged form of an obsolete  (to "flow").
G4150.kjv: to "plunge", i.e. launder clothing:--wash. Compare λούω, νίπτω.

G4151.definition: from πνέω; a current of air, i.e. breath (blast) or a breeze.
G4151.kjv: by analogy or figuratively, a spirit, i.e. (human) the rational soul, (by implication) vital principle, mental disposition, etc., or (superhuman) an angel, demon, or (divine) God, Christ's spirit, the Holy Spirit:--ghost, life, spirit(-ual, -ually), mind. Compare ψυχή.

G4152.kjv: non-carnal, i.e. (humanly) ethereal (as opposed to gross), or (dæmoniacally) a spirit (concretely), or (divinely) supernatural, regenerate, religious:--spiritual. Compare ψυχικός.

G4154.kjv: to breathe hard, i.e. breeze:--blow. Compare ψύχω.

G4155.kjv: to wheeze, i.e. (causative, by implication) to throttle or strangle (drown):--choke, take by the throat.

G4156.kjv: throttled, i.e. (neuter concretely) an animal choked to death (not bled):--strangled.

G4158.definition: from πούς and another element of uncertain affinity.
G4158.kjv: a dress (ἐσθής implied) reaching the ankles:--garment down to the foot.

G4159.definition: from the base of πόσις with enclitic adverb of origin.
G4159.kjv: from which (as interrogative) or what (as relative) place, state, source or cause:--whence.

G4160.definition: apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary.
G4160.kjv: to make or do (in a very wide application, more or less direct):--abide, + agree, appoint, X avenge, + band together, be, bear, + bewray, bring (forth), cast out, cause, commit, + content, continue, deal, + without any delay, (would) do(-ing), execute, exercise, fulfil, gain, give, have, hold, X journeying, keep, + lay wait, + lighten the ship, make, X mean, + none of these things move me, observe, ordain, perform, provide, + have purged, purpose, put, + raising up, X secure, shew, X shoot out, spend, take, tarry, + transgress the law, work, yield. Compare πράσσω.

G4161.kjv: a product, i.e. fabric (literally or figuratively):--thing that is made, workmanship.

G4163.definition: from ποιέω; a performer; specially, a "poet".

G4164.kjv: motley, i.e. various in character:--divers, manifold.

G4165.kjv: to tend as a shepherd of (figuratively, superviser):--feed (cattle), rule.

G4168.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of ποίμνη.

G4169.definition: from the base of ποῦ and οἷος.
G4169.kjv: individualizing interrogative (of character) what sort of, or (of number) which one:--what (manner of), which.

G4170.kjv: to be (engaged) in warfare, i.e. to battle (literally or figuratively):--fight, (make) war.

G4171.kjv: a single encounter or a series):--battle, fight, war.

G4172.definition: probably from the same as πόλεμος, or perhaps from πολύς.
G4172.kjv: a town (properly, with walls, of greater or less size):--city.

G4173.kjv: a town-officer, i.e. magistrate:--ruler of the city.

G4176.definition: middle voice of a derivative of πολίτης.
G4176.kjv: to behave as a citizen (figuratively):--let conversation be, live.

G4179.definition: from πολύς and probably a derivative of πλέκω.
G4179.kjv: manifold, i.e. (neuter as noun) very much more:--manifold more.

G4180.definition: from a compound of πολύς and λόγος.

G4181.definition: adverb from a compound of πολύς and μέρος.
G4181.kjv: in many portions, i.e. variously as to time and agency (piecemeal):--at sundry times.

G4183.definition: including the forms from the alternate ; (singular) much (in any respect) or (plural) many; neuter (singular) as adverbial, largely.
G4183.kjv: neuter (plural) as adverb or noun often, mostly, largely:--abundant, + altogether, common, + far (passed, spent), (+ be of a) great (age, deal, -ly, while), long, many, much, oft(-en (-times)), plenteous, sore, straitly. Compare πλεῖστος, πλείων.

G4185.kjv: extremely expensive:--costly, very precious, of great price.

G4186.kjv: extremely valuable:--very costly, of great price.

G4187.definition: adverb from a compound of πολύς and τρόπος.
G4187.kjv: in many ways, i.e. variously as to method or form:--in divers manners.

G4190.definition: from a derivative of πόνος; hurtful, i.e. evil (properly, in effect or influence, and thus differing from κακός, which refers rather to essential character, as well as from σαπρός, which indicates degeneracy from original virtue); figuratively, calamitous; also (passively) ill, i.e. diseased; but especially (morally) culpable, i.e. derelict, vicious, facinorous; neuter (singular) mischief, malice, or (plural) guilt.
G4190.kjv: masculine (singular) the devil, or (plural) sinners:--bad, evil, grievous, harm, lewd, malicious, wicked(-ness). See also πονηρότερος.

G4193.kjv: a Pontican, i.e. native of Pontus:--born in Pontus.

G4195.kjv: Pontus, a region of Asia Minor:--Pontus.

G4198.definition: middle voice from a derivative of the same as πεῖρα; to traverse, i.e. travel (literally or figuratively; especially to remove (figuratively, die), live, etc.).
G4198.kjv: --depart, go (away, forth, one's way, up), (make a, take a) journey, walk.

G4200.definition: from a derivative of  (a way, i.e. means).

G4202.definition: from πορνεύω; harlotry (including adultery and incest).

G4203.kjv: to act the harlot, i.e. (literally) indulge unlawful lust (of either sex), or (figuratively) practise idolatry:--commit (fornication).

G4205.definition: from  (to sell; akin to the base of πιπράσκω).
G4205.kjv: a (male) prostitute (as venal), i.e. (by analogy) a debauchee (libertine):--fornicator, whoremonger.

G4206.kjv: forwards, i.e. at a distance:--far, a great way off. See also πόῤῥωθεν.

G4207.definition: from πόῤῥω with adverbial enclitic of source.
G4207.kjv: from far, or (by implication) at a distance, i.e. distantly:--afar off.

G4209.kjv: the "purple" mussel, i.e. (by implication) the red-blue color itself, and finally a garment dyed with it:--purple.

G4211.definition: feminine of a compound of πορφύρα and πωλέω.
G4211.kjv: a female trader in purple cloth:--seller of purple.

G4213.kjv: a drinking (the act), i.e. (concretely) a draught:--drink.

G4214.definition: from an absolute  (who, what) and ὅς.
G4214.kjv: interrogative pronoun (of amount) how much (large, long or (plural) many):--how great (long, many), what.

G4216.definition: from ποταμός and a derivative of φορέω.
G4216.kjv: river-borne, i.e. overwhelmed by a stream:--carried away of the flood.

G4217.definition: apparently from πότε and the base of ποῦ.
G4217.kjv: interrogatively, whatever, i.e. of what possible sort:--what (manner of).

G4218.definition: from the base of πού and τέ.
G4218.kjv: indefinite adverb, at some time, ever:--afore-(any, some-)time(-s), at length (the last), (+ n- )ever, in the old time, in time past, once, when.

G4219.kjv: interrogative adverb, at what time:--+ how long, when.

G4220.definition: neuter of a comparative of the base of ποῦ.
G4220.kjv: interrogative as adverb, which (of two), i.e. is it this or that:--whether.

G4221.definition: neuter of a derivative of the alternate of πίνω; a drinking-vessel; by extension, the contents thereof, i.e. a cupful (draught).

G4222.definition: from a derivative of the alternate of πίνω.
G4222.kjv: to furnish drink, irrigate:--give (make) to drink, feed, water.

G4229.definition: from πράσσω; a deed; by implication, an affair.

G4231.kjv: to busy oneself with, i.e. to trade:--occupy.

G4233.kjv: a practiser, i.e. (specially), an official collector:--officer.

G4234.definition: from πράσσω; practice, i.e. (concretely) an act.
G4234.kjv: by extension, a function:--deed, office, work.

G4235.definition: a form of πραΰς, used in certain parts.

G4237.definition: perhaps from  (a leek, and so an onion-patch).

G4239.kjv: mild, i.e. (by implication) humble:--meek. See also πρᾷος.

G4241.kjv: to tower up (be conspicuous), i.e. (by implication) to be suitable or proper (third person singular present indicative, often used impersonally, it is fit or right):--become, comely.

G4245.kjv: specially, an Israelite Sanhedrist (also figuratively, member of the celestial council) or Christian "presbyter":-- elder(-est), old.

G4249.definition: a strengthened form of a primary prio (to saw).

G4252.kjv: Priscilla (i.e. little Prisca), a Christian woman:--Priscilla.

G4259.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πρό and αὐλή.

G4262.kjv: relating to sheep, i.e. (a gate) through which they were led into Jerusalem:--sheep (market).

G4263.definition: probably neuter of a presumed derivative of προβαίνω.
G4263.kjv: something that walks forward (a quadruped), i.e. (specially), a sheep (literally or figuratively):--sheep(-fold).

G4264.definition: from πρό and a reduplicated form of βιάζω.
G4264.kjv: to force forward, i.e. bring to the front, instigate:--draw, before instruct.

G4267.kjv: to know beforehand, i.e. foresee:--foreknow (ordain), know (before).

G4270.kjv: figuratively, to announce, prescribe:--before ordain, evidently set forth, write (afore, aforetime).

G4273.definition: from προδίδωμι (in the sense of giving forward into another's (the enemy's) hands).

G4274.kjv: a runner ahead, i.e. scout (figuratively, precursor):--forerunner.

G4276.kjv: to hope in advance of other confirmation:--first trust.

G4277.kjv: to say already, to predict:--forewarn, say (speak, tell) before. Compare προερέω.

G4279.definition: middle voice from πρό and ἐπαγγέλλω.

G4280.definition: from πρό and ἐρέω; used as alternate of προέπω.
G4280.kjv: to say already, predict:--foretell, say (speak, tell) before.

G4281.definition: from πρό and ἔρχομαι (including its alternate).
G4281.kjv: to go onward, precede (in place or time):--go before (farther, forward), outgo, pass on.

G4282.kjv: to fit up in advance (literally or figuratively):--ordain before, prepare afore.

G4283.definition: middle voice from πρό and εὐαγγελίζω.
G4283.kjv: to announce glad news in advance:--preach before the gospel.

G4284.definition: middle voice from πρό and ἔχω.
G4284.kjv: to hold oneself before others, i.e. (figuratively) to excel:--be better.

G4285.kjv: to lead the way for others, i.e. show deference:--prefer.

G4286.definition: from προτίθεμαι; a setting forth, i.e. (figuratively) proposal (intention).
G4286.kjv: specially, the show-bread (in the Temple) as exposed before God:--purpose, shew(-bread).

G4287.definition: from πρό and a derivative of τίθημι.
G4287.kjv: fixed beforehand, i.e. (feminine with ἡμέρα implied) a designated day:--time appointed.

G4288.kjv: predisposition, i.e. alacrity:--forwardness of mind, readiness (of mind), ready (willing) mind.

G4289.definition: from πρό and θυμός; forward in spirit, i.e. predisposed.

G4291.kjv: to stand before, i.e. (in rank) to preside, or (by implication) to practise:--maintain, be over, rule.

G4292.definition: middle voice from πρό and καλέω.
G4292.kjv: to call forth to oneself (challenge), i.e. (by implication) to irritate:--provoke.

G4293.kjv: to anounce beforehand, i.e. predict, promise:--foretell, have notice, (shew) before.

G4294.kjv: to prepare in advance:--make up beforehand.

G4295.kjv: to lie before the view, i.e. (figuratively) to be present (to the mind), to stand forth (as an example or reward):--be first, set before (forth).

G4296.kjv: to herald (i.e. proclaim) in advance:--before (first) preach.

G4297.kjv: progress, i.e. advancement (subjectively or objectively):--furtherance, profit.

G4298.definition: from πρό and κόπτω; to drive forward (as if by beating), i.e. (figuratively and intransitively) to advance (in amount, to grow.

G4302.kjv: to say beforehand, i.e. predict, forewarn:--foretell, tell before.

G4303.kjv: to be a witness in advance i.e. predict:--testify beforehand.

G4305.kjv: to care (anxiously) in advance:--take thought beforehand.

G4306.definition: from πρό and νοιέω; to consider in advance, i.e. look out for beforehand (actively, by way of maintenance for others.
G4306.kjv: middle voice by way of circumspection for oneself):--provide (for).

G4307.kjv: forethought, i.e. provident care or supply:--providence, provision.

G4308.kjv: to behold in advance, i.e. (actively) to notice (another) previously, or (middle voice) to keep in (one's own) view:--foresee, see before.

G4309.kjv: to limit in advance, i.e. (figuratively) predetermine:--determine before, ordain, predestinate.

G4311.kjv: to send forward, i.e. escort or aid in travel:--accompany, bring (forward) on journey (way), conduct forth.

G4312.definition: from a compound of πρό and πίπτω.
G4312.kjv: falling forward, i.e. headlong (figuratively, precipitate):--heady, rash(-ly).

G4313.kjv: to precede (as guide or herald):--go before.

G4314.definition: a strengthened form of πρό; a preposition of direction; forward to, i.e. toward (with the genitive case, the side of, i.e. pertaining to; with the dative case, by the side of, i.e. near to.
G4314.kjv: usually with the accusative case, the place, time, occasion, or respect, which is the destination of the relation, i.e. whither or for which it is predicated):--about, according to , against, among, at, because of, before, between, (where-)by, for, X at thy house, in, for intent, nigh unto, of, which pertain to, that, to (the end that), X together, to (you) -ward, unto, with(-in). In the comparative case, it denotes essentially the same applications, namely, motion towards, accession to, or nearness at.

G4315.kjv: a fore-sabbath, i.e. the Sabbath-eve:--day before the sabbath. Compare παρασκευή.

G4316.definition: from πρός and a derivative of ἀγορά (mean to harangue).
G4316.kjv: to address, i.e. salute by name:--call.

G4317.kjv: to lead towards, i.e. (transitively) to conduct near (summon, present), or (intransitively) to approach:--bring, draw near.

G4320.kjv: to ascend farther, i.e. be promoted (take an upper (more honorable) seat):--go up.

G4323.kjv: to lay up in addition, i.e. (middle voice and figuratively) to impart or (by implication) to consult:--in conference add, confer.

G4326.kjv: to require additionally, i.e. want further:--need.

G4327.definition: from πρός and δέχομαι; to admit (to intercourse, hospitality, credence, or (figuratively) endurance).
G4327.kjv: by implication, to await (with confidence or patience):--accept, allow, look (wait) for, take.

G4328.definition: from πρός and dokeuo (to watch); to anticipate (in thought, hope or fear).

G4329.kjv: by implication, infliction anticipated:--expectation, looking after.

G4332.definition: from a compound of πρός and the base of ἑδραῖος.
G4332.kjv: to sit near, i.e. attend as a servant:--wait at.

G4333.kjv: to work additionally, i.e. (by implication) acquire besides:--gain.

G4334.definition: from πρός and ἔρχομαι (including its alternate).

G4336.kjv: to pray to God, i.e. supplicate, worship:--pray (X earnestly, for), make prayer.

G4338.definition: from πρός and a derivative of ἧλος.

G4339.kjv: an arriver from a foreign region, i.e. (specially), an acceder (convert) to Judaism ("proselyte"):--proselyte.

G4340.kjv: for the occasion only, i.e. temporary:--dur-(eth) for awhile, endure for a time, for a season, temporal.

G4341.definition: middle voice from πρός and καλέω.

G4344.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of πρός and κεφαλή.
G4344.kjv: something for the head, i.e. a cushion:--pillow.

G4345.kjv: to give a common lot to, i.e. (figuratively) to associate with:--consort with.

G4346.definition: from a compound of πρός and κλίνω.

G4347.kjv: to glue to, i.e. (figuratively) to adhere:--cleave, join (self).
