G4616.kjv: byssos, i.e. bleached linen (the cloth or a garment of it):--(fine) linen (cloth).

G4620.kjv: a grain-measure, i.e. (by implication) ration (allowance of food):--portion of meat.

G4622.definition: of Hebrew origin (צִיּוֹן); Sion (i.e. Tsijon), a hill of Jerusalem.

G4623.definition: from  (silence, i.e. a hush; properly, muteness, i.e. involuntary stillness, or inability to speak; and thus differing from σιγή, which is rather a voluntary refusal or indisposition to speak, although the terms are often used synonymously); to be dumb (but not deaf also, like 2974 properly).
G4623.kjv: figuratively, to be calm (as quiet water):--dumb, (hold) peace.

G4624.kjv: to entrap, i.e. trip up (figuratively, stumble (transitively) or entice to sin, apostasy or displeasure):--(make to) offend.

G4625.definition: ("scandal"); probably from a derivative of κάμπτω.
G4625.kjv: a  trap-stick (bent sapling), i.e. snare (figuratively, cause of displeasure or sin):--occasion to fall (of stumbling), offence, thing that offends, stumblingblock.

G4628.definition: apparently from  (to parch; through the idea of leanness).

G4629.definition: from a derivative of  (a covering; perhaps akin to the base of σκοπός through the idea of noticeableness).

G4632.kjv: a vessel, implement, equipment or apparatus (literally or figuratively [specially, a wife as contributing to the usefulness of the husband]):--goods, sail, stuff, vessel.

G4633.definition: apparently akin to σκεῦος and σκιά.
G4633.kjv: a tent or cloth hut (literally or figuratively):--habitation, tabernacle.

G4634.kjv: the Festival of Tabernacles (so called from the custom of erecting booths for temporary homes):--tabernacles.

G4636.kjv: a hut or temporary residence, i.e. (figuratively) the human body (as the abode of the spirit):--tabernacle.

G4637.kjv: to tent or encamp, i.e. (figuratively) to occupy (as a mansion) or (specially), to reside (as God did in the Tabernacle of old, a symbol of protection and communion):-- dwell.

G4638.kjv: an encampment, i.e. (figuratively) the Temple (as God's residence), the body (as a tenement for the soul):-- tabernacle.

G4639.kjv: "shade" or a shadow (literally or figuratively (darkness of error or an adumbration)):-- shadow.

G4640.kjv: to jump, i.e. sympathetically move (as the quickening of a fetus):--leap (for joy).

G4641.definition: feminine of a compound of σκληρός and καρδία.
G4641.kjv: hard-heartedness, i.e. (specially), destitution of (spiritual) perception:--hardness of heart.

G4642.kjv: dry, i.e. hard or tough (figuratively, harsh, severe):--fierce, hard.

G4646.definition: from the base of σκέλος; warped, i.e. winding.

G4647.definition: perhaps from the base of σκέλος and ὀπτάνομαι.
G4647.kjv: withered at the front, i.e. a point or prickle (figuratively, a bodily annoyance or disability):--thorn.

G4648.kjv: to take aim at (spy), i.e. (figuratively) regard:--consider, take heed, look at (on), mark. Compare ὀπτάνομαι.

G4649.definition: from  (to peer about ("skeptic"); perhaps akin to σκάπτω through the idea of concealment; compare σκέπασμα).
G4649.kjv: a watch (sentry or scout), i.e. (by implication) a goal:--mark.

G4650.definition: apparently from the same as σκορπίος (through the idea of penetrating).
G4650.kjv: to dissipate, i.e. (figuratively) put to flight, waste, be liberal:--disperse abroad, scatter (abroad).

G4651.definition: probably from an obsolete  (perhaps strengthened from the base of σκοπός and meaning to pierce).

G4652.kjv: opaque, i.e. (figuratively) benighted:--dark, full of darkness.

G4656.kjv: to obscure or blind (literally or figuratively):--be full of darkness.

G4657.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of εἰς and κύων and βάλλω.
G4657.kjv: what is thrown to the dogs, i.e. refuse (ordure):--dung.

G4658.kjv: a Scythene or Scythian, i.e. (by implication) a savage:--Scythian.

G4659.definition: from  (sullen) and a derivative of ὀπτάνομαι.
G4659.kjv: angry-visaged, i.e. gloomy or affecting a mournful appearance:--of a sad countenance.

G4661.kjv: something stripped (as a hide), i.e. booty:--spoil.

G4662.definition: from σκώληξ and a derivative of βιβρώσκω.
G4662.kjv: worm-eaten, i.e. diseased with maggots:--eaten of worms.

G4665.kjv: the emerald or green gem so called:--emerald.

G4667.kjv: Smyrna, a place in Asia Minor:--Smyrna.

G4669.kjv: to tincture with myrrh, i.e. embitter (as a narcotic):--mingle with myrrh.

G4670.kjv: Sodoma (i.e. Sedom), a place in Palestine:--Sodom.

G4671.kjv: to thee:--thee, thine own, thou, thy.

G4672.kjv: Solomon (i.e. Shelomoh), the son of David:--Solomon.

G4673.definition: probably akin to the base of σωρεύω.
G4673.kjv: a funereal receptacle (urn, coffin), i.e. (by analogy) a bier:--bier.

G4675.kjv: of thee, thy:--X home, thee, thine (own), thou, thy.

G4676.kjv: a sudarium (sweat-cloth), i.e. towel (for wiping the perspiration from the face, or binding the face of a corpse):--handkerchief, napkin.

G4678.kjv: wisdom (higher or lower, worldly or spiritual):--wisdom.

G4679.kjv: in a sinister acceptation, to form "sophisms", i.e. continue plausible error:--cunningly devised, make wise.

G4680.kjv: wise (in a most general application):--wise. Compare φρόνιμος.

G4682.definition: prolongation from  (to grasp; apparently strengthened from σπάω through the idea of spasmodic contraction).
G4682.kjv: to mangle, i.e. convluse with epilepsy:--rend, tear.

G4683.definition: from  (a strip; from a derivative of the base of σπαράσσω meaning to strap or wrap with strips).
G4683.kjv: to swathe (an infant after the Oriental custom):--wrap in swaddling clothes.

G4684.kjv: to be voluptuous:--live in pleasure, be wanton.

G4686.definition: of immediate Latin origin, but ultimately a derivative of αἱρέομαι in the sense of its cognate εἱλίσσω; a coil (spira, "spire"), i.e. (figuratively) a mass of men (a Roman military cohort.
G4686.kjv: also (by analogy) a squad of Levitical janitors):--band.

G4687.definition: probably strengthened from σπάω (through the idea of extending).
G4687.kjv: to scatter, i.e. sow (literally or figuratively):--sow(- er), receive seed.

G4688.kjv: a speculator, i.e. military scout (spy or (by extension) life-guardsman):--executioner.

G4689.kjv: to pour out as a libation, i.e. (figuratively) to devote (one's life or blood, as a sacrifice) ("spend"):--(be ready to) be offered.

G4691.kjv: a seed-picker (as the crow), i.e. (figuratively) a sponger, loafer (specially, a gossip or trifler in talk):--babbler.

G4692.definition: probably strengthened from πούς; to "speed" ("study"), i.e. urge on (diligently or earnestly).
G4692.kjv: by implication, to await eagerly:--(make, with) haste unto.

G4693.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of  (a grotto); a cavern.
G4693.kjv: by implication, a hiding-place or resort:--cave, den.

G4694.kjv: a ledge or reef of rock in the sea:--spot (by confusion with σπίλος).

G4695.kjv: to stain or soil (literally or figuratively):--defile, spot.

G4696.kjv: a stain or blemish, i.e. (figuratively) defect, disgrace:--spot.

G4697.kjv: to have the bowels yearn, i.e. (figuratively) feel sympathy, to pity:--have (be moved with) compassion.

G4698.kjv: figuratively, pity or sympathy:--bowels, inward affection, + tender mercy.

G4702.kjv: sown, i.e. (neuter plural) a planted field:--corn(-field).

G4703.kjv: a scattering (of seed), i.e. (concretely) seed (as sown):--seed (X sown).

G4704.kjv: to use speed, i.e. to make effort, be prompt or earnest:--do (give) diligence, be diligent (forward), endeavour, labour, study.

G4706.kjv: more earnestly than others), i.e. very promptly:--very diligently.

G4708.kjv: more speedily, i.e. sooner than otherwise:--more carefully.

G4710.kjv: "speed", i.e. (by implication) despatch, eagerness, earnestness:--business, (earnest) care(-fulness), diligence, forwardness, haste.

G4712.definition: from the base of ἵστημι (as fixed); a stade or certain measure of distance.
G4712.kjv: by implication, a stadium or race-course:--furlong, race.

G4713.definition: from the base of ἵστημι (as stationary).

G4714.kjv: figuratively, controversy:--dissension, insurrection, X standing, uproar.

G4715.kjv: a stander (standard of value), i.e. (specially), a stater or certain coin:--piece of money.

G4716.definition: from the base of ἵστημι; a stake or post (as set upright), i.e. (specially), a pole or cross (as an instrument of capital punishment); figuratively, exposure to death, i.e. self-denial.
G4716.kjv: by implication, the atonement of Christ:--cross.

G4717.definition: from σταυρός; to impale on the cross.
G4717.kjv: figuratively, to extinguish (subdue) passion or selfishness:--crucify.

G4718.definition: probably from the base of στέφανος.
G4718.kjv: a cluster of grapes (as if intertwined):--grapes.

G4719.kjv: a head of grain (as standing out from the stalk):--ear (of corn).

G4721.definition: strengthened from a primary  (a "thatch" or "deck" of a building).

G4722.kjv: to roof over, i.e. (figuratively) to cover with silence (endure patiently):--(for-)bear, suffer.

G4723.definition: a contraction from στερεός (as stiff and unnatural).

G4724.definition: probably strengthened from the base of ἵστημι.

G4727.kjv: to make (intransitively, be) in straits, i.e. (by implication) to sigh, murmur, pray inaudibly:--with grief, groan, grudge, sigh.

G4728.definition: probably from the base of ἵστημι.

G4729.kjv: to hem in closely, i.e. (figuratively) cramp:--distress, straiten.

G4730.definition: from a compound of στενός and χώρα.
G4730.kjv: narrowness of room, i.e. (figuratively) calamity:--anguish, distress.

G4731.kjv: stiff, i.e. solid, stable (literally or figuratively):--stedfast, strong, sure.

G4732.kjv: to solidify, i.e. confirm (literally or figuratively):--establish, receive strength, make strong.

G4735.definition: from an apparently primary  (to twine or wreathe); a chaplet (as a badge of royalty, a prize in the public games or a symbol of honor generally.
G4735.kjv: but more conspicuous and elaborate than the simple fillet, διάδημα), literally or figuratively:--crown.

G4737.kjv: to adorn with an honorary wreath (literally or figuratively):--crown.

G4739.definition: from the perfect tense of ἵστημι.
G4739.kjv: to be stationary, i.e. (figuratively) to persevere:--stand (fast).

G4741.definition: from a presumed derivative of ἵστημι (like στερεός).

G4742.kjv: a mark incised or punched (for recognition of ownership), i.e. (figuratively) scar of service:--mark.

G4743.kjv: a point of time, i.e. an instant:--moment.

G4746.kjv: a spread (as if tramped flat) of loose materials for a couch, i.e. (by implication) a bough of a tree so employed:--branch.

G4747.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of the base of στοιχέω.
G4747.kjv: something orderly in arrangement, i.e. (by implication) a serial (basal, fundamental, initial) constituent (literally), proposition (figuratively):--element, principle, rudiment.

G4748.kjv: to march in (military) rank (keep step), i.e. (figuratively) to conform to virtue and piety:--walk (orderly).

G4749.kjv: equipment, i.e. (specially), a "stole" or long-fitting gown (as a mark of dignity):--long clothing (garment), (long) robe.

G4750.kjv: specially, the front or edge (of a weapon):--edge, face, mouth.

G4752.kjv: military service, i.e. (figuratively) the apostolic career (as one of hardship and danger):--warfare.

G4753.kjv: an armament, i.e. (by implication) a body of troops (more or less extensive or systematic):--army, soldier, man of war.

G4754.kjv: figuratively, to execute the apostolate (with its arduous duties and functions), to contend with carnal inclinations:--soldier, (go to) war(-fare).

G4756.definition: feminine of a derivative of  (an army; from the base of στρώννυμι, as encamped).

G4757.definition: from a presumed derivative of the same as στρατιά.

G4759.kjv: a ruler of an army, i.e. (specially), a Prætorian præfect:--captain of the guard.

G4760.definition: from the base of στρατιά and the same as πεδινός.
G4760.kjv: a camping-ground, i.e. (by implication) a body of troops:--army.

G4761.kjv: to wrench, i.e. (specially), to torture (by the rack), but only figuratively, to pervert:-- wrest.

G4762.definition: strengthened from the base of τροπή.

G4763.definition: from a presumed derivative of στρῆνος.

G4766.kjv: to "strew," i.e. spread (as a carpet or couch):--make bed, furnish, spread, strew.

G4767.definition: from a derivative of an obsolete apparently primary  (to hate).

G4768.kjv: to render gloomy, i.e. (by implication) glower (be overcast with clouds, or sombreness of speech):--lower, be sad.

G4769.definition: from  (to stiffen; properly akin to the base of ἵστημι).

G4770.kjv: a "Stoic" (as occupying a particular porch in Athens), i.e. adherent of a certin philosophy:--Stoick.

G4771.definition: the personal pronoun of the second person singular; thou:-- thou. See also σέ, σοί, σοῦ.
G4771.kjv: and for the plural ὑμᾶς, ὑμεῖς, ὑμῖν, ὑμῶν.

G4773.definition: from σύν and γένος; a relative (by blood).
G4773.kjv: by extension, a fellow countryman:--cousin, kin(-sfolk, -sman).

G4774.definition: from a compound of σύν and γινώσκω.

G4775.kjv: to seat oneself in company with:--sit with.

G4776.kjv: to give (or take) a seat in company with:--(make) sit (down) together.

G4777.kjv: to suffer hardship in company with:--be partaker of afflictions.

G4778.kjv: to maltreat in company with, i.e. (passively) endure persecution together:--suffer affliction with.

G4781.kjv: to bend together, i.e. (figuratively) to afflict:--bow down.

G4782.kjv: to descend in company with:--go down with.

G4783.kjv: a deposition (of sentiment) in company with, i.e. (figuratively) accord with:--agreement.

G4784.kjv: to deposit (one's vote or opinion) in company with, i.e. (figuratively) to accord with:--consent.

G4785.definition: from σύν and a compound of κατά and ψηφίζω.
G4785.kjv: to count down in company with, i.e. enroll among:--number with.

G4786.kjv: to commingle, i.e. (figuratively) to combine or assimilate:--mix with, temper together.

G4789.kjv: a co-heir, i.e. (by analogy) participant in common:--fellow (joint)-heir, heir together, heir with.

G4790.kjv: to share in company with, i.e. co-participate in:--communicate (have fellowship) with, be partaker of.

G4792.kjv: to convey together, i.e. collect or bear away in company with others:--carry.

G4793.kjv: to judge of one thing in connection with another, i.e. combine (spiritual ideas with appropriate expressions) or collate (one person with another by way of contrast or resemblance):--compare among (with).

G4794.kjv: to stoop altogether, i.e. be completely overcome by:--bow together.

G4795.definition: from a comparative of σύν and  (to light or happen; from the base of κύριος).

G4796.kjv: to sympathize in gladness, congratulate:--rejoice in (with).

G4797.definition: from σύν and  (to pour) or its alternate.
G4797.kjv: to commingle promiscuously, i.e. (figuratively) to throw (an assembly) into disorder, to perplex (the mind):--confound, confuse, stir up, be in an uproar.

G4798.kjv: to use jointly, i.e. (by implication) to hold intercourse in common:--have dealings with.

G4800.kjv: to continue to live in common with, i.e. co-survive (literally or figuratively):--live with.

G4801.definition: from σύν and the base of ζεῦγος.
G4801.kjv: to yoke together, i.e. (figuratively) conjoin (in marriage):--join together.

G4802.kjv: to investigate jointly, i.e. discuss, controvert, cavil:--dispute (with), enquire, question (with), reason (together).

G4805.definition: from συζεύγνυμι; co-yoked, i.e. (figuratively) as noun, a colleague; probably rather as a proper name.

G4806.kjv: to reanimate conjointly with (figuratively):--quicken together with.

G4807.definition: of Hebrew origin (שִׁקְמָה) in imitation of συκομωραία.

G4811.definition: from a compound of σῦκον and a derivative of φαίνω.

G4812.definition: from the base of συλάω and (the reduplicated form of) ἄγω.
G4812.kjv: to lead away as booty, i.e. (figuratively) seduce:--spoil.

G4813.definition: from a derivative of  (to strip; probably akin to αἱρέομαι; compare σκῦλον).

G4814.kjv: to talk together, i.e. converse:--commune (confer, talk) with, speak among.

G4815.definition: from σύν and λαμβάνω; to clasp, i.e. seize (arrest, capture); specially, to conceive (literally or figuratively).
G4815.kjv: by implication, to aid:--catch, conceive, help, take.

G4816.definition: from σύν and λέγω in its original sense.

G4817.kjv: to reckon together (with oneself), i.e. deliberate:--reason with.

G4818.kjv: to afflict jointly, i.e. (passive) sorrow at (on account of) someone:--be grieved.

G4819.definition: from σύν and the base of βάσις.
G4819.kjv: to walk (figuratively, transpire) together, i.e. concur (take place):--be(-fall), happen (unto).

G4820.kjv: to combine, i.e. (in speaking) to converse, consult, dispute, (mentally) to consider, (by implication) to aid, (personally) to join, attack:--confer, encounter, help, make, meet with, ponder.

G4822.definition: from σύν and  (to force; causative (by reduplication) of the base of βάσις).
G4822.kjv: to drive together, i.e. unite (in association or affection), (mentally) to infer, show, teach:--compact, assuredly gather, intrust, knit together, prove.

G4823.kjv: to give (or take) advice jointly, i.e. recommend, deliberate or determine:--consult, (give, take) counsel (together).

G4824.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of σύμβουλος; advisement.
G4824.kjv: specially, a deliberative body, i.e. the provincial assessors or lay-court:--consultation, counsel, council.

G4826.kjv: Symeon (i.e. Shimon), the name of five Israelites:--Simeon, Simon.

G4827.definition: from a compound of σύν and μανθάνω.

G4828.kjv: to testify jointly, i.e. corroborate by (concurrent) evidence:--testify unto, (also) bear witness (with).

G4829.definition: middle voice from σύν and μερίζω.
G4829.kjv: to share jointly, i.e. participate in:--be partaker with.

G4831.definition: from a presumed compound of σύν and μιμέομαι.
G4831.kjv: a co-imitator, i.e. fellow votary:--follower together.

G4832.kjv: jointly formed, i.e. (figuratively) similar:--conformed to, fashioned like unto.

G4833.kjv: to render like, i.e. (figuratively) to assimilate:--make conformable unto.

G4834.kjv: to feel "sympathy" with, i.e. (by implication) to commiserate:--have compassion, be touched with a feeling of.

G4835.kjv: having a fellow-feeling ("sympathetic"), i.e. (by implication) mutually commiserative:--having compassion one of another.

G4836.definition: from σύν and παραγίνομαι; to be present together, i.e. to convene.
G4836.kjv: by implication, to appear in aid:--come together, stand with.

G4838.kjv: to take along in company:--take with.

G4839.kjv: to remain in company, i.e. still live:--continue with.

G4840.kjv: to be at hand together, i.e. now present:--be here present with.

G4841.definition: from σύν and πάσχω (including its alternate); to experience pain jointly or of the same kind (specially, persecution.

G4843.definition: from σύν and a compound of περί and λαμβάνω.
G4843.kjv: to take by enclosing altogether, i.e. earnestly throw the arms about one:--embrace.

G4844.kjv: to partake a beverage in company:--drink with.

G4845.kjv: to implenish completely, i.e. (of space) to swamp (a boat), or (of time) to accomplish (passive, be complete):--(fully) come, fill up.

G4846.kjv: to strangle completely, i.e. (literally) to drown, or (figuratively) to crowd:--choke, throng.

G4847.kjv: a native of the same town, i.e. (figuratively) co-religionist (fellow-Christian):--fellow- citizen.

G4848.definition: from σύν and πορεύομαι; to journey together.
G4848.kjv: by implication, to assemble:--go with, resort.

G4849.definition: neuter of a derivative of the alternate of συμπίνω.
G4849.kjv: a drinking-party ("symposium"), i.e. (by extension) a room of guests:--company.

G4851.definition: from σύν and φέρω (including its alternate); to bear together (contribute), i.e. (literally) to collect, or (figuratively) to conduce.

G4852.kjv: to say jointly, i.e. assent to:--consent unto.

G4853.definition: from σύν and a derivative of φυλή.
G4853.kjv: a co-tribesman, i.e. native of the same country:--countryman.

G4854.definition: from σύν and a derivative of φύω.
G4854.kjv: grown along with (connate), i.e. (figuratively) closely united to:--planted together.

G4855.kjv: passive, to grow jointly:--spring up with.

G4856.kjv: to be harmonious, i.e. (figuratively) to accord (be suitable, concur) or stipulate (by compact):--agree (together, with).

G4858.kjv: unison of sound ("symphony"), i.e. a concert of instruments (harmonious note):--music.

G4859.kjv: sounding together (alike), i.e. (figuratively) accordant (neuter as noun, agreement):-- consent.

G4862.kjv: with or together (but much closer than μετά or παρά), i.e. by association, companionship, process, resemblance, possession, instrumentality, addition, etc.:--beside, with. In composition it has similar applications, including completeness.

G5091.definition: from τίμιος; to prize, i.e. fix a valuation upon.

G5092.definition: from τίνω; a value, i.e. money paid, or (concretely and collectively) valuables.
G5092.kjv: by analogy, esteem (especially of the highest degree), or the dignity itself:--honour, precious, price, some.

G5093.kjv: valuable, i.e. (objectively) costly, or (subjectively) honored, esteemed, or (figuratively) beloved:--dear, honourable, (more, most) precious, had in reputation.

G5095.definition: from τιμή and θεός; dear to God.

G5097.definition: from a comparative of τιμή and  ouros (a guard).
G5097.kjv: properly, to protect one's honor, i.e. to avenge (inflict a penalty):--punish.

G5099.definition: strengthened for a primary            (which is only used as an alternate in                        certain tenses).
G5099.kjv: to pay a price, i.e. as a penalty:--be punished with.

G5100.kjv: some or any person or object:--a (kind of), any (man, thing, thing at all), certain (thing), divers, he (every) man, one (X thing), ought, + partly, some (man, -body, - thing, -what), (+ that no-)thing, what(-soever), X wherewith, whom(-soever), whose(-soever).

G5101.kjv: an interrogative pronoun, who, which or what (in direct or indirect questions):--every man, how (much), + no(-ne, thing), what (manner, thing), where (-by, -fore, -of, -unto, - with, -withal), whether, which, who(-m, -se), why.

G5103.definition: of Latin origin but uncertain significance.

G5104.definition: probably for the dative case of ὁ; an enclitic particle of asseveration by way of contrast.
G5104.kjv: in sooth:--(used only with other particles in the comparative, as καίτοιγε, μέντοι, τοιγαροῦν, τοίνυν, etc.)

G5105.definition: from τοί and γάρ and οὖν.

G5107.definition: (including the other inflections); from a derivative of 5104 and δέ.

G5108.definition: (including the other inflections); from τοί and οὗτος.
G5108.kjv: truly this, i.e. of this sort (to denote character or individuality):--like, such (an one).

G5110.kjv: interest on money loaned (as a produce):--usury.

G5111.definition: from  (boldness; probably itself from the base of τέλος through the idea of extreme conduct); to venture (objectively or in act; while θαῤῥέω is rather subjective or in feeling).
G5111.kjv: by implication, to be courageous:--be bold, boldly, dare, durst.

G5112.definition: neuter of the compound of a derivative of the base of 5111 (as adverb).
G5112.kjv: more daringly, i.e. with greater confidence than otherwise:--the more boldly.

G5114.definition: comparative of a derivative of the primary  (to cut; more comprehensive or decisive than κόπτω, as if by a single stroke; whereas that implies repeated blows, like hacking).

G5115.kjv: a bow (apparently as the simplest fabric):--bow.

G5116.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative (alternately) of  (a "topaz"; of uncertain origin).

G5117.definition: apparently a primary word; a spot (general in space, but limited by occupancy; whereas χώρα is a large but participle locality), i.e. location (as a position, home, tract, etc.); figuratively, condition, opportunity.
G5117.kjv: specially, a scabbard:--coast, licence, place, X plain, quarter, + rock, room, where.

G5118.definition: from  (so much; apparently from ὁ and ὅς) and οὗτος (including its variations).
G5118.kjv: so vast as this, i.e. such (in quantity, amount, number of space):--as large, so great (long, many, much), these many.

G5119.definition: from (the neuter of) ὁ and ὅτε.
G5119.kjv: the when, i.e. at the time that (of the past or future, also in consecution):--that time, then.

G5120.definition: properly, the genitive case of ὁ; sometimes used for τούτου.

G5121.definition: contraction for the neuter of ὁ and ἐναντίον.

G5122.definition: contraction for the neuter of ὁ and ὄνομα.

G5124.definition: neuter singular nominative or accusative case of οὗτος.
G5124.kjv: that thing:--here (-unto), it, partly, self(-same), so, that (intent), the same, there(-fore, -unto), this, thus, where(-fore).

G5125.definition: dative case plural masculine or neuter of οὗτος.
G5125.kjv: to (for, in, with or by) these (persons or things):--such, them, there(-in, -with), these, this, those.

G5126.definition: accusative case singular masculine of οὗτος.
G5126.kjv: this (person, as objective of verb or preposition):--him, the same, that, this.

G5127.definition: genitive case singular masculine or neuter of οὗτος.
G5127.kjv: of (from or concerning) this (person or thing):--here(-by), him, it, + such manner of, that, thence(-forth), thereabout, this, thus.

G5128.definition: accusative case plural masculine of οὗτος.
G5128.kjv: these (persons, as objective of verb or preposition):--such, them, these, this.

G5129.definition: dative case singular masculine or neuter of οὗτος.
G5129.kjv: to (in, with or by) this (person or thing):--here(-by, -in), him, one, the same, there(-in), this.

G5130.definition: genitive case plural masculine or neuter of οὗτος.
G5130.kjv: of (from or concerning) these (persons or things):--such, their, these (things), they, this sort, those.

G5132.definition: probably contracted from τέσσαρες and πεζῇ; a table or stool (as being four-legged), usually for food (figuratively, a meal).
G5132.kjv: also a counter for money (figuratively, a broker's office for loans at interest):--bank, meat, table.

G5134.definition: from the base of  (to wound; akin to the base of θραύω, τρίβος, τρίζω, etc.).

G5136.kjv: to seize by the throat or neck, i.e. to expose the gullet of a victim for killing (generally, to lay bare):--opened.

G5137.definition: probably from τρέχω (through the idea of mobility).

G5138.definition: perhaps strengthened from the base of ῥήγνυμι (as if jagged by rents).

G5139.definition: from a derivative of τραχύς; rough district.

G5142.definition: a primary verb (properly, ; but perhaps strengthened from the base of τροπή through the idea of convolution).
G5142.kjv: properly, to stiffen, i.e. fatten (by implication, to cherish (with food, etc.), pamper, rear):--bring up, feed, nourish.

G5143.definition: apparently a primary verb (properly, ; compare θρίξ); which uses   (the base of δρόμος) as alternate in certain tenses.
G5143.kjv: to run or walk hastily (literally or figuratively):--have course, run.

G5146.kjv: properly, a crow-foot (three-pronged obstruction in war), i.e. (by analogy) a thorny plant (caltrop):--brier, thistle.

G5147.definition: from  (to "rub"; akin to , , and the base of τράγος, τραῦμα).

G5148.definition: from a compound of τρεῖς and ἔτος.
G5148.kjv: a three years' period (triennium):--space of three years.

G5149.kjv: to creak (squeak), i.e. (by analogy) to grate the teeth (in frenzy):--gnash.

G5150.definition: neuter of a compound of τρεῖς and μήν as noun.

G5152.definition: neuter of a compound of τρεῖς and στέγη as noun.

G5154.kjv: neuter (as noun) a third part, or (as adverb) a (or the) third time, thirdly:--third(-ly).

G5155.kjv: hairy, i.e. made of hair (mohair):--of hair.

G5156.kjv: a "trembling", i.e. quaking with fear:--+ tremble(-ing).

G5157.definition: from an apparently primary  to turn.

G5158.definition: from the same as τροπή; a turn, i.e. (by implication) mode or style (especially with preposition or relative prefix as adverb, like).
G5158.kjv: figuratively, deportment or character:--(even) as, conversation, (+ like) manner, (+ by any) means, way.

G5159.kjv: to endure one's habits:--suffer the manners.

G5163.kjv: a track (as a wheel-rut), i.e. (figuratively) a course of conduct:--path.

G5164.kjv: a wheel (as a runner), i.e. (figuratively) a circuit of physical effects:--course.

G5165.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of uncertain affinity.

G5166.definition: from a derivative of  (to dry) meaning ripe fruit (as if dry).

G5167.definition: from  (to murmur; akin to τρίζω, but denoting a duller sound).

G5168.definition: from a derivative of  (to wear away; akin to the base of τραῦμα, τρίβος and τρώγω).
G5168.kjv: an orifice, i.e. needle's eye:--eye. Compare τρύπημα.

G5169.definition: from a derivative of the base of τρυμαλιά.
G5169.kjv: an aperture, i.e. a needle's eye:--eye.

G5171.kjv: to indulge in luxury:--live in pleasure.

G5172.definition: from  (to break up or (figuratively) enfeeble, especially the mind and body by indulgence).
G5172.kjv: effeminacy, i.e. luxury or debauchery:--delicately, riot.

G5174.kjv: the Troad (or plain of Troy), i.e. Troas, a place in Asia Minor:--Troas.

G5175.kjv: Trogyllium, a place in Asia Minor:--Trogyllium.

G5176.definition: probably strengthened from a collateral form of the base of τραῦμα and τρίβος through the idea of corrosion or wear; or perhaps rather of a base of τρυγών and τρίζω through the idea of a craunching sound.
G5176.kjv: to gnaw or chew, i.e. (generally) to eat:--eat.

G5177.definition: probably for an obsolete  (for which the middle voice of another alternate  (to make ready or bring to pass) is used in certain tenses; akin to the base of τίκτω through the idea of effecting; properly, to affect; or (specially), to hit or light upon (as a mark to be reached), i.e. (transitively) to attain or secure an object or end, or (intransitively) to happen (as if meeting with); but in the latter application only impersonal (with εἰ), i.e. perchance; or (present participle) as adjective, usual (as if commonly met with, with οὐ, extraordinary), neuter (as adverb) perhaps.
G5177.kjv: or (with another verb) as adverb, by accident (as it were):--be, chance, enjoy, little, obtain, X refresh…self, + special. Compare τύπτω.

G5178.definition: from a derivative of τύπτω (meaning a drum, "tympanum").
G5178.kjv: to stretch on an instrument of torture resembling a drum, and thus beat to death:--torture.

G5179.definition: from τύπτω; a die (as struck), i.e. (by implication) a stamp or scar; by analogy, a shape, i.e. a statue, (figuratively) style or resemblance.
G5179.kjv: specially, a sampler ("type"), i.e. a model (for imitation) or instance (for warning):--en-(ex-)ample, fashion, figure, form, manner, pattern, print.

G5180.definition: a primary verb (in a strengthened form); to "thump", i.e. cudgel or pummel (properly, with a stick or bastinado), but in any case by repeated blows; thus differing from παίω and πατάσσω, which denote a (usually single) blow with the hand or any instrument, or πλήσσω with the fist (or a hammer), or ῥαπίζω with the palm; as well as from τυγχάνω, an accidental collision); by implication, to punish.
G5180.kjv: figuratively, to offend (the conscience):--beat, smite, strike, wound.

G5181.definition: a provincial form of the derivative of the base of κύριος; a "tyrant".

G5182.definition: from  (Latin turba, a crowd; akin to θόρυβος).

G5183.kjv: a Tyrian, i.e. inhabitant of Tyrus:--of Tyre.

G5184.definition: of Hebrew origin (צֹר): Tyrus (i.e. Tsor), a place in Palestine:--Tyre.

G5185.kjv: opaque (as if smoky), i.e. (by analogy) blind (physically or mentally):--blind.

G5186.kjv: to make blind, i.e. (figuratively) to obscure:--blind.

G5187.kjv: to envelop with smoke, i.e. (figuratively) to inflate with self-conceit:--high-minded, be lifted up with pride, be proud.

G5188.kjv: to make a smoke, i.e. slowly consume without flame:--smoke.

G5190.definition: from a derivative of τυγχάνω; fortuitous, i.e. fortunate.

G5192.kjv: the "hyacinth" or "jacinth", i.e. some gem of a deep blue color, probably the zirkon:-- jacinth.

G5194.definition: perhaps from the same as ὑετός (as being transparent like rain).

G5195.kjv: to exercise violence, i.e. abuse:--use despitefully, reproach, entreat shamefully (spitefully).

G5196.kjv: insolence (as over-bearing), i.e. insult, injury:--harm, hurt, reproach.

G5198.definition: from ὑγιής; to have sound health, i.e. be well (in body).
G5198.kjv: figuratively, to be uncorrupt (true in doctrine):--be in health, (be safe and) sound, (be) whole(-some).

G5199.definition: from the base of αὐξάνω; healthy, i.e. well (in body).

G5200.kjv: wet (as if with rain), i.e. (by implication) sappy (fresh):--green.

G5201.kjv: a water-jar, i.e. receptacle for family supply:--water-pot.

G5202.definition: from a compound of ὕδωρ and a derivative of πίνω.
G5202.kjv: to be a water-drinker, i.e. to abstain from vinous beverages:--drink water.

G5203.definition: from a compound of ὕδωρ and a derivative of ὀπτάνομαι (as if looking watery).

G5204.kjv: water (as if rainy) literally or figuratively:--water.

G5206.definition: from a presumed compound of υἱός and a derivative of τίθημι.
G5206.kjv: the placing as a son, i.e. adoption (figuratively, Christian sonship in respect to God):--adoption (of children, of sons).

G5207.kjv: a "son" (sometimes of animals), used very widely of immediate, remote or figuratively, kinship:--child, foal, son.

G5209.kjv: you (as the objective of a verb or preposition):--ye, you (+ -ward), your (+ own).

G5213.kjv: to (with or by) you:--ye, you, your(-selves).

G5214.definition: from ὕμνος; to hymn, i.e. sing a religious ode.
G5214.kjv: by implication, to celebrate (God) in song:--sing a hymn (praise unto).

G5215.definition: apparently from a simpler (obsolete) form of  (to celebrate; probably akin to ᾄδω; compare עֲבוֹט).
G5215.kjv: a "hymn" or religious ode (one of the Psalms):--hymn.

G5216.kjv: of (from or concerning) you:--ye, you, your (own, -selves).

G5217.kjv: to lead (oneself) under, i.e. withdraw or retire (as if sinking out of sight), literally or figuratively:--depart, get hence, go (a-)way.

G5218.kjv: attentive hearkening, i.e. (by implication) compliance or submission:--obedience, (make) obedient, obey(-ing).

G5219.definition: from ὑπό and ἀκούω; to hear under (as a subordinate), i.e. to listen attentively.
G5219.kjv: by implication, to heed or conform to a command or authority:--hearken, be obedient to, obey.

G5220.kjv: in subjection under a man, i.e. a married woman:--which hath an husband.

G5221.definition: from ὑπό and a derivative of ἀντί.
G5221.kjv: to go opposite (meet) under (quietly), i.e. to encounter, fall in with:--(go to) meet.

G5222.kjv: an encounter or concurrence (with εἰς for infinitive, in order to fall in with):--meeting.

G5223.kjv: existency or proprietorship, i.e. (concretely) property, wealth:--goods, substance.

G5224.definition: neuter plural of present participle active of ὑπάρχω as noun.
G5224.kjv: things extant or in hand, i.e. property or possessions:--goods, that which one has, things which (one) possesseth, substance, that hast.

G5225.definition: from ὑπό and ἄρχομαι; to begin under (quietly), i.e. come into existence (be present or at hand).
G5225.kjv: expletively, to exist (as copula or subordinate to an adjective, participle, adverb or preposition, or as an auxiliary to a principal (verb):--after, behave, live.

G5227.kjv: under (covertly) contrary to, i.e. opposed or (as noun) an opponent:--adversary, against.

G5228.definition: a primary preposition; "over", i.e. (with the genitive case) of place, above, beyond, across, or causal, for the sake of, instead, regarding.
G5228.kjv: with the accusative case superior to, more than:--(+ exceeding, abundantly) above, in (on) behalf of, beyond, by, + very chiefest, concerning, exceeding (above, -ly), for, + very highly, more (than), of, over, on the part of, for sake of, in stead, than, to(-ward), very. In the comparative, it retains many of the above applications.

G5229.definition: middle voice from ὑπέρ and αἴρω.
G5229.kjv: to raise oneself over, i.e. (figuratively) to become haughty:--exalt self, be exalted above measure.

G5230.definition: from ὑπέρ and the base of ἀκμήν.
G5230.kjv: beyond the "acme", i.e. figuratively (of a daughter) past the bloom (prime) of youth:--+ pass the flower of (her) age.

G5231.kjv: above upward, i.e. greatly higher (in place or rank):--far above, over.

G5232.kjv: to increase above ordinary degree:--grow exceedingly.

G5233.definition: from ὑπέρ and the base of βάσις.
G5233.kjv: to transcend, i.e. (figuratively) to overreach:--go beyond.

G5234.definition: adverb from present participle active of ὑπερβάλλω.

G5235.kjv: to throw beyod the usual mark, i.e. (figuratively) to surpass (only active participle supereminent):--exceeding, excel, pass.

G5236.definition: from ὑπερβάλλω; a throwing beyond others, i.e. (figuratively) supereminence.
G5236.kjv: adverbially (with εἰς or κατά) pre- eminently:--abundance, (far more) exceeding, excellency, more excellent, beyond (out of) measure.

G5237.kjv: to overlook, i.e. not punish:--wink at.

G5238.definition: from ὑπέρ and the neuter plural of ἐκεῖνος.
G5238.kjv: above those parts, i.e. still farther:--beyond.

G5240.definition: from ὑπέρ and the alternate form of ἐκχέω.
G5240.kjv: to pour out over, i.e. (passively) to overflow:--run over.

G5241.kjv: to intercede in behalf of:--make intercession for.

G5242.definition: from ὑπέρ and ἔχω; to hold oneself above, i.e. (figuratively) to excel.
G5242.kjv: participle (as adjective, or neuter as noun) superior, superiority:--better, excellency, higher, pass, supreme.

G5245.kjv: to vanquish beyond, i.e. gain a decisive victory:--more than conquer.

G5247.kjv: prominence, i.e. (figuratively) superiority (in rank or character):--authority, excellency.

G5251.kjv: to elevate above others, i.e. raise to the highest position:--highly exalt.

G5252.kjv: to esteem oneself overmuch, i.e. be vain or arrogant:--think more highly.

G5253.definition: neuter of a derivative of ὑπέρ.
G5253.kjv: a higher part of the house, i.e. apartment in the third story:--upper chamber (room).

G5254.kjv: to hold oneself under, i.e. endure with patience:--suffer.

G5256.kjv: to be a subordinate, i.e. (by implication) subserve:--minister (unto), serve.

G5257.definition: from ὑπό and a derivative of  (to row).
G5257.kjv: an under-oarsman, i.e. (generally) subordinate (assistant, sexton, constable):--minister, officer, servant.

G5258.definition: from an obsolete primary (perhaps akin to ὑπό through the idea of subsilience).

G5259.definition: a primary preposition; under, i.e. (with the genitive case) of place (beneath), or with verbs (the agency or means, through).
G5259.kjv: (with the accusative case) of place (whither (underneath) or where (below) or time (when (at)):--among, by, from, in, of, under, with. In the comparative, it retains the same general applications, especially of inferior position or condition, and specially, covertly or moderately.

G5260.kjv: to throw in stealthily, i.e. introduce by collusion:--suborn.

G5261.definition: from a compound of ὑπό and γράφω.
G5261.kjv: an underwriting, i.e. copy for imitation (figuratively):--example.

G5262.kjv: an exhibit for imitation or warning (figuratively, specimen, adumbration):--en-(ex-)ample, pattern.

G5263.kjv: to exhibit under the eyes, i.e. (figuratively) to exemplify (instruct, admonish):--show, (fore-)warn.

G5264.kjv: to admit under one's roof, i.e. entertain hospitably:--receive.

G5265.kjv: to bind under one's feet, i.e. put on shoes or sandals:--bind on, (be) shod.

G5266.kjv: something bound under the feet, i.e. a shoe or sandal:--shoe.

G5268.definition: neuter of a compound of ὑπό and ζυγός.
G5268.kjv: an animal under the yoke (draught-beast), i.e. (specially), a donkey:--ass.

G5269.kjv: to gird under, i.e. frap (a vessel with cables across the keel, sides and deck):--undergirt.

G5271.definition: middle voice from ὑπό and κρίνω.
G5271.kjv: to decide (speak or act) under a false part, i.e. (figuratively) dissemble (pretend):--feign.

G5272.kjv: acting under a feigned part, i.e. (figuratively) deceit ("hypocrisy"):--condemnation, dissimulation, hypocrisy.

G5273.kjv: an actor under an assumed character (stage-player), i.e. (figuratively) a dissembler ("hypocrite":--hypocrite.

G5274.definition: from ὑπό and λαμβάνω; to take from below, i.e. carry upward; figuratively, to take up, i.e. continue a discourse or topic.

G5275.kjv: to leave under (behind), i.e. (passively) to remain (survive):--be left.

G5276.definition: neuter of a presumed compound of ὑπό and ληνός.
G5276.kjv: vessel or receptacle under the press, i.e. lower wine-vat:--winefat.

G5278.definition: from ὑπό and μένω; to stay under (behind), i.e. remain.
G5278.kjv: figuratively, to undergo, i.e. bear (trials), have fortitude, persevere:--abide, endure, (take) patient(-ly), suffer, tarry behind.

G5279.kjv: to remind quietly, i.e. suggest to the (middle voice, one's own) memory:--put in mind, remember, bring to (put in) remembrance.

G5281.kjv: cheerful (or hopeful) endurance, constancy:--enduring, patience, patient continuance (waiting).

G5282.kjv: to think under (privately), i.e. to surmise or conjecture:--think, suppose, deem.

G5284.kjv: to sail under the lee of:--sail under.

G5285.kjv: to breathe gently, i.e. breeze:--blow softly.

G5286.definition: neuter of a compound of ὑπό and πούς.
G5286.kjv: something under the feet, i.e. a foot-rest (figuratively):--footstool.

G5287.definition: from a compound of ὑπό and ἵστημι.
G5287.kjv: a setting under (support), i.e. (figuratively) concretely, essence, or abstractly, assurance (objectively or subjectively):--confidence, confident, person, substance.

G5288.kjv: to withhold under (out of sight), i.e. (reflexively) to cower or shrink, (figuratively) to conceal (reserve):--draw (keep) back, shun, withdraw.

G5290.kjv: to turn under (behind), i.e. to return (literally or figuratively):--come again, return (again, back again), turn back (again).

G5291.kjv: to strew underneath (the feet as a carpet):--spread.

G5293.definition: from ὑπό and τάσσω; to subordinate.
G5293.kjv: reflexively, to obey:--be under obedience (obedient), put under, subdue unto, (be, make) subject (to, unto), be (put) in subjection (to, under), submit self unto.

G5294.kjv: to place underneath, i.e. (figuratively) to hazard, (reflexively) to suggest:--lay down, put in remembrance.

G5295.definition: from ὑπό and τρέχω (including its alternate).
G5295.kjv: to run under, i.e. (specially), to sail past:--run under.

G5296.definition: from a compound of ὑπό and a derivative of τύπος.
G5296.kjv: typification under (after), i.e. (concretely) a sketch (figuratively) for imitation:--form, pattern.

G5297.kjv: to bear from underneath, i.e. (figuratively) to undergo hardship:--bear, endure.

G5298.kjv: to vacate down, i.e. retire quietly:--go aside, withdraw self.

G5299.definition: from a compound of ὑπό and a derivative of ὀπτάνομαι.
G5299.kjv: to hit under the eye (buffet or disable an antagonist as a pugilist), i.e. (figuratively) to tease or annoy (into compliance), subdue (one's passions):--keep under, weary.

G5302.definition: from ὕστερος; to be later, i.e. (by implication) to be inferior.
G5302.kjv: generally, to fall short (be deficient):--come behind (short), be destitute, fail, lack, suffer need, (be in) want, be the worse.

G5303.kjv: specially, poverty:--that which is behind, (that which was) lack(-ing), penury, want.

G5305.kjv: more lately, i.e. eventually:--afterward, (at the) last (of all).

G5306.definition: comparative from ὑπό (in the sense of behind).

G5309.definition: from a compound of ὑψηλός and φρήν.
G5309.kjv: to be lofty in mind, i.e. arrogant:--be highminded.

G5310.definition: superlative from the base of ὕψος.
G5310.kjv: highest, i.e. (masculine singular) the Supreme (God), or (neuter plural) the heavens:--most high, highest.

G5311.kjv: elevation, i.e. (abstractly) altitude, (specially), the sky, or (figuratively) dignity:--be exalted, height, (on) high.

G5312.kjv: to elevate (literally or figuratively):--exalt, lift up.

G5313.kjv: an elevated place or thing, i.e. (abstractly) altitude, or (by implication) a barrier (figuratively):-- height, high thing.

G5315.definition: a primary verb (used as an alternate of ἐσθίω in certain tenses).

G5316.definition: prolongation for the base of φῶς.
G5316.kjv: to lighten (shine), i.e. show (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative):-- appear, seem, be seen, shine, X think.

G5318.definition: from φαίνω; shining, i.e. apparent (literally or figuratively).
G5318.kjv: neuter (as adverb) publicly, externally:--abroad, + appear, known, manifest, open (+ -ly), outward (+ -ly).

G5319.kjv: to render apparent (literally or figuratively):--appear, manifestly declare, (make) manifest (forth), shew (self).

G5320.kjv: plainly, i.e. clearly or publicly:--evidently, openly.

G5321.kjv: exhibition, i.e. (figuratively) expression, (by extension) a bestowment:--manifestation.

G5322.definition: from φαίνω; a lightener, i.e. light.

G5324.kjv: to make apparent, i.e. (passively) to appear (neuter participle as noun, a spectacle):--sight.

G5327.definition: properly, strengthened from the base of πέραν or rather of ῥήγνυμι.
G5327.kjv: a gap or chasm, i.e. ravine (winter-torrent):--valley.

G5330.definition: of Hebrew origin (compare פָּרָשׁ); a separatist, i.e. exclusively religious.

G5331.kjv: medication ("pharmacy"), i.e. (by extension) magic (literally or figuratively):--sorcery, witchcraft.

G5332.kjv: a druggist ("pharmacist") or poisoner, i.e. (by extension) a magician:--sorcerer.

G5334.definition: from φημί (not the same as "phase", which is from φαίνω).

G5335.definition: prolongation from the same as φημί.

G5338.definition: probably akin to the base of φῶς (compare φθέγγομαι).

G5339.kjv: to be chary of, i.e. (subjectively) to abstain or (objectively) to treat leniently:--forbear, spare.

G5341.definition: by transposition for a derivative probably of φαίνω (as showing outside the other garments).

G5342.definition: a primary verb (for which other, and apparently not cognate ones are used in certain tenses only; namely,            ;       and.
G5342.kjv: to "bear" or carry (in a very wide application, literally and figuratively, as follows):--be, bear, bring (forth), carry, come, + let her drive, be driven, endure, go on, lay, lead, move, reach, rushing, uphold.

G5343.definition: apparently a primary verb; to run away (literally or figuratively); by implication, to shun.

G5346.definition: properly, the same as the base of φῶς and φαίνω.
G5346.kjv: to show or make known one's thoughts, i.e. speak or say:--affirm, say. Compare λέγω.

G5348.definition: apparently a primary verb; to be beforehand, i.e. anticipate or precede.
G5348.kjv: by extension, to have arrived at:--(already) attain, come, prevent.

G5350.definition: probably akin to φέγγος and thus to φημί.
G5350.kjv: to utter a clear sound, i.e. (generally) to proclaim:--speak.

G5351.definition: probably strengthened from  (to pine or waste).
G5351.kjv: properly, to shrivel or wither, i.e. to spoil (by any process) or (generally) to ruin (especially figuratively, by moral influences, to deprave):--corrupt (self), defile, destroy.

G5352.definition: from derivative of   (to wane; akin to the base of φθείρω) and ὀπώρα (meaning late autumn).
G5352.kjv: autumnal (as stripped of leaves):--whose fruit withereth.

G5353.kjv: utterance, i.e. a musical note (vocal or instrumental):--sound.

G5355.definition: probably akin to the base of φθείρω.

G5356.kjv: decay, i.e. ruin (spontaneous or inflicted, literally or figuratively):--corruption, destroy, perish.

G5358.kjv: fond to good, i.e. a promoter of virtue:--love of good men.

G5359.definition: from  (the same as φιλάδελφος), a king of Pergamos.
G5359.kjv: Philadelphia, a place in Asia Minor:--Philadelphia.

G5360.kjv: fraternal affection:--brotherly love (kindness), love of the brethren.

G5361.kjv: fond of brethren, i.e. fraternal:--love as brethren.

G5362.kjv: fond of man, i.e. affectionate as a wife:--love their husbands.

G5363.kjv: fondness of mankind, i.e. benevolence ("philanthropy"):--kindness, love towards man.

G5364.definition: adverb from a compound of φίλος and ἄνθρωπος.

G5367.kjv: fond of self, i.e. selfish:--lover of own self.

G5368.definition: from φίλος; to be a friend to (fond of (an individual or an object)), i.e. have affection for (denoting personal attachment, as a matter of sentiment or feeling; while ἀγαπάω is wider, embracing especially the judgment and the deliberate assent of the will as a matter of principle, duty and propriety: the two thus stand related very much as θέλω and βούλομαι, or as θυμός and νοῦς respectively; the former being chiefly of the heart and the latter of the head).
G5368.kjv: specially, to kiss (as a mark of tenderness):--kiss, love.

G5369.kjv: fond of pleasure, i.e. voluptuous:--lover of pleasure.

G5374.kjv: a Philippesian (Philippian), i.e. native of Philippi:--Philippian.

G5376.definition: from φίλος and ἵππος; fond of horses.
G5376.kjv: Philippus, the name of four Israelites:--Philip.

G5377.kjv: fond of God, i.e. pious:--lover of God.

G5378.definition: from φίλος and λόγος; fond of words, i.e. talkative (argumentative, learned, "philological").

G5380.definition: from φίλος and  (a quarrel; probably akin to νῖκος).

G5382.kjv: fond of guests, i.e. hospitable:--given to (lover of, use) hospitality.

G5383.definition: from a compound of φίλος and πρῶτος.
G5383.kjv: to be fond of being first, i.e. ambitious of distinction:--love to have the preeminence.

G5384.kjv: actively, fond, i.e. friendly (still as a noun, an associate, neighbor, etc.):--friend.

G5386.kjv: fond of wise things, i.e. a "philosopher":--philosopher.

G5387.definition: from φίλος and  (cherishing one's kindred, especially parents or children).
G5387.kjv: fond of natural relatives, i.e. fraternal towards fellow Christian:--kindly affectioned.

G5388.kjv: fond of one's children, i.e. maternal:--love their children.

G5389.definition: middle voice from a compound of φίλος and τιμή.
G5389.kjv: to be fond of honor, i.e. emulous (eager or earnest to do something):--labour, strive, study.

G5390.kjv: with friendliness of mind, i.e. kindly:--courteously.

G5393.definition: active participle of the base of φλόξ; blazing.

G5394.kjv: to cause a blaze, i.e. ignite (figuratively, to inflame with passion):--set on fire.

G5396.kjv: to be a babbler or trifler, i.e. (by implication) to berate idly or mischievously:--prate against.

G5399.definition: from φόβος; to frighten, i.e. (passively) to be alarmed.
G5399.kjv: by analogy, to be in awe of, i.e. revere:--be (+ sore) afraid, fear (exceedingly), reverence.

G5400.definition: neuter of a derivative of φοβέω.
G5400.kjv: a frightening thing, i.e. terrific portent:--fearful sight.

G5401.definition: from a primary  (to be put in fear).
G5401.kjv: alarm or fright:--be afraid, + exceedingly, fear, terror.

G5402.definition: feminine of  (bright; probably akin to the base of φῶς).

G5403.kjv: Phœnice (or Phœnicia), a region of Palestine:--Phenice, Phenicia.

G5406.definition: from φόνος; a murderer (always of criminal (or at least intentional) homicide; which ἀνθρωποκτόνος does not necessarily imply.
G5406.kjv: while σικάριος is a special term for a public bandit):--murderer.

G5407.kjv: to be a murderer (of):--kill, do murder, slay.

G5409.kjv: to have a burden, i.e. (by analogy) to wear as clothing or a constant accompaniment:--bear, wear.

G5410.definition: of Latin origin; a forum or market-place; only in comparative with Ἄππιος.
G5410.kjv: a station on the Appian road:--forum.

G5411.definition: from φέρω; a load (as borne), i.e. (figuratively) a tax (properly, an individual assessment on persons or property.
G5411.kjv: whereas τέλος is usually a general toll on goods or travel):--tribute.

G5412.kjv: to load up (properly, as a vessel or animal), i.e. (figuratively) to overburden with ceremony (or spiritual anxiety):--lade, by heavy laden.

G5413.kjv: an invoice (as part of freight), i.e. (figuratively) a task or service:--burden.

G5414.kjv: something carried, i.e. the cargo of a ship:--lading.

G5416.definition: neuter of a derivative from the base of φραγελλόω.
G5416.kjv: a whip, i.e. Roman lash as a public punishment:--scourge.

G5417.definition: from a presumed equivalent of the Latin flagellum.
G5417.kjv: to whip, i.e. lash as a public punishment:--scourge.

G5418.kjv: a fence, or inclosing barrier (literally or figuratively):--hedge (+ round about), partition.

G5419.definition: probably akin to φράσσω through the idea of defining.
G5419.kjv: to indicate (by word or act), i.e. (specially), to expound:-- declare.

G5420.definition: apparently a strengthening form of the base of φρήν.
G5420.kjv: to fence or inclose, i.e. (specially), to block up (figuratively, to silence):--stop.

G5421.definition: of uncertain derivation; a hole in the ground (dug for obtaining or holding water or other purposes), i.e. a cistern or well.
G5421.kjv: figuratively, an abyss (as a prison):--well, pit.

G5422.kjv: to be a mind-misleader, i.e. delude:--deceive.

G5424.definition: probably from an obsolete  (to rein in or curb; compare φράσσω); the midrif (as a partition of the body), i.e. (figuratively and by implication, of sympathy) the feelings (or sensitive nature.
G5424.kjv: by extension (also in the plural) the mind or cognitive faculties):--understanding.

G5426.definition: from φρήν; to exercise the mind, i.e. entertain or have a sentiment or opinion; by implication, to be (mentally) disposed (more or less earnestly in a certain direction).
G5426.kjv: intensively, to interest oneself in (with concern or obedience):--set the affection on, (be) care(-ful), (be like-, + be of one, + be of the same, + let this) mind(-ed), regard, savour, think.

G5427.kjv: (mental) inclination or purpose:--(be, + be carnally, + be spiritually) mind(-ed).

G5428.kjv: mental action or activity, i.e. intellectual or moral insight:--prudence, wisdom.

G5429.definition: from φρήν; thoughtful, i.e. sagacious or discreet (implying a cautious character; while σοφός denotes practical skill or acumen; and συνετός indicates rather intelligence or mental acquirement).
G5429.kjv: in a bad sense conceited (also in the comparative):--wise(-r).

G5431.kjv: to exercise thought, i.e. be anxious:--be careful.

G5432.definition: from a compound of πρό and ὁράω; to be a watcher in advance, i.e. to mount guard as a sentinel (post spies at gates).
G5432.kjv: figuratively, to hem in, protect:--keep (with a garrison). Compare τηρέω.

G5433.kjv: to snort (as a spirited horse), i.e. (figuratively) to make a tumult:--rage.

G5434.definition: neuter of a presumed derivative of  (to roast or parch; akin to the base of φλόξ).
G5434.kjv: something desiccated, i.e. a dry twig:--stick.

G5435.kjv: Phrygia, a region of Asia Minor:--Phrygia.

G5438.definition: from φυλάσσω; a guarding or (concretely, guard), the act, the person.
G5438.kjv: figuratively, the place, the condition, or (specially), the time (as a division of day or night), literally or figuratively:--cage, hold, (im-)prison(-ment), ward, watch.

G5440.definition: neuter of a derivative of φυλάσσω.
G5440.kjv: a guard-case, i.e. "phylactery" for wearing slips of Scripture texts:-- phylactery.

G5442.definition: probably from φυλή through the idea of isolation; to watch, i.e. be on guard (literally of figuratively).
G5442.kjv: by implication, to preserve, obey, avoid:--beward, keep (self), observe, save. Compare τηρέω.

G5443.kjv: an offshoot, i.e. race or clan:--kindred, tribe.

G5445.definition: from a prolonged form of  (to mix a liquid with a solid; perhaps akin to φύω through the idea of swelling in bulk), mean to knead.

G5448.definition: from φύσις in the primary sense of blowing.
G5448.kjv: to inflate, i.e. (figuratively) make proud (haughty):--puff up.

G5449.definition: from φύω; growth (by germination or expansion), i.e. (by implication) natural production (lineal descent); by extension, a genus or sort.
G5449.kjv: figuratively, native disposition, constitution or usage:--(man-)kind, nature(-al).

G5451.kjv: trans-planting, i.e. (concretely) a shrub or vegetable:--plant.

G5452.definition: from a derivative of φύω; to set out in the earth, i.e. implant.

G5453.definition: a primary verb; probably originally, to "puff" or blow, i.e. to swell up.
G5453.kjv: but only used in the implied sense, to germinate or grow (sprout, produce), literally or figuratively:--spring (up).

G5455.definition: from φωνή; to emit a sound (animal, human or instrumental).
G5455.kjv: by implication, to address in words or by name, also in imitation:--call (for), crow, cry.

G5456.definition: probably akin to φαίνω through the idea of disclosure; a tone (articulate, bestial or artificial).
G5456.kjv: by implication, an address (for any purpose), saying or language:--noise, sound, voice.

G5457.definition: from an obsolete  (to shine or make manifest, especially by rays; compare φαίνω, φημί).
G5457.kjv: luminousness (in the widest application, natural or artificial, abstract or concrete, literal or figurative):--fire, light.

G5458.kjv: an illuminator, i.e. (concretely) a luminary, or (abstractly) brilliancy:--light.

G5460.kjv: lustrous, i.e. transparent or well-illuminated (figuratively):--bright, full of light.

G5461.kjv: to shed rays, i.e. to shine or (transitively) to brighten up (literally or figuratively):--enlighten, illuminate, (bring to, give) light, make to see.

G5463.definition: a primary verb; to be "cheer"ful, i.e. calmly happy or well-off.
G5463.kjv: impersonally, especially as salutation (on meeting or parting), be well:--farewell, be glad, God speed, greeting, hall, joy(- fully), rejoice.

G5465.kjv: to lower (as into a void):--let down, strike.

G5466.kjv: a Chaldæan (i.e. Kasdi), or native or the region of the lower Euphrates:--Chaldæan.

G5467.definition: perhaps from χαλάω through the idea of reducing the strength.
G5467.kjv: difficult, i.e. dangerous, or (by implication) furious:--fierce, perilous.

G5468.definition: from a compound of χαλινός and the reduplicated form of ἄγω.
G5468.kjv: to be a bit-leader, i.e. to curb (figuratively):--bridle.

G5469.kjv: a curb or head-stall (as curbing the spirit):--bit, bridle.

G5474.definition: neuter of a compound of χαλκός and λίβανος (in the implied mean of whiteness or brilliancy).
G5474.kjv: burnished copper, an alloy of copper (or gold) and silver having a brilliant lustre:--fine brass.

G5475.definition: perhaps from χαλάω through the idea of hollowing out as a vessel (this metal being chiefly used for that purpose).
G5475.kjv: copper (the substance, or some implement or coin made of it):--brass, money.

G5476.definition: adverb perhaps from the base of χάσμα through the idea of a fissure in the soil.

G5477.kjv: Chanaan (i.e. Kenaan), the early name of Palestine:--Chanaan.

G5478.kjv: a Chanaanæan (i.e. Kenaanite), or native of gentile Palestine:--of Canaan.

G5479.kjv: cheerfulness, i.e. calm delight:--gladness, X greatly, (X be exceeding) joy(-ful, -fully, -fulness, -ous).

G5480.kjv: a scratch or etching, i.e. stamp (as a badge of servitude), or scupltured figure (statue):--graven, mark.

G5481.kjv: a graver (the tool or the person), i.e. (by implication) engraving (("character"), the figure stamped, i.e. an exact copy or (figuratively) representation):--express image.

G5482.definition: from  (to sharpen to a point; akin to γράφω through the idea of scratching).
G5482.kjv: a stake, i.e. (by implication) a palisade or rampart (military mound for circumvallation in a siege):--trench.

G5483.kjv: to grant as a favor, i.e. gratuitously, in kindness, pardon or rescue:--deliver, (frankly) forgive, (freely) give, grant.

G5484.definition: accusative case of χάρις as preposition.
G5484.kjv: through favor of, i.e. on account of:--be-(for) cause of, for sake of, +…fore, X reproachfully.

G5485.definition: from χαίρω; graciousness (as gratifying), of manner or act (abstract or concrete; literal, figurative or spiritual; especially the divine influence upon the heart, and its reflection in the life.
G5485.kjv: including gratitude):--acceptable, benefit, favour, gift, grace(- ious), joy, liberality, pleasure, thank(-s, -worthy).

G5486.definition: from χαρίζομαι; a (divine) gratuity, i.e. deliverance (from danger or passion).
G5486.kjv: (specially), a (spiritual) endowment, i.e. (subjectively) religious qualification, or (objectively) miraculous faculty:--(free) gift.

G5487.kjv: to grace, i.e. indue with special honor:--make accepted, be highly favoured.

G5488.kjv: Charrhan (i.e. Charan), a place in Mesopotamia:--Charran.

G5489.kjv: a sheet ("chart") of writing-material (as to be scribbled over):--paper.

G5490.definition: from a form of an obsolete primary  (to "gape" or "yawn").

G5491.definition: from a form of the same as χάσμα; a lip (as a pouring place).

G5492.kjv: to storm, i.e. (passively) to labor under a gale:--be tossed with tempest.

G5493.definition: from the base of χειμών and ῥέω.

G5494.definition: from a derivative of  (to pour; akin to the base of 5490 through the idea of a channel), meaning a storm (as pouring rain).
G5494.kjv: by implication, the rainy season, i.e. winter:--tempest, foul weather, winter.

G5495.definition: perhaps from the base of χειμών in the sense of its congener the base of χάσμα (through the idea of hollowness for grasping); the hand (literally or figuratively (power).
G5495.kjv: especially (by Hebraism) a means or instrument):--hand.

G5496.kjv: to be a hand-leader, i.e. to guide (a blind person):--lead by the hand.

G5497.definition: from χείρ and a reduplicated form of ἄγω.
G5497.kjv: a hand-leader, i.e. personal conductor (of a blind person):--some to lead by the hand.

G5498.definition: neuter of a compound of χείρ and γράφω.
G5498.kjv: something hand-written ("chirograph"), i.e. a manuscript (specially, a legal document or bond (figuratively)):--handwriting.

G5499.definition: from χείρ and a derivative of ποιέω.
G5499.kjv: manufactured, i.e. of human construction:--made by (make with) hands.

G5500.definition: from a comparative of χείρ and  (to stretch).
G5500.kjv: to be a hand-reacher or voter (by raising the hand), i.e. (generally) to select or appoint:--choose, ordain.

G5501.definition: irregular comparative of κακός; from an obsolete equivalent  (of uncertain derivation).
G5501.kjv: more evil or aggravated (physically, mentally or morally):--sorer, worse.

G5503.definition: feminine of a presumed derivative apparently from the base of χάσμα through the idea of deficiency.
G5503.kjv: a widow (as lacking a husband), literally or figuratively:--widow.

G5504.kjv: by extension, in time past or hitherto:--yesterday.

G5506.definition: from χίλιοι and ἄρχω; the commander of a thousand soldiers ("chiliarch".

G5508.kjv: Chios, an island in the Mediterranean:--Chios.

G5509.kjv: a tunic or shirt:--clothes, coat, garment.

G5510.definition: perhaps akin to the base of χάσμα (χαλάω) or χειμών (as descending or empty).

G5512.definition: from a derivative probably of χεῖλος.
G5512.kjv: to throw out the lip, i.e. jeer at:--mock.

G5514.definition: feminine of apparently a primary word; "green".

G5516.definition: the 22nd, 14th and an obsolete letter (στίγμα as a cross) of the Greek alphabet (intermediate between the 5th and 6th), used as numbers; denoting respectively 600, 60 and 6.
G5516.kjv: 666 as a numeral:--six hundred threescore and six.

G5517.kjv: dusty or dirty (soil-like), i.e. (by implication) terrene:--earthy.

G5518.kjv: a chœnix or certain dry measure:--measure.

G5520.kjv: to be bilious, i.e. (by implication) irritable (enraged, "choleric"):--be angry.

G5521.definition: feminine of an equivalent perhaps akin to the same as 5514 (from the greenish hue).
G5521.kjv: "gall" or bile, i.e. (by analogy) poison or an anodyne (wormwood, poppy, etc.):--gall.

G5522.definition: from the base of χειμών; a heap (as poured out), i.e. rubbish.

G5524.definition: from a compound of χορός and ἄγω.
G5524.kjv: to be a dance-leader, i.e. (generally) to furnish:--give, minister.

G5526.kjv: to fodder, i.e. (generally) to gorge (supply food in abundance):--feed, fill, satisfy.

G5528.kjv: a "court" or "garden", i.e. (by implication, of pasture) herbage or vegetation:--blade, grass, hay.

G5530.definition: middle voice of a primary verb (perhaps rather from χείρ, to handle); to furnish what is needed; (give an oracle, "graze" (touch slightly), light upon, etc.), i.e. (by implication) to employ or (by extension) to act towards one in a given manner:--entreat, use. Compare χράω.

G5531.definition: probably the same as the base of χράομαι.

G5532.definition: from the base of χράομαι or χρή; employment, i.e. an affair.
G5532.kjv: also (by implication) occasion, demand, requirement or destitution:--business, lack, necessary(-ity), need(-ful), use, want.

G5533.definition: from a derivative of χράω and ὀφειλέτης.

G5534.definition: third person singular of the same as χράομαι or χράω used impersonally.

G5535.kjv: to make (i.e. have) necessity, i.e. be in want of:--(have) need.

G5537.definition: from χρῆμα; to utter an oracle (compare the original sense of χράομαι), i.e. divinely intimate.
G5537.kjv: by implication, (compare the secular sense of χρεία) to constitute a firm for business, i.e. (generally) bear as a title:--be called, be admonished (warned) of God, reveal, speak.

G5538.kjv: a divine response or revelation:--answer of God.

G5540.kjv: employment, i.e. (specially), sexual intercourse (as an occupation of the body):--use.

G5541.kjv: to show oneself useful, i.e. act benevolently:--be kind.

G5542.definition: from a compound of χρηστός and λέγω.

G5543.kjv: employed, i.e. (by implication) useful (in manner or morals):--better, easy, good(-ness), gracious, kind.

G5544.kjv: usefulness, i.e. morally, excellence (in character or demeanor):--gentleness, good(-ness), kindness.

G5545.kjv: an unguent or smearing, i.e. (figuratively) the special endowment ("chrism") of the Holy Spirit:--anointing, unction.

G5546.kjv: a Christian, i.e. follower of Christ:--Christian.

G5547.kjv: anointed, i.e. the Messiah, an epithet of Jesus:--Christ.

G5548.definition: probably akin to χράομαι through the idea of contact.
G5548.kjv: to smear or rub with oil, i.e. (by implication) to consecrate to an office or religious service:--anoint.

G5549.kjv: to take time, i.e. linger:--delay, tarry.

G5550.definition: of uncertain derivation; a space of time (in general, and thus properly distinguished from καιρός, which designates a fixed or special occasion; and from αἰών, which denotes a particular period) or interval; by extension, an individual opportunity.
G5550.kjv: by implication, delay:--+ years old, season, space, (X often-)time(-s), (a) while.

G5551.definition: from a presumed compound of χρόνος and the base of τρίβος.
G5551.kjv: to be a time-wearer, i.e. to procrastinate (linger):--spend time.

G5553.kjv: a golden article, i.e. gold plating, ornament, or coin:--gold.

G5554.kjv: gold-ringed, i.e. wearing a golden finger-ring or similar jewelry:--with a gold ring.

G5557.definition: perhaps from the base of χράομαι (through the idea of the utility of the metal); gold.
G5557.kjv: by extension, a golden article, as an ornament or coin:--gold.

G5558.kjv: to gild, i.e. bespangle with golden ornaments:--deck.

G5559.definition: probably akin to the base of χράομαι through the idea of handling.
G5559.kjv: the body (properly, its surface or skin):--body.

G5561.definition: feminine of a derivative of the base of χάσμα through the idea of empty expanse; room, i.e. a space of territory (more or less extensive.
G5561.kjv: often including its inhabitants):--coast, county, fields, ground, land, region. Compare τόπος.

G5562.kjv: to be in (give) space, i.e. (intransitively) to pass, enter, or (transitively) to hold, admit (literally or figuratively):--come, contain, go, have place, (can, be room to) receive.

G5563.definition: from χώρα; to place room between, i.e. part.
G5563.kjv: reflexively, to go away:--depart, put asunder, separate.

G5564.kjv: a spot or plot of ground:--field, land, parcel of ground, place, possession.

G5565.kjv: at a space, i.e. separately or apart from (often as preposition):--beside, by itself, without.

G5567.definition: probably strengthened from  (to rub or touch the surface; compare ψώχω).
G5567.kjv: to twitch or twang, i.e. to play on a stringed instrument (celebrate the divine worship with music and accompanying odes):--make melody, sing (psalms).

G5568.definition: from ψάλλω; a set piece of music, i.e. a sacred ode (accompanied with the voice, harp or other instrument; a "psalm").
G5568.kjv: collectively, the book of the Psalms:--psalm. Compare ᾠδή.

G5569.kjv: a spurious brother, i.e. pretended associate:--false brethren.

G5570.kjv: a spurious apostle, i.e. pretended pracher:--false teacher.

G5571.kjv: untrue, i.e. erroneous, deceitful, wicked:--false, liar.

G5572.kjv: a spurious teacher, i.e. propagator of erroneous Christian doctrine:--false teacher.

G5573.kjv: mendacious, i.e. promulgating erroneous Christian doctrine:--speaking lies.

G5574.definition: middle voice of an apparently primary verb.
G5574.kjv: to utter an untruth or attempt to deceive by falsehood:--falsely, lie.

G5575.definition: from ψευδής and a kindred form of μάρτυς.
G5575.kjv: a spurious witness, i.e. bearer of untrue testimony:--false witness.

G5576.kjv: to be an untrue testifier, i.e. offer falsehood in evidence:--be a false witness.

G5578.kjv: a spurious prophet, i.e. pretended foreteller or religious impostor:--false prophet.

G5584.definition: from the base of ψάλλω (compare ψῆφος); to manipulate, i.e. verify by contact.
G5584.kjv: figuratively, to search for:--feel after, handle, touch.

G5585.kjv: to use pebbles in enumeration, i.e. (generally) to compute:--count.

G5586.definition: from the same as ψηλαφάω; a pebble (as worn smooth by handling), i.e. (by implication, of use as a counter or ballot) a verdict (of acquittal) or ticket (of admission).

G5587.definition: from a derivative of  (a whisper; by implication, a slander; probably akin to ψεύδομαι).

G5589.definition: diminutive from a derivative of the base of ψάλλω (meaning a crumb).

G5590.definition: from ψύχω; breath, i.e. (by implication) spirit, abstractly or concretely (the animal sentient principle only; thus distinguished on the one hand from πνεῦμα, which is the rational and immortal soul.
G5590.kjv: and on the other from ζωή, which is mere vitality, even of plants: these terms thus exactly correspond respectively to the Hebrew נֶפֶשׁ, רוּחַ and חַי):--heart (+ -ily), life, mind, soul, + us, + you.

G5591.definition: from ψυχή; sensitive, i.e. animate (in distinction on the one hand from πνευματικός, which is the higher or renovated nature.
G5591.kjv: and on the other from φυσικός, which is the lower or bestial nature):--natural, sensual.

G5594.definition: a primary verb; to breathe (voluntarily but gently, thus differing on the one hand from πνέω, which denotes properly a forcible respiration.
G5594.kjv: and on the other from the base of ἀήρ, which refers properly to an inanimate breeze), i.e. (by implication, of reduction of temperature by  evaporation) to chill (figuratively):--wax cold.

G5595.kjv: to supply with bits, i.e. (generally) to nourish:--(bestow to) feed.

G5596.definition: diminutive from a derivative of the base of ψώχω.
G5596.kjv: a crumb or morsel (as if rubbed off), i.e. a mouthful:--sop.

G5597.definition: prolongation from the same base as ψάλλω.
G5597.kjv: to triturate, i.e. (by analogy) to rub out (kernels from husks with the fingers or hand):--rub.

G5599.definition: a primary interjection; as a sign of the vocative case, O.
G5599.kjv: as a note of exclamation, oh:--O.

G5600.definition: the subjunctive of εἰμί; (may, might, can, could, would, should, must, etc..
G5600.kjv: also with εἰ and its comparative, as well as with other particles) be:--+ appear, are, (may, might,  should) be, X have, is, + pass the flower of her age, should stand, were.

G5602.definition: from an adverb form of ὅδε.
G5602.kjv: in this same spot, i.e. here or hither:--here, hither, (in) this place, there.

G5603.definition: from ᾄδω; a chant or "ode" (the general term for any words sung.
G5603.kjv: while ὕμνος denotes especially a religious metrical composition, and ψαλμός still more specially, a Hebrew cantillation):--song.

G5604.kjv: a pang or throe, especially of childbirth:--pain, sorrow, travail.

G5605.kjv: to experience the pains of parturition (literally or figuratively):--travail in (birth).

G5606.definition: perhaps from the alternate of φέρω.
G5606.kjv: the shoulder (as that on which burdens are borne):--shoulder.

G5608.definition: middle voice from an apparently primary  (a sum or price).
G5608.kjv: to purchase (synonymous with the earlier πίμπρημι):-- buy.

G5610.kjv: an "hour" (literally or figuratively):--day, hour, instant, season, X short, (even-)tide, (high) time.

G5611.kjv: belonging to the right hour or season (timely), i.e. (by implication) flourishing (beauteous (figuratively)):--beautiful.

G5612.definition: middle voice of an apparently primary verb.

G5613.definition: probably adverb of comparative from ὅς.
G5613.kjv: which how, i.e. in that manner (very variously used, as follows):--about, after (that), (according) as (it had been, it were), as soon (as), even as (like), for, how (greatly), like (as, unto), since, so (that), that, to wit, unto, when(-soever), while, X with all speed.

G5614.definition: of Hebrew origin (יָשַׁע and נָא); oh save!.
G5614.kjv: hosanna (i.e. hoshia-na), an exclamation of adoration:--hosanna.

G5615.definition: from ὡς and an adverb from αὐτός.
G5615.kjv: as thus, i.e. in the same way:--even so, likewise, after the same (in like) manner.

G5616.kjv: as if:--about, as (it had been, it were), like (as).

G5618.kjv: just as, i.e. exactly like:--(even, like) as.

G5619.kjv: just as if, i.e. as it were:--as.

G5620.kjv: so too, i.e. thus therefore (in various relations of consecution, as follow):--(insomuch) as, so that (then), (insomuch) that, therefore, to, wherefore.

G5621.kjv: an earlet, i.e. one of the ears, or perhaps the lobe of the ear:--ear.

G5622.definition: from a derivative of the base of ὠφέλιμος.

G5623.kjv: to be useful, i.e. to benefit:--advantage, better, prevail, profit.
